Name: Disney Live Entertainment
Description:
The collective gasp brought on by a burst of fireworks over a fairytale castle. The chills felt as Simba's story comes to life on stage. The moments of delight in a personal connection between a child and a beloved Disney character. All this and more are made possible by the world-class team of professionals at Disney Live Entertainment. 
 
Through innovative storytelling and a culture of collaboration, Disney Live Entertainment creates, produces, and delivers remarkable and engaging entertainment experiences. From the intimate to the spectacular, our work can be seen at Disney theme parks, resort hotels, cruise ships and other locations the world over. This diverse team – representing a wide variety of disciplines and talents from technical directors, writers and lighting designers to choreographers, cosmetologists, and music producers – brings magical worlds to life through technical expertise, performance excellence, incomparable ingenuity, unparalleled spectacle… and a dash of pixie dust.

Name: Michael Cassel Group
Description:
Michael Cassel Group is an award-winning theatrical powerhouse, producing acclaimed performances and live entertainment for audiences around the world.

The entrepreneurial company has enjoyed a “meteoric rise” (Australian Financial Review), credited as “a major force in Australian theatre” (Variety), “the new hit-maker in Australian theatre” (Sydney Morning Herald) and described as “a visionary” and “a producer with global cred changing the face of the stage” (The Weekend Australian). 
Michael Cassel Group is an award-winning theatrical powerhouse, producing acclaimed performances and live entertainment for audiences around the world. 

The entrepreneurial company has enjoyed a “meteoric rise” (Australian Financial Review), credited as “a major force in Australian theatre” (Variety), “the new hit-maker in Australian theatre” (Sydney Morning Herald) and described as “a visionary” and “a producer with global cred changing the face of the stage” (The Weekend Australian).

Name: Donmar Warehouse
Description:
The Donmar is an intimate 251-seat, subsidised theatre in Covent Garden; right at the heart of London’s West End. It is internationally renowned as one of the world’s principal producing theatres, having won over 100 major awards during its 24-year history.

The Donmar Warehouse is a registered charity number 284262.

Name: Cinemacity UAE
Description:
Providing world class luxury cinema theaters with an unmatched movie-going experience for people of all walks of life who share one thing – 
a love for the movies & art.

Name: Dramatics Club - ISAB
Description:
The Dramatics Club is all about theatre lovers and dramatic enthusiasts.
Theatre-packed events like Nukkad, stage and street plays, comedy skits, and much more could be done at ISAB.
It will entertain us by liberating the joyous flavor of drama as well as extracting the socialistic issues of society that need our keen attention. Writing scripts to direct and play a role will help students develop in a wide range of areas, such as self-confidence, self-esteem, communication, collaboration, interpersonal skills, aesthetic awareness, and last but not least, imagination

Name: Staatstheater Hannover - Staatsoper und Schauspiel Hannover
Description:
Die Niedersächsischen Staatstheater Hannover GmbH ist eines der größten Mehrsparten-Theater Deutschlands. Die beiden Häuser, Staatsoper Hannover und Schauspiel Hannover, die neben Musiktheater und Schauspiel unter anderem auch Tanz und Konzert präsentieren, erreichen mit rund 1.200 Veranstaltungen pro Jahr etwa 370.000 Besucher:innen. Die Niedersächsische Staatstheater Hannover GmbH beschäftigt ca. 950 Mitarbeiter:innen.

Seit der Spielzeit 2019/20 liegt die künstlerische Leitung der Staatsoper Hannover in den Händen von Laura Berman, die des Schauspiels in den Händen von Sonja Anders. Diversität und Internationalität bestimmen den Spielplan und die Ensembles. Wir suchen den offenen Dialog mit der Stadtgesellschaft und die Kommunikation mit der europäischen Theaterszene.

Name: entertainers
Description:
Entertainers is one of the leading theatre producers and promoters in the UK. 

The creators and home to shows such as - The Magic of Motown, Fastlove, Lost in Music, Cirque the Greatest show, The Makings of a Murderer and many more.  

Producing 1600 plus shows a year, we are the family business of show business!

www.entertainers.co.uk

Name: No Guarantees Productions
Description:
Artist Driven Theatrical Productions

Now Playing on Broadway: HADESTOWN, HELL'S KITCHEN, BUENA VISTA SOCIAL CLUB, JUST IN TIME, CHESS, OEDIPUS and ALL OUT. Coming soon, Pony Cam's BURNOUT PARADISE @ Astor Place Theatre (off-Broadway) and SCHMIGADOON! @ The Nederlander Theatre.

Name: L'Oiseau-Mouche
Description:
Fondée en 1978, l’Oiseau-Mouche est un projet atypique qui regroupe vingt interprètes professionnels permanents, en situation de handicap mental et psychique. 
Ayant fait le choix de ne pas avoir de directeur·ice artistique attitré·e, la compagnie se réinvente continuellement et place la création et ses comédien·ne·s au cœur de son fonctionnement. 

Chacune de ses créations reflète l’originalité et la complicité d’une rencontre entre un·e artiste et la compagnie. Ce mode de travail permet une diversité de formes artistiques (théâtre, danse, marionnette, approches pluridisciplinaires etc.) et de formats (pièce, performance, projet déambulatoire, création in situ etc.). 
  
Son répertoire est foisonnant et s’inscrit dans le champ des écritures contemporaines plurielles. Les dernières créations et collaborations ont été signées, entre autres, par Cédric Orain, Sylvain Maurice, Latifa Laâbissi, Christian Rizzo, Michel Schweizer, Boris Charmatz, Bérangère Vantusso et Noëmie Ksicova. 
À ce jour, 56 pièces ont été créées pour plus de 2 000 représentations en France et à l’étranger.

L’Oiseau-Mouche possède également un théâtre avec deux salles, accueillant une trentaine d’équipes artistiques en représentation, en résidence ou en pratique partagée avec les interprètes permanent·e·s de la compagnie. Ces temps d’échanges qui croisent des univers artistiques hétéroclites sont indissociables des activités de création. Ils peuvent aussi avoir lieu hors-les-murs, en France ou à l’étranger. 

L'Oiseau-Mouche c'est également deux restaurants, le colibri et l'alimentation au sein de la Condition Publique.

Name: Malinche, The Musical
Description:
MALINCHE es el proyecto musical de Nacho Cano, que se estrenó en Madrid el 15 de septiembre de 2022.

Narra uno de los hechos históricos más significativos de la historia: el nacimiento del mestizaje. Malinche es la celebración de la vida de una extraordinaria y mal conocida mujer que navegó entre dos mundos aparentemente contrapuestos y medió entre dos culturas al borde de un inevitable conflicto.

MALINCHE es un ambicioso proyecto meticulosamente elaborado a lo largo de más de una década junto a los más destacados colaboradores del ámbito artístico, que ha resultado en una verdadera renovación del género. Una experiencia total que rompe los moldes del espectáculo tradicional y renueva sus patrones.

Malinche es además un espacio versátil y adaptable para cualquier tipo de evento empresarial, MICE, grupos corporativos, incentivos, cena de empresa...

Name: Badisches Staatstheater Karlsruhe
Description:
The Staatstheater Karlsruhe is one of the largest multi-disciplinary theatres in Germany. With our opera, ballet, concert, theatre and young state theatre (Junges Staatstheater) divisions, we reach over 250,000 visitors with around 750 permanent employees from over 45 countries of origin in over 900 events per season and offer a creative and international working environment.

As a member of several european opera and theatre organisations, the Staatstheater is internationally networked. It is a central concern of ours to open our work sustainably to all age groups, social classes and, above all, interculturally - in terms of programme, audience and staff.

Name: Day-for-night/cie Anne Monfort
Description: theatre company

Name: Theater Kikker
Description:
Theater Kikker is een eigenzinnig theater in Utrecht, gespecialiseerd in toneel en performance, moderne dans en jeugdtheater. Ons programma is divers, inclusief, uitdagend en rafelig. We bieden een podium aan Utrechtse makers en groepen en stimuleren (jong) opkomend talent. 

Jaarlijks presenteert Theater Kikker circa 120 titels (ongeveer 300 voorstellingen) in de eigen programmering. Daarnaast bevat ons programma ieder seizoen zo'n 100 activiteiten van festivals of externe huurders. 

Naast de reguliere programmering zijn er namelijk verschillende ruimtes voor verhuur beschikbaar. Deze zijn flexibel inzetbaar en voorzien van uitstekende technische faciliteiten. Of het nu gaat om een workshop, voorstelling, borrel, lezing of presentatie, Theater Kikker is de informele en sfeervolle locatie om uw kwalitatief hoogstaande activiteit te organiseren.

Name: PANDORA PRODUCTIONS
Description: Pandora Productions produit et diffuse des spectacles d'humour inspirants, écrits et interprétés par Laurent Boghossian, pour l'entreprise ou le grand public.

Name: Loods13  Creatieve broedplaats in Noord Nederland
Description:
Kritisch, prikkelend en verbindend. 
Loods13 maakt voorstellingen over actuele maatschappelijke thema’s: soms samen met deelnemers uit de samenleving en professionele makers, soms met acteurs en een artistiek team.

Zo maakten we  in Noord-Nederland met 7 theatermakers met 22 Syrische statushouders  in 3 maanden de voorstelling Thuis in Hoogeveen op locatie. In december 2019 werkten we met 9 alleenstaande moeders aan Moederliefde en in 2023 met 13 eenzame jongvolwassenen in het project Kanariepietjes praten niet terug.

Loods13 werkt met diverse bevlogen theatermakers. In projecten worden verschillende kwaliteiten aangesproken van zowel makers als spelers.

Name: New York Theater Festival
Description:
Thespis Theater Festival / Competition is organized to help bring never-before seen work of playwrights, directors and actors to the stage in a way that may lead to future performances. The Festival presents an opportunity to stage first-run plays for audiences with the chance to win prizes for Best Play and Best Actor. The Festival will be presented in the Cabrini Repertory Theater in Manhattan.

For those playwrights who want to incorporate live music into their play, Cabrini Rep offers a fully-tuned baby grand piano. We also offer a choice of stage furniture and props to all productions, as well as a large projection wall at the back of the stage and a quality projector that will create a wide range of possibilities for your set. In this way, productions need not be as concerned about moving their props in and out of the theater before and after each performance.

Name: WaardenLaders
Description:
WaardenLaders maakt de zorg & welzijn sector beter met rake, op maat gemaakte theatershows en content. 
We raken medewerkers met herkenbare, rake, rauwe verhalen door middel van toneel, cabaret, inspiratie, interactie en muziek. Zo maken wij een blijvende impact op de cultuur van zorgorganisaties, zodat we samen in beweging en ontwikkeling komen.

Met onze verschillende verhalenmakers, -dragers en theaterproducties dragen we bij aan de doelstelling van 1 miljoen gelukkige medewerkers in de zorg. En zo ook aan het behoud van medewerkers in de zorg.

Name: Loods13 Ruimte voor Theater
Description:
Kritisch, prikkelend en verbindend. Loods13 maakt voorstellingen in Noord Nederland vanuit actueel maatschappelijke thema’s. Met onze community projecten bouwen we aan theater voor sociale verbindingen.  De theaterschool daagt uit met onverwachte, schurende, scherpe lessen die bouwen aan de ontwikkeling van eigenzinnige individuen.

Loods13 biedt mensen vanaf 8 jaar theaterlessen op niveau. Spelers werken in verschillende leeftijds- en niveaugroepen en zitten in een vaste jaargroep. Iedereen wordt op eigen niveau getraind en werkt uiteindelijk naar een voorstelling toe die gespeeld wordt op eigenzinnige locaties.

Naast de lessen en producties op haar theaterschool heeft Loods13 zich in Noord-Nederland gespecialiseerd in community-theater (theaterwerkplaatsen), het werken met specifieke doelgroepen op bijzondere locaties. Zo werkten zeven theatermakers met 22 Syrische statushouders om in 3 maanden de voorstelling Thuis in Hoogeveen op locatie te maken. In december 2019 werkte Loods13 met acht alleenstaande moeders aan Moederliefde. 

Loods13 werkt met diverse bevlogen theatermakers. In projecten worden verschillende kwaliteiten aangesproken van zowel makers als spelers. Lessen worden hierdoor uniek, uitdagend, inspirerend en leerzaam.

Name: Innovation:Lab
Description: Where makers and experts from all over the country and beyond work together at a high level at the intersection of technology and performance arts. An open space where young and established makers meet, inspire and motivate each other to tell the stories in a way that is deepened, enhanced and broadened through innovative application of technology. Where audiences immerse themselves in a world where technology and storytelling come together in ways that are totally new and undiscovered. Where new audiences are reached in ways long thought impossible.

Name: Birds of Paradise Theatre Company
Description:
BOP is a small-scale organisation that has an immense impact.  BOP makes theatre that is about disabled people, by disabled people and for everyone. We are a pioneer of Creatively Embedded Access

BOP creates theatre that entertains, inspires, shocks, represents and connects, offers development opportunities for disabled artists that empowers, enables progression and generates role-models and instigates strategic activity that leaves everyone we work with more aware, fired up and ready to realise the disability equality justice that we have ignited.

Name: Version AVI
Description:
Welcome to Version AVI, where we bring your events to life.
Our Mission
As a premier company specializing in renting top-notch audio-visual devices, we are dedicated to making your gatherings unforgettable. We provide seamless experiences that captivate and engage your audience.

Our Story
We are Version Company, a leader in the market with 13 years of experience. Founded with a passion for innovation and excellence, Version AVI has grown into a trusted name in the events industry. Whether it's a grand celebration or a professional conference, our state-of-the-art equipment and expert team ensure your event is a resounding success.

Name: Stage & Tiers
Description:
Simply put, Stages and Tiers is what we do.

Stages - Nobody has built stages for a wider range of customers than we have. From theatres to schools, embassies to the British Army, board rooms to the Olympic Games. 

We listen to you. Then we produce a package that’s tailored to your needs.

Tiers - Our modular staging systems make great tiers. Their versatility allows you to change performance spaces from day to day.

But we also build fixed seating tiers for cinemas, lecture theatres, schools and more.

Close cooperation with the seating manufacturer ensures the best outcome.

Bespoke
We started out as theatrical scenery-makers so bespoke design is in our blood.

We have a wide range of skills and the ability to integrate with other specialists when required.

If you’re wondering if something can be done, why not ask us?

Name: Spelmag'Rzijn
Description:
Spelmag'Rzijn is een sociaal maatschappelijke onderneming en maakt voorstellingen met als inspiratie de levensverhalen van deelnemers. Deelnemers ervaren allen op de een of andere manier fragiliteit m.b.t. gevoelens van eenzaamheid, al dan niet zelf zo geformuleerd. Door Spelmag'Rzijn wordt
netwerk uitgebreid en verdiept, creatief vermogen opgebouwd. Regelmatig leidt dit tot verrassende nieuwe inzichten op het levensverhaal.

Name: Compagnie Coralena
Description:
La Compagnie Coralena crée des spectacles interactifs et participatifs avec une sensibilité au développement durable , eco-responsable.
Nous sommes amoureuses des mots et des notes.
Le désir de mêler théâtre, musique, danse, marionnettes, peintures, interactivités, participations, bref, tous les arts,    
les styles, et le plaisir jouissif de la scène,
cimentent notre trio atypique. 
Nous aimons questionner l’être, la société, l’univers, avec humour, dérision et poésie.
La compagnie est composée de Coralie Desbrousses, Elena Verri et Carole-lyne Klay .
Le nom de l'association est un mixte des prénoms des créatrices Cora(lie) et (e)lena.

Name: Mens2producties
Description: We zijn gedreven mensen die psychologische kennis op theatrale wijze voor een breed publiek voor het voetlicht brengen. Vanuit onze dagelijkse ervaring met therapie, coaching en managementtrainingen bleek bij onze klanten de honger naar de nieuwste psychologische ontwikkelingen groot. Op een zeer toegankelijke manier, met veel humor en verbeelding, worden de laatste wetenschappelijke inzichten over de psychologie van de mens en zijn relaties uitvergroot. Preventie in optima forma; ‘want voorkomen is beter dan genezen!’

Name: رتيب لتنظيم المعارض والمؤتمرات
Description: رتيب شركة تبني من الموقع حدث بفكر استراتيجي في تنظيم المعارض والمؤتمرات والفعاليات #رتيب_بكل_ترتيب

Name: En Répliques
Description:
En Répliques est une association de théâtre et d'improvisation déclarée au Barreau de Paris. 

Elle accueille les avocats, élèves-avocats et anciens avocats des barreaux de Paris et d'Île-de-France.

L'association propose à ses membres de nombreux ateliers, sorties et rencontres dans le cadre de ses partenariats avec différents théâtres parisiens.

Elle offre à tous ses membres la possibilité de rejoindre une ou plusieurs troupes, en fonction de leurs disponibilités, pour jouer ou mettre en scène des pièces de qualité dans des théâtres parisiens.

Elle propose également des ateliers et matches d'improvisation ouverts à tous, sans sélection.

L'association a été créée en 2022 par de jeunes avocates et avocats forts de leurs expériences théâtrales, et accepte les nouvelles adhésions tout au long de l'année !

Laissez nous vos coordonnées afin d’être recontacté pour les prochaines auditions et actualités de l’association : 
enrepliques@gmail.com

Name: Scalateatern Karlstad
Description: Scalateatern är en central del av Karlstads kultur- och nöjesliv. Här hittar du allt från teater, konserter och stand-up till möten och event. Här säljs biljetter till Scalateaterns eget utbud och mängder av andra evenemang i Karlstad, Värmland och resten av Sverige. Scalateatern har fungerat som teaterscen sedan 1992 och ägs av föreningarna Värmlandsteatern och Cabary.

Name: Mana Chuma Teatro
Description:
Mana Chuma Teatro, compagnia calabro-sicula di teatro contemporaneo, diretta da Massimo Barilla e Salvatore Arena. Impegnata nell’ambito della nuova drammaturgia, del teatro civile e nel raccontare la storia contemporanea del Sud Italia, la compagnia è vincitrice del Premio della Critica 2019 ANCT. Riconosciuta e finanziata dal MIC nell’ambito del Fus (Impresa di produzione teatro di ricerca e innovazione) e dalla Regione Calabria ai sensi della legge 19/2017 come impresa di produzione teatrale.
Mana Chuma è un collettivo di artisti con competenze multidisciplinari (teatro, musica, sound design, video, poesia, cinema, danza, tecnologie interattive). 
In un confronto con l’identità culturale e storica del territorio meridionale e del mediterraneo, ha sviluppato una propria ricerca poetica e artistica con un proprio approccio alla drammaturgia legato alla contaminazione tra linguaggi differenti, e curando in particolar modo la ricerca sullo spazio e la sperimentazione di luoghi “altri” per il teatro.
Mana Chuma realizza le proprie produzioni artistiche a partire da progetti di ricerca in collaborazione con organizzazioni artistiche, culturali, educative e della società civile.
Mana Chuma è anche un’organizzazione culturale impegnata in processi di innovazione sociale e culturale, che costruisce un lavoro di comunità dal basso attraverso iniziative di rete, cittadinanza attiva, scambi culturali valorizzando la resilienza e le risorse del territorio.

Name: Black Sheep Can Fly
Description: Black Sheep Can Fly produceert theater, film, muziek en educatieve projecten. Met een grote diversiteit aan projecten kaarten we urgente en maatschappelijke onderwerpen aan die relevant zijn voor onze samenleving.

Name: Delta Produkció
Description:
Kik vagyunk?

A Delta Produkció családi vállalkozás, amely elsősorban színházi produkciós irodaként működik, a mennyiség helyett a színvonalas és igényes minőségű alkotásokra és prémium előadókra helyezi a hangsúlyt. 
Ennek végeredménye a garantáltan értékes, mégis a széles közönségréteg szemében is sikeres kulturális tartalom, amely előadásaival már 2010 óta bizonyít telt házak előtt.
Előadásaink utóélete ugyanannyira fontos, mint azok létrehozása és bemutatása. 
A számunkra értékes mondanivalók együtt lélegeznek az idő múlásával, folyamatosan alkalmazkodnak a változó piaci igényekhez.

Mit csinálunk most?

Repertoárunkon szereplő előadásainkat és a hozzá kapcsolódó programokat gondozzuk és 17 év szakmai tapasztalattal most új utakra evezünk és együttműködéseinket a színház falain kívülre is kiterjesztjük: a forprofit és nonprofit szféra egyéb szereplőire is. 

Kiemelt célkitűzésünk a vállalati és kulturális szféra innovatív összekapcsolása. 
Céges partnereinkkel együttműködve a hagyományos formátumokon túl olyan projekteket hozunk létre, amelyek az újdonság erejével hatékonyan támogatják a cégek eredményességét és értékeit: az emberi és kommunikációs kapcsolatok erősítését cégen belül és kívül, a meglévő és potenciális partnerekkel; valamint PR és CSR területen is. Mindez pedig a cég célkitűzésének megfelelően, releváns tartalmakkal történik.

Mire vagyunk képesek?

Kiterjedt kapcsolatrendszerrel rendelkező, élvonalbeli és prémium alkotókkal együttműködve, minőségi kulturális tartalom biztosítását nyújtjuk - a potenciális partner elképzelésének megfelelően. Teljeskörű menedzsmenti és kommunikációs, ill. lebonyolítással biztosítjuk egy termék, kampány, etc. sikerre válását a piacon, mely együttműködés jelentőségét releváns sajtómegjelenésekkel tudjuk biztosítani, amely kommunikációs tevékenység a nagy médiazajban is képes ezt az igen értékes együttműködést az őt megillető helyre kiemelni.

Name: Immediate Theatre
Description:
Immediate Theatre has worked with young people and communities in Hackney for over 25 years. We believe in the transformative power of the arts to all our lives and the importance of giving people a voice. Our purpose is to involve communities in creative projects that inspire wellbeing, break down barriers and engage people in the process of personal and social change. 

We work in partnership to develop work that supports our values of being:
Inclusive - working at the grassroots and celebrating diversity.
Interactive - involving communities throughout the creative process.
Imaginative - finding new ways to engage with vital issues 

Our Objectives: 
- To provide inspiring participatory arts programmes, enabling people to reach their potential and preventing exclusion and social isolation 
- To creatively explore social issues, engaging people in the process of change and encouraging and enabling them to influence decision making 
- To improve health and wellbeing and increasing life skills and employability through engagement in the arts  

Immediate Theatre is committed to promoting equality, valuing diversity and fostering inclusivity in all areas of our work. We strive to be representative of the community in which we operate across all areas of the company, including Trustees and senior management, staff, freelance artists and facilitators, participants, partners and the wider network of associates.

Name: Hayes Theatre Co
Description: Hayes Theatre Co has established a reputation for showcasing thrilling, innovative, and ambitious musicals and cabaret. Hayes is a place where new Australian writing rubs shoulders with bold new productions of classic and contemporary international shows; where you can see barnstorming performers and musicians threaten to burst out of the theatre, then return to experience an intimate one-person show that casts a magic spell and breaks your heart. Hayes has earned a place on the cultural map by developing, producing, and presenting the most compelling and mould-breaking music theatre in Australia.

Name: National Black Theatre
Description: Founded in 1968 by Dr. Barbara Ann Teer, an award-winning performer, director, visionary entrepreneur, and champion of the Black Arts Movement, NBT has a ground-breaking legacy: as the country’s first revenue-generating Black art complex, the longest continually run Black theater in New York City, and one of the oldest theaters founded and consistently operated by a woman of color in the nation. Since its founding, NBT has invested over $10 million in 350+ original works by Black artists and garnered numerous accolades, including NYTimes Critics Picks, Obie Awards, Lortel Awards, a TONY award, and an EMMY nomination. NBT has also been included in the permanent collection of the Smithsonian’s National Museum of African American History and Culture in Washington, D.C.

Name: Hoftheaterschool
Description: Wij willen iedereen naar en aan het theater! We maken theater- en musicalproducties, geven theater- en musicallessen in de Hoftheaterschool en produceren theaterinterventies en -events! We werken vooral vanuit en in de Haagse regio.

Name: Theatergroep Suburbia
Description:
Theatergroep Suburbia is het stadsgezelschap van Almere. Suburbia wordt structureel ondersteund door de gemeente Almere, de provincie Flevoland en het Nederlands Fonds voor Podiumkunsten+. 

Suburbia maakt toneel in de polder: ontroerende, tragische, hilarische voorstellingen over de mens in al zijn kleinheid. Voorstellingen waarin “de magie” ontstaat door het inlevingsvermogen van de acteur, daarbij ondersteund door een eenvoudige maar toepasselijke vormgeving.

Name: Nicole Beutler Projects
Description:
Nicole Beutler Projects (NBP) realiseert de voorstellingen en initiatieven van choreograaf en theatermaker Nicole Beutler. De organisatie maakt deel uit van het Kunstenplan van de Gemeente Amsterdam / AFK en ontvangt meerjarige subsidie van het Fonds Podiumkunsten / FPK.

Het werk karakteriseert zich door beeldende, poëtische ensceneringen en een minimalistische en interdisciplinaire aanpak. NBP nodigt uit tot een kritische reflectie op het menselijk bestaan, proclameert de kracht van het individu en koestert samenwerking en verbinding. Haar artistieke bevlogenheid vertaalt Nicole Beutler in overtuigende voorstellingen met tournees in binnen- en buitenland. NBP verkent nieuwe territoria en vormen binnen de dans- en performance kunst. Zij faciliteert ontmoeting, uitwisseling en reflectie – zowel met het publiek als met het professionele kunstenveld – en stimuleert talentontwikkeling.

In 2025 is Beutlers dansopera NOW WE ARE EARTH / An Orchestra te zien in de grote theaters in het land. Kijk voor de speellijst en tickets op nicolebeutlerprojects.nl.

Name: Ganadhakshya Arts
Description: Ganadhakshya Arts is a vibrant space for creative expression, dedicated to producing original plays and immersive workshops. We celebrate the richness of intangible cultural heritage. Through our productions and workshops, we aim to inspire and nurture talent, preserving traditional art forms while fostering innovation. Whether you’re an artist, a learner, or an enthusiast, Ganadhakshya Arts invites you to explore the beauty and diversity of culture through the arts. Join us in crafting stories that resonate and performances that captivate!

Name: Unga Klara
Description: Unga Klara grundades 1975, då som en del av Stockholms Stadsteater, och har sedan dess bedrivit en med tiden världsberömd forskande teaterverksamhet med barns och ungas villkor i fokus. Konstnärliga ledare har sedan starten varit Suzanne Osten. Idag är teatern en självständig enhet och sommaren 2014 tar Farnaz Arbabi och Gustav Deinoff över den konstnärliga ledningen för Unga Klara. De har båda tidigare arbetat på Unga Klara och har de två senaste åren tillhört dess konstnärliga råd.

Name: Mezrab
Description:
Mezrab is an Amsterdam based platform for storytelling and an important initiator in the development of storytelling as an art form in the Netherlands. Mezrab serves as a source of inspiration for many theatres, centres, museums and festivals to also programme storytelling. Mezrab and storytelling in general has grown considerably in recent years and is gradually being incorporated into the professional performing arts sector.
Mezrab programmes regular storytelling evenings several times a week. On the other nights, storytelling is combined with other art disciplines (dance, visual arts, poetry, etc.) and a world music programme. Mezrab has a unique position in Amsterdam, in the Netherlands and in Europe as a storytelling stage and platform for the development of interdisciplinary art. Mezrab organises an average of 300 events per year and attracts an average of 800 visitors per week.
Mezrab also organises occasional storytelling evenings at other locations and festivals such as Oerol, Podium Mozaïek, Amsterdam Fringe Festival, Amsterdamse Bos, Storytelling Festival, Pleintheater, etc.

Mezrab’s programming is multidisciplinary. With crossovers of disciplines, projects, collaborations, cultures and stories, with the focus on telling multidisciplinary stories. In words and music.

Name: J'en fais K ma prod - JFKMP
Description: Société de production et de diffusion de spectacles vivants

Name: Théâtre du Rideau Vert
Description:
Situé en plein cœur du Plateau Mont-Royal, le Théâtre du Rideau Vert présente annuellement une programmation qui s’adresse à un large public, son créneau vise à combiner l’exigence artistique et l’accessibilité. Sa salle de 426 places offre un rapport scène-salle chaleureux, convivial et de proximité avec le public.

Fondé en 1949 par Yvette Brind'Amour et Mercedes Palomino, le Théâtre du Rideau Vert est le premier théâtre professionnel francophone au pays. Il fut également l'un des premiers théâtre québécois à investir dans la création d'œuvres « d'ici », favorisant l'éclosion du théâtre de Félix Leclerc, Marie-Claire Blais, Gratien Gélinas, Michel Tremblay, Antonine Maillet, etc. C'est d'ailleurs là que fut créée la pièce Les Belles-Sœurs de Michel Tremblay en joual en 1968.

Name: Jamie Wilson Productions Ltd
Description:
Established in 2008, Jamie Wilson Productions have produced and co-produced over 75 productions in London, Broadway, on tour throughout the UK, and internationally. The Stage
newspaper has regularly listed Jamie among the top 100 most influential people in the theatre industry, and in 2023, Jamie Wilson Productions was shortlisted for Producer of the
Year at The Stage Awards. Last year’s London productions include the smash-hit new version of Sister Act The Musical, co-produced with Whoopi Goldberg; Chichester Festival Theatre’s landmark production of Rodgers & Hammerstein’s South Pacific at Sadler’s Wells; and The Lincoln Centre’s critically acclaimed production of Lerner and Loewe’s My Fair Lady which played at the London Coliseum, with all three productions receiving nominations for Best Musical Revival at the 2023 Olivier Awards.

Jamie is producing the UK premier of Ain’t Too Proud: The Life and Times of the
Temptations which plays at The Prince Edward Theatre, and the new musical comedy Mrs Doubtfire, at The Shaftesbury Theatre in the West End from May 2023. This production marks the beginning of a ten year collaboration with The Shaftesbury Theatre, and sees Jamie take the role of principal Producer for the venue.

Current touring productions include the major UK, Irish and international tours of Sister Act and My Fair Lady. Collaborating with the three-time Tony Award winning producer, Kevin McCollum, Jamie is developing musical adaptations of The Devil Wears Prada with music by Elton John and The Notebook with music by Ingrid Michaelson, both of which premiered in Chicago in summer 2022. Also in development is Night at the Museum with music by Alan Menken.

Jamie is a member of the Society of London Theatre, the League of Independent Producers and is a trustee of ‘Stage One’, supporting new producers.

Name: Better Than Broadway Productions, LLC.
Description:
Better Than Broadway Productions, LLC is dedicated to making the performing arts accessible, fun, and transformative. We proudly present Theater Week, a highly acclaimed, immersive workshop program delivered to over fifty educational institutions and camps throughout the tri-state area.

The primary objective of Theater Week is to cultivate strong self-esteem in every participant while instilling a deep appreciation for the performing arts. We structure the week to emphasize the importance of teamwork, effort, and creative risk-taking, stressing that giving one's best effort is the key to success, both on and off the stage.

Over five days, students engage in comprehensive training across acting, singing, and movement, working collaboratively to stage a musical production. The journey from eager fledglings on Monday, who may be performing for the very first time, culminates in a proud Friday night bow. This final presentation for peers, teachers, and family provides an invaluable opportunity for students to showcase their new skills and experience the thrill of accomplishment, leaving them with an unforgettable experience and enduring memories.

Name: Trots54
Description:
Trots54 is een kunst en cultuur community voor en door jongeren in de regio Noordoost-Brabant. Binnen de community gaan jongeren aan de slag met hun dromen, ambities en uitdagingen. Trots54 gelooft hierbij in de positieve kracht van kunstuitingen met kwaliteit. Deze kracht versterken we door jongeren zelf op het podium te plaatsen en hun kunstuitingen te exposeren. Ze ontwikkelen en tonen hiermee hun talent en maken persoonlijke onderwerpen zichtbaar en bespreekbaar. Trots54 biedt jongeren uit alle lagen van de samenleving de mogelijkheid om deel te nemen.

Bij Trots54 maken jongeren op hun eigen manier en vanuit hun eigen leefwereld kennis met kunst en ervaren wat het hen brengt. Dit zorgt ervoor dat jongeren weer aansluiting vinden bij het kunst- en cultuuraanbod. Zowel de makers als het publiek worden uitgedaagd om te reflecteren op hun eigen leven.

Name: Theateralliantie
Description: De Theateralliantie verbindt theaters, producenten en makers om samen kwalitatieve voorstellingen te produceren voor de grote(re) zalen van de Nederlandse theaters. De co-creatie tussen voorheen gescheiden marktpartijen zorgt voor een gedeeld financieel risico en geeft theaters inhoudelijke invloed, wat resulteert in een betere afstemming tussen aanbod en publiek. Ook wordt innovatie gestimuleerd door vernieuwende combinaties met betrekking tot acteurs, regisseurs en creatieve ontwerpers. De Theateralliantie fungeert hierbij als aanjager van nieuwe artistieke ideeën, coproducent en coördinator van financiering en publiciteitscampagnes van theatervoorstellingen.

Name: Compagnie Daniko
Description:
La Compagnie Daniko est créée en janvier 2022 en région parisienne par deux passionnés de théâtre. Son nom est trouvé : Dani et Nico, Daniko.

Le théâtre est à vous, puisque la Compagnie Daniko ambitionne de parcourir les scènes et festivals de France, à votre rencontre.

Name: Le Theatre
Description: Le theatre is located in freeway center sin el fil Beirut lebanon and it is a perfectly balanced balanced venue of 300 seats for all occasions like theatrical events for current and rising artists, stand up comedy, academic acting or dance classes, graduation events and all types of business conferences or lectures. Also a Well balanced location in Sin el fil at sally I round about where mount Lebanon and Beirut area can have easy & fast access.

Name: The Inspired Acting Company
Description: We tell relevant, timely, and inclusive stories through productions of world-class plays both new and classical featuring top-tier Michigan Actors, Directors, Stage Managers, Technicians, and Designers. We provide classes for aspiring and seasoned actors to improve their craft by training the actor to think of themself as a complete and transformational artist. We will provide arts education programs that inspire empathy and promote life-long learning to our diverse community. And we celebrate the power of theatre to build empathy, promote discourse, and generate positive change.

Name: İzmir Büyükşehir Belediyesi Şehir Tiyatroları
Description: 70 yıl önce temelleri atılan İzmir Büyükşehir Belediyesi Şehir Tiyatroları, Büyükşehir Belediye Başkanı Tunç Soyer’in girişimiyle ve 2019 yılında Orhan Alkaya, Zeynep Altıok, Eren Aysan, Cezmi Baskın, Yücel Erten, Hülya Nutku, Bilgehan Oğuz ve Levent Üzümcü’den oluşan bir Danışma Kurulu’nun oluşturulmasıyla Şehir Tiyatroları yeniden yolculuğuna başlamış, 27 Mart 2020 Dünya Tiyatro Günü’nde tanıtımı yapılmış ve kamuoyuna duyurulmuştur.

Name: INTAR Theatre
Description:
Committed to the development and continuation of the Latine voice in American theater and beyond,

INTAR’s mission is to commission, develop, and produce bold, innovative, artistically significant live theater works generated by an intersectional array of Latine playwrights, composers, directors, choreographers, and visual artists.

Name: The Journey World Tour
Description:
The Journey , created by international magician Lucas Di Giacomo, is an emotional journey through illusionism to find the origin of one's dreams. A family and interactive show that combines the best mentalism numbers, sleight of hand and grand illusions, mixed with music and theatre. An opportunity to embark on a journey through the imaginary of the great classics of magic, from Houdini to the Great Carter, which will connect with our childhood and make young and old believe in the power of dreams. In the Ibercaja Delicias Space .
Synopsis

The Argentine magician, producer and collector Lucas Di Giacomo “appears” for the first time in Madrid after taking his shows all over the world by storm. He is the founder of the most exclusive private magic club in Spain, the Ibiza Magic Club, which has been the setting for recovering the essence of true illusionism with magical evenings held together with celebrities and beautiful people from Ibiza.

This is his most personal work, partly autobiographical, which comes to Madrid after 5 successful years surprising the faithful of Ibiza Magic Club and touring prominent international venues such as Dubai, New York, Paris, London and Saudi Arabia.

This is a family and interactive show that combines the best mentalism numbers, sleight of hand and great illusions, mixed with music and theater, a journey that travels through the imaginary of the great classics of magic, from Houdini to the Great Carter, that will connect with our childhood and make young and old believe in the power of dreams.

Name: Musicales On Perú
Description:
MUSICALES ON PERU, TIENE MÁS DE 12 AÑOS PRODUCIENDO OBRAS DE TEATRO MUSICAL.
EN SU REPERTORIO HA TENIDO OBRAS RECONOCIDAS COMO GREASE, JESUCRISTO SUPERSTAR, TAN SOLO HAY QUE SOÑAR, HAIRSPRAY, MAMMA MIA!, BROADWAY AL AMANECER, ENTRE OTRAS.

NUESTRO PRINCIPAL OBJETIVO ES CONTRIBUIR CON LA CULTURA DEL PAÍS Y LA DIFUSIÓN DEL TEATRO MUSICAL APOYANDO A NUEVOS TALENTOS DE LAS ESCUELAS DE ARTES ESCÉNICAS MÁS IMPORANTES, ASÍ MISMO CONTRIBUIR CON EL APRENDIZAJE DE LOS JÓVENES EN DIFERENTES DISCIPLINAS COMO EL TEATRO, DANZA Y CANTO.

A LO LARGO DE ESTE TIEMPO HEMOS OBTENIDO EL APOYO DE DIFERENTES EMPRESAS PRIVADAS QUIÉNES HAN FORMADO PARTE DE NUESTRA CARTERA DE PATROCINADORES Y AUSPICIADORES, GRACIAS A ELLAS HEMOS CUMPLIDO CON CADA OBJETIVO TANTO FINANCIERO COMO A NIVEL DE PRODUCCIÓN.

Name: Boutcher Theatre Company
Description: Boutcher Theatre Company was born out of Bradley and Kari’s shared passion for local theatre. We believe that everyone should have access to Broadway-quality shows at a fair price starring members of their own community. We value equality, fairness, accessibility, truth, and excellence, and we strive to exemplify those qualities in each step of our theatrical process. We are storytellers, and we hope that the stories we tell, and the way we use our voices, will serve to uplift the artists and audiences we love.

Name: Spotlit Club
Description:
Spotlit Club is the cultural heartbeat of Icfai Tech, offering a vibrant platform for students passionate about acting, theater, fashion, makeup, event management, and podcasts. It’s a space where creativity takes center stage and bold ideas thrive, both on and off the stage.

Our mission is to empower students to explore their creative potential, build confidence, and foster collaboration. Whether it’s delivering powerful stage performances, curating stunning fashion displays, managing unforgettable events, or hosting engaging podcasts, Spotlit Club encourages every member to express themselves and shine in their unique way.

Acting & Theater: Dive into the world of drama with stage plays, skits, and storytelling, where emotions and characters come alive.
Fashion & Makeup: Showcase style and innovation through fashion shows, design workshops, and creative makeup artistry.
Event Management: Plan and organize memorable events that leave a lasting impression.
Podcasts: Produce thought-provoking and entertaining discussions that amplify voices and ideas.
At Spotlit Club, we celebrate teamwork, leadership, and the pursuit of excellence. Every member has the opportunity to develop skills, create lasting memories, and make an impact on the cultural landscape of Icfai Tech.

Name: Theater in 't Groen
Description: Wij maken theater op locatie, oorspronkelijk vanuit de dorpskern Groenekan.

Name: Bocchi/Scarrocchia APS Compagnia Teatrale
Description: Compagnia teatrale di performing arts e danza contemporanea.

Name: Flatwater Shakespeare Company
Description: FLATWATER SHAKESPEARE COMPANY is a company based out of PO BOX 84935, LINCOLN, Nebraska, United States.

Name: The Grappler
Description: The Grappler is The Theatre School's community journal created by students and for students. We provide TTS students of all years, disciplines, and identities the opportunity to cultivate and share themselves, their work, and their ideas. By promoting thoughtful writing, curating, and editing, we are able to lift up TTS student voices in a responsible and constructive way.

Name: An Inspector Calls - UK Tour
Description:
Stephen Daldry’s multi award-winning National Theatre production of JB Priestley’s classic thriller returns for a UK Tour in 2022.

Winner of 19 major awards and hailed as the theatrical event of its generation, An Inspector Calls has thrilled more than 5 million theatregoers worldwide.

Name: Fiatal Drámaírók Háza - House of Young Playwrights
Description: A Fiatal Drámaírók Háza a legújabb drámaíró generáció befogadó műhelye és produkciós irodája. A világot jelentő deszkák eléréséhez minden pályakezdő tehetségnek kell egy ugródeszka. A célunk, hogy ezt több formában, pl. rendszeres nyílt pályázatok és egy nemzetközi felolvasóest-sorozat révén is biztosítsuk, folyamatosan figyelve – és alakítva – az itthoni kulturális élet helyzetét.

Name: Pizza Chapel Theatre Company
Description: DFW-based production company with an eye for grit & love of theatre.

Description:

Name: Theater Concordia Haastrecht
Description:
Theater Concordia Haastrecht wordt jaarlijks door meer dan 15.000 mensen bezocht voor een gevarieerd cultureel programma, bijeenkomsten en evenementen. Meer dan 75 vrijwilligers zetten zich in om dit mogelijk te maken!

Grote namen als Herman van Veen, Karin Bloemen, Sjaak Bral, Wibi Soerjadi en tal van andere artiesten stonden al op de planken in Concordia. De kleine zaal zorgt voor een intieme sfeer. 

Mevrouw Paulina Le Fèvre de Montigny -Bisdom van Vliet legde in 1900 de eerste steen voor Theater Concordia  Ze schenkt een groot startkapitaal. Paulina gaf met Concordia een plek aan de dorpsverenigingen van Haastrecht, want die zorgen volgens haar voor ‘sociale samenhang, nuttige tijdsbesteding en soms verdieping van de geest’.

Concordia is het Latijnse woord voor “eendracht”, letterlijk “met (een) hart”. Concordia is ook een Latijns-Amerikaanse meisjesnaam en betekent “harmonie”.

Name: Yorkshire Productions
Description: Yorkshire Productions is a nonprofit professional production company performing musical theatre across the east-coast.

Name: Whim Productions
Description: Whim Productions is dedicated to creating challenging and evocative queer theater. Our mission is to produce works written by LGBTQ+ writers with narratives that center queer characters. We are committed to sharing the diversity of queer lives with Kansas City audiences and providing a platform for LGBTQ+ theater artists to tell their own stories.

Name: Diverse Arts Now!, INC.
Description:
The mission of Diverse Arts Now! is to inspire, educate, challenge, amaze, and empower artists and audiences, in order to make the public a more conscious and compassionate community.

Diverse Arts Now! is a theater organization with a priority commitment to help develop theater artists from diverse backgrounds - racially, economically, socially, with regards to gender identity, and thought - to create work that is experimental in form and/or challenging in concept. 

Diverse Arts Now’s! intent is to utilize the performing arts to create a more conscious and compassionate community.

Name: Neem me niet de (kli)maatshow
Description:
De positieve theatershow over klimaat!

In een wereld die steeds verder polariseert is het belangrijk dat we naar elkaar blijven luisteren, want waar is anders het einde? Wat is nou goed voor het klimaat en wat moeten we precies doen?
Vanuit onze eigen onkunde op het thema klimaat voelde gesprekken met mensen niet prettig. De toon van de discussie was hard en verwijtend omdat we klaarblijkelijk onder druk zouden staan.
Dat we met elkaar iets moeten doen is evident. Wij zijn ervan overtuigd dat dit wel moet op een positieve manier moet gebeuren.
Onze doelstelling met de voorstelling is: het gesprek opstarten tussen de diverse visies, zonder daarbij de ander direct te veroordelen en leren oprecht naar elkaar te luisteren.

Name: Shilpee Theatre Group
Description: Shilpee Theatre Group is a non-profit national NGO in Kathmandu, Nepal. It began its journey in 2006, and since then, is actively contributing in connecting people to the theatre. Shilpee’s team has travelled all over the country and successfully completed many 'participatory theatre (also known as ‘Forum Theater’ or ‘theater of the oppressed’) projects for social institutions. Shilpee also hosts regular performances at its 210 seats capacity Gothale Theatre. Cafe Shilpee and a theatre library are also located at Shilpee Theatre’s premises. For those interested to learn acting, storytelling, and various theatre forms, regular training sessions are being conducted at its workshop space ‘Abhimanch’.

Name: Kadar
Description:
Kadar.
Dek.
Gibi.
Denli.

-2022 yılının Ekim ayında Aksel Bonfil tarafından kuruldu.
-Kısa bir süre sonra Begüm Ertuğrul ortak olarak dahil oldu.
-27 Şubat 2023'te “Eksik” isimli oyunla Moda Sahnesi'nde ilk kez perde açıldı.
- ”Eksik” , 2024 Yeni Tiyatro Dergisi Emek ve Başarı Ödülleri'nde Jüri Özel Ödülü'nü aldı.
