- ”Eksik” , üçüncü sırada 30 Ocak 2025 tarihinde Baba Sahne'de final yaptı.

Name: Sullivan Theater
Description: A venue for Performing and Visual Arts, History, and Entertainment, by and for the Central, Louisiana community.

Name: First Stages
Description:
A new organization supporting the development of new musical theatre through educational seminars, feedback roundtables, and workshop productions.
Founded by Columbia University students in 2023.

Name: Mankato Playhouse
Description:
Mankato Playhouse brings professional quality entertainment to the community, providing an exceptional experience for both our audience members and volunteers. 

We produce high-quality musical theater performances and Broadway Teen Workshops each season to showcase the talent we have in our local and surrounding communities.

Tickets available now for our 2022-2023 season!

Name: Parson's Nose Theater
Description: In our 24th year introducing classic comedies, plays and stories by Shakespeare, Twain, Goldoni, Chekhov, Hans Andersen and many more in accessible "under 90 minute" performances and podcasts.

Name: La LINA Impro
Description:
La LINA est une compagnie professionnelle de théâtre pratiquant l'improvisation.
Depuis près de trente ans cette équipe transmet, expérimente, partage et invente un théâtre exigeant pour les artistes et populaire pour le public.

En entreprise :
Nous proposons aux entreprises, établissements publics et associations d’intervenir au cœur même de leurs structures.
En étroite collaboration avec vous, nous cernons vos problématiques et vos objectifs afin de concevoir et animer une prestation personnalisée, en accord avec vos valeurs et celles de l'improvisation théâtrale: travail d’équipe, responsabilité individuelle, gestion du temps, implication et distance, innovation, prise de risque calculée.

Les spectacles tout public :
Nos spectacles tout public sont une véritable immersion dans l’improvisation, où chaque représentation devient un moment unique, interactif et créatif, alliant émotion, rire et réflexion.
Voici les spectacles que nous proposons :
- T.I.(L).T! – Tentatives Instantanées (Légèrement) Théâtrales
- Le Blablathèque
- Le Blablabar
- Le Match d'Improvisation

Name: Dario Fo Organizasyon Gıda Turizm Sanayi ve Ticaret Ltd. Şti.
Description:
2020 yılının yaz aylarında düşündüğümüz ve Kasım ayında da hayata geçirdiğimiz bir fikir olan Dario Fo adını İtalyan ve bir o kadar da protest kişiliğe sahip tiyatro oyuncusu ve günümüzde de dünya tiyatrosunda sahnelenen metinlerin yazarı olan Dario Fo’dan öyle olduğu gibi araklamıştır.

Eskişehir’in Eski Bağlar Mahallesi’nde sık sık kafe hizmeti veren ara sıra tiyatro yapılan çoğunlukla da insanların iyi hissetmek için uğradığı bir yer.

Name: Pinole Community Players
Description:
In 1986, two Pinole, CA couples, Gary & Nancy Gill and David & Patti Clark met around the Gill's kitchen table to discuss their dream of forming a local community theatre group. 

Utilizing Gary's technical knowledge, Nancy's musical talents, David's directing background and Patti's producing and organizational skills, the PINOLE COMMUNITY PLAYERS was born.

Name: Parastoo Theater
Description:
We are a community-funded theater troupe of refugees in Kuala Lumpur which aims to raise awareness on social, economic and mental health issues faced by refugees. We aim to rebuild confidence of our members through theater acting and aid in relieving depression.

Parastoo Theater is the only professional refugee theater company in Malaysia. Founded in 2017, by the end of 2022 Parastoo had produced and developed 9 shows for 12,000 people, staging 42 performances.

Parastoo is privileged to be the first of its kind in Malaysia using a unique methodology based on the ‘Theater of the Oppressed’ model. Parastoo believes that theatre is a tool for transformation, to bridge differences, build understanding, raise awareness and create spaces where difficult social issues can be addressed through creative expression and dialogue.

Name: Le Théâtre de Babble
Description: Le Théâtre de Babble propose des pièces pour les plus jeunes, ainsi que des ateliers et cours de théâtre en langue anglaise.

Name: Alternative Theatre Company
Description:
Alternative Theatre Company Inc. is a 501c3 nonprofit organization dedicated to celebrating LGBTQ+ artists and providing a home for unheard storytellers. Since 1991 we have been an all-volunteer non-profit theatre group known for producing award-winning plays that engage an audience in a conversation relating to specific feelings and messages reflecting the LGBTQ community, including the Off-Broadway hits "The Gayest Christmas Pageant Ever!," "A Night in Vegas," "Dirty Secrets" and "A Waning Gibbous Moon."

With the world now immersed in visual and interactive media, the performing arts have perhaps never been more relevant in communication. Dramatic productions can powerfully communicate diversity, faith, compassion, understanding and acceptance across barriers of age, race, gender, orientation, culture, language and prejudice in a way few other mediums can.

Theatre not only communicates ideas, but also demonstrates them, touching the audience's mind and heart. That is and will always be our mission.

Founded in 1991 by Joe Marshall in Phoenix, Arizona, the company relocated to New York in 2009.

Name: Three Fates Theatre Company
Description: Three Fates Theatre Company was founded in 2019 by Thalia Dudek, Zoe Hawkins, and Laura McCluskey. Based in Naarm/Melbourne, Australia, we have fostered a community of emerging and established storytellers. To create and produce thought-provoking, entertaining, and essential stories. We strive to foster an approachable and thriving community of emerging and established creatives, both home-grown and international.

Name: Titiriguiri
Description: Teatro, animación, títeres, música, nuevas tecnologías… En Titiriguiri creamos teatro de calidad para los más pequeños. A través de nuevas formas de comunicarnos, con una cuidada puesta en escena y una sólida interpretación, apostando por contenidos que trabajan educación en valores. Que se abra el telón!

Name: The Rockwell
Description:
We produce and present shows that are a must-see.

It’s nerve-racking to see a live show and we take the guess work out of it. If it’s here, it’s been work-shopped, vouched for, and recommended.

The Rockwell as a space has survived multiple owners and management, and yet, it lives on! A trusty block-box theater with a well-equipped light plot and sound system able to support performances from full stage productions to 18-piece bands to comedy podcasts to heart-racing burlesque.

Nestled in Davis Square, a hotbed of bars, outdoor markets, and arts-centric events, in Somerville, Massachusetts, The Rockwell twinkles with its old-fashioned marquee on Elm Street. Just steps away from The Davis Square “T” (subway) station. Formerly The Davis Square Theatre and Jimmy Tingle’s Off Broadway, our underground theater controls all its light sources to house any event at any time. We seem small but we accommodate up to 203 people and host over 500 performances annually.

Name: Compagnie Les Enfants Sauvages
Description:
La compagnie Les Enfants Sauvages est basée à Thonon-les-Bains en Haute-Savoie. Elle propose des spectacles en salle ou en rue destinés à un public jeune, familial ou adulte. La compagnie anime des stages et des ateliers-théâtre.
Notre troupe travaille à partir de textes littéraires. Nos adaptations sont pimentées de facéties, d’humour et de légèreté. L’interaction avec le public est la marque de fabrique de nos comédiens, formés au théâtre de rue.

Name: The Clinton Street Cabaret
Description: The Clinton Street Cabaret is a company based out of 2522 SE Clinton St, Portland, Oregon, United States.

Name: Beloved Theatre Company
Description: Beloved Theatre Company empowers marginalised groups by creating inspiring productions and equipping individuals with life skills through theatre based workshops to enable them to deal effectively with the challenges of everyday life and access equal opportunities.

Name: Absurda Scenens Sällskap
Description: Ett avantgarde teatersällskap.

Name: Compagnie 2.1
Description: La compagnie 2.1 est un laboratoire de création théâtrale qui associe la recherche, l'expérimentation et l’innovation artistique tout en puisant dans la sensibilité des comédiennes et des comédiens qui y travaillent. Nous y développons un lien intense entre les matériaux texte, les corps en action et l'héritage du théâtre. Il en résulte une matière authentique et vivante au carrefour de l'humain, du désir et de la passion.

Name: Encore Theatre Collective
Description: Encore embraces the excitement of theatre and provides a fresh approach to performing arts for young people. Our aim is to discover, inspire and showcase unique young talent through high-quality theatre experiences, bridging the gap between amateur and professional theatre in Auckland.

Name: KY-Speksi
Description: The musical theatre club of KY - Aalto University Business Students.

Name: Turné-Teatret
Description:
Oplev Turné-Teatret – Teater, der udfordrer rammerne!

I 2020 sprang Helge Reinhardt og Benjamin Lannerö ind i et eventyr, hvor de ikke kun ville sætte teater på scenen, men også flytte det ud i verden og skabe en oplevelse, som ingen har set før. Turné-Teatret blev stiftet med en drøm om at bryde de traditionelle teaterrammer og transformere, hvordan vi opfatter og oplever teater.

Vi har et mål: At gøre teater til noget, man taler om – noget, der berører, udfordrer og inspirerer. Turné-Teatret formår at skabe uventede møder mellem skuespillere og publikum, hvor man måske ikke forventer at finde teater. Fra gamle fabrikker til lokale parker, fra byens torve til hyggelige stuer – vi bringer dramatikken til livs, hvor folk allerede er, og inviterer dem ind i fortællingernes verden.

Vores forestillinger er ikke bare noget, der vises; de er interaktive oplevelser, hvor publikum ikke blot er tilskuere, men aktive deltagere. Hver historie er skabt med omhu, med fokus på både den gode fortælling og den dybe forbindelse mellem skuespillere og publikum. Vi udfordrer normerne, rejser spørgsmål og åbner op for nye perspektiver, alt imens vi skaber øjeblikke, der vil gøres til samtaleemner blandt venner og familie.

Hos Turné-Teatret mener vi, at alle fortjener at opleve teater i deres hverdag. Vi vælger at bringe kunsten tættere på folket og skaber et rum, hvor både nye og erfarne teatergængere kan udforske, føle, lære og grine sammen.

Gør dig klar til at træde ind i en ny verden af teater, hvor grænserne mellem scene og publikum viskes ud, og hvor hver forestilling bliver en uforglemmelig rejse. Kom og vær med til at udfordre det normale teaterrum med os. Oplev, hvordan vi sammen kan skabe kunst, der giver stof til eftertanke og samtale – for det er ikke bare teater, det er en bevægelse, og vi vil have dig med!

Turné-Teatret – Hvor historien kommer til live!

Name: Wokingham Theatre
Description: WT is a leading amateur theatre company staging 8+ productions each year at our own 160 seat theatre.

Name: Arts Undergraduate Theatre Society of McGill University
Description: The Arts Undergraduate Theatre Society (AUTS) is a student run group under the Arts Undergraduate Society (AUS) operating out of McGill University. We are dedicated to bringing quality musical theatre to the McGill student body and Montreal community. Our productions aim to appeal to the general public while challenging our artists to strengthen their skills accordingly. We are committed to fostering a collaborative and dynamic creative experience for our members.

Name: Blemme Fatale Productions
Description: Blemme Fatale Productions is a theatrical and events producing company with a focus on weaving Black Diasporic historical research throughout the creative process to create authentic and representative theatre and cultural events. We offer exemplary theatre productions, events and supplementary schools.

Name: ArtProm / touch the beating he-art
Description: ArtProm s.r.o. založil v roce 2011 Jakub Vedral, divadelní producent, dramaturg a režisér eventů s více než desetiletou praxí. ArtProm je možná jediným svého druhu v České republice - úzce se specializuje na developement a tvorbu uměleckého obsahu na míru - od konceptu podporujícího brand awareness přes animaci prostoru až po booking zahraničních umělců. Pod svými křídly ve spolupráci s ART Prometheus o.s. zaštiťuje více než stovku českých a zahraničních umělců - režisérů, performerů, akrobatů, výtvarníků a tvůrců z nichž všichni dosahují evropských a světových kvalit. Je realizátorem největšího pouličního festivalu v ČR - Živé ulice v Plzni nebo unikátního konceptu prvního českého pop-up klubu Blink Excelent. Jakub Vedral zajišťoval divadelní reprezentaci a animaci prostoru českého pavilonu na EXPO 2010 v čínské Šanghaji. ArtProm má za sebou práci pro věhlasné klienty jako jsou Camel ČR, Philip Morris, Plzeňský Prazdroj a.s. PriceWaterHouseCoopers, Česká centra, Czech trade nebo Karlovarské minerální vody a.s. Spolupracuje a dodává pro přední české eventové agentury.

Name: La Générale de Théâtre
Description: La Générale de Théâtre est une compagnie théâtrale indépendante basée dans le 19ème arrondissement de Paris.

Name: Schauplatz Langenfeld GmbH
Description: Schauplatz Langenfeld GmbH is a company based out of 129 Hauptstraße, Langenfeld (Rheinland), Germany.

Name: Hamlet Isn't Dead
Description: Hamlet Isn’t Dead believes Shakespeare can be fun for and understood by anyone, and we aim to make that true for our audiences through our use of language and storytelling alongside live music, joyful interpretation, and intimate staging. Our diverse community of artists and audiences reflects our NYC home and our core values of accessibility and inclusion. We are committed to maintaining an equitable, collaborative environment inclusive of the people and voices that are often neglected within the classical space.

Name: Drama Club
Description: Drama Club creates thought-provoking stories, with particular attention to LGBTQ voices, BIPOC creators, and emerging theater artists. We also make musicals to challenge the status quo and build cultural understanding.

Name: Kemin Teatteri
Description: Kemin Teatteri jatkaa siitä, mihin täyskunnallisen Kemin kaupunginteatterin toiminta päättyi. Meri-Lapin Teatteriyhdistys ry:n tekemä työ takaa alueen asukkaille valtakunnallisesti tasa-arvoisen taidetarjonnan ja varmistaa ammattilaisvoimin toteutetun monipuolisen esittävän taiteen saavuttamisen eri ikäryhmille.

Name: NH Theatre Project
Description: Since 1988 New Hampshire Theatre Project has been connecting communities through transformational theatre-making.

Name: Théâtre Populaire Alizé
Description:
Profondément ancrés dans une réflexion populaire sur le théâtre et son accessibilité et recherchant la qualité de représentation vers les jeunes publics, nous essayons de dynamiser l’idée de créer. Notre travail consiste également en l’élaboration de « ponts » entre jeunes et adultes. La qualité artistique se doit de développer des intérêts vers l’inter-génération et d’activer les échanges relationnels. Nous mettons en place des créations théâtrales amateurs de façon permanente sur toutes les tranches d’âges. De septembre à mai, on y trouve des espaces privilégiés de répétitions, pour aboutir à la présentation de ces spectacles de théâtre amateur, au cours de notre festival annuel au printemps.

L’association a été fondée par Francis BREL en février 1987. À l’origine, ce comédien professionnel a tout appris en pratiquant et en suivant un enseignement de terrain. C’est en partant de ce principe qu’est née son envie d’un nouveau théâtre proposant des créations originales et novatrices qui sortent des codes habituels.
Les productions du théâtre Alizé ne sont pas uniquement divertissantes, elles invitent également le spectateur à la réflexion. L’association s’est développée autour de ces valeurs et n’a cessé de se renouveler depuis grâce à ses membres de plus en plus diversifiés, par leur âge et leur expérience du théâtre.
On retiendra la formule suivante : « Créer pour donner, donner envie de créer. »

Name: Open Space Arts
Description: Located in Chicago's Uptown neighborhood, we produce live theater fighting antisemitism and homophobia and also hosts Gay Film Fest.

Name: Undekha
Description:
Undekha is IIT Ropar's vibrant dramatics society, where creativity meets expressions. We bring stories to life through engaging stage plays, nukkad nataks, and other immersive performances . 
Our club is a platform for students to showcase their acting, direction, scriptwriting, and production skills while fostering teamwork and artistic collaboration. Whether it's through captivating drama or impactful street performances, we aim to inspire, entertain, and provoke thought in our audience.

Name: Worlds Biggest Productions
Description:
ELF The Musical is back for a Global Tour! Have you booked yet?

It’s never too early for Christmas, so share with your friends and family and plan a festive day out! Tickets are available at elfthemusicaluk.com

Name: Impro13 - das berührende Improvisationstheater
Description:
Das berührende Improvisationstheater mit der 13 Sekunden Geld-zurück-Garantie. 
Impro 13 ist eine Expedition ins Unbekannte, eine Mischung aus Intelligenz, Schlagfertigkeit und Mut. Jede Vorstellung ist eine Premiere und ein Stück Ihres eigenen Lebens.

Name: Theater in a Box
Description:
We are a 501c3 free lending library of Props, Set Pieces, and Set Dressing, for Community Theaters and School Drama Groups. 
Sets, Props, and furniture are a major expense when putting on a production, but most groups have no place to store them. Often times for each show a group puts on, wood for sets is purchased then thrown away at the end of the show because the group has no space to warehouse them. the same problem applies to furniture and props. 
Our items and services help these groups save money often used on one time use items, allowing them to decrease their budget or allow them to put their money to other expenses.

Name: Outskirts Theatre Co.
Description:
PLAYING IT FORWARD SINCE 2014.

Outskirts Theatre Co.’s mission is to create professional opportunities for emerging artists through entertaining thought-provoking theatrical productions.

Name: Astana Ballet Theater
Description: Astana Ballet Theater is a leading ballet theatre based in Astana, Kazakhstan.

Name: Théâtre de l'Olmu
Description:
Entre mer et montagne, le village d’Olmeto surplombe le Valinco depuis le 14ème siècle. Terre des seigneurs della Rocca, place fortifiée pour la défense contre les attaques barbaresques, village de mort de la Colomba qui inspire Mérimée, tout respire le conte épique lorsque l’on regarde les maisons de l’Ortale, ou que l’on serpente les ruelles de la Ribba.

Le Festival s'est inventé« en extérieur », chaque création se faisant en lien avec les diverses scénographies réelles que propose le village, et les spectacles invités se ré-adaptant au cadre du plein air, ses contraintes et ses forces.

Le Festival permet ainsi aux artistes de réinventer les lieux de vie du spectateur, de remodeler les centres névralgiques du village. L'imaginaire est décuplé, et, en dehors des diktats de la réalité du temps et de l'espace, le réel devient autre. Chaque année, déambulations, tragédies, créations contemporaines, formes poétiques, performances artistiques font, pendant deux semaines, vibrer au son de l’art les espaces illimités du village.

Name: Theater o.N. e.V.
Description:
Das Theater o.N. ist ein seit 40 Jahren bestehender Verbund von Schau- und Puppenspieler*innen, Regisseur*innen, Musiker*innen und Schriftsteller*innen. Es war das erste und lange Zeit einzige freie Theater der DDR. Unter dem Namen „Zinnober“ entwickelten die KünstlerInnen wegweisende Inszenierungen wie „traumhaft“ (1985) oder „Die Bremer Stadtmusikanten“ (1986).

In seiner jetzigen Konstellation arbeitet das Theater o.N. seit 2010 und schafft mit seinen Arbeiten Kulturangebote für Menschen jeden Alters und unabhängig von ihrer sozialen oder kulturellen Herkunft. Zwei Jahre lang leitete Ania Michaelis das Theater und setzte neue Schwerpunkte, 2012 übernahmen Dagmar Domrös und Vera Strobel die künstlerische Leitung und werden seit 2013 zusätzlich durch Doreen Markert unterstützt.

Im Bereich des Kinder- und Jugendtheaters erforscht und entwickelt das Theater o.N. die darstellenden Künste für die Jüngsten (ab 2 Jahren) und setzt mit seinen Inszenierungen und dem zweijährlich stattfindenden »FRATZ International« in Deutschland und international künstlerische Impulse für diese Theaterform. 2014 wurde das Ensemble hierfür mit dem George Tabori Förderpreis ausgezeichnet.

Seit Gründungszeiten arbeitet das Theater o.N. mit dem Ansatz des Biografischen Theaters und entwickelt den Großteil seiner Inszenierungen ohne textliche Vorlage. In seinen partizipativen Projekten in Berlin Marzahn-Hellersdorf wenden die Künstler*innen diese Methode auch auf die Arbeit mit den Kindern und Jugendlichen an.

Körperbetontes Spiel und eine Art fantastischer Realismus, eine eigene Ausprägung der biografischen Methode und das Objekt- und Puppentheater sind die Merkmale der Inszenierungen des Theater o.N.. Mit diesen Mitteln betreibt das Ensemble seine ästhetische Forschung - in den Arbeiten für die Jüngsten genauso wie für sein erwachsenes Publikum.

Name: Teatriados │ Artes Escénicas en Medellín
Description:
A través de las artes escénicas, construimos conversaciones cotidianas, divertidas, cercanas; experiencias artísticas que propiciaran el diálogo, las emociones, la comunicación y el debate, para provocar la conexión entre los habitantes del mundo.
En estos 17 años,TEATRIADOS logra identificar un formato teatral que nombra TEATRO A LA CARTA, dentro del cual desarrolla diversos productos de carácter lúdico y pedagógico, entre los cuales se destacan las “puestas en escena” y “Personajes Itinerantes” construidos por actrices y actores, inspirados en la vida misma (la vida real), a través de los cuales se logra el acercamiento directo con la comunidad, entablando un diálogo tranquilo que permite un intercambio de saberes y preguntas que pueden, o no, ser resueltas en el instante mismo, pero que propician cambios actitudinales y posibles soluciones.

Name: StageRights Consulting
Description:
[StageRights Consulting] is a premier consulting firm specializing in theater technical direction, legal advisory for cultural projects, and strategic event production. 
With over 25 years of experience in the performing arts and cultural sector, we deliver world-class solutions that blend creativity, precision, and compliance.
Founded by a seasoned Theater Technical Director and Legal Consultant, our company has been instrumental in shaping iconic cultural initiatives across the Middle East. From managing international productions to advising legal frameworks for creative ventures, we ensure every project achieves technical brilliance and legal integrity.
Core Services
•	Technical Consulting for Theaters & Events
o	Lighting, sound, and stage systems design
o	Technical audits and operational optimization
o	Production supervision for large-scale shows
•	Legal Advisory for Cultural & Creative Projects
o	Contract drafting and compliance
o	Intellectual property protection
o	Regulatory guidance for cultural initiatives
•	Event & Festival Management Consulting
o	Strategic planning and execution
o	Artistic direction and programming
o	Sponsorship and partnership development

Name: Sinapse Produções Culturais e Teatrais
Description:
Sobre Nós:

A Sinapse administra e realiza a curadoria do Teatro Colinas, em São José dos Campos desde 2011. 
Nesse período trouxe grandes espetáculos para São José dos Campos, tais como: Cruel, Adultérios, Meu Deus, A Mentira, musicais como Rita Lee Mora ao Lado, Bossa Nova, Canção dos Direitos da Criança, Mamonas Assassinas, shows, espetáculos infantis e adultos.  

Outra frente de atuação da Sinapse é a realização de Festivais de Teatro. Em 2022 realizamos a Mostra de Teatro no Vale, que aconteceu nas cidades de São José dos Campos, Lorena, Caraguatatuba, Jacareí e Ubatuba. No mesmo ano realizamos também, o Festival Jazz no Vale, com 20 apresentações gratuitas, que aconteceram no Teatro Colinas em São José dos Campos.

Em 2024 realizamos o Festival de Teatro Seguros Unimed com 90 apresentações em 24 cidades do interior de São Paulo. Trouxemos grandes nomes como o Fúlvio Stefanini, a Vera Holtz, a Grace Gianoukas e muitos outros.
Location: São José dos Campos - São Paulo, SP

Name: Visiunarte
Description:
The Associação Juvenil Visiunarte-Ateliês de Teatro e Dança, whose purpose is the presentation of theater, musical and contemporary plays.
It began its activity in 2012 only as a theater group, later expanding to theater and dance. In addition to the artistic part, the Association also aims to include young people at social and economic risk in an ambitious project, which perhaps due to some hardships in life they could not do, but at Visiunarte several doors are opened for them through which they can succeed in the path to success. The Association has already been recognized mainly in the city of Viseu for the solidary causes that it defends and participates in:
Events:
- Young Theater Festival
- Organization of the Grão Vasco Primary School gala | Project Challenges
- Preparation of pieces for various institutions such as APPDA, GRUMAPA, BORA LÁ, Lar Santa Teresinha, Infantário da Misericórdia, among others.
- Animation of various events
- Creation of the flashmob choreography for the Viseu Now channel
- Presentation of pieces for Schools such as the Grouping of Schools of São Pedro do Sul
- Participation in Popular Marches

Over time, the Association has managed to have several successful cases in terms of some rehabilitations, since integration in this young and innovative group is always safeguarded. In 2015 he won the Revelation of the Year award at the Viseu Theater Festival, and since then these awards have been repeated over the years.

Name: Chilliwack School of Performing Arts (CSOPA)
Description:
CSOPA Is A Non-Profit, Youth Theatre Arts Studio Offering Training And Performance Opportunities In Theatre And Musical Theatre For Ages 5-24.
We acknowledge and support that engagement and success looks different for each student, and our faculty prioritizes keeping their teaching style, activities, and goals flexible to the needs of our students.

We are storytellers. We begin by breaking down expectations of casting and production by discussing how integral each life is in the body of a story. Each life on stage is imperative, so we start by acknowledging we are storytellers with a responsibility to honour each individual story we are entrusted with because each individual story is a life. Each life holds value, so we approach each individual’s story with the value and respect equal to the respect each human life deserves.

CSOPA is a registered charity, governed by a volunteer board of directors.

Name: analyse schmitt kollektiv - Feministisches Theaterkollektiv
Description:
Das analyse schmitt kollektiv, bestehend aus Laura Teiwes und Janina Haring, hat sich im Juni 2024 gegründet.

Das freie Theaterkollektiv beschäftigt sich mit verschiedenen Themen aus einem feministischen Blickwinkel. Der Fokus auf junges* Publikum ist ihnen besonders wichtig, wobei sich jung nicht nur auf das Alter bezieht, sondern auch auf Menschen, die bisher wenig Berührungspunkte mit dem Theater hatten. Durch die Unmittelbarkeit von theatralen Elementen möchte das Kollektiv empowernde Momente schaffen.

Das analyse schmitt kollektiv setzt einen besonderen Fokus auf eine Arbeit auf Augenhöhe. Der Prozess ist genauso wichtig, wie die Premiere. Dabei bekommen alle Beteiligten den Raum zu experimentieren und sich auszuprobieren, um gemeinsam die Freude am künstlerischen Vorhaben zu zelebrieren.

Name: Colchester Operatic Society
Description: Colchester Operatic Society is a registered charity (No. 1198865) based in Colchester, Essex

Name: Pasquerilla East Musical Company
Description:
In 1997, a group of students in Pasquerilla East Hall set out to put on a musical, reintroducing something that had been missing from life at Notre Dame for more than 10 years. 

Today, PEMCo is the leading producer of musical theatre at the University of Notre Dame, presenting at least two musicals and a revue to the community every year. PEMCo welcomes students of all majors and backgrounds within the Tri-Campus Community of Notre Dame, Holy Cross College, and Saint Mary's College.

We are one of the largest student groups on campus, with students serving as producers, directors, designers, choreographers, actors, instrumentalists and so much more. All of these roles are necessary to put on the large-scale, high-quality musicals that PEMCo proudly presents each season.

Name: Rennie and White Productions
Description:
This Production Company was founded by Phoebe White and Emily Rennie. Two peas in a pod determined to bring fresh stories to the stage and to the screen. 

The company have worked with a variety of writers to help them debut their work and take it to the center of the London fringe theatre circuit.

Since forming they have gone on to produce: 'Can I Call You Back?' (Theatre Peckham, 2022), a play tackling the impact of Psoriasis and chronic illness, 'The Halo Effect', a four time award nominated short film.  'Bloodsucker Disco' (Music Video, 2022) for Last of the Lizardmen, which is available on Youtube. 'Sometime, Somewhere' (Golden Goose Theatre, 2023) and  'Siren Song' (Little Angel  Theatre, 2023).

Name: Curtain's Up Theater Company
Description:
We are a non-profit organization dedicated to providing quality
theatrical experiences to the surrounding communities. Many of
our productions are intended to introduce, develop, and inspire a
love of the theater for children. The children who are involved with our shows have an opportunity to train and practice many
skillsets: acting, singing, dancing, musical instrumentation,
backstage assistance (props and costumes), and front of theater
activities (lights and sound). Our Board, show directors,
choreographers, voice coaches, stage managers, cast, crew, and
parents are all volunteers with Curtain's Up Theater Company.
Our goal is to produce family-oriented shows for our audiences
as well as our volunteers, on stage or behind the scenes.

Name: Theatre Studio BELOE
Description: Theatre classes for adults and kids, performances and unique artistic projects, retreats, and children's art camps.

Name: Medusa Collective NYC
Description: Medusa Collective NYC is a theatrical production company devoted to creating a safe space where artists can create new work for the stage. Our goal is to showcase meaningful work that influences our community in an empowering way.

Name: Arts at the Arms
Description:
Arts at the Arms is a performing arts organisation based in Yorkshire that supports new writing, emerging artists and diverse voices across theatre, comedy, poetry and music.

We run live events at a variety of locations, from some of the region's most prominent theatres (Leeds Playhouse, Lawrence Batley Theatre, CAST) to unusual and non-traditional spaces (art galleries, pubs, sports and social clubs, even people's living rooms). Building a creative community, engaging audiences and showcasing local talent.

Name: Theater of Witness
Description: Theater of Witness is a form of testimonial performance and documentary films performed by people sharing their personal and collective stories of suffering, transformation and peace. Developed more than thirty years ago, the work brings people together across divides of difference to bear witness to each other’s life experiences. Performers who have survived trauma, marginalization, oppression, and the complexity of the human experience, address some of society’s most challenging issues from a multiplicity of perspectives.

Name: Milagro
Description: As the premier Latino arts and culture center of the Pacific Northwest, Milagro has provided extraordinary Latino theatre, culture, and arts education for the enrichment of all communities since 1985.

Name: Time’s Fool Company
Description: Time’s Fool Company is a nonprofit, professional theatre company dedicated to creating accessible, inclusive, and innovative theatre in the Greater Hartford area.

Name: Terra Mysterium
Description: A performance troupe embracing mythology, culture creation, and audience interaction.

Name: Theatergroep ECHO
Description:
ECHO is punk-poëtisch, absurdistisch, activistisch en eigentijds. De speelstijl is rauw, de spelers raken getekend en besmeurd door wat de vertelling van ze vraagt. De altijd aanwezige humor is zwart, banaal, satirisch en soms subtiel. 
ECHO beweegt tussen beeldend- en bewegingstheater, performance en nieuw Nederlands teksttheater in. Aan de basis van het maakproces staat altijd een op maat geschreven script, dat op de vloer een beeldende en fysieke vertaling krijgt.  

ECHO pakt de wereld vast, kantelt haar en zet ook de bril waarmee wij naar die kanteling kijken ondersteboven. Ze haalt de taal weg van het beeld en de handeling weg van de tekst. Ze stapt achteruit en bekijkt het nieuwe perspectief.  Steeds opnieuw verschuift de lens, tot de vervorming en verdraaiing compleet zijn.

Name: Compagnie Zone de Broca
Description: Le théâtre d'impro du coeur au cerveau, c'est notre motto et c'est pas du pipeau. Permettez à vos collègues un moment de détente et de développement de leurs soft skills grâce à nos spectacles et ateliers que nous adapterons à votre structure. Team buildings, ateliers focalisés ou spectacles personnalisés pour votre organisation, Vous trouverez forcément votre bonheur dans notre offre de prestations !

Name: Korsa Musical Theater
Description:
By providing intensive training through the production of exceptional musical theater, we take young artists on adventures that will inspire them the rest of their lives.

Who We Are
Since its nearly two decades ago, Korsa Musical Theater has become the Bay Area’s premier musical theater training company, teaching young artists about all the disciplines of musical theater, while also producing excellent productions. We offer intensive training to young artists and believe that the best teaching combines professionalism, respect, and kindness. The life cycle of the artist is very important to us, and our team of staff, teaching artists, and designers boasts many Korsa alums who have returned to mentor the next generation.

What We Do
We bring together the Bay Area’s most talented and dedicated young performers, musicians and students of technical theater (7th grade through college) with professional directors, designers, choreographers, and musicians. We create theater that takes on challenging and sophisticated musical and dramatic themes, and that is always accompanied by a full, live orchestra. Our students go on to study at the top musical theater programs around the world, star in Broadway shows and national tours, and even win Tony Awards.

Name: Fysiek Theater OverHoop
Description: 4 professionele christenacteurs uit België en Nederland hebben de droom om verschillende voorstellingen te maken waar ze bekende Bijbelverhalen in een modern jasje steken en opvoeren. Fysiek theater of bewegingstheater is visueel, hierdoor is het toegankelijk voor alle leeftijden en achtergronden.

Name: Kyiv Municipal Academic Opera and Ballet Theatre for Children and Youth
De Leeuw Producties

Name: Visalia Fox Theatre
Description:
The Visalia Fox Theatre is a non-profit 501(c) 3 organization operated by the Visalian Friends of the Fox Theatre – a non-profit organization that was formed in December 1996 to acquire, restore and reopen the theatre as a performing arts venue.

The theatre first opened its doors in February 1930. The theatre was built by Wiliam Fox of Fox West Coast Theatres and designed by Los Angeles architects Floyd Stanbery and Clifford Balch. The theatre has an East Indian Theme inside, including a giant genie that is above the proscenium arch and to the sides of the stage are temple pagodas. Above the theatre floor is painted a gorgeous blue to represent the evening sky with twinkling lights.

Name: BRIDPORT ELECTRIC PALACE COMPANY LIMITED

Name: Ordinary Stories Theatre CIC
Description:
Ordinary Stories Theatre (OST) is a company of Applied Theatre practitioners with a wealth of experience in planning, organising and facilitating socially-engaged art and performance projects. We provide communities across the UK with creative opportunities, fostering connections through theatre and storytelling. At OST, we believe everyone deserves access to creative opportunity, and we share the ambition to deliver quality arts provision outside of metropolitan environments, namely in rural communities/ regional areas which experience low artistic engagement (like those we have grown up in). We visit and work with communities of various ages across the country, facilitating inclusive and creative workshops. Our workshops respond to participants' interests and challenges, and tend to be multi-disciplinary. Workshops so far have included arts, crafts, puppetry, creative writing, oral storytelling, poetry, natural dyeing and more. 

Alongside our creative workshops, we make performance and creative experiences which are joyful, thoughtful, environmentally sustainable and rooted in identity. We are place-responsive in our work - informed by the stories of the people and places we encounter and co-create with participants to bring their ideas to life.

Intrigued? Do get in touch at ordinarystoriestheatre@gmail.com

Name: Slidell Little Theatre
Description: Slidell Little Theatre offers the finest in community theater on the Northshore. It was founded in 1963 by volunteers who recognized the need for live theater in St. Tammany Parish, Louisiana. Over the years, it has produced over 350 main stage productions, showcasing the on stage and off stage talents of nearly 400 area residents, and entertaining approximately 10,000 adults and children each season.  SLT's state-of-the-art facility is conveniently located next to the Fremaux Town Center at 2024 Nellie Drive, and houses two stages, the Main Stage and the Allen Little Stage.

Name: Teaterpigerne
Description:
Bag Teaterpigerne står to dedikerede teaterelskere, der dele en fælles passion for musicals, skuespil og shows. Vi har mere end 15 års venskab bag os, og siden da har vi oplevet utallige forestillinger sammen - altid med et ønske om at inspirere andre til at gå i teatret. 

Ved siden af vores faste jobs driver vi Teaterpigerne for at skabe et uhøjtideligt og engageret rum for teateroplevelser. Vi fokuserer især på forestillinger i Jylland og på Fyn og anmelder med hjertet - ikke med akademisk distance. Vores anmeldelser formidler ikke blot en vurdering, men også den følelse og energi, som teateroplevelser bringer. 

Vi tror på, at teater er for alle, uanset om du er garvet teatergænger eller blot nysgerrig på scenekunstens verden. Gennem vores anmeldelser og anbefalinger håber vi at åren dørerne for flere og dele den magi, der opstår, når tæppet går op. 

Følg med, og lad os sammen hylde teatrets fortryllende univers! 

- Ninna & Line. 

#Teaterpigerne #Scenekunst #Musicals #Teateroplevelser #Teateranmeldelser

Name: La Comédie de Bruxelles
Description:
La Comédie de Bruxelles est une entreprise culturelle privée, qui organise et diffuse des spectacles. Elle a été créée en 2004, sous le nom d’Argan42 Production, à l’initiative de l’acteur et metteur en scène, Daniel Hanssens.
Argan, c’est « le » malade imaginaire de Molière.

Après plus de 35 ans de carrière, Daniel Hanssens exprime, à travers la création d’une telle structure, son souhait de liberté et d’autonomie tant dans ses choix artistiques que dans la manière dont il veut les exprimer. La compagnie fonctionne sur fonds propres et vit des recettes de ses spectacles. En 2009, la compagnie a complété son appellation d’origine avec « La Comédie de Bruxelles ». Et, c’est en 2010 qu’elle prendra définitivement le nom de « Comédie de Bruxelles ».

La Comédie de Bruxelles défend un répertoire populaire de qualité.
Elle a pour mission d’être un « passeur », un passeur de valeurs, d’une certaine éthique et de nous amener à la réflexion à travers un spectre culturel, le spectacle.

Des spectacles de qualité et accessibles à tous.
Comment ? Par l’humour ! L’humour n’est-il pas un état d’esprit, une manière d’utiliser le langage, un moyen d’expression ? D’avoir un regard bienveillant sur le monde et notre société, écarter tout jugement sur notre prochain, redonner de l’espoir aux plus démunis, repousser toutes les discriminations et avoir le droit à la différence.

Le rôle de la « Comédie de Bruxelles » est de faciliter l’accès à la culture à des personnes qui en sont éloignées, développer la curiosité et le sens critique et la participation à des débats sociétaux.

Des rencontres, après spectacles, sont d’ailleurs encouragées au sein de l’entité culturelle et une grande place est faite au partenariat avec des œuvres caritatives et notre « Les Théâtres du Cœur » en invitant tous les usagers des CPAS de Bruxelles la veille de Noël.

Name: Elvis & Ali: The Play
Description:
As the story goes, in the mid 1970’s, a frustrated Elvis Presley called Muhammad Ali for advice. Ali invited Elvis to his rural Pennsylvania training camp where they discussed life, race, family, politics, war, religion, women, and the prison of fame.

Oh,tobeaflyonthatwall!

“Elvis & Ali: The Summit” is a musical stage play about the biggest, most popular, cultural icons of the last century and what a summit between the two of them would’ve been like. We see the two men shed from their clichés—intelligent beyond their education, insightful, and, most of all, feeling, as they explore what they have done to the world and what it has done to them.

Blues and Gospel songs are played throughout the play as Elvis did in his home, with the simple, elegant accompaniment of a guitar or a piano, highlighting the conversations. The selections carry the deeper meanings that Blues and Gospel often do, and they bring extra significance to the topics of race, imprisonment, freedom and love.

Ali offers a metaphorical challenge to the King of Rock ‘N Roll to go back to his roots by singing at a country dive bar, and the show climaxes with a rousing impromptu concert that is energetic and freeing.

“Elvis & Ali: The Summit” is a story of what was and what could’ve been. It is a lesson in imprisonment and slavery, sometimes in the traditional sense and sometimes in a more subtle sense. It is part lesson in culture and race, and part lesson in the Blues and Gospel.

Today, with with Elvis biographies still hitting the New York Times Best Seller List, with the three-time Tony-nominated Million Dollar Quartet on the road in the US, Britain, Australia and permanently in Las Vegas, and with the 2016 release, Elvis with the Royal Philharmonic charting in both this country and abroad, it is clear that the

Elvis & Ali: A Staged Reading from The Thinking Cap Theater

YouTube Playlist for Elvis & Ali: The Play >> https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLdynirg3G63rIDb4mnePnnhWnl_sCQwZO

Description: RUN OPERUN is an artist collective founded in 2015. Our main aspiration is to bring opera closer to the kind of audience that might feel detached from this genre. The collective responds to the current global affairs & trends, and seeks to set opera on an equal footing with other artistic genres.

Name: Markus Zohner Arts Company
Description:
MARKUS ZOHNER ARTS COMPANY DEVISES AND STAGES WORLD-CLASS THEATRE FOR ALL AUDIENCES.

We write, create, and produce theatre performances, cultural events, radio shows, podcasts, books, and creative writing courses to share unforgettable stories with people in our community, nationally, and worldwide. We perform on stages all over the world, at schools, on the big screen, or virtually. Furthermore, we strive to be as inclusive and diverse as possible.

Our artistic starting point is an interest and curiosity directed towards theatrical forms based on body theatre, strong storytelling, and precise directing. We are interested in the big themes of the human being: Love, Power, Sex, and Death, as well as the impact of conflict, so-called progress, technology, and all forms of force on the human soul.

 Our activities reach from writing to performing, from devising to directing, from teaching masterclasses for theatre professionals to creative writing workshops for authors, from podcasting in arts and science and creating radio shows to publishing books.
We devise ambitious new pieces of high-artistic quality that are the outcome of a distinct type of work and culture that has evolved and refined over many years.

We expand our presence through online interactions such as conferences, workshops, and live-streaming of our shows.

We’re looking to push the performing arts into new media and merge theatre, technology, and society in a virtual environment. Furthermore, we’re exploring the potential for new methods, searching for innovative ideas to be created locally, nationally, and internationally within a framework that allows for real-time interaction and creates unique theatrical experiences.

 We’re aware of the climate crisis and work hard to integrate environmental sustainability into our operations, creative work, and corporate policies to reduce our carbon impact. We take measures to avoid emissions and offset our remaining carbon footprint.

Sa mission est de promouvoir les arts de la marionnette par la création, la production et la diffusion de spectacles pour le jeune public. Le TAC explore des avenues pédagogiques spécifiques grâce au médium des arts de la marionnette et contribue au développement de l’intellect, de l’imaginaire et du comportement social de l’enfant.

Name: Hoopstar Theatrical ltd
Description:

Whether it's designing bespoke events for heritage sites, leisure attractions, or seasonal festivals, or touring our own full-scale productions, Hoopstar delivers high-energy, engaging entertainment that sparks joy, curiosity, and connection.

We believe theatre should be playful, accessible, and inclusive — and we specialise in making moments that audiences of all ages will remember forever.

Name: 3Views on Theater
Description:
3Views is a digital publication offering multiple viewpoints on theater.

We imagine that arts criticism can: 
>Lead with respect for the artists
>Embrace the subjectivity inherent in engaging with any piece of art: meet shows where they are at, acknowledge who they are for, and critique from that acknowledgment
>Offer multiple perspectives

We hope to foster this critical paradigm by: 

>Curating a minimum of three views on each theater production we cover
>Hiring and paying contributors of diverse backgrounds—meaning genre and aesthetic preferences, race, spirituality, gender, ability, sexuality, culture, age, and nationality
>Rotating contributors monthly so that one voice is never dominating the critical conversation

We believe the 3Views criticism formula will help: 
>Create respectful, symbiotic relationships between critics and artists
>Change how we measure value and success in the theater
>Amplify voices of the global majority who are redefining what theater is and how we make it

Name: Descolonizarte Teatro
Description:
Our Mission.
Desco Teatro is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit professional Latinx theater organization with the mission of promoting diverse Latin American experiences, cultures, and talents through artistic and educational programming with a focus on the intersection of Latinx, immigrant and LGBTQIA+ identities.

Our Pledge.
To offer an array of programs that are financially accessible for underserved and underprivileged Latinx communities.

Why decolonization?
Theater serves as a powerful platform for individuals of Latinx descent to reconnect with their cultural roots and heritage. Decolonization in the context of the arts allows us to reclaim the spotlight and assert our agency in narrating our own stories. This involves not only reframing and correcting narratives about ourselves but also addressing historical inaccuracies, challenging stereotypes, and celebrating our rich history and knowledge.



The process of decolonizing Latinx art has profound implications. It empowers people by providing them with a means to amplify their voices and perspectives. This empowerment isn't limited to a single group; it resonates across diverse communities, fostering a sense of unity, belonging, and pride.

 

Through productions that explore decolonization, we bring joy and healing to individuals and communities, serving as a source of inspiration, education, and cultural celebration. Ultimately, these productions contribute to a more inclusive, equitable, and empathetic society where diverse voices are valued and heard.

Name: Good Medicine Productions
Description:
Good Medicine Productions is a non-profit theatrical performance company based out of Westerville, Ohio. Our mission is to bring audiences of all ages transformative joy through the art of improvisation, comedic, performance and innovative storytelling.
Primarily, GMP is a health care theater company as their year-round signature program brings comedic performers bedside to nursing homes and pediatric patients. The comedic performers use physical comedy, improvisation, music, the circus arts and more to help relieve anxiety, isolation and sadness often found in the medical environment.  GMP's tagline is "Find Your Joy." But it's not so much that the performers bring the joy, but act as a catalyst for the residents and kiddos to find their joy that lives inside all of us.
Good Medicine also does performances for the public, including Uptown Scrooge during the holidays.

Name: Good Theater
Description:
Good Theater, a professional nonprofit theater founded in 2001 and based in Portland, Maine, has been producing high-quality theatrical productions for over two decades. As Maine’s largest employer of locally-based theater artists, we are dedicated to creating exceptional art, supporting local talent, and expanding community access to the transformative power of live theater.

Our mission is threefold:

Create Exceptional Art – Present professional, diverse theatrical productions that resonate with audiences of all backgrounds and highlight the best of Maine’s talent.

Support Local Artists – Fairly compensate and provide consistent employment opportunities for Maine-based artists, contributing to the sustainability of the arts in our state.

Expand Community Access – Leverage the arts as a tool for connection, education, and inclusion by offering programs and productions that are affordable and accessible to all.

In 2025, we proudly opened as the theater-in-residence and primary tenant at the newly renovated, 480-seat Stevens Square Theater. This move has transformed an underutilized performance space in the heart of Portland into a vibrant cultural hub, providing a state-of-the-art venue for our acclaimed productions as well as a wide range of community and cultural events. As the primary tenant, we also manage all venue bookings, helping to catalyze community partnerships, nurture creative collaborations, and elevate Portland as a premier arts destination.

Through our work, we aim not only to entertain but to spark dialogue, build connections, and contribute to Maine’s creative economy. We are committed to enriching the cultural fabric of our community, supporting the growth of local talent, and making the arts accessible to all.

Name: Lionel Wendt Art Centre
Description: The Lionel Wendt Centre for the Arts is owned by Lionel Wendt Memorial Fund (LWMF), a non-profit, charitable trust with no state funding, and managed by a Board of Trustees who serve in a voluntary capacity. Inaugurated in 1945 and incorporated in 1949 by an Act of Parliament, the LWMF is the official custodian of the legacy of Lionel Wendt. Established in memory of Lionel Wendt (1900-1944) for the development and promotion of the arts, the Lionel Wendt Memorial Centre was built creating spaces for exhibitions, concerts, recitals, theatrical and dance performances and providing opportunities for classes in art, music, drama and photography.

Name: Center Stage Theatre - Idaho Falls
Description:
Welcome to Center Stage Theatre, where the magic of the stage comes alive in the heart of Idaho Falls. Nestled in our vibrant community, Center Stage is more than a theatre – it's a haven for creativity and cultural enrichment. It is our goal to deliver exceptional performances that captivate and inspire. We take pride in providing a diverse range of family-friendly productions that cater to all tastes. Our stage is a dynamic space that brings stories to life and fosters a deep appreciation for the performing arts. At Center Stage Theatre, we believe in the transformative power of live entertainment and strive to create an immersive experience that resonates with audiences of all ages. Join us on a thrilling journey where each production is a celebration of talent, passion, and the enduring magic of theatre. We invite you to be a part of our community, where the spotlight is always on the joy of storytelling. Welcome to Center Stage!

In addition to our performances, we also offer theatre classes for aspiring performers via the CenterStage Broadway Academy. 

Follow us on Facebook (https://www.facebook.com/centerstageif) and Instagram (@centerstagetheatreif)  for updates!

Description:

Our 2023   show "The Good Women" opened at VAULT Festival, transferred to Greenwich and Chelsea Theatre and will go on a UK & Ireland tour in 2024.

We offer support to artists re. production, touring, funding, marketing, script feedback, dramaturgy and acting coaching. Get in touch via goodwomenarts@gmail.com and we are happy to have a chat about your production needs. 

Our process is always artist-led: We empower writers, actors, designers, theatre- and film makers to follow their vision. We take care of the organisational side of things, so you have the freedom to create.

Name: WAT - Wijchens Amateur Toneel
Description:
Het Wijchens Amateur Toneel is een vereniging van enthousiaste toneelspelers, decorbouwers en licht- & geluidtechnici, waar humor, gezelligheid en saamhorigheid voorop staan!
Bij het WAT komen we elke maandagavond samen om toneel te spelen en leuke oefeningen/warming-ups te doen om nóg beter te worden. Naast serieuze regie voor het instuderen van een rol wordt er natuurlijk ook veel gelachen om bloopers en gekkigheid.

Buiten de wekelijkse repetities wordt er ook regelmatig een uitje , een borrelavondje of een dagje uit georganiseerd, zodat er genoeg ruimte is om elkaar te leren kennen, te lachen en te ontspannen.

Location: Kingston upon Thames, Kingston upon Thames

Name: Arc-en-scène Théâtre
Description:
Arc-en-scène est spécialisée dans le théâtre forum et l'accompagnement d'équipes.
Notre axe de travail est l'empowerment et le développement de l'autonomie, de l'autodétermination et nous favorisons l'émancipation.
Chacun·e est appelé·e à devenir acteur·ice et auteur·e de sa vie. Ensemble, nous cherchons à développer les savoirs-être et savoirs-faire pour aller vers plus de liberté, de dignité et d'égalité grâce aux outils du théâtre, de l'écriture créative et de l'expression verbale.
Nous accompagnons des groupes en analyse de pratique en utilisant le théâtre image, une approche holistique qui permet de mettre en lien la tête, le corps et les ressentis.
Nous proposons aussi des entraînements aux entretiens d'embauche, des répétitions de présentations ou de conférences et des préparations à la prise de parole en public.
Pour cela, nous pouvons vous aider dans la reprise de confiance en soi, le développement de l'estime de soi et la gestion du stress.
Si nécessaire, nous vous accompagnons aussi pour la constitution de vos présentations - Powerpoint, dossiers de candidature, lettre de motivation - et l'élaboration de vos projets - professionnels, recherche d'emploi, etc.
Notre éthique de travail engage les valeurs de bienveillance, d'écoute inconditionnelle, d'empathie et de patience.
Formés professionnellement, nous suivons régulièrement des formations continues et participons aussi à des groupes d'analyse de pratique, d'intervision et de supervision.

Name: AMTP LTD
Description:
Our Ethos

We are a new company bringing the chance of performing and working in the industry to all amateur Actors, Dancers, Cast, Crew Ensemble Players and Musicians in fact, anyone who is interested in The Arts and has a passion for "treading the boards"

We know that making a career in the world of Theatre takes not only talent, but also experience, and gaining that experience can seem anywhere from difficult to impossible. 

Our aim as a Company is to put on a varied programme of productions that will enable everyone to gain that experiance and have a chance at taking centre stage. 

So wait no longer and apply to one of our Open Audition Days or sign up to our Open Register of Talent, and make today the start of your tomorrow!

AMTP - Gaining Experiance Through Performance

Name: Teatro Boxer
Description:
La compagnia Teatro Boxer dal 2004, anno della sua nascita, ha realizzato diverse attività nel campo teatrale.

Guidata dall’autore e attore padovano Andrea Pennacchi con sempre a suo fianco il musicista Giorgio Gobbo, Teatro Boxer produce spettacoli di prosa e lezioni – spettacolo per ragazzi delle superiori.

In oltre quindici anni di attività ha portato in scena molti spettacoli, tra i quali: Una piccola Odissea, Mio padre – appunti sulla guerra civile, Pojana e i suoi fratelli, Enrico IV- a scuola di re, Trincee: risveglio di primavera, Eroi – finalista al Premio off del Teatro Stabile del Veneto – Raixe storte, Quel veneto di Shakespeare. Numerose le sue lezioni spettacolo per i ragazzi delle superiori, nate grazie alla collaborazione con Arteven: Una feroce primavera, Viva Verdi!, Galileo – Le montagne della luna e altri miracoli, Capitan Salgari alla riscossa, Il Tao di Bruce Lee (un drago in giardino).

Ultime, giovani, produzioni che hanno debuttato negli scorsi anni sono The merry wives of Windsor e A midsummer night’s dream di William Shakespeare, Gulliver’s travels e Darwin’s diary per la regia di Lorenzo Maragoni, spettacoli in lingua inglese pensati per gli studenti. Da non dimenticare anche la lezione spettacolo bilingue Shakespeare at work.

Dalla sua prima edizione cura la direzione artistica di Terrevolute – Festival della bonifica a San Donà di Piave e ha curato per due edizioni la rassegna Odeo days di Padova. Ha collaborato e collabora con molte realtà del territorio regionale veneto come l’Accademia teatrale veneta di Venezia,la Fondazione Teatro Civico di Schio, l’Accademia Lorenzo da Ponte e i servizi scolastici di Padova e Venezia. Organizza e segue laboratori di teatro per adulti, adolescenti e bambini.

Description:
We are a collective of next-generation artists who celebrate expression and experimentation through art. Believing art should be accessible for the audience and the artist, we bring new life to all mediums.

Name: North Country Community Theatre (NCCT)
Description: The mission of North Country Community Theatre (NCCT) is to promote meaningful community connection through the unique experience of participating in live theatre. Our organization allows members of our community to take an active role in the creation of quality theatrical productions, on stage, in the pit, backstage, and through leadership and volunteerism. We believe in the power of learning by doing, and therefore strive to open these roles to people with all levels of experience. NCCT aspires to cultivate a diverse, equitable, and inclusive environment, and we are committed to ensuring that our theatrical programs are accessible to all members of our community.

Name: Hey Thanks! Theatre Collective
Description:
We're a queer, women-led theatre collective based between London and Edinburgh. 

We produce community events and productions throughout the year, and are passionate about creating spaces where everyone feels empowered to create.

Name: Elephant Run District
Description:
Elephant Run District is an NYC-based indie theater, film, and new media company devoted to developing the work of a core group of artists, challenging expectations, engaging our audiences, inspiring dialogue in the communities we serve, and creating long-lasting memories. ERD seeks to entertain its audiences while addressing issues that affect our society. The District is a place where traditions collide and new possibilities are explored in the hunt to create stories that are ultimately human.

The company gets its name after the time when founding members Aimee Todoroff and Chris Harcum first met on a chilly Monday around midnight in 2010. This happened to be the final time the Ringling Bros. and Barnum & Bailey Circus ran their elephants across 34th Street to get them to Madison Square Garden. People cheered the elephants while others protested the cruelty. There were cops shouting, sirens blaring, clowns cheerily waving on tall bikes, horses majestically trotting, and stilt walkers gliding above the crowd. The elephants zipped by much faster than you might imagine. It was exciting and unexpected, just like how we feel good theater should be.

Like any community, Elephant Run District is in a constant state of evolution, becoming more diverse and exciting as collaborators move in, set up shop and offer their creative wares to the world. Established in late 2010, ERD has produced several full-length plays and various smaller projects.

Name: Project Spotlight

Description:
Compagnie de théâtre basée à Grenoble (38) en Isère, fondée en 2014 par Juliette Rizoud.
De septembre 2022 à juin 2025, la compagnie sera en résidence triennale sur tout le Pays Voironnais, le Cœur de Chartreuse et associée à l’EPCC Grand Angle de Voiron (38), avec le soutien du Département Isère.

Name: la youle compagnie
Description:
La Youle Compagnie est une compagnie de théâtre, de conte et de marionnette qui crée, produit, diffuse et programme les arts de la scène sous toutes leurs formes. En résidence mission auprès de la Ville de Rouen, elle concentre particulièrement ses actions sur les quartiers de la rive gauche.

Chaque année, elle propose le festival 1,2,3 Contes d'été, un événement dédié aux arts du conte et de la musique, qui se déroule durant la première semaine de juillet.

Elle organise également le festival des arts de la rue, intitulé Théâtre à la Cité. Ce rendez-vous annuel, programmé entre mai et septembre, offre une riche diversité de spectacles, mêlant théâtre, arts de la rue et performances vivantes, avec des formats singuliers et innovants.

En partenariat avec l'association Culture du Cœur, la Youle Compagnie a récemment inauguré un nouvel espace culturel baptisé CASA, situé au 1er étage du centre commercial Saint-Sever, dans l'ancienne boutique Camaïeu. Ce lieu polyvalent, véritable carrefour culturel, comprend une bibliothèque participative où chacun peut déposer et emprunter des livres, ainsi qu’un café littéraire.

À travers ces initiatives, la Youle Compagnie poursuit son engagement en faveur de l'accès à la culture pour tous, tout en encourageant les rencontres et les échanges entre artistes et public dans un esprit de partage et de convivialité.

Name: The Waiting Room Series
Description:
The Waiting Room Series is one of the first Artificial Intelligence and Digital Immersive Experience for Theater, Marketing and Facilitation "The Waiting Room Series" is a pioneering venture that seamlessly integrates Artificial Intelligence and immersive digital technology to transform various domains, including theater, marketing, and facilitation.
The Waiting Room Series ushers in a new era of possibilities at the intersection of art, technology, and human interaction. This groundbreaking venture is one of the first of its kind to harness the transformative power of Artificial Intelligence (AI) and immersive digital experiences to reshape the worlds of theater, marketing, and facilitation. Through its innovative approach, The Waiting Room Series transcends traditional boundaries, offering unparalleled opportunities for engagement, storytelling, and connection.

At its core, The Waiting Room Series embraces the dynamic interplay between AI and immersive digital technologies to create unparalleled experiences that captivate audiences. This unique combination allows for the seamless integration of virtual and physical realms, blurring the lines between reality and imagination. By leveraging the capabilities of AI and immersive technologies, the series pushes creative boundaries, enabling the exploration of new narratives and modes of expression that were previously unimaginable.

In the realm of theater, The Waiting Room Series reimagines the traditional stage by introducing AI-driven characters, interactive digital sets, and real-time audience interaction. This groundbreaking approach transforms the theater experience into a dynamic and immersive journey, where audiences become active participants in the unfolding story. Through AI-powered dialogue and adaptive narratives, each performance becomes a unique and personalized experience, tailored to the preferences and reactions of the audience.

In the marketing world, The Waiting Room Series offers an innovative app

Name: Theaterbolwerk PUNCH
Description:
PUNCH
Theaterbolwerk PUNCH brengt teksten van nieuwe Nederlandse toneelschrijvers naar het podium met behulp van een professioneel theaterbolwerk. PUNCH bestaat uit gerenommeerde acteurs, regisseurs, dramaturgen en toneelschrijvers die allemaal in dienst staan van nieuwe Nederlandse toneelteksten en schrijvers. PUNCH streeft naar een wereld waarin theaterteksten van nieuwe toneelschrijvers net zo veel in de theaters te zien zijn als de klassiekers en die van bekende en gerenommeerde toneelschrijvers. Theaterbolwerk PUNCH brengt verrassend en verfrissend theater naar het Nederlands theater publiek. Theaterbolwerk PUNCH heeft de Leidse Schouwburg als thuisbasis.

Name: Applause Vadodara - Theatre and Art
Description:
Applause Vadodara encourages an age-no-bar gender-no-bar language-no-bar type of association with theatre and art. The group focuses on creating innovative theatre experiences that engage, empower and entertain. It is Vadodara's favorite theatre initiative, since 2014, with an aspiration to make the world a better place through theatre engagement. 

Programs at Applause Vadodara: 

New Theatre Rules - India's longest running community theatre engagement program, running for over 6 years, every single Friday. With more than 300+ session, 600+ individuals have been offered applied theatre experience. The program aims to make theatre experiences available to all - professionals as well as those with an interest to try theatre. 

Storytelling for Children - Applause runs a storytelling program every saturday for children, open for all to join. A Storytelling Festival is also celebrated annually, since 2015.

Intensive Acting Program - Vadodara's first and most empowering performance oriented 5 Weekend Theatre Program for individuals from all backgrounds, fondly known as IAP

Street Plays for a Cause - Commissioned performances, conceptualized for maximum impact for its audiences to inspire positive change.

Name: Fourteenth Grade Players
Description: Since 2001, Fourteenth Grade Players has prided itself on bringing the talent, inclusivity, and professionalism of the GW student theatre community to the wider student body. Our wide range of hard-hitting productions, both dramatic and comedic, allow any member of the GW community to pursue their interest in the arts through a warm, accepting, enthusiastic, and professional environment. From being a member of the student team involved in directing a production, acting on the stage in one of our four shows each year, designing and executing the myriad technical elements of each production, to simply being an audience member watching the performance unfold, we hope to unite the larger GW and DC community in a shared passion and appreciation for theatre and the arts.

Name: Parallel 45 Theatre
Description:
P45 SUMMER THEATRE FESTIVAL
Every summer, Parallel 45 produces a festival of plays in the relaxed setting of the Civic Center Park in Traverse City. Artists from across the country and around the world convene on P45’s new, state-of-the-art stage to perform adventurous, boundary-pushing musicals, plays, and devised works for all ages--rotating daily. Local food vendors, a well-stocked bar, and live music allow our community to gather in celebration of the theatre and the beauty of northwest Michigan. During the shoulder seasons, Parallel 45 operates a theatre education program and produces a free-to-the-public contemporary play reading series.

WHY
With play, joy, and intellectual rigor, we attack the notion that there is one correct way to look at the world. P45 complements an industry of theatre artists desperate for new voices, new material, and new stories by taking a strong look at our canon, breaking toxic values embedded within, and imagining a new path forward. We believe that a flourishing and fulfilling cultural experience, to which people from every walk of life are invited—and within which they can see themselves reflected—is essential to our democracy and our quality of life in small-town America. For this reason, we look to the theatre as our public forum, our town square, a place where ideas can be exchanged with more dignity, respect, and efficacy than in other areas of our society. Our greatest asset is our joyful, open, intellectually curious audience, always ready to explore.

We want to put the stories of those who don’t feel represented in our society at the centre, stimulating a conversation on the different ways we live our lives.

Name: Teatro a la Fresca
Description:
Compañía teatro amateur con el entretenimiento en su ADN.
Asociación cultural que promueve las artes escénicas, y reivindica la igualdad real y efectiva de mujeres en todo ámbito relacionado con el teatro.
.
“Teatro a la Fresca” se forma en 2021 cuando dos de las fundadoras, María Berenguer y María Jesús Garrido, deciden crear esta asociación cultural y buscar obras modernas y originales que destaquen el papel de la mujer en el arte.
.
Así comienzan esta aventura bajo la dirección de una experimentada actriz, directora y amiga, Rosa Lasierra, con más de 30 años de experiencia teatral. Completan el elenco con viejas compañeras de escenario, Ana Nieto, Beatriz Román y Elena Val, y una nueva incorporación que trae juventud e ilusión al equipo, Selene Barrachina. Este grupo de mujeres con personalidades, intereses, formación, experiencia y edades dispares se hacen fuertes en su pasión común, el TEATRO.
.
Teatro a la Fresca busca la frescura, diversión, desvergüenza y desparpajo a través de la humildad, compañerismo, respeto a la diversidad y sobre todo el amor por disfrutar de las pequeñas cosas de la vida. Esta positividad e ilusión pretende traspasar la cuarta pared y tocar los corazones de quienes decidan dejarse llevar. Teatro a la Fresca anhela divertir, convencer y no dejar indiferente a ningún espectador con su primer montaje, que se estrena en verano de 2022.
.
Nuestra misión: promover las artes escénicas.
Nuestro objetivo: agrupar a personas interesadas en esta disciplina artística.
Nuestro mensaje:
Entendemos el teatro como fuente de desarrollo humano, personal y social. Promovemos los objetivos de igualdad real y efectiva de mujeres y hombres, en todos los ámbitos relacionados con el teatro. Pretendemos desarrollar iniciativas culturales, sociales y educativas a través de las artes escénicas. Y queremos promover a través de ellas la diversidad de género en el ámbito teatral como fuente de enriquecimiento de la cultura y de los valores humanos en la sociedad.

Name: The Marvellous Elephant Man
Description:
The Marvellous Elephant Man has come a long way since his April 2022 debut at the humble Melbourne Jazzlab.

The show's sell-out run at the 2023 Adelaide Fringe, earned 15 x  reviews and won the Critics' Circle Award for 'Best Show.'

Following another sell-out run at Melbourne's Chapel Off Chapel, the musical is set to headline the 650-capacity Sydney Spiegeltent in September 2023.

----

"IF I COULD GIVE THIS SHOW TEN STARS, I WOULD”  GLAM Adelaide

"THE JEWEL OF THE FRINGE"  Stage Whispers

"A VICTORIAN F**K TON OF FUN"  BEAT Magazine

----

The production was originally conceived, scripted and scored by three professional musicians: Jay and Sarah Nandagopan plus Marc Lucchesi.

Following the show’s 2022 debut, accomplished filmmaker Chris HF Mitchell joined as Co-Director, alongside Olivier-award winning West End veteran, Guy Masterson.

The show’s current cast features world-class musical talent, including Australian Opera tenors Ben Clark and Kanen Breen and Annelise Hall, who set to play Sandy in 2024’s big stage production of Grease.

Name: The Whisper Current Productions
Description:
The Whisper Current Productions is a London-based independent theatre and media production company founded by director Xinyue "Sammi" Xing. Born from the creative spirit of Scroll Arc Theatre — continuing the journey through wind and light. We create immersive, poetic, and visually striking experiences that explore identity, emotion, and human connection. Our works flow like wind and light, weaving theatre, sound, and visual storytelling to engage audiences on multiple levels.

Our debut production, Bound by the Wind, premiered at the Lambeth Fringe in 2025. It exemplifies our approach: intimate yet epic, grounded in human relationships yet elevated through stylised visuals and soundscapes. We aim to create works that invite reflection, evoke emotion, and resonate long after the performance ends.

Looking forward, The Whisper Current Productions is committed to developing new theatre and cross-media projects, supporting collaborations with directors, performers, designers, and composers. We seek to build a sustainable platform for innovative, thoughtful, and emotionally engaging art, reaching audiences locally and internationally.

At the intersection of Eastern aesthetics and contemporary performance, our company strives to craft works that move subtly yet powerfully, like whispers of wind and shafts of light.

Name: Höga Kusten Friluftsteater
Description:
Välkommen till Höga Kusten Friluftsteater!
Höga Kusten är världsunik för sin landhöjning och det är inte konstigt att det har uppstått så många vackra platser i detta område genom årtusenden. 

I sommar är det teaterpremiär på en sådan plats, nämligen på Höga Kusten Friluftsteater i vackra Lövvik. Här finns idag 80 bofasta personer. De var fler förr. 

Men idag har förenade krafter av en ohejdbar ordförande i byföreningen, en lokal snickare, montör, elektriker och killen som hade en duglig lastbil, eldsjälarna i kommunalpolitiken och näringslivet, en drivande teaterchef, en till Stockholm utflyttad popstjärna samt tusentals ideella arbetstimmar byggt en modern, storskalig friluftsteater där ett helt nytt bygdespel ska uppföras mitt ute i obygden med premiär den 11 juli 2024. Vi hoppas vi ses i sommar!

Name: GENÇ TİYATROCULAR TOPLULUĞU
Description:
Türkiye'de bir ilk olarak gerçekleştirmeye başladığımız projemiz için pilot bölge Eskişehir belirlenmiştir.  Okullarda bugüne kadar gençlerimiz bir çok sanatsal faaliyette bulunmuş olup bunların çoğu ya okulların arşivinde yada resmi kurumlarda kalmıştır. Hepimiz veli olarak bunların teminini bile belki yapamadık ve çoğu güzel gösteri geçmişte kalmış oldu. 
   Bu zamanda artık bunların daha fonksiyonel bir yolla herkeze ulaşması ve gençlerin artık kapalı kapılar ardında değil de özgürce sahne sanatlarını sergileyebilmeleri adına bir akım başlatarak Genç Tiyatrocular Topluluğumuzu oluşturduk. Platformumuz bu sahne sanatlarını dijital kanallarda sergileyerek gençlerimize destek olmayı amaçlamaktadır. Bu amaçla kurulan topluluğumuz elde edilecek gelirlerle ileriye dönük yatırımlarla faaliyetlerini örnek faydalı model olarak sürdürecektir.
      Projemizin kapsamlı bir şekilde faaliyetini sürdürmesi ile elde edilecek gelir ve desteklerle neler mi yapacağız ! 
Öncelikle gençlerin okul hayatları adına katkılar yapılacaktır. Bu aşamada öğrencilerin sanatsal faaliyetleri için ihtiyaçlarının temini, liseyi bitirdikten sonra eğilimleri olması durumunda ilgili konservatuar ve tiyatro okullarında kullanabilecekleri burs temini, okulların sanatsal faaliyetlerinin devamlılığını sağlamak adına ihtiyaçlarının temini gibi birçok aşamada katkı sağlayarak, Türkiye'de başlangıcı çok iyi amaçla kurulan bir oluşum olmuş olacağız.
Ülkemizde bulunan Tiyatro kurumlarına da, lise yıllarında sanata gönül veren gençlerin yetiştirilmesi hususunda ayrıca destek olmayı hedeflemekteyiz.
Pilot ilimiz kültür başkenti , dünyanın yaşanabilir en iyi 3. şehri seçilen Eskişehir'de başlatılacak bu projeyle tüm Türkiye'de ki okullar da kapsama alınıp ülkemizdeki sanatsal faaliyetlerin yayılmasını sağlayacağız.

Name: For the Makers Productions
Description:
Born in 2019 in a midtown coffee shop, For the Makers Productions (previously Seeded Productions) was the result of three hungry NYC artists eager to do the work they felt called to do. Through a journey of ups and downs (and a pandemic), we became an official LLC in 2022. 

For the Makers Productions exists to aid and produce innovative works in the performing arts that challenge audiences to connect to stories and inspire artists to tell them.

We are passionate about cultivating space for the developmental process of new and reimagined works. With both empathy and creative bravery, Makers provides opportunities for artists to do what they love, spurring each other on to grow, and challenging others to do the same.

Description: Amsterdam Comedy Studio provides comedy classes, monthly shows, and everything funny in between.

Name: QTCboston
Description:
QTC is a queer storytelling collective that uplifts the voices of, and provides a platform for LGBTQ+ identifying individuals of all backgrounds and experiences within the creative community of the greater Boston area. 
We are changing the future of the theater industry by exclusively programming new works that tell unique stories which encourage audiences to shift their perspective on what it means to be an active and compassionate member of a community.
