Description: Speak Up! Act Out! cic is a theatre company based in Brighton, UK. We are committed to sharing stories, skills, and knowledge, whilst making a positive social impact, through our work.

Name: Oshi's World Theatre
Description: We are Wales’ first theatre company making work exclusively with and for people with  profound and multiple learning disabilities (PMLD). We make innovative and original work that is engaging and meaningful for our audiences by creating multi-sensory story-telling experiences within theatres.

Name: Act Too Players Foundation
Description:
Inspiring +    Encouraging +    Empowering =  Community
We provide scholarships for children in foster care and low income families in need. We support children with special needs such as autism, ADHD, ADD, Asperger Syndrome, rare muscular diseases, hearing disabilities, dyslexia, traumatic brain injuries, mental disorders and seeing impaired. We also support senior citizens in our community by performing free concerts throughout the year.

Over the past 21 years, Act Too Players has generously supported Williamson County by giving scholarships to children in financial need from our personal funds. This has become a hardship and seek grant support and donations
to provide these services. Children benefit and thrive from the support of the theatre community and gain confidence by encouraging their passions. Please consider supporting Act Too Players Foundation, a registered 501(C)(3) nonprofit.

Description: Alumni van de Meisner Toneelacademie maken binnen Meisner theaterproducties voorstellingen. Wij staan voor het vakmanschap van de acteur.

Name: Howick Little Theatre
Description: Howick Little Theatre is a community theatre that has been entertaining Auckland patrons and theatregoers since 1954.

Name: LA TIPI
Description:
LA TIPI : Tribu d'improvisation des poètes itinérants 

Cette association a pour objet de promouvoir la pratique de l’improvisation théâtrale principalement, du spectacle vivant plus globalement et de la création artistique de l’audio-visuel en coordonnant des actions, diffusant des connaissances et techniques et en organisant des spectacles ou toute initiative dans ces domaines.

Name: ImproSynthesis - Σχολή Αυτοσχεδιαστικού Θεάτρου
Description:
ImproSynthesis

Located in the heart of Athens, Greece, ImproSynthesis is your premier destination for improv and acting education. We offer a dynamic range of services tailored to both individuals and businesses, including:

Improv Classes: Whether you're a beginner or an experienced performer, our classes are designed to enhance your creativity, confidence, and spontaneity.

Acting Classes: Our acting classes are led by professional actors with degrees approved by the Ministry of Culture, ensuring top-notch training.

Rehearsal Space: A versatile and supportive environment for artists to rehearse and create.

Special Events: Monthly events featuring guest instructors from around the world, providing unique learning opportunities.

Corporate Training: Customized training sessions focusing on team building, problem solving, and creative thinking, ideal for tech companies and other businesses.

Corporate Events: Expertly organized events tailored to meet the specific needs of your team.

Our team consists of highly trained instructors, all of whom are active performers in the oldest and most active improv teams in Athens. At ImproSynthesis, we are committed to fostering an inclusive, supportive, and creative community where students can thrive.
Join us at ImproSynthesis and discover the transformative power of improv and acting!

Name: isi bhakhomen productions
Description: isi bhakhomen is a freelance artist who produces works that they believe in.

Name: Welttheater Einsiedeln
Description:
Seit 1924 verwandelt das Welttheater Einsiedeln den Klosterplatz alle ca. sieben Jahre in eine grosse Freilichtbühne. Über 500 Laien – Schauspieler:innen, Musiker:innen und Helfer:innen – gestalten rund 40 Aufführungen pro Spielperiode. Organisiert wird es von der Welttheatergesellschaft Einsiedeln unter Präsident Lukas Lang.

Informationen, Anregungen oder Fragen können Sie unter info@welttheater.ch anfordern bzw. stellen.

Name: Liverpool's Royal Court
Description:
Royal Court Liverpool is the friendliest theatre in the city. With pre-show dining and a range of drinks served before and after the show, a trip to The Court is night of great entertainment. 

An historic art deco building which has been modernised and refreshed, The Royal Court is a mix of modern service standards in a traditional setting. The theatre produces eight long running plays every year, mostly comedies and musicals. 

The shows have a Liverpool theme with largely Liverpool cast and crew. Sets are built in the city, rehearsals take place here and 95% of all money spent by the theatre goes back into the local economy.

Name: Skånska Operan
Description: Vi är en fri teatergrupp i Skåne som vänder oss till en bred publik och vår ambition är att sprida opera som konstform. Genom att spela på svenska i intima lokaler med folklig förankring når vi en ny operapublik samtidigt som vi gärna vill överraska och locka de trogna operabesökarna. Vi spelar i arenaform, alltid på svenska och publiken är placerad mycket nära sångarna. Om du sträcker ut foten är du med i skådespelet…

Name: Terraquée
Description:
Spectacles, actions culturelles, vulgarisation scientifique, ateliers mathéâtre, festival Maths en ville. 
Terraquée est labellisée Jeunesse et Éducation Populaire, et titulaire de l’agrément de l’Académie de Créteil en tant qu’association éducative complémentaire de l’enseignement public.

Name: Teatro Sustentável
Description: O Teatro Sustentável trabalha na criação, produção e execução de espetáculos infanto-juvenis, possuindo um vasto portfolio de temáticas. Com o propósito de transformar vidas através da arte e do teatro, com vários projetos aprovados pelas Leis de Incentivo à Cultura.

Name: Podium Hoge Woerd
Description:
Podium Hoge Woerd is het nieuwe, vlakke vloer theater met 229 stoelen in Castellum Hoge Woerd, dat is geopend in september 2015.
Podium Hoge Woerd presenteert jaarlijks ca. 100 voorstellingen voor bezoekers voornamelijk afkomstig uit Leidsche Rijn, Vleuten en De Meern. De voorstellingen bestaan uit cabaret en kleinkunst, familie- en jeugdvoorstellingen, theater, dans, muziek en muziektheater en een buitenprogramma. De kaartverkoop voor de voorstellingen verloopt via onze website.
Podium Hoge Woerd is een initiatief van Theater Kikker in Utrecht en ontvangt subsidie van de gemeente Utrecht.

Castellum Hoge Woerd
Op initiatief van de Gemeente Utrecht is in september 2015 Castellum Hoge Woerd gerealiseerd:
een moderne interpretatie van het Romeinse fort dat hier bijna 2000 jaar geleden stond. Het is een eigentijds, duurzaam gebouw waarin ook Museum Hoge Woerd, Steede Hoge Woerd en CastellumCafé zijn ondergebracht. Je kunt er dan ook eindeloos rondstruinen, door de stallen en over het panorama, in het prachtige paviljoen met het Romeinse schip De Meern1 of de boomgaard en de tuinen. Een gastvrij restaurant en ons theater maken deze unieke beleving in Leidsche Rijn compleet.

Name: Fuldt Hus
Description: Forening Fuldt Hus har til formål at bidrage til at socialt udsatte oplever sig som en del af et fællesskab gennem deltagelse i kulturlivet. Foreningens medlemmer er teatre, der ønsker at donere ikke-solgte billetter. Billetterne stilles til rådighed for socialt og økonomisk udsatte via organisationer, som arbejder på et socialt og alment velgørende grundlag eller til andre, der på nonprofit basis arbejder for at give økonomisk og socialt udsatte en bedre hverdag.

Name: Sjællands Teater
Description:
Sjællands Teater skaber teater til hele livet - for små og store - børn, unge og voksne!
Vi har til huse i både Holbæk og Slagelse Kommuner, og vores børne- og ungdomsafdeling Fair Play turnerer i hele landet. Oplev musikalske familieforestillinger, samfundsdebatterende ungdomsforestillinger, aktuelle talkshows med kendte gæster, sommerteater under åben himmel, comedy og udvalgte gæstespil fra andre teatre.

Sjællands Teater blev en realitet den 1. januar 2021 som en fusion mellem Holbæk Teater og Teatret Fair Play og en indgåelse af egnsteateraftale med både Holbæk og Slagelse Kommuner. 
Sjællands Teater spiller i hele regionen og turnerer over hele landet.
Sjællands teater har desuden et tæt samarbejde med Holbæk Musik- & Teaterforening. 

Sjællands Teater kan i dag kalde sig Danmarks største egnsteater med cirka 12 egenproduktioner om året foruden talkshows, undervisningsforløb, gæstespil, stand-up og meget mere - i alt mere end 150 arrangementer årligt!

Sjællands Teater er en selvejendeinstitution, der beskæftiger ca. 20 fastansatte medarbejdere, to elever og et skiftende antal freelance medarbejdere og scenekunstnere. Det årlige budget er på cirka 16 millioner kr. 

Sjællands Teater producerer og præsenterer iscenesatte oplevelser af højeste kvalitet til alle gennem hele livet. Vi ønsker at præsentere publikum for scenekunsten og dens mangfoldige udtryksformer. Du kan møde det, du allerede kender, og du kan blive overrasket på ny.

Vi er dit lokale teater - på hele Sjælland!
VÆR SAMMEN

Name: Teatrul Apropo
The Market Theatre Foundation
Description: The Market Theatre, based in the downtown bohemian suburb of Newtown in Johannesburg, South Africa, was opened in 1976, operating as an independent, anti-racist theatre during the country's apartheid regime. It was named after a fruit and vegetable market that was previously located there.

Name: Mjojo Finance Play
Description:
Mjojo Finance Play is a pioneering initiative dedicated to bringing financial literacy to South Africa’s youth through the power of interactive storytelling. Our unique approach dramatizes complex financial concepts like saving, budgeting, entrepreneurship, and smart spending, making them accessible to learners from township, rural, and peri-urban schools.

Operating in partnership with Soweto Theatre, we create engaging, impactful performances that reach children who are often excluded from traditional financial education. We provide learners with practical tools, including workbooks and piggy banks, to help them develop positive financial habits that last a lifetime.

Our mission extends to empowering learners with special needs, and we are actively developing programs for children with sensory difficulties by working closely with professionals in the field. Through financial literacy, we aim to break the cycle of poverty and enable upward mobility for the next generation.

Join us as we educate, empower, and inspire South Africa’s future leaders to build a brighter, financially secure tomorrow.

Name: collectif F71
Description: Le collectif F71 réunit depuis 2004, Stéphanie Farison, Emmanuelle Lafon, Sara Louis, Lucie Nicolas et Lucie Valon, accompagnées par Gwendoline Langlois, directrice de production. Ce qui caractérise notre travail, c’est l’interrogation du réel, de l’Histoire, des luttes et l’usage de matériaux dramaturgiques diversifiés pour construire une écriture scénique. Après une série de spectacles qui s’appuyaient sur l’œuvre et la figure du philosophe Michel Foucault, nous travaillons à faire théâtre à partir de cette « exaspération de notre sensibilité de tous les jours » que nous y avons puisée.

Name: Theatre for Change NGO
Description: Aimed at promotion Theatre of the Oppressed methodology in Ukraine and development of the all-Ukrainian TO practitioners network to apply TO as an instrument for non-violent change, dialogue and local analysis.

Name: Oortwolk
Description:
Oortwolk maakt onbevangen en levendig jeugdtheater voor álle kinderen. (En de volwassenen om hen heen.) En kiept onze binnenwereld naar buiten, om samen al die emoties eens goed te bekijken. Hoe mooi of hoe lelijk ook, alles mag gezien worden, want het hoort er allemaal bij.

Geestig, filosofisch en poëtisch theater over alles dat zich vanbinnen afspeelt.

Name: Staatsschauspiel Dresden
Description: Das Staatsschauspiel Dresden ist das größte sächsische Sprechtheater und zählt zu den bedeutendsten im deutschsprachigen Raum. Es bespielt das historische Schauspielhaus in der Altstadt sowie das Kleine Haus in der Neustadt, das auch die Heimat der Bürger:Bühne ist.

Name: Theatergroep DRANG
Description:
Theatergroep DRANG maakt voorstellingen met een educatief traject op maat, speciaal ontwikkeld voor het MBO. In de afgelopen twintig jaar hebben we de expertise opgebouwd om deze doelgroep op de juiste manier aan te spreken en te raken.

Onze voorstellingen combineren theater en bewustwording, waarbij alles in het teken staat van het leerproces van de student. DRANG stelt actuele onderwerpen en dilemma’s uit de jongerencultuur aan de kaak met als doel te confronteren, provoceren en ontroeren. We houden MBO-studenten een onverbloemde spiegel voor; de rauwe werkelijkheid zichtbaar maken blijkt de sleutel tot kritisch nadenken. Herkennen en erkennen is de eerste stap in het bewust worden van eigen gedachten, keuzes en mogelijkheden.

Name: 2Lång - Teater & Bar
Description:
2Lång Teater & Bar är Göteborgs kreativa humorscen – en plats för både företag och individer att uppleva, lära och skratta tillsammans! 

Vi erbjuder skräddarsydd konferensunderhållning och inspirerande workshops som stärker teamkänsla och främjar kreativitet. 

Vår centrala teater på Andra Långgatan kan hyras för event och möten med guldkant, och vi erbjuder kurser i improvisationsteater och regelbundna föreställningar. Med en härlig atmosfär, god mat och dryck, blir varje besök hos oss en minnesvärd upplevelse. 

Välkommen till en humorscen med mycket hjärta och glädje!

Name: La Boîte à Sel
Description:
La troupe de théâtre de la Boîte à Sel, créée dans les années 70, a débuté avec une représentation annuelle pour 50 spectateurs. L’engouement pour la comédie ayant augmenté considérablement ces dernières années, notre troupe propose désormais une pièce avec 8 représentations pour un total moyen de 1’000 spectateurs par pièce.

Notre but premier est d’offrir à notre public un bon moment d’émotions, d’humour, de rire et de larmes… de joie ! Nos choix se portent de ce fait principalement sur des scénarios qui présentent des scènes de vie remplies de quiproquos, de jeux de mots ou autres usurpations d’identités…

Notre troupe est composée de comédiennes et comédiens amateurs très motivés, dont la plupart ont déjà une très longue expérience dans le milieu théâtral. Nous construisons nous-mêmes nos décors, avec l’aide de nos proches (amis et famille) qui s’occupent par ailleurs aussi de toute la logistique (buvette, billetterie, régie son et lumière, etc.).

Au plaisir de vous rencontrer prochainement, avec le sourire !

Name: OKO Theater
Description:
Theater "OKO" appeared on the professional map of Lviv theaters on December 17, 2016.

The concept of our theater consists in interactive action between actors and spectators. The repertoire of the theater consists of children's and adult performances of various genres, each of which is performed with live music.

Name: MINOUX
Description:
MINOUX is een ruimhartige theaterorganisatie rondom cabaretière en theatermaker Minou Bosua, voorheen de helft van cabaretduo De Bloeiende Maagden. MINOUX is sinds 2018 in Den Bosch gevestigd en ontwikkelt een nieuwe vorm van theater die zij Bewustzijnsamusement noemt. Cabaret gaat in dialoog met documentaire, film, muziektheater en beeldende kunst.
Bijzonder is dat bij het maken en spelen van de voorstelling een specifieke groep uit de samenleving deelneemt.

In samenwerking met maatschappelijke en culturele organisaties maakt MINOUX uit deze groep een duurzame sociaal culturele community voor kwetsbare, eenzame of gewoon enthousiaste mensen op zoek naar verbinding. Op deze manier worden bestaande manieren van en opvattingen over samen-leven opengebroken en nieuwe mogelijkheden aangereikt (en bestendigd).

Minou Bosua is de artistieke bron van het gezelschap. Samen met Corien Baart (artistiek adviseur) bedenkt zij producties en projecten. Daarbij wordt regelmatig samengewerkt met makers uit verschillende disciplines zoals o.a. Maasja Ooms, Annelies van Wieringen, Mijke de Jong, Lotte de Beer, Eelco Smits.

Name: Tijd van de Wolf
Description:
Wij zijn Tijd van de Wolf. We maken voorstellingen die rammelen aan de ratio, op het snijvlak van kunst, psychiatrie en spiritualiteit. We schijnen licht op vaak duistere (onbesproken) onderwerpen en zoeken ingangen naar meer menselijkheid. We spelen met het onvoorstelbare en het mystieke. Wat gebeurt er als de grens tussen waan en werkelijkheid vervaagt? Wat is echt, wat is niet echt, gezond of ongezond, en wie bepaalt dat eigenlijk? We staan open voor meerdere werkelijkheden en dimensies. Het is niet erg is als je het niet weet. Wij weten het ook niet. En vanuit dit niet weten maken wij ons werk.
Tijd van de Wolf (TvdW) bestaat sinds 2021 uit artistiek leider Alexandra Broeder, scenograaf Sacha Zwiers, dramaturg Berthe Spoelstra en componist Roald van Oosten.

Name: Teatr Wybrzeże
Description:
Teatr Wybrzeże to jeden z najważniejszych polskich teatrów. Miejsce, które nigdy nie śpi. Gra przez cały rok, również w wakacje. To wybitny zespół aktorski, różnorodni twórcy i ważkie tematy. 
Teatr Wybrzeże posiada sceny w Gdańsku, Sopocie, a latem również w Pruszczu Gdańskim.

Name: Vivies Dance and Theatre Academy
Description:
We are a performing arts school comprised of professionally trained artists passionate about promoting the arts through education, performance, and entertainment. 

Our mission is to leverage the power of performance to shed light on pressing social issues, inspiring dialogue and driving change in our communities. Join us in our commitment to using the arts as a catalyst for positive social impact.

Name: Kleine Theaters Overijssel
Description: Kleine Theaters Overijssel

Name: Detroit Public Theatre
Description: Detroit Public Theatre produces nationally recognized plays and programs with world-class writers, directors, actors, and designers in the heart of Midtown Detroit’s thriving cultural district. We create bold, relevant work that illuminates the thrills, joys, and challenges of our shared human experience.

Name: SSM ARTE
Description:
Transformamos conhecimento em espetáculo!

A SSM Arte é uma companhia de teatro especializada em intervenções artísticas de impacto para o meio corporativo. Com vasta experiência no mercado cênico empresarial, já passamos por   25 grandes instituições, impactando mais de 5.000 colaboradores com nossas apresentações voltadas para a conscientização e a transformação do ambiente de trabalho.  

Nosso compromisso vai além do entretenimento: levamos arte, cultura e conhecimento sobre saúde, segurança, meio ambiente e sustentabilidade, tornando temas essenciais mais acessíveis, envolventes e eficazes.  

O grande destaque do nosso catálogo é Dr. ONU, um médico especialista nos Objetivos de Desenvolvimento Sustentável (ODS). Essa peça é altamente requisitada por empresas que valorizam a cultura organizacional e estão comprometidas com a sustentabilidade.  

Se você busca uma forma inovadora e impactante de promover conhecimento e engajamento na sua equipe, a SSM Arte é a escolha certa!  

 Entre em contato e leve o teatro corporativo para transformar a sua empresa.

Name: The Little Theatre (Leicester)
Description:
The Little Theatre, home of the Leicester Drama Society (LDS) provides a high quality of theatre to the East Midlands and has been running for over a hundred years in the heart of Leicester’s city centre.

The Little Theatre produces 12 main house shows each year including musicals, drama, comedy, contemporary theatre and the classics as well as a consistently popular pantomime, performed in the 350-seat auditorium to over 25,000 audience members. 

We are a predominantly voluntary-run organisation funded by the Leicester Drama Society (LDS) who have established the building as their society’s home in 1932. The Leicester Drama Society proudly boasts patrons such as Sir Anthony Hopkins, Tim Pigott-Smith and Lord Richard Attenborough (who once trod the boards at The Little Theatre himself!).

Membership is open to anyone interested in the theatre above the age of 16, and while we encourage all members to get involved both on and backstage, we also have many members who are simply supporters and regular audience members.

Name: Zoukak Theatre
Description:
Zoukak was established in 2006 as a horizontal theatre collective committed to artistic practice as a form of social and political engagement. Each performance addresses issues that challenge the status quo, resonating with the context in which it operates and beyond.

Over the years, Zoukak has performed and collaborated both regionally and internationally, participating in numerous international festivals. Locally, the collective remains dedicated to decentralizing culture by presenting its work across Lebanon, reaching diverse audiences in various regions.

Zoukak continuously diversifies its theatre tools, applying them in contexts such as social engagement, therapy, and education. The collective also fosters dialogue and reflection around the performing arts, aiming to cultivate a supportive environment for artistic development and provide training opportunities for local artists in Lebanon and beyond. 

Zoukak remains steadfast in fostering dialogue and critical reflection within Lebanon’s performing arts landscape. Since 2013, we have curated Zoukak Sidewalks, a bi-annual international festival, alongside a constellation of initiatives designed to support emerging local artists.

Name: Vanti Stage
Description: Offer specialist lighting, sound and stage solutions, providing the essential link between theatrical, architectural and construction professionals to create performance spaces with real impact

Name: Stage2 Youth Theatre
Description:
Stage2 Youth Theatre is Birmingham’s longest running Youth Theatre with a 34-year history of high quality work and positive, supportive experiences. We have an excellent track-record for providing wide-ranging opportunities to our members, whist being totally open access and promoting equal opportunities in all areas: our primary rule that ‘no one is ever left out’.

Stage2 currently runs on Sundays during Term Time at Queensbridge Secondary School from the Summer Term 2022 onwards. In August, we will be presenting our first Production since COVID, and will then be back to performing two shows a year at The Crescent Theatre.

Over the years, we have produced hundreds of 4- and 5-star Productions, delivered termly Workshops and offered Work Experience, Qualifications, Technical Theatre Training and Leadership Schemes to our members (the only youth theatre in the UK to be accredited by the Mentoring and Befriending Foundation). We maintain that anyone should be able to access the Arts, and therefore have always had a Subsidy Fund for anyone who needs it to make sure all areas of our practice is always inclusive.

Anyone from age 7-21 can join, with absolutely zero audition or waitlist. Many members of our company have some kind of additional need or challenge, and our members are vastly diverse in ethnicity, gender identity, sexuality, neurodiversity, age and financial position as well as confidence and experience.

Name: Soundscape Theater
Description:
Producing new 3-10 minute plays & scenes with immersive soundscapes, presented as audio theater on Instagram, SoundCloud and YouTube. 
soundscapetheater.com
Instagram: @soundscapetheater
SoundCloud: soundcloud.com/soundscapetheater
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCB6I-b7e3hDTGoRFhsuOcGA
Facebook: facebook.com/SoundscapeTheater

Name: What's Your Story Slam
Description:
"What's Your Story Slam" is a curated event that brings together talented storytellers and an experienced creative director. Each participant must pitch their story idea to Anna Ong, who will help them craft a compelling and engaging narrative. 

The storytellers will then be able to share their story with the audience, with each performance lasting five to six minutes. With the help of Anna, each story will be transformed into a captivating and memorable tale that will leave a lasting impression on the audience. So, come and be a part of this unique storytelling experience and let your voice be heard!

Name: Red Theater
Description: Red Theater’s mission is to make theater by putting people first. Founded in 2013, Red’s productions have included 7 Chicago premieres and 6 world premieres. We work from our core values of radical transparency, community care, and meaningful experience. These ideals drive us to bring access to theater to anyone who wants it, with an intentional focus on those restricted by financial and physical disability.

Name: Liars and Believers
Description: We work at the intersection of social emotional learning and live performance. Through creating plays and continual training (both for ourselves and for others), we center the human experience in all things. Basically, we help humans to be better humans.

Name: Theater im Palais Berlin
Description:
DAS THEATER IM PALAIS BERLIN ist ein musikalisches Salontheater, das sich im Herzen Berlins vor allem den Themen und Geschichten rund um die Hauptstadt widmet. Zu sehen und zu hören sind (Musik-)Theaterproduktionen, Lesungen, musikalische und literarische Programme aus eigener Produktion sowie zahlreiche Gastspiele.
Die Reihe der Berliner Geschichten, die sich herausragenden Berliner Persönlichkeiten, einem Stück Stadtgeschichte oder dem Lebensgefühl der Hauptstädter widmet, ist ein inzwischen bekanntes Markenzeichen unseres Hauses.
Neben den Produktionen, die sich im engen oder weiteren Sinn mit Berlin befassen, sind uns Uraufführungen und die Förderung von Talenten ein besonderes Anliegen. Nicht zuletzt soll der lebendige Austausch mit Ihnen, unserem Publikum gepflegt werden.
So wird jeder Besuch im charmanten Salontheater mit seinen 99 Plätzen im historischen Palais am Festungsgraben zu einem einzigartigen Theatererlebnis. Wir freuen uns auf viele gemeinsame, erfüllte Theaterabende!

Name: El Aedo Teatro
Description: En EL AEDO no hacemos solo teatro. Queremos hablar contigo, estar conectadXs y entablar un diálogo continuo con espectadorXs, artistas y docentes. Ponemos en escena obras de Teatro Clásico, pero también Teatro en Valores, Teatro Multidisciplinar… y somos una compañía pionera en desarrollar estrategias de gamificación relacionadas con las artes escénicas: seriousgame, videojuegos, libros, redes sociales… Usamos todas las nuevas tecnologías para estar CERCA DE TI.

Name: Silbersee
Description:
Silbersee was born from opera and creates performances with the most idiosyncratic and unique talents from different genres and fields. With the voice as a primal instrument we say what needs to be heard, from themes such as inclusion, ecology and artificial intelligence.

By 2027, we want to be a completely climate-positive production house that has no negative impact on the environment, raw materials supplies or society.

We can be found on small and large stages, festivals and at special indoor and outdoor locations.

Name: Place of Hope -  Theater
Description:
שמי יפית ונטורה מחזאית ושחקנית בנשמה 
בשנת 2017 החלטתי לשלב בין האהבה הגדולה שלי לתיאטרון לבין האהבה העוד יותר גדולה שלי לסבי וסבתי 
והקמתי מיזם הנצחה לזכרם –"מקום של תקווה" שהיום הפך למפעל חיים.
סבי וסבתי נולדו ברומניה ושרדו את השואה אך מעולם לא דיברו איתנו על הזוועות שחוו שם.
לאחר שהם נפטרו התעוררה בי סקרנות גדולה לדעת יותר על התקופה הארורה הזאת.
אז החלטתי לצאת למסע

התחלתי לתעד עשרות שורדי שואה מכל רחבי הארץ נפגשתי איתם ,הקלטתי אותם, הקשבתי להם 
חיבקתי אותם והכלתי את כל הרגשות המהולים בעצב בדידות ואובדן

מתוך תיעודים אלו נולדו שלוש הצגות:
להיכנס לנעליים שלהם, התליון ,העולם שתק
אני מאמינה שכדי לבנות עתיד טוב יותר ולהגיע להחלטות מושכלות בהווה,חייבים להכיר את העבר
שורדי השואה הולכים ומתמעטים ובקרוב לא נוכל להקשיב לסיפוריהם ממקור ראשון 
הדורות הבאים לא יוכלו להרגיש את העוצמה וההזדהות שהרגשתי בכל תיעוד ותיעוד
נושא השואה בקרוב יהפוך לעוד נושא מעומעם שמלמדים עליו בשיעור היסטוריה
ולזה לא יכולתי להישאר אדישה!

את ההצגות בניתי באופן שבו הקהל יהיה מעורב ולא יוכל להישאר אדיש ופאסיבי
כל ההצגות שכתבתי מבוססות על הדילמות שקרו בשואה ששואבות את הקהל אל תוך העלילה המוצגת
בכל תחילת הצגה הקהל מקבל אביזרי במה ועם קאסט מצויין של שחקנים ומנגינת רקע מותאמת לעלילה 
הקהל חווה סוג של מסע בזמן וטלטלה רגשית שאי אפשר לתאר במילים

במהלך ההצגה הקהל מתבקש להוביל, להשפיע ולהחליט על מהלך העלילה
את ההצגות אני מנחה ומשתפת את הקהל בתיעודים האמיתיים כפי שהסתיימו באמת.
אומנם ההצגות מבוססות על סיפורי השואה אבל הן מלמדות את הקהל שלנו שיעור בקבלת החלטות, בהובלת מצבים, בניהול קונפליקטים שפוגשים כל אחד מאיתנו ביומיום.

מ2017- ועד היום תיאטרון מקום של תקווה פועל בהצלחה בכל הארץ מדרום ועד צפון
ומשמיע את קול השורדים בדרך עוצמתית ומרגשת במיוחד
הביקורות שאנחנו מקבלים מהקהל בכל הצגה מרגשות עד דמעות
מעבר להצגות אני גם מעבירה הרצאות לאירגונים וחברות על נושא השואה שמתבססות על הדילמות מתוך ההצגות.

נשמח להכיר גם אתכם 
יפית ונטורה - 0509461825

Name: EUX Compagnie d'improvisation
Description:
Découvrez le dernier spectacle de la Compagnie EUX : CHAOS. En ce moment au Studio des Champs Élysées les lundis et mardis à 20H. Réservations : http://euximpro.fr/resa/chaos

Bienheureuses les villes qui accueilleront la compagnie Eux répandant sa magie devant un public qui lui, ne trouve plus les mots... 
Plus de 70 000 spectateurs déjà conquis.
Leur prochaine destination ? A vous de le décider. 

Depuis 17 ans, la Compagnie d’Improvisation EUX continue de s'imposer comme une référence parisienne incontournable du théâtre improvisé, au travers de la création d'une vingtaine de spectacles différents et de la représentation de plus de 800 spectacles en France et à l’étranger.
(Chicago, San Francisco, Austin, Atlanta, Montréal, Vancouver, Athènes, Tallin, Dublin, Amsterdam, Brest, Lyon, Toulouse, Strasbourg, Nantes…)
 
La recette de leur succès ? 
Sortir du cadre traditionnel des matchs et cabarets d’improvisation pour explorer les formes plus théâtrales de cet art de la création spontanée. Une pratique inédite qui s’est forgée sur l’audace, la création et l’échange constant avec des artistes improvisateurs du monde entier et leur public. 
 
Contact : Emilie BLARD
eblard@gmail.com
06 71 66 62 44

Name: Werdenberger Schloss-Festspiele
Description: Die Werdenberger Schloss-Festspiele inszenieren alle zwei Jahre eine Freilicht-Oper am Werdenberger See und bieten jeweils über 5000 Besuchenden ein unvergessliches Opernerlebnis an einem der schönsten Opernspielorte der Schweiz

Name: His Story: The Musical
Description:
To the darkness....Dawns a Light!

His Story is a new musical of the story of the ages, uniquely combining pop, hip-hop, jazz, and orchestral ballads.  It was conceived of and written by Anna Miriam Brown.
For more information visit HisStoryTheMusical.com

Name: The Contemporary Theatre of Ohio
Description: The Contemporary Theatre of Ohio (The Contemporary) strives to become a nationally recognized, anti-racist contemporary theatre company that anchors a thriving Columbus theatre ecosystem in an empathetic, equitable world.

Name: Teater Carpa
Description:
Vi skapar spännande och humoristiska föreställningar på scen och i äventyrsform, utomhus för skolor och offentliga evenemang. Vi skapar kulturprojekt tillsammans med kommuner runt i hela Sverige som bidrar till att minska utanförskap.

Teater Carpa - vi skapar minnen.

Name: Rauwkost
Description:
Rauwkost maakt per jaar diverse voorstellingen die er-toe-doen, een beetje rauw zijn en raken. 
*muziektheater * lokatie-theater * voorstellingen met een maatschappelijk thema*
Daarnaast is Rauwkost de vaste theatergroep van Schildje Experience en maken we vele voorstellingen in opdracht.

Name: Glada Hudik-teatern
Description:
Glada Hudik-teatern är mer än en teater – det är en rörelse för inkludering, jämlikhet och förändrade attityder. Genom teater, film, musik och utbildningsprojekt arbetar vi för att bryta normer och krossa fördomar om människor med intellektuella funktionsnedsättningar.

Sedan starten 1996 har vi berört och inspirerat publik över hela Sverige och internationellt. Vi tror på att se möjligheter istället för begränsningar och att varje människa har något unikt att bidra med. Genom våra projekt och samarbeten vill vi bygga ett samhälle där olikheter ses som en styrka och där alla får en chans att växa.

Name: Teatrul Municipal Bacovia
Description: Teatrul e oglinda lumii. Te așteptăm să te privim în ochi.

Name: TEATR PIBA
Description:
Le Teatr Piba est une compagnie créée en 2009 et aujourd’hui basée à Brest. Sa création est une continuité de rencontres et collaborations d’artistes dont les parcours croisés et les expériences partagées les ont conduits au départ à un même désir : des créations composites, multilingues, contemporaines et voyageuses... Où l’on prend le temps de l’enquête et créer le récit par empirisme : le Teatr Piba c’est du théâtre d’aventure.

La compagnie mène un travail de création artistique & théâtrale accordant une grande importance dans l’écriture à la place des voix les moins entendues : les langues – minorisées - les marges, et par là même, à la question des « diversités » dans la création. En faisant de la question du multilinguisme un enjeu d’écriture poétique autant qu’un enjeu technologique, la compagnie veut réinventer sans cesse cet espace où puisse s’établir une rencontre féconde entre artistes et
publics.

Name: PIG IRON THEATRE COMPANY, INC
Description: PIG IRON THEATRE COMPANY, INC is a company based out of 1417 NORTH 2ND STREET, PHILADELPHIA, Pennsylvania, United States.

Name: Entracte Diffusion
Description: Entracte Diffusion est née de l'initiative de deux compagnies théâtrales de créer un pôle de diffusion autonome, juste, généreux et convivial qui s'appuie sur les expériences respectives de Cédric Chapuis - Cie Scènes Plurielles et de Thomas Le Douarec mais aussi sur un lieu : Le Théâtre des Lucioles à Avignon.

Name: PASSAGE THEATRE COMPANY
Description: PASSAGE THEATRE COMPANY is a company based out of Trenton, New Jersey, United States.

Name: Genesis Children's Theatre
Description:
After spending many years in children’s theater, Neicole and her daughter, Megan decided it was time they started their own. Focused on the mission of creating extraordinary theater experiences and to advance theater as a means of educating, challenging and inspiring young people to their full potential, Genesis Children’s Theatre opened its doors in 2010. 

Today, Genesis Children’s Theatre is a 501(c)(3) non-profit children’s theatre serving children of North Texas ages 3-18 years. Genesis is committed to providing each student with skills to be successful on stage and in life. We believe the theatre experience is more than performing; it is a vehicle for learning responsibility, cooperation, and self-confidence. This philosophy coupled with exciting programming and a staff with unequaled experience has allowed Genesis to grow to its current reach of over 400 families and earned Genesis the title of “Best Children’s Theatre in Plano.” 

We are an educational based organization that reaches beyond the public school drama programs and offers opportunities to students of various educational settings (public, private, and home-schooled). Our theatre is located in Plano, TX, however we have students who come from Dallas County, Denton County, Collin County, and Grayson County. We cater to many specialized demographics, including but not limited to single parent households, low-income households, and autistic or learning challenged students.

Website: www.GenesisChildrensTheatre.org
Facebook: www.facebook.com/GenesisChildrensTheatre
Twitter: twitter.com/GenesisTheatre_
YouTube: www.youtube.com/c/GenesisChildrensTheatrePlano

Name: Theatr na nÓg
Description: Cynhyrchu theatr sy'n Tanio Dychymyg y Genedl Igniting the Imagination of the Nation Producing theatre in Neath and beyond.

Name: Wabi Sabi Theater
Description: Fysiek theater over maatschappelijke imperfecties

Name: STT-produkties
Description: STT-produkties is een impresariaat voor jeugdtheater en cultuureducatie, met een breed aanbod en  ruime ervaring. In 1991  is  STT-produkties opgericht door Arie Hemmen en sinds 1 juli 2018 staat Annemiek Zwierenga aan het roer. Annemiek was voorheen theatermaker en artistiek leider van jeugdtheatergroep Opslag voor Cacao. Wij zijn trots op ons aanbod van voorstellingen, gezelschappen, projecten en workshops. Onze missie is dat ieder kind met professioneel theater in aanraking komt. Zodat zoveel mogelijk jonge mensen de wereld rondreizen in een stoel, zich kunnen verwonderen, identificeren, achter het oor krabben, ten prooi vallen aan ontroering, of zich slap lachen.

Name: Theatergroep Nyxland
Description:
Nyxland heeft een fascinatie voor de struikelende jongere die grip probeert te krijgen op de wereld en het leven als volwassene. Samen met jongeren proberen we de komende jaren door het delen van verhalen meer empathie te kweken voor dat wat anders wordt gevonden. In een wereld waarin mensen elkaar steeds meer kwijtraken, doordat we lijnrecht tegenover elkaar lijken te staan, neemt Nyxland het op voor de empathie.

Theatergroep Nyxland maakt toegankelijke, maatschappelijk geëngageerde, muzikale en filosofische voorstellingen met jongeren en professionele acteurs. Met nieuwe, creatieve vormen willen we jongeren een podium geven, hun stem hoorbaar maken en hun levensfase belichten in onze samenleving.

Name: Magnolia Musical Theatre
Description:
At Magnolia Musical Theatre we believe quality musical theatre should be accessible to ALL PEOPLE. Our mission is to bring Broadway quality musical theatre experiences for ALL PEOPLE in the Central Texas Hill Country. Each Summer, Magnolia Musical Theatre will bring a new musical to the beautiful Hill Country Galleria in the center of Bee Cave. The show will always be free to the public and will encourage people from all walks of life to come together and experience the best of musical theatre.

Magnolia Musical Theatre is a registered 501(c)3 non-profit organization.

Name: Stichting Smeedwerk
Description:
Smeedwerk is opgericht in 1999 en bestaat 25 jaar.
Smeedwerk maakt theater op locatie. Bijzondere voorstellingen die vanuit verbeelding en op de speelvloer al improviserend tot stand komen. We spelen met zo weinig mogelijk: de acteur als verbeelder van het onzegbare. Altijd op zoek naar de magie van het samen beleven en verbetering van de kwaliteit van dat wat we voorschotelen en opdienen.

We zoeken naar kwetsbaarheid en openheid. Bij onszelf en het publiek om te zoeken naar de verwondering. We schuwen het schuren daarbij niet. Onze voorstellingen komen niet vlekkeloos tot stand. We hebben een visie en weten wat we willen brengen. We staan voor kwaliteit en professionaliteit. Altijd op zoek naar hoe we de magie van de beleving kunnen ‘vangen’ en herhaalbaar kunnen maken. Zonder dat we gevangen zitten in een stramien. Open in het moment om nieuwe ingangen te vinden. Elke keer weer.

We kiezen de onderwerpen van onze voorstellingen met zorg. We staan wakker in de samenleving en willen iets zeggen. We willen prikkelen, zaken aan de kaak stellen, confronteren zonder belerend te zijn. Theater gaat over in contact zijn met elkaar. Een gezamenlijke beleving, een verbinding tot stand brengen. De plek waar we spelen verandert, al is het maar voor even. Een herinnering achterlatend voor altijd.

Name: Big League Productions
Description: BIG LEAGUE PRODUCTIONS/DANIEL SHER is celebrating its 30th season of producing and general managing Broadway tours of shows and attractions throughout the world. Most recently, Big League remounted its acclaimed tour of An American in Paris, a new production of South Pacific, Legally Blonde, and continued touring its flagship production of A Christmas Story The Musical. Current and future work includes The Cher Show (first national tour), Little Women, A Christmas Story at the Ahmanson Theater, and The Addams Family.

Name: Naptown African American Theatre Collective Inc.
Description:
NAATC was created to be a hub for Black creatives in the city of Indianapolis and beyond giving true equity to AEA artists across the country through programming, full-time staff, and community outreach through professional development.

Our performances are artistically designed to please and illuminate the minds of all audiences while paying homage to our roots as artists of color by producing work that is truly reflective of the African American diaspora.

Name: New Stuff Theatre
Description:
New Stuff Theatre seeks to be Canada’s foremost presenter of new, contemporary, cutting-edge international plays while cultivating new local artistic voices. The company aims to hire emerging artists of diverse disciplines to stage chic and comprehensive productions of both narratives born from our backyards, and the faraway narratives that are reflected within them.

In addition to being the widely recognized home of international theatre, New Stuff Theatre will become a home for many rising artists in Toronto. The theatre will provide them a platform to create and develop new work that will premiere to the world on our stages. The theatre will bridge the gap between artists of all performance areas, and will engage unlikely and artistically under-serviced communities in Toronto through innovative and dynamic education and outreach initiatives.

Name: Karl's kühne Gassenschau
Description:
Kreiert seit 1984 einzigartiges Open Air Theaterspektakel. 

Karl’s kühne Gassenschau hat seit ihrer Gründung 1984 zweiundzwanzig verschiedene Produktionen in über 3500 Vorstellungen vor über drei Million Zuschauenden gezeigt - eine stolze Bilanz. Das Gründer-Team hat sich an der Mimenschule Ilg, Zürich kennen gelernt. Vom einfachen Strassenvariété im Jahr 1984 über das abenteuerliche Freilufttheater um eine BAUSTELLE und den archaischen Alptraum im STEINBRUCH bis hin zum aufwändigen Wasserspektakel AKUA hat sich dabei ein reicher Erfahrungsschatz angesammelt.

Treibende Kraft bei allen Produktionen ist die unbändige Lust, Grenzen zu sprengen und Unterhaltung mit Innovation zu verbinden. Die einzigartige Theaterform soll für ein breites Publikum zugänglich sein und dabei immer wieder in neue Dimensionen der Fantasie vorstossen. Charme, Komik und Risiko spielen bei jeder Kreation von Karl’s kühner Gassenschau zentrale Rollen. Doch es geht nicht nur um Spass und Nervenkitzel, die Zuschauenden sollen auch zum Nachdenken verführt werden. Denn es sind immer zeitkritische Themen, die Karl’s kühne Gassenschau unter die komödiantische Lupe nimmt. 

Nach den Grosserfolgen SILO8, FABRIKK und SEKTOR1 folgte 2024 das neue Wasser-Spektakel RECEPTION. Auch im Sommer 2025 wieder in Dietikon zu sehen!
Tickets sind auf www.reception.ch erhältlich.

Name: Inheritance Theater Project
Description:
Inheritance Theater Project (ITP) builds relationships across religious, racial, and generational divides through collaborative playmaking. The company is led by a team of national artists who partner with local artists, educators, and clergy to engage in a process that uses theater and shared cultural touchstones to bridge divides and build community. The process culminates in an original piece of theater by and for the residents of that city, but it is the act of creating this work that builds strong, more interconnected communities.

Since 2015, ITP has employed 200+ artists to engage 11,000+ people in 15 cities across the U.S. ITP has worked in communities where issues like refugee resettlement (Omaha), housing discrimination (Norfolk), and impending climate disasters (Palm Beach) have led to neighbors operating in silos and, at times, conflict. By inviting people to co-create art about these challenging topics, ITP increases empathy and creates new durable connections that continue to serve the community for years to come.

Name: Adam Theater
Description:
Adam Theater, a place to grow, is a professional non-profit theater company for children and youth that will produce, put on stage across communities in the USA, translated plays from the Hebrew culture corpus. It is an educational space, where children are allowed to safely explore real life experiences through articulation of personal hero narratives, which support a sense of identity, and belonging. A place where different parts of our society are allowed to connect and experiment with each other. 



A Hebrew culture Theater will offer a bridge between cultures through its unique sphere that transitions from personal culture to universal. Theater allows for a personal journey of discovery in reference to the other, that can help decipher many parts of society through the lens of a particular one.

Name: Eco Drama
Description:
Eco Drama are passionate about making quality theatre and creative learning experiences for children and young people which nurture a sense of curiosity, wonder and care for our natural world and remind us we are part of an amazing living planet.

Our theatre productions, projects and workshops are delivered in schools, theatres, community venues and festivals across Scotland and the UK. Our work explores how we can use the power of the arts to inspire and support people of all ages to take positive, practical action for the natural environment.

Name: Les Culturailes
Description: Les Culturailes : des spectacles inoubliables, juste à côté de chez vous

Name: COMPAGNIE MIDI A L'OUEST
Description: Compagnie d'art de rue, paysage et espace non dédié basée dans le Marais poitevin (Marans, 17).

Name: GLIMT Amager
Description:
GLiMT AMAGER er Københavns lille storbyteater siden 2021. 
Vi er et teater, der arbejder med et bredt udtryk inden for discipliner som moderne cirkus, fysisk teater, dans, installationskunst, livemusik og lydvandringer. 
Vores forestillinger spiller ofte ude hos jer, vores publikum, hvor vi transformerer jeres velkendte byrum og lokationer gennem iscenesættelse. 
Vi mener, at teater er noget, der kan berige alles liv, og opsøger derfor at gøre det tilgængeligt for så mange som muligt.

Name: GalataPerform
Description:
2003 yılında Galata’da Büyük Hendek Caddesi'nde bir apartmanın birinci katında, Yeşim Özsoy tarafından kurulan GalataPerform kuruluşundan beri oyunlar, projeler, festivaller ve atölyeler yoluyla Türk tiyatrosunda yenilikçi ve çağdaş bir alan yaratıyor. 

2002 senesinde Yeşim Özsoy tarafından Ve Diğer Şeyler Topluluğu olarak kurulan tiyatro, Galata’daki mekanına geçmeden önce ve geçtikten sonra, bu isim altında, “Ev Kakofonik bir Oyun”, “Aksak İstanbul Hikayeleri”, “Noter”, “Playback”, “3. Evren” gibi oyunlarla sahnelerde ve kendi mekanında yer aldı ve ağırlıkla Yeşim Özsoy’un yazdığı yönettiği oyunları sahneledi. Yeni metinler, disiplinler arasılık ve yeni teknolojiler üzerine yoğunlaşan tiyatro, GalataPerform’da Görünürlük Projesi (2004-2012), Yeni Metin Tiyatro Projesi, Festivali ve Atölyeleri gibi pek çok proje, oyun ve etkinliğe imza attı.

2006 senesinde Ceren Ercan, Mark Levitas, Dilek Altuntaş ve Yeşim Özsoy’un girişimiyle oluşturulan Yeni Metin Tiyatro Festivali Projesiyle GalataPerform çatısı altında yeni yazarlar ve yönetmenlerin tiyatromuza kazandırıldığı bir denklem yaratıldı. Proje halen devam etmekte ve alana tiyatrocular kazandırmanın yanı sıra yeni ve çağdaş tiyatro konusunda tartışma alanı yaratmakta. Proje kapsamında 20’ye yakın farklı ülkeden 60’dan fazla yazar yönetmen İstanbul’a geldi, etkinliklerle tanıtıldı, atölyelerle Türk yazarlarla buluştu. Festivaller ve oyun okumaları yoluyla 100’e yakın yeni metin Türkiye tiyatrosuna kazandırıldı.

2020’de Galata’daki mekanlarından çıkan tiyatro, alanında yeni oyunlar, atölyeler ve yayınlar için bir dijital platform olan YeniPerform’u kurdu. 

Halen Galata Perform bünyesinde Fairfly, Medea’ya Göre Ahlak, Kalanlar oyunları çeşitli sahnelerde devam etmekte  ve  Yeni Metin Tiyatro Festivali, uluslararası etkinlikler ve atölyeler yoluyla seyircisine farklı platformlarda ulaşmaya devam etmektedir.

Name: TOP - Teatri Off Padova
Description:
TOP-Teatri Off Padova è un'impresa sociale, costituita in forma cooperativa, che riunisce tre realtà teatrali off di Padova: TaleaTeatro, Amistad Teatro, Teatro Popolare di Ricerca.
Condividendo fortemente una visione della cultura come “motore di sviluppo” e insieme come strumento di promozione sociale e di una migliore qualità della vita, la cooperativa TOP si prefigge di ideare e promuovere progetti innovativi per il territorio. La sua sede è il Teatro Sanclemente, ex chiesa delle Granze, che nasce dalla riconversione dell’antica chiesa di San Clemente in spazio culturale.

TOP collabora e lavora con enti locali, università, fondazioni, realtà del terzo settore, scuole, musei e istituzioni culturali, imprese e associazioni di rappresentanza. 

TOP produce spettacoli teatrali, promuove e organizza rassegne, propone laboratori e percorsi di formazione per ragazzi, giovani e adulti, progetti ad hoc per le scuole, nonché per le imprese e target specifici. E ancora si occupa di ideare e gestire progettualità che mirano a creare coesione sociale, a sensibilizzare sui temi della sostenibilità, a promuovere e valorizzare con strumenti e linguaggi innovativi il patrimonio storico, artistico e culturale. 

TOP infine offre alle imprese servizi di consulenza e formazione dove il teatro è strumento per lavorare sulle risorse umane e fare team building, per innovare la comunicazione della realtà e della storia aziendale, per rafforzarne l’immagine e la competitività.

Name: Blue Door Theatre
Description:
Spokane's community improv theatre! We are a non-profit, all volunteer organization. We are dedicated to the advancement of improvisation and the performing arts through innovative entertainment and education.

We have shows every Friday and Saturday at 7:30 pm for only $9. Our Friday shows are for general audiences and our Saturday shows are for a mature audiences. 

We have opened the Spokane School of Improv to bring new and exciting classes to the Spokane Community. We have classes for teens and adults and are looking to start classes for 8-12 year olds. We have beginner and advanced improv, improv for lawyers, improv for self-care, improv and poetry and more. Have you wanted to become a Pun Master. Take our Pun Workout. Want to learn about developing characters, we have a class for you.  More classes will be added throughout the year so check out our school's website.

We are an all volunteer organization so anything that refers to employees here actually means volunteers.  

Performance, Education, Corporate Training, Entertainment Community & Laughs!  

Join us!

bluedoortheatre.com
spokaneschoolofimprov.org

Name: Theater De Makkers
Description:
Artistieke kwaliteit, verbinding, onderzoek en ontmoetingen zijn voor het Zwolse gezelschap De Makkers al bijna tien jaar de belangrijkste ingrediënten voor haar projecten, voorstellingen en sociale interventies. 

De Makkers kijkt met trots terug op succesvolle producties als De Buurtzaak, We Zwemmen Nog (winnaar Vrijwilligersprijs 2022), DE NOODZAAK (i.s.m. De Voedselbank), Waarom mensen liever tegen hun hond praten (gespeeld op o.a. Over ‘t IJ Festival Amsterdam), De Wachtkamer (i.s.m. Welcome to the Village en sociale partners) en WE BEGINNEN BIJ HET EINDE (i.s.m. Hospice Zwolle). 

De onderscheidende multidisciplinaire werkwijze van De Makkers blijkt een maatschappelijke behoefte te vervullen. De samenleving staat onder druk, de bestaanszekerheid is laag en het verlangen naar verbinding is groot. De Makkers beweegt zich op het grensvlak van theater, community art, social design, onderzoek en maatschappelijke participatie en creëert een podium midden in de samenleving. Dit podium wordt niet alleen beklommen om te zenden, maar biedt ruimte voor nieuwe inclusieve ontmoetingen en faciliteert persoonlijke gesprekken; altijd onder begeleiding van professionele makers. De Makkers brengt niet alleen kunst dichter bij de Zwollenaar, maar draagt ook bij aan een veerkrachtige en harmonieuze stad.

Name: Theater Latea
Description:
https://linktr.ee/teatrolatea
LATEA (Latin American Theater Experiment Associates)
is a performing arts theater company that has been a Latino cultural staple for over 30 years. Through multicultural and multidisciplinary initiatives at The Clemente, which it helped establish, LATEA assiduously promotes and produces Latino performing arts to and for Latinos and multicultural audiences.

Our mission encompasses producing experimental theater as well as co-producing dance, film, music and visual arts exhibits.

Since 2017, LATEA has reinvigorated its focus on three distinct initiatives: LATEA STAGE produces and hosts Latino theater, LATEA SCREEN produces new media content and holds film festivals and open screens, and LATEA MUSIC presents Latin Jazz, Afro-Caribbean rhythms and South American genres such as Tango. Spoken word events and visual arts exhibits are also presented. A new festival dedicated to Afro-Latin cultures started in 2018 and is in its fourth year

Name: Porin Teatteri
Description:
The theatrehouse was designed by a Swedish architect Johan Erik Stenberg in 1884 and it represents Renaissance Revival art style. Its interior is one of the most prestigious in Finland. The main auditorium has 304 seats and the studio stage which was opened in 1974 has 110 seats. 

Pori Theatre was established in 1931 as a merger of two local theatregroups: Pori Workers’ Theatre and Pori Stage Theatre. Pori is considered to be the birthplace of Finnish speaking professional theatre as the Finnish National Theatre gave its first performance in Pori at Hotel Otava in 1872.

Name: Reading Theater Project
Description:
The Reading Theater Project is a locally-focused, theater company, based in Greater Reading/Berks County, PA. We produce new theater with a focus on the creative process for the artists involved, resulting in a unique production for the audience.
We value collaboration and creative challenges and believe theater is an inclusive experience that can reveal our shared human condition. Risk-taking and art-making are at the forefront of what we do.
ALL ARE WELCOME HERE.
Theater is transformative. As such, and with a spirit of shared humanity, we stand for an anti-racist community of artists and audience, and we renounce all racism, xenophobia, transphobia, homophobia, sexism, Islamophobia, anti-Semitism, classism, ableism, and hate speech or actions that aim to silence, threaten, or degrade anyone.
Each year, we fully produce a play or series of short plays, our annual Fringe theater festival, play readings on local television and in person, and outdoor theater in the summer.
We want to connect with you: Are you a playwright looking to hold a reading? Are you a theater-lover looking for something new? Are you an actor, director, writer, composer, designer, or any kind of artist looking for a group of peers to work and create? Do you want to make a donation to enable us to make more innovative theater? Please contact us to get involved!

Name: Theatergroep De Horde
Description:
Wij maken werelden. Recht voor je ogen. Met alles wat voor handen is.

Soms subtiel anders, soms radicaal. Werelden waarin je even kunt verdwijnen, waarin je niet kunt wegscrollen, op pauze kunt zetten of uit kunt drukken. Werelden waar je niets anders kan doen dan erin mee gaan en je ertoe verhouden.

Vanuit onze basis in Theater het Badhuis maken wij voorstellingen voor jong en oud publiek. Met een mix van spel, tekst, muziek, maquettes, camera’s en poppen. We maken dit het liefst samen met anderen omdat er dan iets uitkomt dat we nooit hadden verwacht.

Name: Lindenberg Kunst en Technologie
Description:
De Lindenberg maakt allerlei programma's binnen het thema Kunst en Technologie. We tonen kunst die de mogelijkheden en grenzen van (digitale) technologieën opzoekt. Daarmee laten we ontwikkelingen op het gebied van deze technologieën zien, in relatie tot allerlei maatschappelijke onderwerpen. 

Bovendien kunnen bij de Lindenberg Kunst en Technologie het publiek en makers hun huidige én toekomstige positie ten opzichte van digitale technologieën bepalen en zelf actief een bijdrage leveren aan de creatieve aspecten ervan. 

Onze educatieve tak binnen de Kunst en Technologie stimuleert en faciliteert de mogelijkheden om zelf creatief aan de slag te gaan met technologie. Deze tak richt zich zowel op lessen in het primair en voortgezet onderwijs en op het MBO als op buitenschoolse activiteiten. In een multidisciplinair programma voor verschillende niveaus worden nieuwe technologieën op verrassende manieren ingezet. Hier is veel aandacht voor raakvlakken in de maatschappij. 

De Lindenberg in het centrum van Nijmegen is onze thuishaven, maar we zoeken het publiek ook buiten onze eigen muren; in de vorm van (een bijdrage aan) een festival of expositie of in opdracht van andere organisaties.

Name: Arlekin Players Theatre
Description:
Arlekin’s company of immigrants is led by Igor Golyak, a Jewish director born in Ukraine. 

For 9 years, it grew a local audience for plays in Russian at its Needham, MA studio. In year 10, Arlekin performed in English and swept the 2020 Boston Elliot Norton Awards. 

Then COVID hit and Arlekin premiered STATE VS NATASHA BANINA: a free, live virtual theater event that went viral and received a NYTimes Critics Pick. The production launched Arlekin’s Zero Gravity Virtual Theatre Lab, which produced CHEKHOVOS (NYT Critics Pick, w/Jessica Hecht & Mikhail Baryshnikov), and WITNESS, a documentary about antisemitism and Jewish migration. 

Next, Arlekin’s THE ORCHARD featured Baryshnikov, Hecht, and an international design team that combined animation, robotics, gaming, and other technologies to form a hybrid in-person/virtual production at Baryshnikov Arts Center (NYC) and Emerson Paramount (Boston).

Arlekin commissioned Ukrainian-born playwright Sasha Denisova to write/direct THE GAAGA for its 2023 US Premiere - the hybrid production put Putin and his cronies on trial and was acclaimed by critics and audiences in-person in Boston and virtually throughout the globe. In June 2024, Arlekin mounted an acclaimed site-specific production of THE DYBBUK at The Vilna Shul in Boston, which sold out every performance.

In 2024, OUR CLASS premiered at Brooklyn Academy of Music and Golyak was cited by the NY Times as “among the most inventive directors working in the United States.” The play then remounted alongside Golyak’s hailed adaptation of MERCHANT OF VENICE in Fall 2024 in residence at Classic Stage, NY.  OUR CLASS was cited on The Wall Street Journal's "Best of 2024" list, and is headed to Boston for a production at the Calderwood Pavilion at BCA, starring Chulpan Khamatova in Spring 2025.

From Boston’s suburbs, a strong immigrant perspective, visionary artistic voice, and innovative technical force has emerged as Arlekin is increasingly recognized for its theatrical work.

Name: No Dream Deferred NOLA
Description:
NDD Mission No Dream Deferred creates theatre programming that maximizes cultural relevance for our New Orleans audience. 
Guides to our mission: 
1. We work to amplify the voice of historically marginalized playwrights. 
2. We empower theatre makers of color in the city of New Orleans and beyond. 
3. Our approach to theatre-making is equitable in its visioning, design, and 
implementation. 
 Our vision is to employ a revolutionary approach to art making in our city, for our communities, and in doing so create theatre that is anchored to place. We, through our programming and activism, are building a future where art leaders of color and stories about people of color are not the exceptions but the norm.

Name: Aries Kalanilayam Arts & Theatre Pvt Ltd
Description:
Welcome to Aries Kalanilayam Arts and Theatre, where creativity and passion come to life. We are dedicated to nurturing and showcasing young and talented individuals in the vibrant world of theatre production. Our mission is to provide a platform where aspiring artists, skilled technical professionals, and dedicated office staff can thrive and collaborate.
At Aries Kalanilayam, we believe in the transformative power of theatre. Our productions are a blend of traditional and contemporary art forms, reflecting the rich cultural heritage while embracing modern storytelling techniques. We are committed to excellence and innovation, ensuring that every performance is a unique and memorable experience.
Opportunities for All
Whether you are an actor, dancer, singer, or any other performer, Aries Kalanilayam offers a stage for you to shine. We are always on the lookout for fresh talent and provide extensive training, mentorship, and performance opportunities to help you hone your craft and build a successful career in the arts.
Our productions rely heavily on the expertise of our technical team. From lighting and sound engineers to set designers and costume makers, we offer numerous opportunities for technical professionals to contribute their skills and creativity. We provide a collaborative environment where your technical prowess can enhance the overall theatrical experience.
Behind every successful theatre production is a dedicated team of office staff who manage the administrative, marketing, and logistical aspects. 
Come and join us for a Creative Culture

Name: Re-Staging
Description:
Re-Staging is introducing sustainability to the world of Set Construction within Theatre and the Arts in Ireland. We will be providing the Irish Theatre and Entertainment Industry with an environmentally responsible circular alternative in place of its current use of landfill for unwanted Sets and Scenery which is fundamental to the current challenge of making Theatres sustainable. 

Stephen Bourke has been involved in Theatre and Events for the past 30 years in Dublin, in the UK and on many local and international tours. Having been a Performer, Stage Crew, Stage Manager, Production Manager, Audio Visual Technician, Lighting and Sound Technician and Set builder, Stephen realised the impact Theatre and Events were having on the environment. He was aghast and disheartened every time he saw a Set end up in a skip or that was rotting in a storage facility so he came up with the plan to try to eradicate such waste within the Industry through the sharing of knowledge and introducing sustainability. 
The benefits of this are that the carbon footprint of the company is reduced, by means of the reduction of waste, and also the reduction of virgin material in the construction of the Set.

Theatre Sets and Staging have traditionally not been favourable to the environment or been sustainable. Sets are designed, constructed, brought to life by artistry, used for a production and are then either put into storage at a recurring cost to the theatre company (and historically not used again) or put in a skip generally ending up in landfill sites.

This is where Re-Staging comes in. Our mission is to use sustainable, recyclable materials to construct Sets for Theatre companies. But it doesn’t stop there. We will also be responsible for (dismantling and) collection of the Set, returning it to our premises where the Set will be broken down and reused for other Sets and Productions where practical. This circular economy is imperative for the future of sustainability within Theatre.

Name: Compagnie EtSi
Description:
Partisan.e.s d’un “théâtre pauvre”, l’acteur est au cœur de notre travail. C’est ce dernier qui, à partir du manque, donne à voir. C’est par lui que se déploie l’univers scénique - soutenu par des sons et parfois l’utilisation de l’image vidéo.

Notre travail porte sur des textes du répertoire classique et contemporain et sur des créations. Sensibles à différentes formes, à différentes langues, c’est avant tout notre besoin de réinterroger les choses qui nous anime : notre vision du monde, de la société, de l’art... Ne rien prendre pour acquis, soumettre au doute nos a priori, être en constante recherche, déconstruire en s’interrogeant : "Et si… ?"

Name: Live Arts Santa Fe
Description:
Mission
To inspire, engage, and transform a multi-cultural, neurodiverse, and multi-generational audience through innovative and inclusive theatrical work, professional education in theatre and film, and accessible performing arts spaces that welcome diverse local, regional, and international voices to create and explore.

Vision
We strive to recreate and enhance the legacy of the Greer Garson Theatre Center; re-envisioning performing arts for the 21st Century and reinventing styles of presentation more fitting to today's audience. We will accomplish this effort in a variety of innovative ways: creating a two-year accredited conservatory program (LiveArts Conservatory), a resident professional repertory company (LiveArts Rep), and holding space for local and international artists (LiveArts Community Programs).

Values
Inspire both artists and audiences to be artistically linked to their community and to elevate Santa Fe's reputation as a vital performing arts destination. Santa Fe has been recognized as one of the best arts cities in the world. We will enhance that excellence by providing a vibrant, accessible performing arts center that propels Santa Fe’s established reputation beyond the visual arts.

Transform the expectations of traditional theatrical work, structures, and concepts with visionary new pieces and fresh interpretations of the past. In this space we create brave work with disenfranchised voices that include all races, genders, and abilities.

Engage audiences at all stages of life with entertaining and affordable programming that starts a conversation and builds new bridges between cultures. Our outreach welcomes current theater goers and expands to those who are still discovering the value of live performance.

Name: Nona's Supper Club
Description:
Nona’s Supper Club is an interactive musical experience that invites guests into the heart of the Abalafia family’s beloved (and chaotic) restaurant on the night of its grand reopening. Wine flows, food is served, and original music fills the air—but beneath the celebration simmers a nearly impossible goal: to convince Matilda “Nona” Abalafia, the fierce and beloved matriarch, to finally retire and pass the torch to the next generation.

With a score packed with infectious pop anthems and show-stopping ballads—and a heaping side of dinner—Nona’s Supper Club is a musical feast about resilience and an imperfect lovable family on a mission to save Nona’s legacy...Can love (and food) conquer all?

performances in Clondalkin and the surrounding areas, to encourage participation in and appreciation of the performing arts by the local community, and to support the integration of International Protection applicants by fostering inclusion, cultural exchange, and engagement through drama and community theatre.

Name: Opera Viva Festival Woerden
Description:
**Opera Viva Festival** is a vibrant festival dedicated to music lovers, culture enthusiasts, opera aficionados, and curious visitors. Originally centered in the picturesque town of Woerden, the festival has now grown to include performances in Leerdam, Eindhoven, and Amsterdam, achieving a national scope and coverage. Known for its accessibility, diversity, and inspiring performances, the festival is a significant event not to be missed this fall!

Supported by the Italian Ministry of Culture (MIC), Opera Viva Festival is committed to making opera accessible to broader audiences, bringing this art form to life for everyone.

**Our Mission:** 
Opera Viva Festival aims to make opera accessible to a broader audience by bringing together amateurs and professionals from local, regional, and international backgrounds. 

**Our Program Pillars:**
1. **(O)PRO:** Professional performances, concerts, lectures, and workshops.
2. **(O)MUSA:** Music theatre productions with social value, designed for special target groups or occasions.
3. **(O)AMA:** The festival's roots, featuring opera performances and concerts by amateurs.

**History:**
Founded on the concept of Opera Viva AMA, the festival began as a small project with a group of singers and a pianist. Under the guidance of mezzo-soprano and theatre maker Carla Regina, it evolved into a full-fledged opera company. Since 2018, the festival has been a significant cultural event in Woerden, developed further by Carla Regina and Arie Oosterlee, inspired by renowned festivals like Glyndebourne and Aix en Provence.

**6th Edition Highlights:**
- **Dates:** September 14, October 15, 17, 18, 19, 20, 22, 31, and November 2, 22, 2024.
- **Locations:** Woerden, Amsterdam, Eindhoven, Leerdam.
- **Featured Soloists:** Eleonora Hu, winner of the TV program ARIA (2021), and Eric Reddet, known for André Rieu's The Platin Tenors.

For more information, visit our website www.operavivafestival.com and follow us on LinkedIn!

Name: Evan Bernardin Productions
Description:

Our wholistic approach is unique, combining established golden age practices with new age technological, organizational, and analytical tools. Evolve Theatrical Management maintains relationships with agents, theater owners, unions, and suppliers which can be leveraged to provide expert support at competitive rates.

We pride ourselves on the familial round-the-clock guidance and support we provide our clients. We work tirelessly to ensure that your production stays on track, on budget, and on the path to success.

Description:
At OddKnock Productions, we create immersive dance and theater performances designed to transport audiences to new worlds and ignite their imagination. With every production, we want to reimagine the relationship between the performer and the viewer, placing special emphasis on interaction. 

We believe the best stories are told together.
