Name: Theatergroep Maaistoff
Description:
NORMALE MENSEN BESTAAN NIET
Verrassende, ontroerende, hilarische, troostende, hoopvolle, vrolijke voorstellingen voor kinderen van 6 tot 106 jaar.

Theatergroep Maaistoff maakt theater vanuit liefde en compassie voor mensen, vanuit de overtuiging dat iedereen bijzonder is en niemand beter is dan een ander. Iedereen op deze aardkloot loopt maar een beetje zijn best te doen om er iets van te maken. Soms lukt dat en heel vaak ook niet, door tegenslag, door koppigheid, door angst, door belemmeringen, beperkingen, onzekerheid, overmoed. Lach er maar om, huil er maar om. Het is goed, jij mag er ook zijn.
Met onze voorstellingen willen we je laten ervaren dat je echt niet de enige bent; we zitten allemaal in hetzelfde schuitje!

De voorstellingen van Theatergroep Maaistoff zijn geschikt voor kinderen vanaf groep drie en kunnen op locatie worden gespeeld, bijvoorbeeld op school, op de BSO, in de bibliotheek, in het theater en op andere plekken waar kinderen komen. Maar de voorstellingen zijn zeer zeker ook geschikt voor volwassenen, want Maaistoff gelooft dat kinderen al heel veel volwassenheid in zich hebben en volwassenen nog heel veel kind.

Theatergroep Maaistoff laat zich elk jaar inspireren door het motto van de Kinderboekenweek, maar de thema's uit de voorstellingen zijn het hele jaar door actueel. Dus ook na de Kinderboekenweek.

Name: Teatro de Gli Incamminati
Description: Milano, nel luglio del 1983, e muove i suoi primi passi in risposta ad una vocazione del tutto particolare: quella di produrre, sostenere e rappresentare l’opera di Giovanni Testori.  Nel tempo il lavoro degli Incamminati ha subito cambiamenti e trasformazioni, la compagnia è cresciuta ed ha assunto sempre maggior rilievo. Nel 2022 ha ricevuto il riconoscimento come Centro di Produzione Teatrale dal Ministero della Cultura, a conferma della qualità di un progetto artistico svolto in quarant’anni di attività, garantendo ulteriormente la stabilità di una compagine strutturale dinamica e prolifera.

Name: Nikt Nic Nie Wie - improwizacja dla dzieci
Description:
Nazywamy się "Nikt Nic Nie Wie". Improwizacją teatralną zajmujemy się na na co dzień - występujemy na warszawskich scenach m.in. w Resorcie Komedii i Klubie Komediowym, ale również jesteśmy instruktorkami i instruktorami w warszawskiej Szkole Impro, w której uczymy zarówno dzieci, jak i dorosłych. Istniejemy nieprzerwanie od 2014 roku i bawimy Młodych i Dorosłych Widzów i uczymy Młodych Improwizatorów.

Dlaczego improwizacja? - Bo jest jedną z najbardziej autentycznych form wyrazu, a także swoimi wartościami i głównymi założeniami potrafi zmieniać życie. Widzimy, jakim pięknym i skutecznym narzędziem jest w pracy z dziećmi. Poprzez zabawę otwiera na współpracę z innymi, pomaga pozbyć się lęków i blokad i ułatwia komunikację.


Spektakle
„Nikt nic nie wie” to wyjątkowe wydarzenie teatralne dla dzieci.
To komediowy spektakl, podczas którego wspólnie z dziećmi wymyślamy i nadajemy bieg zabawnym, wzruszającym i przygodowym historiom. Dzieci pomagają nam w stworzeniu świata i bohaterów. Wszystko jest improwizowane na żywo, przez co każda historia jest niepowtarzalna i wydarza się tylko raz. Zdarza się, że młoda widownia jest angażowana przez nas również na scenie!
Spektakl przeznaczony jest dla widzów w wieku od 4 do 10 lat. Ale gwarantujemy, że dorosła widownia również będzie bawić się wyśmienicie ;)


Warsztaty
Zajęcia z improwizacji teatralnej są zabawą, która rozwija w dzieciach wiele umiejętności:
• integrują dzieci poprzez zabawy i gry grupowe
• rozwijają kreatywność i wyobraźnię
• uczą słuchania, uważności i obserwowania
• pogłębiają pewność siebie, wyłączają wewnętrznego krytyka
• poprzez wspólne tworzenie wyłączają ocenianie siebie i innych
• uczą spontaniczności, szybkiego podejmowania decyzji
• otwierają dzieci na zaskakujące sytuacje i ośmielają do nowych pomysłów
• uczą działania w grupie

Name: Order Chaos Theater Inc
Description: Order Chaos Theater, Inc is a non-profit 501 (c)3, dba Order Chaos Theater Company (OCTC) that strives to create a space upholding the highest standards and integrity for all involved with OCTC and within our Community here in the Valley. Through its thoughtful and intimate productions, OCTC hopes to remove the distance between the stage and the audience, connecting with our community through plays and musicals that resonate with the lives of those around us. We are committed to equality on and off the stage, with our dedication to diversity, inclusion, and tolerance in all we do.

Name: LUCY.
Description:
Collectief LUCY. bestaat uit Rozan Vergeer, Janneke Bruggink en Anke Odinga. Op dit moment werken we aan de volgende projecten:

JE HEBT GEEN IDEE: 
Een ode aan het (uitblijvende) moederschap. We reizen langs buurthuizen, scholen en kleine theaters om het gesprek hierover te openen. 

Project Goudmakers:
We strijken een halfjaar neer in een wijk in Groningen om de verhalen van zestigplussers een podium te geven. Samen met hen werken we toe naar een artistiek product. Van september t/m december 2025 zijn we te vinden in Hoogkerk. 

Workshops/projecten op bestelling:
Ben je op zoek naar een workshop of project op maat? Wij geven schrijf-, dans- en theaterworkshops aan jong en oud, op iedere locatie. 

Zin in een kopje koffie? Welkom!

Name: Blue Masque Theatre
Description: Blue Masque Theatre is a non-profit touring theatre company. Its mission is "Good theatre for thirsty people." It has three programming strands: Classical Ladies (stories about women), What If? What Then? (sci fi/fantasy theatre) and Wit & Wisdom (comedy theatre.)

Name: Kirsten van Teijn
Description: Kirsten van Teijn ontving de Neerlands Hoop, de cabaretprijs voor de meest veelbelovende theatermaker met een groot toekomstperspectief voor de voorstelling (S)EXPERIMENT. In 2024 werd haar voorstelling JALOEZIE IS EEN BITCH genomineerd voor de Poelifinario Engagement, en het Nederlands Theater Festival. Club Queersten is stichting rondom haar culturele en maatschappelijke activiteiten.

Name: Merely Players
Description: Merely Players is an actor-managed traveling Shakespeare company based in Corvallis, Oregon. Our take on Shakespeare is accessible, interactive, irreverent, fast-paced, and most of all, fun. We make collaborative theatre that can travel anywhere in the Central Willamette Valley.

Name: ACCESS Broadway NY
Description: ACCESS Broadway NY strives to lead the Theater industry in building pathways to accessible services. Specializing in ADA Audits, Accessible program creation, and developing access services for live theater performances.

Name: Subtract Pigeon
Description: Theatre community based in Christ University, Bangalore.

Name: Stichting Theater!
Description: Stichting Theater is een kleine theaterproducent die zich richt op het produceren van muziektheater en musicals. Wij produceren zowel nieuw geschreven stukken als bijzondere, intieme en kleinschalige bestaande muziektheater producties.

Name: The 5 O'Clock Club
Description: The 5 O'Clock Club is a new theatre and production company aiming to promote new work in theatre, film, and literature. Our passion lies in stories and we aspire to give a voice to all, allowing our audiences and artists to share, experience, inspire, and learn.

Name: Stel Dat: theater impresariaat
Description: De origineelste voorstelling, vetste tribute bands en de mooiste muzikale acts vind je bij Stel dat:

Name: Lilliput Company
Description: Since 1996, Lilliput is a puppetry theater company and non-profit organization from Paris, France.

Name: InterAzioni Creative
Description:
L’associazione ha come mission quella di attivare interazioni creative: per questo, sin dall’inizio ha promosso progetti nati dall’incontro eterogeneo e in continua mutazione di artisti e operatori teatrali e dello spettacolo, afferenti a tutti gli ambiti dal teatro, alla danza, alla musica, al circo, le arti grafiche ecc…

Nel corso degli anni sono state realizzati diversi progetti di allestimento teatrale, molti dei quali sitespecific: spettacoli, flash mob, reading, happening… in collaborazione con altri artisti italiani e stranieri.

Parallelamente Alla e Francesco tutti gli anni propongono una serie di percorsi di formazione nel territorio di Prato e Montemurlo, tra cui corsi annuali per bambini, ragazzi e adulti, laboratori e workshop specifici.

Name: Delaware Shakespeare
Description:
Inspired by Shakespeare’s creative vision and the broad societal mix of audiences of his era, Delaware Shakespeare brings our community together for vibrant theatre and learning experiences.

The Delaware Shakespeare Summer Festival is an annual outdoor event held each summer at Rockwood Park in Wilmington, Delaware. The event is known for its inclusive atmosphere, featuring low-cost ticket options, family-friendly nights, and interactive programming that invites audiences to experience Shakespeare in a relaxed, picnic-friendly setting.

Our annual Community Tour is a statewide initiative that brings professional Shakespeare performances to underserved communities in Delaware. Since its launch in 2016, the tour has performed in non-traditional venues such as prisons, libraries, community centers, and shelters, ensuring that individuals with limited access to the arts can experience live theater.

Name: Homecoming Centre
Description:
HCC (Homecoming Centre) of the District Six Museum, is a multi-purpose eventing and education space and an amalgamation of arts, performance, learning & community.

It features purposeful spaces including the Star Theatre, the Avalon Auditorium, Bits 'n Pieces galleries, Tafel, workspaces and an on-site cafe run by the team at Truly Love Coffee. 

Each space has its own story to tell and like District Six itself, celebrates the rich culture and history before it.

Name: Teatro Avenida
Description: El Teatro Avenida de Buenos Aires, Argentina, inaugurado en 1908 y reconstruido en 1994, ha sido tradicional sede de compañías españolas, de zarzuela, teatro y ópera en su emplazamiento en el número 1222 de la Avenida de Mayo del barrio porteño de Montserrat.

Name: Arts Alliance at Northwestern University
Description: Arts Alliance is the oldest student-run arts group at Northwestern University, a school renowned for its breadth of undergraduate-produced programming. Founded by a collection of groups looking to share space, Arts Alliance has grown to become one of the largest student arts organizations in the country and continues to produce work for the Northwestern and greater Evanston communities.

Name: Compagnie de l'ArroZoir
Description: Explorations immersives et théâtre d'objets.

Name: YALTA ART ROOM
Description:
Представяме Ви най-новия и най-младия театър в София - 
YALTA ART ROOM !
Казваме “най-младия”, защото тук нашите зрители ще срещнат най-новите поколения професионални артисти. Младият талант и неговото развитие имат нужда от бойно поле за действие, осветяване на идеи и общуване.  Освен основна сцена на младото изкуство в Столицата,  YALTA ART ROOM е отворено и за творчески акции от цялата страна - всеки месец в нашата програма можете да откриете гостуващо представление от провинциалните театри. 
   Ние отворихме врати на 19-ти септември 2021г. и за тези няколко месеца успяхме да дадем живот на близо 20 различни заглавия в сферата на театралното, танцовото, кино и литературно изкуство, които регулярно срещат своята публика на нашата сцена. 
   Зрителите на Ялта гледат в бъдещето. Те виждат същинското начало на онези, които само след няколко години ще бъдат любимите им актьори и режисьори, и с голямо задоволство ще могат да си кажат един ден “Аз 
този актьор го знам още млад и зелен, преди никой да знае за него, от YALTA ART ROOM го знам.”
Ние сме преди Новините! 
Елате! Вижте ги! Подкрепете ги! Повярвайте им!

Name: Det store Julespelet
Description:
Julespelet er en utendørs teaterforestilling som spilles i Julebygda i desember hvert år. 

40 skuespillere på scenen, de fleste amatører, og noen profesjonelle. 
Men minst like viktig - bak scenen et helt lite samfunn av dugnadsfolk som strekker seg mer enn lang for å få dette til. 

I tilknytning til sceneområdet har vi et Julemarked, der det selges håndlagde skatter og bakverk fra driftige håndverkere. 

Julespelet og julemarken har julestemningsgaranti! 

Spelet drives av "Stiftelsen Julebygdspelet", og Julespelets verdier er "Kjærlighet - forsoning  - varme". Disse verdiene jobber vi etter i alt vi gjør, og vår visjon er å spre juleglede og varme langt ut over våre egne grenser. 

Vi er stolte av sponsornettverket vårt, som sammen med dugnadsgjengen er grunnen til at vi får dette til år etter år. I nettverket vårt har vi flere små, og noen store bedrifter, og vi har plass til flere! Ta kontakt på post@julespelet.no

Name: Limburg Festival
Description: Bijzonder theater op bijzondere locaties in Midden-Limburg

Name: Black Box Players
Description: Black Box Players is a student run, not-for-profit organization that is open to all Syracuse University students. Our mission is to provide an enriching theatre experience to the University and surrounding communities. We produce the work of student artists (directors, designers, actors, and playwrights) in order to support the development of theatrical expression. We encourage discussion, oppose censorship, and support each production's right to make creative choices. Admission to our events is free.

Name: Third Wheel Improv
Description:
Third Wheel Improv is one of two improv groups at Barnard/Columbia. Our team members are from all four undergraduate schools at Columbia. We host open rehearsals most Wednesdays and have shows monthly. 

@thirdwheelcolumbia on Instagram, Facebook and TikTok

Name: Zinvol Gesprek
Description:
Wij maken met onze campagne doormiddel van verschillende ervaringsdeskundige, een educatieve speelfilm en een interactief lesprogramma maatschappelijke thema’s onder jongeren bespreekbaar. We openen een Zinvol Gesprek! Waar geen antwoord goed of fout is. Wij maken maatschappelijke thema’s bespreekbaar en open een gesprek.

De verschillende lesprogramma’s zijn beschikbaar voor zowel het VO, PO, MBO- en het hbo-onderwijs. De verschillende pakketten uit ons aanbod worden per school individueel afgestemd op het niveau, leerjaar en het aantal leerlingen.

Om onze campagne toegankelijk te maken voor een breed publiek werken we exclusief samen met onder andere CJP en bioscoopketen Pathé.

Name: Teatrul Excelsior
Description:
Teatrul Excelsior a fost înfiinţat la 1 aprilie 1990, imediat după Revoluţia din 1989, ca teatru pentru copii şi tineret. În stagiunea curentă, pe scena Teatrului Excelsior, se pot viziona 45 de spectacole pentru copii și tineri, un program care reunește printre cele mai talentate nume din regia românească și o trupă de actori a căror efervescență și tenacitate sunt la un nivel superior.

Începând cu 2023, din dorința de a oferi mai departe bucuria teatrului, organizăm X-Fest - Festivalul Internațional de Teatru Tânăr Excelsior. Nouă zile și nopți în care teatrul cu, despre sau pentru tineri ia cu asalt Bucureștiul, în cadrul unui eveniment de amploare, unic în peisajul cultural al capitalei. Mai multe detaii aici: https://x-fest.ro/

Vă așteptăm în sălile de spectacol! :)

Name: Theatre Western
Description:
Theatre Western is a vibrant and passionate community dedicated to the captivating world of the performing arts. Within our club, you will find a diverse ensemble of creative individuals who share a love for the stage and the magic it holds.

Through script readings, performances, and shared experiences, we foster collaboration and artistic development. At our core, we are a close-knit family, bound by our unwavering passion for the theatre and our commitment to achieving excellence.

Name: Lumen Repertory Theatre
Description:
Founded in 2022, Lumen Rep is committed to collaborating with established professional artists and technicians, cultivating emerging professional talent, and creating a sustainable vision for our region’s cultural fabric.

We believe: 

BOLD choices are the foundation for memorable art.

Good art is entertaining, great art is SUBVERSIVE.

Theatre holds up a mirror to society, CHALLENGING us to be our best selves. 

Performance art has the power to ILLUMINATE the empty spaces within our community, and within ourselves.

That EXCEPTIONAL experiences begin with exceptional quality.

We are:

A RESIDENT theatre company who cultivates a core team of professional actors, directors, production staff and designers, playwright and dramaturg in residence, stage manager in residence, and company staff. 

A REGIONAL theatre company who collaborates with multiple professionals, disciplines, and organizations to extend the reach of the company beyond a single location and focus. 

A REPERTORY theatre company who creates a bigger body of work from the synergy of the core team who are representatives of the company, and are consequently more flexible than the typical line production system of most theatre companies.

Founders: 
Brian Niece, Kristin Livingston and Josh Andrews

Board of Directors: 
Rob Edenzon, Jane Condon, Carol Grimes, Diane Brunet-Garcia, Derrick Scott III, Suzanne Tunnell and Cheryl Fluhr

Name: Wellington Law Revue
Description: The Wellington Law Revue takes talented young Wellingtonians, mixes in satirical wit, a dash of student humour, splashes of songcraft and visual shenanigans to taste and delivers a hilarious stage production for all shapes and sizes.

Name: Teater K
Description: Teater K is a community theater founded in 2018. Built by the previous members and trainer of Teater Bamboe (SMA Perguruan Cikini), Teater K has became one of many theater community in South Jakarta and part of SINTESA (Simpul Interaksi Teater Jakarta Selatan).

Name: Lombó Teatro
Description: La Escuela de Teatro Lombó, fue fundada en 2009, imparte desde entonces clases regulares de manera ininterrumpida y han pasado cientos de alumn@s de diferentes países. Muchos de nuestros alumnos y alumnas han participado de manera activa en Espéctaculos, Intervenciones Callejeras, Muestras de Teatro y otras actividades. Actualmente impartimos clases regulares en Salamanca capital para adultos, adolescentes y niños, aunque también ha extendido sus cursos regulares a Ciudad Rodrigo, Zamora y más localidades de la región.

Name: Aveksha - Dramatics Society of USS, GGSIPU
6t-théâtre
Description: Créateurs de spectacles de théâtre forum, participatifs et citoyens, où les spectateurs passent de simples observateurs à acteurs en un instant.

Name: La Lit de Camp
Description: La Lit de Camp is CentraleSupélec's improvisational theatre. Open to begginers and experimented, the club's speciality is improvisational match.

Name: Streetcar Theatre Company
Description: At Streetcar Theatre Company, we foster a vibrant, inclusive community where every voice is celebrated. STC operates from the position that talent is equal, opportunity is not. We are deeply committed to sharing the narratives of marginalized groups, including BIPOC, LGBTQ+, disabled, and neurodivergent individuals, as well as a belief that those stories are universal and meant to unite.  By helping to remove the barriers that divide neighbors, we are able to provide Lexington and Central Kentucky with a professional theatrical entertainment experience meant for everyone. Through not just embracing but championing diversity, we aim to break barriers and empower all.

Name: Eesti Noorsooteater / Estonian Theatre for Young Audiences
Description: Eesti Noorsooteater on noore vaataja teater, mis kujundab noore inimese kultuuriruumi, avardab tema tajusid, peegeldab tema maailmatunnetust, aitab tundma õppida iseennast ja maailma. Teatri juurde kuuluvad ka Nukuteatrimuuseum ja Rahvusvaheline visuaalteatrifestival Tallinn Treff, mis moodustavad teatriga sünergilise terviku.

Name: La Corte Ospitale
Description:
La Corte Ospitale è impresa di produzione teatrale e Centro di residenza dell'Emilia-Romagna. Ha base a Rubiera (RE), in un antico ospitale del '500, luogo di cure e ristoro per i pellegrini.
Gestisce il Teatro Herberia, nel centro di Rubiera, dove programma una stagione di prosa e teatro ragazzi e per famiglie.

Name: La Compagnie du Palais de Justice
Description:
Née en 1995, à l’occasion de la représentation du procès d’Oscar Wilde, la Compagnie du Palais de Justice rassemble des amateurs du théâtre : juges, substituts, avocats, médiateurs et notaires qui revêtent, le temps d’une soirée, le costume de comédiens pour traiter, de manière critique, relevée et passionnée, des sujets au cœur de leur profession quotidienne.
(Landru en 1997, Bérénice de Racine en 1999, le procès de Mata Hari en 2000, le procès de Kafka en 2001, Richard III de Shakespeare en 2002, Antigone d’Anouilh en 2005, Crime et Châtiment de Dostoïevski en 2012, Genet en 2014, 12 hommes en colère et le procès de Jack l’éventreur en 2017).

Name: Baúl Polisémico
Description: Corporación artística integrada por jóvenes que utilizan el arte como herramienta de comunicación, para expresar una visión polisémica sobre la sociedad. Desde el año 2012, ha trabajado en 3 áreas: producción audiovisual, blog y artes escénicas en la ciudad de Barranquilla.

Name: Walnut Theatrical Productions
Description:
Founded by Artistic Director Liam Eric Dawson and Managing Director Luísa Raymundo, Walnut Productions is a new home for emerging artists to be creatively free while striving to make quality entertainment that is immersive and visually exciting. To create visceral art, you have to use the walnut (your brain) — and be a little nuts!

By fostering new Canadian playwrights and supporting artistic excellence, Walnut Productions aims to become an integral part of the Toronto theatre community — one that celebrates bold storytelling and the next generation of theatre artists.

Name: KITE Theater
Description:
We are a group of multinational professional artists (actors, directors, musicians, script writers), with wide experience in theatre industry.

We create original plays, conduct workshops, organize festivals and entertainment events.

Name: Straattheaterfestival  BuitenGewoon
Description: Straattheaterfestival BuitenGewoon is een uniek festival in Doetinchem.

Name: La Mandarine.cie
Description: Compagnie de théâtre.

Name: Angereds Teater
Description: Angereds Teater grundades 1978 och var fram till 1996 en del av Göteborgs Stadsteater. Idag finansieras Angereds Teater av Göteborgs kommun och spelar nyskriven dramatik för barn, ungdomar och vuxna. Vi spelar de främst föreställning på dagtid, ofta för elever i skolan, men vi har även offentliga föreställningar på kvällar och helger.

Name: American Theatre Company
Description: Tulsa's oldest nonprofit theater company, bringing A Christmas Carol to life every year for 48 years!  We also present various other productions at the Tulsa PAC and the Black Box Theater.

Name: BRODER MUZIEKTHEATER
Description:
BRODER maakt muziek + theater over de grenzen heen. Van verbeeldingsrijke muziektheatervoorstellingen voor 6 tot 106, tot performances, debatten en publicaties. Actrices zingen, muzikanten acteren. Nieuwe hedendaags-klassieke composities ontmoeten klassiek werk. In herkenbare en doorleefd gespeelde teksten worden gestofeerde verhalen scherp en actueel. Samen wordt het één partituur over de grenzen van theater, musical en opera. Van unieke lokaties tot in mooie theaterzalen maakt BRODER muziek + theater, gestoffeerd en episch vorm gegeven in beeld, muziek en tekst.

BRODER IS OOK …

- één grote FAMILIE, een eerlijke meerstemmige samenklank
- een KOOR, een zwerm van enthousiaste stemmen die rond de producties hangt, zangers die vaak onverwacht naar voren treden
- een LAB, een creatieve speeltuin, verrassende satellietprojecten, debat en performance
- PUBlicaties van muziek, tekst en beeld
- een BASEcamp voor muziek + theater in Gent: Arca als deel- en draaiplatform voor diverse Gentse groepen en makers - www.arcatheater.be. Contact : arca@broder.be

Name: Arc Theatre
Description: Originally founded in 1984, Arc is a professional, educational touring theatre company based in the London Borough of Barking & Dagenham and working across London and throughout the UK on issue-based theatre, film and multi-media projects for young people and local communities.

Name: Stage Troupe
Description: Our mission is to stage high-quality productions all while building a community that provides Boston University students the opportunity to explore their artistic potential, develop new skills, and express themselves through collaborative projects. We hold ourselves to a high standard of theatrical excellence, student leadership, and professionalism.

Name: Peacock Players
Description:
The mission of Peacock Players is to create theatre that entertains, educates, and inspires the community, and to offer theatre arts educational programs that encourage, inform, and challenge our students.

Peacock Players is proud to serve our community as Southern New Hampshire’s beloved youth theatre nonprofit.

For over forty years, Peacock Players has proudly touched the lives of countless students, and audiences alike, by bringing the best in high-quality youth theatre and theatre arts education to the southern New Hampshire region. In addition to producing our highly acclaimed Mainstage productions each season, Peacock Players provides year-round educational programs and select community outreach performance groups. Through these programs, Peacock Players enables students to build self-esteem and imagination, foster leadership and team working skills. Our programs instill strong artistic values that will support them throughout their lives.

Name: International New Technical Est. INTE
Description:
International New Technical Est. (INTE) was established in 1983 as MEP contracting company. In relatively short time, INTE was able to be certified by the Ministry of work as first degree ( highest in Jordan). INTE in 1985 opened its Theater Department and became the market leader in full professional theater design and Integration.

INTE provides proven electronic solutions, maximum flexibility and the utmost in responsiveness, we are customer-focused, results oriented and easily accessible.

INTE has successfully delivered a number of projects and has vast experience in MEP design, construction, supervision, service and maintenance.

Name: Artemisia Theatre
Description:
Artemisia produces plays that empower women, creating career-altering opportunities for female identifying theatre artists of all racial and ethnic backgrounds; sexual orientations and identities; economic status; ages and disabilities. We make women heroes of their own lives by sharing their stories and amplifying their voices.  We invite anyone and everyone who wants to empower women to join us as artists and audience.

Artemisia aims to be at the forefront of the fight for women and female-identifying people through outstanding performances that push the envelope.  From world premieres to the virtual stage, our mission is and will always be to better our world for women and female-identifying people.

Name: For The Record Live
Description:
FOR THE RECORD: a breakthrough, genre-bending form of live entertainment, turning the soundtracks of iconic films into thrilling immersive theatrical experiences. The FTR Live Experience is not your classic movie-based musical, but a new kind of character-driven concert where some of cinema’s most beloved stories and the songs forever linked to those films mix and mash together in inspired and surprising ways. 

What began in 2010 in a small bar in East Hollywood and went on to become a “must-see show” in Los Angeles, a hit special event in NYC, Chicago, at SXSW in Austin and the Montreal International Jazz Festival, For The Record has since created BAZ: STAR CROSSED LOVE, “the best spectacular you might ever watch” (Las Vegas Sun) at the Palazzo Theater in Las Vegas, SCORSESE: AMERICAN CRIME REQUIEM at The Wallis in Beverly Hills, which was nominated for 11 Ovation Awards and won the 2016 Broadway World Award for Best Musical in Los Angeles, and THE BRAT PACK, the “overwhelmingly popular” show on the Norwegian Escape voted one of the “best stage shows at sea”.  

Most recently, FTR debuted Cinema For The Record, a first-of-its-kind event that combines live orchestra film screenings with immersive musicals to create an altogether new genre of live event. LOVE ACTUALLY LIVE, the first edition of the series, was a box office-record-breaking smash hit at The Wallis in Beverly Hills with Entertainment Weekly calling it “pitch perfect”, and the LA Times recommending everyone “let this superbly mounted musical wash over you with warmth and joy”.  

FTR is currently building a traveling home for the company called the CineVita. A Pop Arts Center that will allow FTR to take their unique experiences around the world.

Name: Who is Esther
Description: Who is Esther: a modern-day heroine who inspires people to believe that everyone has it within themselves to make a difference.

Name: Actor Unveiled
Description:
Actor Unveiled is a Theatre & Performing Arts Society and Academy in Noida established in December 2014 by Gul Guncha Arts (A New Age Media Production House). 

Its founder, Ms.Kanu Priya, is a celebrity media personality who has been in the industry for the last 25 years. She is also the Founder and CEO of Gul Guncha Arts. 

Actor Unveiled has developed into an open community of actors, non-actors, students, professionals, retired persons, homemakers; people from all walks of life who share a passion for acting and drama. 

Corporate & school workshops are also available.

As of 2021, Ojaswini Gul Priya is managing the academy

Name: Openluchttheater Overloon "Victoriaklef"
Description: Het openluchttheater Overloon is net als het Oorlogsmuseum, gelegen in het museumpark in Overloon. De bosrijke omgeving zorgt voor een sfeervol decor en een intieme sfeer. Ruik en proef de buitenlucht in het theater met het mooiste plafond van de regio, dat elk kwartier anders is.

Name: RELATIONSHIT - Le spectacle sur nos relations professionnelles
Description:
Dans la start-up innovante et branchée SARRAUTECH, tout est dit, tout est clair, tout est net… En apparence. 

RELATIONSHIT est une comédie de caractère drôle, mordante, parfois grave qui remet la relation humaine et la communication authentique au cœur de l'essentiel.

POUR LES CSE :
 Une sortie à fort impact social
 Un déclencheur de parole sur le "travailler ensemble"
 Une action simple à organiser, ET qui marque durablement

POUR LES ÉCOLES ET UNIVERSITÉS :
 Un miroir percutant des réalités des Relations Professionnelles
 Un levier pédagogique original 
 Une expérience qui pousse les étudiants à parler de ce qu’ils vivent vraiment

 18 représentations au Studio Hébertot (Paris) dès le 17 septembre

 Pack communication sur demande
 Tarif préférentiel 

Et si un spectacle pouvait faire plus que divertir ?
 Demandez à recevoir le pack pour relayer Relationshit dans votre structure.

Name: UKMF Teater PsiMeWah Universitas Diponegoro
Description: Psikologi Mepet Sawah (PsiMeWah) merupakan Unit Kegiatan Kemahasiswaan Fakultas (UKMF) Fakultas Psikologi Universitas Diponegoro yang berfokus pada seni teater, parodi, dan komedi

Name: Adélier Classics
Description: We always rebel. Rebel against conventional thinking in thoughtful and cultivated ways.

Name: Catalyst Theatricals
Description: Catalyst Theatricals offers a comprehensive range of services, including general management and executive producing for stage productions, creative consulting for emerging producers and artists, international productions and licensing support. With a commitment to tailored service and bold, out-of-the-box thinking, Catalyst Theatricals champions the unusual, the inspired, and the passionate.

Name: Les Talons Fous
Description: Créé par Luca Max et Mikaël Morin, le collectif Les Talons Fous est né du désir de lier l’art du pole dancing à celui du théâtre. Le terme pole-théâtre est utilisé pour décrire cette nouvelle forme artistique interdisciplinaire.

Name: Jaunimo teatras
Description:
Rodome spektaklius visoms amžiaus grupėms, tame tarpe ir  jaunimui, vaikams, pristatome eksperimentiniai trupės aktorių darbai. Spektakliai rodomi lietuvių bei anglų kalbomis (arba su subtitrais anglų k.). 

Jaunimo teatras įsteigtas Lietuvos kultūros ministerijos 1965 sausio 29 d.

We show performances for all age groups, including young people and children, and present experimental works by our actors. Plays are shown in Lithuanian and English (or with English subtitles).

The Youth Theater was established by the Lithuanian Ministry of Culture on January 29, 1965.

Name: Mornington Peninsula Theatre Company inc.
Description: classical theatre with a modern minimalist twist

Name: Bawre Theatre
Description: Be Insane, Be Bawre

Name: SNG Opera in balet Ljubljana
Description: Today – apart from some regular programme novelties, offered to its audience every season – the central Slovenian Musical Theatre boasts a wide repertoire of operas, ballets and concerts that derive from both modern and classical creativity, as well as around 150 season and off-season repeat performances on stages at home and abroad. The Slovenian National Theatre Opera and Ballet Ljubljana has been successfully staging its own productions as well as cooperating with various international and Slovenian co-producers for several years, and thus producing an enviable number of acclaimed projects (Faust, Aida, The Love for Three Oranges, Don Quixote, Prince Igor, etc.). Certainly, one of the most memorable performances was the world premiere of the Offenbach’s newly discovered The Rhine Nymphs.

Name: UnderGlass Productions
Description: We are a film and theatre production company that facilitates the production of creative and thought provoking pieces.

Name: Casa Dee Productions
Description: Casa Dee Productions is dedicated to creating experiences that not only entertain but also challenge and amuse our audiences whether this be in film, theatre, literature, creative workshops etc.

Name: Chapman Student Organized Productions
Description: Chapman Student Org Productions, also known as CSOP, produces pre-professional musical productions at Chapman University. We are open to all majors and offer undergraduate students opportunities to perform, direct, design, administrate, and tech.

Name: Gem City Groundlings
Description: The Gem City Groundlings envisions a future where Shakespeare’s works are a vibrant and integral part of the cultural fabric of Dayton and beyond. We aspire to be a leading force in classical theater, redefining how Shakespeare is experienced through bold, inclusive, and innovative productions. By fostering a deep appreciation for the Bard’s artistry, we aim to make his works accessible to diverse audiences, from seasoned theatergoers to first-time viewers. Through education, outreach, and community-driven initiatives—including Shakespeare Behind Bars, stage combat training, and acting workshops—we seek to empower individuals with the tools of performance, critical thinking, and self-expression. Our commitment is to create a lasting impact, ensuring that Shakespeare’s words continue to challenge, inspire, and unite generations to come.

Name: La Compagnie des Tropes
Description: Une compagnie parisienne qui crée et produit des spectacles vivants professionnels. Une fabrique d‘ingéniosités culturelles qui invente des dramaturgies plurielles et multispatiales au service de vos projets.

Name: Sveamatea
Description:
Sveamatea är en teaterförening som grundades 1979 när en grupp ungdomar satte upp Kabaré Mannen. Sedan dess har Sveamatea vuxit och blivit större, och är nu en av de största ideella amatörteaterföreningarna i Skåne.

Just nu har vi tre barngrupper, två ungdomsgrupper och såklart en hel del vuxna skådespelare som sätter upp allt från farser till tragedier. Alla i föreningen jobbar ideellt, vilket också ger Sveamatea en drivkraft med hjälp av den kärlek medlemmarna har för föreningen.

På Sveamatea är det inte bara att stå på scenen som är viktigt, utan alla roller är betydelsefulla för att allt ska fungera så bra som möjligt. Vi strävar efter att göra det bästa för våra medlemmar – om någon är intresserad av smink, ljus, rekvisita eller något helt annat så ser vi till att intresset lyfts och tillämpas på bästa sätt.

Name: Deafinitely Theatre
Description:
You can get a great idea of who we are by having a look around our website and viewing our short film here: www.deafinitelytheatre.co.uk

Deafinitely Theatre is the first professional deaf launched and led theatre company in the UK that works bilingually in British Sign Language and spoken English and produces work that caters to audiences of all ages.

We believe deaf-led theatre has a vital contribution to make to the UK's diverse and vibrant theatre landscape.

We challenge barriers to training and opportunities and embraces the deaf world's diversity.

We work hard to nurture the next generation of deaf actors, writers and audiences through our Deafinitely Youth Theatre project and our creative training and development programme for adults.

We make work that is relevant to our community, amplifying their voices in our unique, theatrical style.

Name: Stichting Gedeelde Verhalen
Description:
Stichting Gedeelde Verhalen is een theaterproducent die sinds 2014 geschiedenis tot leven brengt op het podium. Vanuit Groningen realiseren wij locatievoorstellingen in de noordelijke provincies, waarin historische en maatschappelijke thema’s centraal staan.

Wij maken interdisciplinair theater – verweven met film, muziek en dans – en betrekken bewoners, ervaringsdeskundigen en kunstenaars met een directe band tot het onderwerp en de omgeving. Elke productie wordt ontwikkeld vanuit meerdere perspectieven, met als doel: verhalen delen die ertoe doen.

Kunst met betekenis. Theater met een verleden én een toekomst.

Name: TEATR KOMEDII IMPRO
Description: Teatr Komedii Impro to pierwszy w Polsce zawodowy teatr dedykowany sztuce improwizacji.

Name: Waxing Moon Masks, LLC
Description: Waxing Moon represents artists and practitioners of mask making, mask performance, and theatre education. We serve theatre companies, individuals, and universities throughout the United States. On the stage, in the classroom, and in the studio, Waxing Moon thrives on collaboration, and we work hard to facilitate strong connections for communication.

Name: 3Below Theaters
Description: 3Below Theaters, located in Downtown San Jose, CA, is home to four programs all designed to entertain you and yours. Whether you're looking for the new film that has everyone talking, a place to enjoy high quality professional live theatre, somewhere to take the kids or the entire family, or a theatre class to make new friends and share common interests, 3Below is your home away from home for great entertainment and fun!

Name: Studio Productions @ Bingley Little Theatre
Description: Studio Productions produces events which complement the larger scale productions of the Main Stage at Bingley Little Theatre. Our ambit includes a focus on new writing and creativity. Through our ITCH programme, we offer emerging playwrights the opportunity of regular scratch nights to test their material, performed by Bingley Little Theatre's fantastic acting members. We encourage writers to develop material that we will consider taking into full productions while giving new life to lost and forgotten classics. We are also excited to attempt exciting, experimental pieces which include forms of expression including dance, music and poetry. We are a  true Studio space and are welcoming of everybody - we hope to see you at one of our events soon.

Name: Komiktheater GHG Sonnenhalde Tandem
Description: Wir arbeiten und proben in St.Gallen und entwickeln eigene professionelle Stücke mit Humor sowie hoher künstlerischer Qualität, die auf den Theaterbühnen der ganzen Schweiz präsentiert werden. Gegründet wurde das Theater 2017 von der GHG Sonnenhalde Tandem.

Name: Compagnia Chille de la balanza
Description: La compagnia risiede dal 1998 a San Salvi, ex-città manicomio di Firenze: così decise l’ultimo direttore, dr. Pellicanò, che volle collegare l’uscita dei “matti” con l’ingresso della città nell’area dell’ex-manicomio. Per favorire questo processo chiese alla compagnia di stabilire la sua residenza in un padiglione dell’ex-ospedale psichiatrico e dar vita ad un progetto culturale pluriennale di presidio attivo (San Salvi città aperta).

Name: BarokOpera Amsterdam
Description: BarokOpera Amsterdam is een kameroperagezelschap waar oude muziek en modern theater elkaar versterken (barokoperaamsterdam.com). We brengen ieder jaar een nieuwe nationale of internationale (co-)productie op de Nederlandse podia, Franse festivals en elders, waarmee we het barokrepertoire een nieuwe plaats geven in de huidige tijd.

Name: El Viejo Actor
Description:
Productora Teatral  malagueña con más de diez años y ahora también Productora Audiovisual.
Contenidos 100% originales creados por un elenco de más 10 personas (escritores, músicos, figurinistas, escenógrafos, y un largo etc...).
En la actualidad se acaban de estrenar dos espectáculos: "Un Spot Terrorífico" (Teatro de calle) y "Patrés (Músic Festival) (Comedia de Sketch).
Y en Marzo (2011) se estrenará "Spot" (Comedia teatral) y dos cortometrajes: "Músico" y "Pintor".

Name: FilmFabriek NL
Description:
Filmfabriek Nederland – Ontdek jouw talent in film! 
Filmfabriek Nederland is dé plek waar kinderen en jongeren alles leren over filmmaken! Wij bieden inspirerende lessen waarin je niet alleen de magie van storytelling ontdekt, maar ook de technieken achter camera, licht, geluid, scenarioschrijven, scriptontwikkeling en acteren.
Wat maakt Filmfabriek uniek?
 Compleet filmproces – Van idee tot eindmontage, je leert alles over filmproductie.
 Drie eigen films per jaar – Elke leerling maakt samen met anderen drie films, compleet met een feestelijke première!
 Ontdek je passie – Probeer alle aspecten van filmmaken en ontdek wat jij écht leuk vindt.
 Gelijke kansen voor iedereen – Iedereen krijgt de kans om zijn talent te ontwikkelen, ongeacht ervaring of achtergrond.
 Samenwerken met professionals – Wij werken met ervaren producenten en regisseurs, en onze talenten kunnen geboekt worden voor professionele opdrachten.
Bij Filmfabriek Nederland draait alles om creativiteit, samenwerking en plezier. Of je nu acteur, regisseur, scenarioschrijver of cameraman wilt worden – hier krijg je de kans om alles uit te proberen en te groeien in wat jij het beste kunt! 

Inschrijf formuleer:
https://form.jotform.com/250943318863362

Name: Bijli
Description:
Bijli is a company focused on creating work that encourages diversity across cultures and art forms for Scottish and UK communities, and beyond.

We have been nationally recognised for our approach to developing and staging new writing, and our authentic representation of the diversity of the Scottish community.

Driven by a commitment to create work that is guided by innovation, truth, and humanity, Bijli from its inception is reaching new audiences through the creation of dynamic, socially engaged work, that has a visceral impact.

Bijli was co-founded by Mariem Omari and Umar Ahmed.

Name: Artemis is Burning
Description: Artemis is Burning is a bold, women-led theater company igniting a revolution in immersive storytelling. We are creators of worlds—blending immersive theater, film, and dynamic performance to craft powerful, sensory-driven experiences that transport you to uncharted realms. Each production is an invitation to step beyond the ordinary, where narrative, enchantment, and audience interaction collide in unforgettable ways.

Name: Great Barrington Public Theater
Description:
From June through mid-August we present in-person performances in both of our theaters—the beautiful, 300-seat McConnell Theatre, and the 99-seat Liebowitz Black Box, both state-of-the-art performance venues in the Daniel Arts Center on the campus of Bard College at Simon’s Rock, in Great Barrington, MA. 

Our focus is on compelling storytelling: thought-provoking scripts and performances that leap off the stage. 

Please join us as we continue to bring you top-tier, professional theater at its best. Come enjoy the many talented area theater artists—names you’ve come to know and have enjoyed watching on various stages around the region, and others whom you may encounter for the first time—reminding us all why we love and support theater here in the Berkshires.

Name: Theater O'kontreir
Description:
Theater O'Kontreir maakt tegendraads jongerentheater rond maatschappelijke thema's. 

Onze voorstellingen dagen jongeren uit om kritisch te denken en zich een eigen mening te vormen. Daarbij gaan we steeds op zoek naar nieuwe vormen, onverwachte invalshoeken en creatieve manieren om ons publiek écht aan te spreken en te betrekken.

De grote kracht van theater ligt in de uitnodiging tot collectieve inleving. Je neemt samen een duik in het hoofd en de ervaring van de personages. Dat maakt het tot een ideale manier om een onderwerp ‘van binnenuit’ te gaan begrijpen en duurzaam bespreekbaar te maken. 

Voor de inhoudelijke onderbouwing van onze voorstellingen gaan we steeds op zoek naar samenwerking met sociaal/maatschappelijke organisaties die rond het thema van de voorstelling actief zijn.  die rond het thema van de voorstelling actief zijn. Zij helpen ons om ons onderwerp in de diepte te doorgronden zodat onze voorstellingen nooit aan de oppervlakte blijven hangen.

Daarnaast adviseren ze ons bij het uitwerken van een natraject of bieden ze zelf omkaderende workshops en/of activiteiten aan. Zo werkt ieder vanuit zijn eigen kracht mee aan een artistiek én educatief project dat echt impact heeft. Zo werken we samen met Child Focus, Sensoa, TEJO, Cavaria, Respect Foundation en De Sleutel. 

Onze klanten zijn steden en gemeenten, secundaire scholen, hogescholen, preventiediensten,... We brengen onze voorstellingen in culturele centra en op locatie. Momenteel spelen we ongeveer 200 voorstellingen per seizoen. 

Komende productie: 
Fel Vel - Mentaal welzijn & zelfverwonding

Lopende producties: 
De Pest! aan mij - pesten
Sex Thing - sexting
Van Twee Kanten - respect
OGAY - seksuele geaardheid & gender
Trip - Drugs
Schaap van Vlaanderen - diversiteit
Grensgevallen - seksualiteit & grenzen

Name: Compagnie Vent Debout Montreuil
Description:
La compagnie Vent Debout est une association loi 1901 qui intervient au près des collégiens et des lycéens afin qu'ils participent à des ateliers théâtre.
La compagnie créait également des spectacles professionnels et se produit régulièrement.

Name: Freckle Productions Ltd
Description: Freckle Productions specialise in producing theatre shows for families, adapted from books by the brilliant Julia Donaldson and Axel Scheffler.

Name: Klaipėdos valstybinis muzikinis teatras
Description: Klaipėdos valstybinis muzikinis teatras (KVMT) – didžiausia profesionalaus scenos meno įstaiga ne tik Klaipėdoje, bet ir visame Vakarų Lietuvos regione. Jos misija – pristatyti aukščiausio meninio lygio muzikinius spektaklius bei koncertines programas šio regiono žiūrovams ir svečiams. Teatro repertuarą sudaro įvairių žanrų muzikiniai spektakliai (operos, operetės, miuziklai, šokio spektakliai), spektakliai ir edukacinės programos vaikams, simfoninės, chorinės, kamerinės muzikos koncertai, teatralizuotos koncertinės programos ir mažieji spektakliai – kelioninės spektaklių versijos, adaptuotos rodymui regiono kultūros centrų salėse. Iš jų kiekvieną sezoną įvyksta 2–4 naujų pastatymų premjeros ir repertuarinių spektaklių parodymai gastrolėse kituose Lietuvos miestuose ir svetur.

Name: The Other Guise Theatre Company
Description: The Other Guise is a community-motivated theatre company founded in Ladysmith, BC, now operating in Victoria, BC. We are committed to developing theatrical presentations which reflect the history and culture of Vancouver Island, and strive to support the livelihoods of established professionals and emerging artists alike.

Name: Acid Kostik
Description: Théâtre de rue décalé et tout terrain parfois humoristique, souvent musical, toujours participatif.

Name: Theatrically
Description:
Theatrically is a four-floor cultural hub with technically equipped spaces for conducting performing and visual arts workshops, presentations and stage shows.
Founded by Annu Mehta in 2022 with the aim of -
- Creating ample opportunities for the children to watch theatre.
- Providing a platform for children to engage artistically, participate and experiment creatively.
- Providing affordable spaces to various artists, creatively keen individuals and groups to conduct workshops and stage their productions.
- Hosting creative workshops for adults to help them express creatively in any art form.
Theatrically has been created with a vision and a purpose of aiding the creation of a better world by using theatre and the arts as a tool, working in collaborations and co partnerships with individuals, groups, organizations, teachers, instructors and experts holding a similar vision.
Because
Art makes us better human beings

Name: Old Fitz Theatre
Description: Welcome to the Old Fitz Theatre - Australia’s only remaining pub theatre, located in the basement of Woolloomooloo’s beloved 150-year-old Old Fitzroy Hotel. Over the past 26 years, this unique 55-seat space has become the leading NSW venue incubator for daring, bold, and innovative independent work, and has been the home to over 100 Australian Premieres of timely international works, new Australian works, and landmark revivals. Balancing the intimate and the epic, the Old Fitz provides inclusive, accessible platforms for new work and new artists, and a home for industry heavyweights to return to for an experience unlike anything else Sydney offers, all whilst ensuring a safe space for all kinds of artistic expression.

Name: Brave Bold Drama
Description:
People deserve high quality arts in their lives, even if they can't pay.

Brave Bold Drama is led by two freelance artists who are working class and LGBTQI+. We make award-winning theatre for families and for those living with dementia, and run a broad portfolio of community art projects made with and for working class communities.

Our playable theatre shows for family audiences have been described as "pioneering" by Dr Kirsty Sedgman, University of Bristol.

Our family theatre is non-didactic and never patronises. We are not simplistic, saccharine or superficial. We believe children deserve the richness of their humanity to be reflected in their art. When devising new shows, we draw on playful audience participation, original music and song, quirky humour and bold characterisation to create multi-faceted, layered worlds that appeal just as much to adults as to children.

Our community art projects emerge organically and in response to demonstrable community need. We work with all ages within working class communities. Our portfolio includes early years play sessions in libraries, sensory story kits for carers and residents in care-homes, sound walks creatively written by community members and arts award courses within schools.

Name: théâtre l'Escaouette
Théâtre du Sphinx
Description:
LE THÉÂTRE DU SPHINX, UN LIEU DE VIES…

…et de formations :

Pour booster la confiance en soi de vos équipes, pour réduire le stress lors de situations professionnelles complexes et en améliorer sa gestion, ou encore pour réduire l’angoisse lors de prises de parole en public. Expérimentez la scène et le jeu pour optimiser l’efficacité professionnelle de vos équipes avec des séminaires de formation !

…ou encore de lâcher prise :

Offrez un moment de détente et de plaisir à vos collaborateurs ! Boostez votre cohésion d’équipe avec des teambuildings personnalisés en fonction de vos besoins et vos envies ! Une expérience inédite passant par des jeux de scène et des activités autour du théâtre. De bons souvenirs, des moments de rires et de créativité collaborative !

…ou bien de rêves :

Pour apprendre à devenir le.la comédien.ne que vous avez toujours souhaité devenir ! Entourés de formateurs expérimentés et passionnés, intégrez un atelier professionnalisant : l’École Nantaise d’Art Dramatique, ateliers d’interprétation, d’exploration, de corps et rythme, ou encore de mise en scène. Faites de votre passion, votre profession !

Name: Folio Theatre
Description:
Folio is a dynamic, female-led new writing theatre company, proudly based in Wiltshire.

Through our programme we engage with under-represented audiences and provide participation opportunities for those whose stories we tell. Our work reflects a national need to create and share high quality new writing in under-served areas, inspiring artists and audiences to re-connect to arts and culture in the place they call home.

Name: PRA Muziektheater
Description: Bevlogen, inclusieve en innovatieve kunstprojecten opzetten binnen leefwerelden waar de beleving en het maken van kunst geen vanzelfsprekendheid zijn. Dat is waar PRA voor staat.

Name: Company Marte Boneschansker
Description:
SCHADUW is op tournee  koop je ticket via onze website!

Marte Boneschansker maakt één-op-één ervaringstheater vertrekkend vanuit documentair materiaal. Gewapend met een microfoon en in vaste samenwerking met zakelijk leider en sparringpartner Koosje Laan ontwikkelt zij intieme, fysieke audiowerken die het midden houden tussen theater en installatie. Eerder maakte zij BLOOS (2018), TOURIST (2019), BLOOS de mannen (2021), ROUW (2022) en BLOOS de mens (2023).

Stichting Bloos is in 2018 in het leven geroepen door artistiek leider Marte Boneschansker. De stichting streeft ernaar de bespreekbaarheid van diverse precaire onderwerpen in de samenleving te bevorderen. De stichting maakt zich hiervoor sterk door in haar producties actuele sociale en culturele thema’s centraal te zetten. Daarnaast initieert de stichting verschillende activiteiten ter ondersteuning van haar doelstelling en ter bevordering van de interdisciplinariteit binnen de kunsten.

Name: Kamerni Teatar 55
Description:
Kamerni teatar 55, iako je nastao, sada već davne, 1955. godine, još uvijek slovi za jedan veoma moderan i neobičan teatar. Napravljen kao svojevrstan alternativni pandan tadašnjim mainstream scenama klasičnog tipa, Kamerni je bio nešto nesvakidašnje. 
Mala, intimna scena, sa svih strana okružena publikom. Tada se to zvalo "ring" scena. I glumci su se, ako je vjerovati mnogim ispovijestima, zaista tako i osjećali igrajući okruženi publikom sa svih strana. Sve se vidi, sve je tako blizu. U Kamernom se glumi i čelom i začeljem. Kamerni je bio, i ostao, arena u kojoj se glumački majstorluk najbolje vidi. Ili ne. Mjesto na kojem su se veliki glumački bardovi nalazili lišeni onog međuprostora četvrtog zida velike scene. Te nevidljive bezbjednosne barijere koja odvaja publiku od scene i njenih aktera. U Kamernom toga nema. Zato je tako poseban. Zato je tako izazovan. Kamerni teatar 55 glumca, ali i publiku, ogoljava do srži. U stanju je uhvatiti vas za samu suštinu bića i držati tako do samog kraja komada. Često i mnogo duže. Nastao je sa idejom da propituje, izaziva, gura do, i preko, ruba. Da bude drugačiji. Uzbudljiv i privlačan. Vruć. Da nikoga ne ostavlja ravnodušnim. Da pomjera granice. Uskoro slavi sedamdeseti rođendan. A nikad nije bio mlađi. Potentniji. Kamerniji. Napisati nešto zvanično o Kamernom je teško. O Kamernom se jedino može pisati strastveno. On se može samo iskusiti.
Location: Sarajevo, Federation of Bosnia and Herzegovina

Name: BAM Children's Entertainment
Description: BAM Children’s Entertainment is a touring company that comes right to you! Our goal is to take children on a theatrical journey that will help instill creative ways to build confidence, self-respect for themselves and others; while dealing with difficult life situations.

Name: Teatro dei Lupi
Description: Teatro dei Lupi: Teatro per chi ha fame di Teatro.

Name: RAFCO Talent Management
Description:
RAFCO Management isn't just a talent management company; it's a community of creatives lifting each other up to reach their highest potential. 

At RAFCO, we take pride in offering a personalized and individualized approach for every client. Our mission is to deeply understand the unique strengths and dreams of each creative, tailoring our services to support their specific needs and ambitions. We don't believe in fitting our clients into a "box." Instead, we help them shape their multifaceted identities and achieve their artistic visions. Through meaningful connections and career guidance, we empower individuals to find success in their entertainment careers.

RAFCO Management is dedicated to nurturing a community that celebrates diversity, promotes equity, and champions inclusion. We are committed to creating a culture where everyone feels valued, respected, and empowered to be their authentic selves.

Name: Театр "4"
Description:
Эмигрантский театр в Белграде.
Даём авторские спектакли про людей и для людей.
С любовью из Петербурга.

Name: Remote Theater Project
Description: Remote Theater Project (RTP) develops the work of artists whose voices are not often heard in the U.S. including international artists as well a U.S.- based artists from other countries.  We challenge artists to engage in difficult questions about their perceptions of other groups.  We believe that people can learn to understand other cultures through human scale stories that shed light on larger historical, socio-political dramas.  Our productions are human-to-human exchanges and culture-to-culture dialogues intended to promote empathy, especially between groups in political conflict. RTP also develops work with teens and young adults from immigrant backgrounds, with a focus on refugees and asylum-seekers. These provide a platform for young people to share their stories.

Name: Compagnie Sultan Bacchus
Description: Nous proposons des spectacles et ateliers de théâtre bilingue anglais/français aux entreprises, établissements scolaires et associations.

Name: Theater Oester
Description: Theater Oester maakt theatervoorstellingen vóór en dóór de LHBTI+ community. Theater Oester maakt theatervoorstellingen waarin het LHBTI+ publiek haar eigen verhalen terugziet, om meer zichtbaarheid te creëren en om de LHBTI+ kijker erkenning en herkenning te bieden.

Name: Athens Improv Studio
Description:
We are the Architects of Dream Teams! 

Forget awkward icebreakers and forced bonding exercises. Athens Improv Studio isn't your average team-building company. We're a team of passionate facilitators who leverage the science of synergy to transform your workforce into high-performing, collaborative units.

Our Secret Weapon? Tailored awesomeness.

We ditch the one-size-fits-all approach. Our facilitators, all experts in HR and organizational development, design tailor-made workshops that address your specific team's challenges. We're talking about communication roadblocks dissolving into smooth-flowing dialogues, trust issues fading faster than the weekend, and problem-solving skills that would impress even the most discerning minds.

More Than Workshops. Cultivating Collaboration.

We believe in fostering strong bonds within teams. It's not just about workshops; it's about creating a collaborative environment where individuals thrive. When you partner with Athens Improv Studio, you're joining a team of experts dedicated to your success.

Ready to build a dream team? 

We're just a call, email, or virtual high-five away. Contact us today and unlock the full potential of your workforce!

Name: Matthew North
Description: Theatre & Events Company Management, Production Management, Stage Management. Consultant for producing and production.

Name: Hoops of Iron
Description: Theatre in English
