Description: Theatre in English

Name: La Troupe à l'Ouest
Description:
La troupe de théâtre la plus à l'Ouest !
Troupe de théâtre amateur.
Association "La Troupe à l'Ouest"
Courriel : troupealouest@gmail.com

Name: The Doha Players
Description: The Doha Players are a volunteer not for profit theatre company creating, producing and staging high quality theatrical, musical, family and children's shows here in Doha.

Name: Next Generation Theatre
Description:
A non-profit youth theatre where professional theatre artists teach their craft and provide a safe and encouraging home in which students can grow.
There is a full year of programming of Classes and Shows for students in 1st to 12th grade

Name: DLSU Harlequin Theatre Guild
Description: DLSU Harlequin Theatre Guild is one of the longest-running university-based theater groups in the Philippines, staging Filipino-made, award-winning productions celebrated locally and internationally.

Name: Atlantic Repertory Company (ARC)
Description: Since its inaugural production in 2019, the Atlantic Repertory Company (ARC) has steadily grown. What began as a small pilot project with the goal of employing Atlantic Canadian theatre artists in Atlantic Canada has now developed into a fully realized professional company: ARC turns out a minimum of three productions every season while also providing ARC Academy professional development training to artists during the off-season.

Name: Twintigers aan Z
Description:
Twintigers aan Z is een theatervereniging in Enschede voor spelers tussen de twintig en dertig jaar met twee lesgroepen:

- Niveau I (voor beginnend spelers)
- Niveau II (voor ervaren spelers)

Ook meespelen of samenwerken? Kijk voor alle info op www.twintigersaanz.nl

Name: Fidget Theatre Company
Description: Fidget Theatre make playful and witty theatre with a warm welcome to children and families. Our collaborative processes ask thoughtful questions of the world in which we live with imagination and heart. Our audiences are invited to actively participate in our shows, and together we benefit from an entertaining and meaningful live, collective experience

Name: Mooville Theatre
Description: Founded in 2014, Mooville Theatre creates raw and dynamic theatre. We deliver social issues based workshops and performances that Impact, Influence, and Inspire!

Name: West End MT
Description:
Every Sunday an elite group of talented young performers come from all over the country to take part in five hours of intensive Musical Theatre training classes and workshops.

 Our specialist teachers and incredible guests offer the best part-time Musical Theatre training available anywhere in the UK.

Our dedicated creative team work weekly with students in order to develop a strong and consistent background of technique and performance training that is absolutely essential in the three core disciplines of Musical Theatre  – dance, singing and acting.

Name: Aura Of Puppets
Description: We are a network of professional puppet artists dedicated to advancing puppetry and visual theatre in Finland and beyond. We organise festivals, performances, and workshops – actively shaping a vibrant puppetry scene through both national and international collaboration.

Name: The Scratch Impro School
Description:
Book a workshop for your team: info@scratchtheater.com.

The Scratch Impro School is a theatre training organization based on the philosophy of Robert Rodger's Scratch Theater. By applying the physical, emotional and intellectual elements from theatre and improvisation to the challenges that organizations face today, teams are left refreshed and ready to tackle whatever comes next in a flexible and playful way.

Founded in San Francisco by Cirque du Soleil acrobat and clown, Robert Rodgers, the performing ensemble "Scratch Theater" has found renewed life in Berlin as a group of improvisers that ventures beyond comedy, strapping you to a rollercoaster of hopes, fears, laughter and tears, leaving you with new memories and waiting for more!

Name: South Jersey Theatre Critics
Description:
South Jersey has such a phenomenally large theatre scene, but not many reviewers out there! We would like to change all of that with a team of honest, theatre loving reviewers to get your work known.

South Jersey Theatre Critics accepts and supports theatre participants from any race, ethnicity, gender, sexual orientation and religious beliefs. Our goal is to publish honest and thoughtful reviews of every production regarding performances, direction, technical aspects.

Name: Not Finished With You Yet!
Description:
Kate and Rupert live in a world where divorce is compulsory at 13 years. As life expectancy has grown from 35 to 85, those extra 50 years make life long marriage unendurable. In this world, everyone must divorce after 13 years.

But Kate and Rupert are still in love.

In this buoyant, occasionally saucy musical, the protagonists fight the system to stay together. 

Twenty songs explore not only the nature of love in its middle stages but confront middle age issues such as the existential significance of kids (or otherwise), post- menopausal sex, masturbation and male midlife crisis.

Name: Etikettendames
Description:
Wij brengen voedseletiketten tot leven met verrassende voorlichting die consumenten helpt bewuste keuzes te maken. 

Ons doel? Consumenten écht laten begrijpen wat ze eten (en daarmee welvaartsziektes terugdringen). 

Samen met u zetten we een idee om naar een krachtig product: denk aan een explainerserie, een tiktok campagne, een workshop of een visueel aansprekende fotoserie – de mogelijkheden zijn eindeloos!

Wilt u met ons deze gezonde revolutie starten? Neem dan snel een kijkje op onze Instagrampagina en ontdek hoe we samen iets groots kunnen neerzetten!

Heel graag Toedeloep!
De Etikettendames

Name: LIT Immersive LLC
Description:
Where Seattle Comes to Play!

LIT Immersive is Seattle's premiere location for immersive theater, and the first space wholly dedicated to immersive theater and events. Located in the Stadium district, we are excited to bring immersive entertainment to Seattle premiering July, 2024!

Name: 3 Soles
Description:
3 Soles: Where Puerto Rico's artistry shines.

We are a company dedicated to building platforms where local artists can showcase their talents in music, acting, and dancing. We believe that Puerto Rico is a land of immense talent, and we are passionate about helping artists to achieve their dreams.

We are committed to creating a supportive and inclusive community for artists of all backgrounds and experience levels. We believe that everyone deserves the opportunity to share their talents with the world, and we are here to help them make it happen.

Name: iOpenEye Africa
Description:
Since 2015, our team has produced powerful stage plays, offered skills building workshops and facilitated open dialogue events aimed at breaking the culture of silence and building independence, safety and value for women. 
iOpenEye Africa Foundation is a Nigerian non-profit organisation that utilises the power of performance art to challenge the status quo, empower and improve the rights and status of women.

Name: Amherst Repertory Company
Description:
A student led pre professional theater company located in Amherst, MA.
https://linktr.ee/amherstrepco

Name: Vandalia Youth Theatre
Description:
At Vandalia Youth Theatre, we are not just a theatre; we are a vibrant community dedicated to nurturing confident, expressive young individuals who are well-equipped for success in their future endeavors. Our mission is to provide safe, nurturing, and exceptional theatre experiences that foster creativity and personal development in youth.

 Our Vision:
We envision a future where young adults emerge from our programs as confident, expressive individuals, ready to succeed in their diverse and exciting journeys. Quality youth theatre participation is the key to unlocking their full potential.

 Our Mission:
To achieve our vision, we are committed to providing safe, nurturing, and exceptional theatre experiences. We believe that every moment on our stage contributes to the creativity and personal development of the youth in the Miami Valley.

 Our Values:

Creativity: We encourage youth to find their voice, think outside the box, and foster their imagination. Our stage is a canvas for unlimited creative expression.

Excellence: We challenge our staff, volunteers, and youth to grow through teamwork, respect for others, and superior individual effort. Excellence is not just a goal; it's our standard.

Inclusivity: We build a safe and welcoming community where youth can find empathy, a sense of belonging, and gain confidence in who they are. Diversity is our strength.

Why VYT?

Passionate Team: Our dedicated team is driven by a shared passion for empowering youth through theater.

Inclusive Environment: VYT is a place where everyone is welcome, and diversity is celebrated.

Impactful Programs: From afterschool enrichment to major events, our programs leave a lasting impact on our participants.

Let's make memories, build connections, and bring the magic of theater to life at Vandalia Youth Theatre!

Name: Cabary
Description:
Vi är Karlstads nyårsrevy som spelas traditionsenligt sedan 1981!

Sedan dess har vi roat många olika människor i alla olika åldrar år efter år. Galna karaktärer, oväntade vändningar och påhitt kan man räkna med när Cabary är i farten.

Name: Toneelgroep Habitat X
Description: We maken voorstellingen waarbij we uit de eigen bubbel stappen om die van een ander te betreden. Bubbels die we niet begrijpen, waar we nieuwsgierig naar zijn of die we zelfs veroordelen. Dit levert actueel, scherp en eigenzinnig theater op dat diepgeworteld is in de maatschappij.

Name: Divadlo Koráb
Description: Divadlo Koráb je nezávislá scéna působící od roku 1996 v Brně, odkud vyjíždí hrát po celé České republice. Zaměřuje se hlavně na dětské publikum a rodiče. Stálá scéna se nachází v domě U Tří knížat na ulici Jánská v Brně, kde najdete i Galerii v Divadle Koráb, pořádající pravidelné vernisáže a výstavy. V poslední době Divadlo Koráb plánuje i večerní představení pro dospělé diváky.

Name: Divadlo v Dlouhé
Description:
Divadlo v Dlouhé je činoherní souborové divadlo založené v roce 1996. Orientuje se na odvážnou dramaturgii a mezigenerační dialog. Tvoří inscenace jak pro dospělé, tak i pro děti. V základu své identity nese experimentující principy studiových divadel vyznačující se žánrovou a stylovou pestrostí a permanentním hledáním živé podoby současného divadelního jazyka.
Od sezóny 2025/26 ho jako umělecký šéf vede Ivan Buraj, který spolu s dramaturgyněmi Terezou Marečkovou a Ninou Jacques vystřídal režisérku Hanu Burešovou, poslední ze zakladatelského tria Borna-Burešová-Otčenášek.

Name: Women of Candor Storytelling
Description: Women of Candor is a live storytelling experience featuring African-American women from various walks of life. Candor is simply the quality of being open and honest in expression, and these women share their truths with boldness and vulnerability. Women of Candor audience members are guaranteed to feel all the feelings! We promise that our storytellers will take you on an unforgettable heartfelt journey.

Name: Orpheus Productions, Christ (Deemed to be University) BGR
Curtain Call
Description: Curtain Call is a vibrant and dynamic theater club dedicated to nurturing creativity and artistic expression. We provide a platform for passionate individuals to explore the world of performing arts, from acting and directing to screenplay writing and production. With a focus on collaboration, innovation, and skill-building, we aim to bring compelling stories to life and create a welcoming space for aspiring artists to grow and shine. Join us as we take center stage and redefine the art of storytelling.

Name: Cie La Carotte
Description: Compagnie de théâtre basée à Orchamps (39). École de théâtre, spectacles tout Terrain, théâtre de Territoire. Nous associons la création artistique à la vie.

Name: Teatro ICTUS
Description:
70 años sobre las tablas #ICTUS70años
La compañía de teatro independiente más longeva de Latinoamérica

Name: Hav' Det Sjovt Festival
Description:
Danmarks nye festival som er designet med internationale gadeteaterforestillinger med HAV-koncept og målretter at fylde Danmarks hav- og havneområder med liv i sommerferieperioden. 
Festivalens første udgave blev afviklet i juli 2022.

Følg med her:
Instagram: @hav.det.sjovt.dk
Facebook: @Havdetsjovt.dk

Name: Badische Landesbühne
Description: Badische Landesbühne was founded in 1949 presents theatrical productions in  Bruchsal as well as in it's 15 member municipalities. The repertoire includes plays, young theatre and participatory productions.

Name: Childsplay Theatre
Description: Childsplay is a professional theatre company dedicated to inspiring young people through the transformative power of the arts. Founded in 1977, we have spent nearly five decades creating exceptional theatre experiences. Our mission is to ignite imagination, wonder, and joy by creating original theatre and educational experiences that encourage young people to explore, dream, and soar.

Name: Musical Improwizowany
Description:
Nazywamy się „Musical Improwizowany” i jesteśmy grupą improwizatorów. Improwizacji teatralnej uczyliśmy się od najlepszych aktorów komediowych i performerów z całego świata takich, jak: Jason Shotts, Collen Doyle, Tara DeFrancisco, Mick Napier, Susan Messing czy Patti Stiles, w miejscach takich jak: legendarne iO Chicago, Annoyance Chicago i Annoyance New York. Na co dzień poza improwizacją zajmujemy się szeroko pojętą komedią - stand-upem, skeczami, a także aktorstwem, lektorstwem, scenopisarstwem i wieloma innymi. Na pianinie akompaniują nam Joanna Kucharczyk i Agata Pankowska.

Gramy spektakle całkowicie improwizowane na oczach widzów. Jak to w improwizacji teatralnej, wszystkie sceny i fabuła, a także teksty i melodie piosenek oraz choreografia są improwizowane na oczach widzów. Należy podkreślić, że muzyka jest również improwizowana na żywo. 
Od początku istnienia zapełniamy naszą rodzimą scenę w Klubie Komediowym, ale z powodzeniem udaje nam się również bawić i wzruszać publiczności w innych miejscach w Polsce - Klub SPATiF, Teatr im. S. Jaracza w Otwocku i nawet za granicą - Magnet Theater podczas New York Musical Improv Festival.

Name: Space for the Oppressed අපේ රඟමඩල
Description:
In a world filled with diverse voices, Space for the Oppressed emerges as a beacon of creative empowerment and healing for the marginalized and underprivileged. Our organization is a unique combination of applied theatre, theater of oppression, art, drama, music and dance therapy. We have developed a holistic approach that harnesses the transformative power of art to address social injustices and uplift individuals and communities.

Our flagship branch, our Rangamdala Art Village, is committed to holding workshops in every nook and cranny of society, from remote villages to urban schools. Through carefully planned workshops, we connect children, youth and adults to explore their inner strengths, unleash their creativity and pave the way for self-expression. It also enables them to achieve their goals and intervenes in social problems to propose creative solutions to them. In the space for the oppressed, cultural elements are nurtured and work to fuse and preserve the worlds of cultural exhibition and modern art.

We work to explore and share creations with people, from traditional performances to contemporary expressions. And we foster cultural exchange by uniting different villages and communities. At the end of the village workshop there will be a cultural festival where a collection of all the artworks will be presented.

Also, while providing opportunities to the rural people to watch movies, they are also conducting workshops through the online system. Through this cultural amalgamation, a space is created where different ethnic groups can come together. Also, our Rangamdala Art Village prepares art festivals by collecting international art culture, and design.

Space for the Oppressed is a space that seeks to empower the oppressed to amplify their stories and develop resilience through the transformative power of art. Together we can create a more just and harmonious world where every voice finds its place in the singing of humanity.

Name: Dystopia
Description: Dystopia is een jong collectief bestaande uit theatermakers Fleur Mennega en Mathijs Demper en productieleider Myrthe Ligtenberg. Fleur is afgestudeerd Docent Theater, Mathijs studeerde Writing for Performance en Myrthe studeerde af aan Kunst en Economie (allen HKU). Ze maken voorstellingen die een mix vormen tussen 'soft' sciencefiction-theater en interactief zapcabaret. Ze streven naar razendsnelle dialogen, duistere humor en herkenbare pijnpunten. Zoals hun naam doet vermoeden, maken ze dystopisch theater. Voor hen houdt 'dystopie' in dat we in een maatschappij leven waarin we elkaar constant bangmaken voor de toekomst. We zijn het er bijna allemaal over eens dat het de verkeerde kant op gaat met de wereld - of dit nu te maken heeft met klimaat, technologie, oorlog of ongelijkheid.

Name: The Underground Theater
Description: We develop new works that release shame and nurture community.

Name: The Underground
Description: We develop new works of theatre that release shame and nurture community.

Name: KASPER PRODUCTIONS
Description: Kasper Productions focuses on women-identifying and other underrepresented communities in theatre and the arts. #producer #theatre #theater #womenempower #writer #director #Broadway #OffBroadway #OffOffBroadway #Producersnetwork #film #television

Name: Blue Book Theatre Company S.L.
Description:
Winner of the "Theatre Company of the Year" by Spanish Business Awards 2026.

We love collaborating with talented professionals and seeing them shine, while creating opportunities for people to do what they all do best- to be on stage, to work within a group, sharing and collaborating with talented human beings around the world through art.

We work with actors, designers, directors, writers and producers of all ages from all over the world, combing our super talents to bring artwork and living stories to life- to share in a city that we love.

Name: Musicals.ro
Description:
Musicals.ro is made up of a team of professionals who over the last 19 years have started and been involved in the production and presentation of shows with a high artistic standard on the musical market in Romania, such as the The Phantom of the Opera, Romeo and Juliet, Rebecca or the nationally successful productions My Fair Lady and Mamma Mia.
As trendsetters in the world of musical performance arts, our objective is to create innovative productions with commercial impact, where the quality of the artistic product reaches the highest levels.

Name: DR Theatrical Management
Description: DR THEATRICAL MANAGEMENT was founded by Tony Award and Pulitzer Prize winning Producer Daryl Roth together with General Manager Adam Hess. The company, led by Grant A. Rice, Kyle Provost, and Emily Currie, provides general management services to commercial productions in New York and their interests on the road. DRTM also specializes in not for profit collaborations, as well as offering venue management services.

Name: Companhia de Teatro Lusco-Fusco
Description:
Com dezessete anos de existência e de arte-resistência, a CIA. DE TEATRO LUSCO-FUSCO é uma organização cultural independente cujo trabalho consiste em uma intensiva pesquisa de duas linguagens principais: o teatro e a música. Dessa forma, consolidou-se em sua trajetória como uma produtora e fomentadora do teatro musical independente em São Paulo. O principal objetivo da Cia. é fomentar a arte através da divulgação de montagens teatrais, espetáculos musicais e apresentações performáticas.



Seu espetáculo mais recente é “Cantos de Coxia e Ribalta” (2018-2019), indicado ao Prêmio Destaque Imprensa Digital 2018 e vencedor em três categorias no Prêmio MP (Musical Popular) de Teatro Musical Independente em 2019.

Name: Met Haar Zonder Hem
Description:
Wij kunnen uw evenement of feest op geheel eigen wijze voorzien van een voorstelling op maat over uw thema, of een workshop in improviseren en presenteren. 

Wat kun je verwachten?
Het bijzondere aan een voorstelling op maat is dat het interactief is. Wij gaan kort in gesprek met het publiek, bespreken het thema, ideeën en meningen, en vertalen dit naar een mooi lied, een hilarische scène of een nieuw inzicht. De voorstelling wordt als het ware samen met de zaal gemaakt, de interviews, herkenning en humor werken enorm verbindend. Wij spelen met 2 tot 4 actrices plus een muzikant. 

We geven ook workshops, aan groepen van 5 tot 200 personen.  Ook in het Engels

Name: Briery Gap Cultural Centre
Description:
The Briery Gap Cultural Centre CLG was established by Cork County Council in 1998 to provide a significant cultural facility to the Macroom Community and wider hinterland. Situated in the centre of Macroom, following a 7-year closure and a complete rebuild, it is due to reopen in the second quarter
of 2024. It includes a 217 seat Theatre and Cinema facility incorporated with the town’s public library.
As a shared facility it is the agreed aim of the Board and Council that the managements of both the Cultural Centre and Library will work closely together to optimise cooperation, use of facilities, and opportunities for creative community engagement.

Name: Théâtre Le Valet de Cœur
Description: Le théâtre du Valet de Coeur est une compagnie amateur basée sur Clermont-Ferrand depuis 45 ans. Vous retrouverez chez nous Molière, Ionesco, Eschyle, Poudérou, Alègre, et tant d'autre !

Name: The Movement Theatre Company
Description:
The Movement Theatre Company creates an artistic social movement by developing and producing new work by artists of color. Our work engages audiences in a rich theatrical dialogue, enlightens communities to the important issues affecting our world, and empowers artists to celebrate the many sides of their unique voice. We create brave spaces for artists of color to discover and unleash their most authentic selves and tell complex stories of both the everyday and the extraordinary. Through our work we refuel, affirm, and celebrate the triumph of our resilience as artists.

Under the leadership of Deadria Harrington, Eric Lockley, Ryan Dobrin, and David Mendizábal, who serve as the Producing Artistic Leadership Team, The Movement has four core process-driven programs: Harlem Nights, GO GREEN, the Ladder Series, and Mainstage Productions. Our programming cultivates a vision that embraces dialogue and inclusion as a means of community building. Founded on the culture of family and service to community, we have grown from a small collective of actors and writers to an expanded network of diverse artists from varied creative practices. Led by the principles of collaboration, collective leadership, and the active listening, we have built a home for artists to experiment, develop, and unpack their ideas and established ourselves as a growing artistic staple in Harlem.

Name: The Children's Theater Company
Description: The Children’s Theater Company of New York (CTC) (top 12 children’s theater companies across the U.S.)  is a non-profit organization founded in the year 2000. The CTC is a national organization that has launched multiple Chapters in several cities across the country. ‘Kid with a Cause’, the Company’s signature program, produces a multi-disciplinary program (Four disciplines: acting, dancing, singing, and character education) that culminates into a full musical showcase and choral program for a full performance run at a professional theater venue. The program serves in & after-school residencies, serving kids ages 5 to 18 in 4 separate age groups with age-appropriate content. With a social-justice imperative at its core, CTC’s award-winning musical catalog is rooted in the belief that through the magic of theater youth can explore their power toimpact diversity, develop empathy, and become agents of healing and the voices of positive change in their communities.

Name: Théâtre Benno Besson
Description: Le TBB est un théâtre généraliste et multidisciplinaire et à la fois un théâtre proposant des spectacles pointus et variés.

Name: National Puppet Theatre
Description:
Yerevan State Puppet Theater named after Hovhannes Tumanyan was established in 1935 on June 1st and has been operating alongside the Theater for Young Spectators. The theater was founded by stage director Sofya Bejanyan, artist Gevorg Arakelyan, and actors Pavlos Boroyan and Araksya Arabyan. In 1975, the theater relocated to its current building situated at 4 Sayat-Nova Street.

 

Since 1998, the esteemed Armenian artist and professor Ruben Babayan has served as the director of the theater. He is the director of several performances for children and adults. Next to the theater, there is the Museum of Theater Puppets, which is dedicated to the founder P. Boroyan. This museum holds the distinction of being the only one of its kind in Armenia. The theater holds membership in UNIMA.

Since 2022 the director of the theater is Artashes Babayan.

 

The theater has been active by showing many performances of different genres, puppets, shadows, music, site-specific performances, etc. There are 50 performances in the theatre's repertoire, with about 100,000 spectators a year, which is growing. The theater has more than 500 performances a year and organizes many cultural events, such as exhibitions, music concerts, festivals, tours, etc.

 

The mission of the theater is to serve as a cultural guide for children and the younger generation, offering them their first and foundational steps in cultural education.

Name: Tanssiteatteri Hurjaruuth – Dance Theatre Hurjaruuth
Description: Dance Theatre Hurjaruuth specialises in producing dance and contemporary circus performances for children and families. We are a medium-sized government-supported theatre located at the Cable Factory in Helsinki, Finland. Our goal is to be a trailblazer at the forefront of performing arts while operating actively in Helsinki as well as nationally and internationally.

Name: Muziektheater VAKK
Description:
De vereniging Muziektheater VAKK uit Dedemsvaart viert in mei 2025 haar 80-jarig bestaan. 
Ons doel is het in stand houden en het omhoog brengen van het culturele niveau in de gemeente Hardenberg en omstreken. Daarbij willen wij:
-Kwaliteit handhaven: we willen hoogwaardige producties leveren. 
-Talent ondersteunen: leden/deelnemers, van jong tot ouder, kunnen hun passie volgen en daarin groeien. 
-Sociaal maatschappelijke meerwaarde te creëren: met Dedemsvaart als thuisbasis willen wij een vereniging zijn die bijdraagt aan saamhorigheid en creatieve leefbaarheid.

Anno 2024 zijn er ruim 100 leden en is het een plek waar passie voor theater en muziek tot leven komt. Jaarlijks staan de volwassenen in het najaar op het podium in de Voorveghter te Hardenberg. Zij hebben bijvoorbeeld Oliver, Shrek, Aida, Zorro, All shook up!, en 9 to 5! voor uitverkochte zalen gespeeld. 
De jongeren (VAKK junior) zijn in het voorjaar te vinden in De Baron te Dedemsvaart.

Name: ITG
Description: With over 35 years of award-winning service, ITG is a team of experienced professionals who integrate state-of-the-art audio, video, lighting, communications, and control equipment into both new and existing construction.

Name: Skyboat Productions Ltd
Description:
A brand new musical theatre company from Milton Keynes, formed from an alliance between local musician and writer/composer Christopher Edwards and producer Stephen Bowcott.

Their debut musical A World Divided premieres at Milton Keynes Theatre on 17 April 2023 with a fabulous cast made up of fresh local talent. The show has been described as ‘an epic edge-of your-seat journey with songs that will touch your soul…’

Book your tickets now to be part of this unforgettable journey: ATGTICKETS.COM/MiltonKeynes

Name: Collectif Ponce Pilate
Description:
Collectif de théâtre fondé en 2024 à Lyon.
Pièce en cours de création... RDV du 17 au 21 juin 2025 au Théâtre de la Petite Rue à Charpennes, Villeurbanne !

Name: art for human sake
Description:
‘art for human sake’ is a collaborative theater and art performance where 100 % of the ticket proceeds goes towards foods distribution efforts in the USA. Our previous shows have fed over 700 New Yorkers free fresh food through Sixth Street Community Center's Emergency Food Distribution. 

The show is a combination of young art activists including playwrights, directors, actors, and musicians passionate about food for body and soul.

Name: Radnóti Miklós Színház
Description: Radnóti: markáns rendezői vízió és erős színészi alakítások színháza.

Name: Teatr w ogrodzie
Description: Tworzymy teatr z pasją.

Name: Opera for the Young, Inc
Opera Frontier
Description:
The award-winning Opera Frontier is a Bay Area performing arts company founded in 2007 by Artistic Director Gail Simpson. Opera Frontier makes opera accessible to opera fans and opera-phobes alike by using unexpected elements of culture, dance, and context to reimagine opera for contemporary audiences. In addition to stage productions, Opera Frontier performs in nontraditional settings, surprises audiences as pop-up artists and creates films for YouTube.  
Opera Frontier is passionate about covering contemporary social justice issues and also about collaborations that create exciting new works by combining opera with other musical and artistic traditions domestically and from around the world.  

These works have included collaborations with Circus Abyssinia, as well as with classical Indian, Middle Eastern and Ethiopian musicians. By utilizing instruments not seen in the western classical music canon such as the qanun, tabla, sarode and masenqo, Opera Frontier expands upon traditional operatic pieces to develop something new.

Name: Yavanika (Dramatics Society of IIT Patna)
Description:
Yavanika is the official dramatics society of IIT Patna, committed to promoting the art of theatre through stage plays, street plays (nukkad nataks), mime, and monoacts. As a vibrant community of passionate performers and storytellers, Yavanika strives to spark conversations, challenge perspectives, and leave lasting impressions through the power of drama.

From campus productions to prestigious intercollegiate festivals, the society has consistently showcased its creative excellence and social relevance. Yavanika is more than just a society, it’s a platform for expression, collaboration, and transformation where technical minds meet artistic souls.

Name: Theater Stap
Description:
Theater Stap is een professioneel theatergezelschap dat voorstellingen maakt waarin mensen met een mentale beperking centraal staan.  
Op hun werkplek in Turnhout kunnen acteurs met een handicap en valide vakmensen ( theater, dans, film ) mekaar ontmoeten en worden de acteurs ondersteund in het uitbouwen van hun loopbaan. 
Al ruim 30 jaar speelt Theater Stap zijn voorstellingen in het reguliere theatercircuit in Vlaanderen en in het buitenland.

Name: World Theatre Training Institute AKT-ZENT
Description:
The World Theatre Training Institute AKT-ZENT (WTTI) is the appointed research centre of the International Theatre Institute, the World Organisation for the Perfoming Arts. Artistic Direction Dr. Jurij Alschitz. The Institute's work focuses on the innovation of theory and practice of theatre training. The scientific focus lies in the development of the artist’s “self-education” and “self-creation” based on the concept of the “homo creativus” and on the understanding of a “holistic theatre”.
The institute offers seminars, laboratories and masterclasses at various locations and in worldwide co-operation. The Online Theatre Academy is the WTTI's online training platform for the areas of ACTING, DIRECTING and TEACHING and offers a wide variety of topics as well as the opportunity for comprehensive professional studies.

Name: Montévidéo Marseille
Description:
Situé au centre-ville de Marseille, Montévidéo propose chaque mercredi soir une programmation qui fait la part belle aux artistes issus de la scène contemporaine. Performances, lectures, spectacles, concerts, expositions, projections, conférences forgent une proposition pluridisciplinaire destinée au plus grand nombre et en grande partie en accès libre.

Montévidéo accueille en résidence auteurs, artistes, compagnies de la scène contemporaine et festivals du territoire mettant au cœur de son projet la recherche artistique.

Aux deux espaces scéniques s’ajoutent un lieu de restauration, un bar, une terrasse et, à l’occasion des rendez-vous littéraires, une librairie éphémère.

Fondé par l'auteur, metteur en scène et scénographe Hubert Colas, Montévidéo est aussi le lieu de Diphtong Cie et le QG d'actoral, festival international des arts et des écritures contemporaines et bureau d'accompagnement.

Name: Arnaud Dubois
Description: Arnaud Dubois vous présente le spectacle à succès "Burn-out voor Beginners" d'Arnout Van den Bossche en français: "Burn-out pour les Débutants". Costume violet inclus!

Name: Crypto Comedy Collective
Description:
Humor is coming to web3 !
Come laugh in the company of comedians on the first stand-up comedy show dedicated to crypto and NFT !

Name: ARTS ET SCENE
Description: ARTS ET SCÈNE création de spectacles vivants

Name: KokoTeatteri
Description:
KokoTeatteri makes visible stories that might otherwise be ignored. KokoTeatteri praises also multiculturalism and operates on the principles of diversity and democracy. KokoTeatteri commits to values such as equality, freedom of speech, democracy, sustainable development, value of art, civilization, and humanity.
KokoTeatteri is an independent, professional theatre, founded in 1997. KokoTeatteri´s program is all about new drama from Finland and overseas. KokoTeatteri presents 4–6 productions per year and takes part in many visiting performances.

Koko Jazz Club also operates in the same premises as the theater. Koko Jazz Club's high-quality artistic orientation is modern mainstream.

Name: Droomis Theater Community
Description: Ben jij theatermaker of liefhebber in Eindhoven en op zoek naar verbinding? De Droomis Theater Community is dé plek waar makers en theaterliefhebbers samenkomen om inspiratie, samenwerking en spelplezier te delen.

Name: Born In A Taxi
Description:
BORN IN A TAXI (Taxi) is a multi award winning theatre company from Australia who enjoys mixing dance with humour, the profound with the profane and the familiar with the unlikely. Established in 1989, Taxi is one of Melbourne’s most highly regarded physical theatre ensembles and creators of contemporary performance. 

They are recognised for producing highly original, physically driven and participatory works in site specific and outdoor contexts that focus on real time co-creation. 

In the last ten years the company have been commissioned to create four new theatre works for young people by Arts Centre Melbourne. Immediacy, responsiveness and play are at
the centre of everything they do.
Taxi has maintained an ongoing inquiry into improvisation and the body’s intelligence
in performance making for over 3 decades, placing impulse, the unconscious and associate mind centre stage in the making of live performance. They value and prioritise making connections to audiences of all ages and all abilities through performances, workshops and community development.

Taxi’s creative directors are Carolyn Hanna and Penny Baron.
Taxi’s work has been seen at World Theatre Festival Powerhouse Brisbane, Perth International Festival, Melbourne International Festival, Melbourne Commonwealth Games Cultural Festival, White Night Melbourne, Enlighten Festival Canberra, Manchester Commonwealth Games, Gwacheon Hanmadang & Goyang Lake Park (Korea), Sziget (Hungary), Oerol Festival and Theatrefestival Boulevard (Netherlands), ISTF Ghent & Chasspierre (Belgium) plus many more.

Awards include: Powerhouse Performance Award, Melbourne Fringe Festival 2010 Best Production, Best Independent Theatre, and Best Female Actor Award Arts
Centre Melbourne Short & Sweet Festival 2008, Best Production Award Melbourne Fringe Festival 2005 and De Grote Prix Jury Award International Street Theatre Festival Ghent Belgium 2003

Name: Theater Rigiblick
Description: Zürichs einziges Theater mit eigenem Standseilbahn-Anschluss

Name: Dramatic Theatre CIC
Description:
Since 2009 Dramatic Theatre have been designing and delivering engaging, educational theatre projects. Our approach offers young people the opportunity to learn about themselves and their world in a creative way.

Our work uses professional performance and Interactive workshops to support young people to explore key issues, so that they can begin to make empowered and informed choices in the future. Whether it's exploring a challenge, tackling a key issue, or expressing feelings, our projects are always designed to connect with the needs of our participants and partners.

Our work has taken us- across the Yorkshire and Humber region and connected us with children and young people of all needs, abilities and backgrounds. In both schools and wider community settings. Together we use theatre to create new ways of exploring ideas, that support young people to discover, develop and grow.

Dramatic Theatre constituted as a community interest company in 2020.

Name: Impro Sexes et Genre
Description:
Compagnie d’improvisation théâtrale se questionnant sur la diversité de genre et d’orientations sexuelles.

Créatrice du spectacle « Trouble » qui interroge les clichés et les stéréotypes pour une représentation théâtrale et sociétale plus inclusive.

Impro Sexes et genre intervient en entreprises, en milieu scolaire, en centres de formation et au sein de collectivités locales pour des événements de sensibilisation.

Le sexisme, la représentation des minorités LGBTQIA+, les discriminations, les injonctions du quotidien font partie des thématiques traitées par le collectif. 

Les spectacles interactifs et sur mesure peuvent déboucher sur un débat concernant les sujets abordés.


https://www.instagram.com/impro_sexes_genre/

https://www.facebook.com/impro.ISG

https://www.billetreduc.com/323067/evt.htm?nr=1

Name: De Rode Loper - Educatietheater
Description:
Ons educatietheater is in het voorjaar van 2025 te vinden in De Gelderlandfabriek Culemborg en in Het Pakhuis Hoorn voor losse kaartverkoop.

Wij zijn ook te boeken voor een In-company voorstelling speciaal voor jouw organisatie op maat gemaakt.

Name: Evogía
Description:
Compañía de teatro profesional.
Un lugar de encuentro entre la obra y el público.
Clásicos + contemporáneo |
Colaboración + creación | 
Diversión + reflexión |

Name: Hakkehuset
Description:
Produktioner, forestillinger, workshops, undervisning, co-produktioner, Artist-in-Recidence af og med kunstnere fra ind- og udland.

Hakkehuset er et tværæstetisk laboratorium for eksperimenterende scenekunst. Mange af vores produktioner er stedsspecifikke, hvilket betyder at publikum inviteres med ud til steder som iscenesættes i samklang med natur, byrum og arkitektur, og med skulpturelle kunstværker. 

Hakkehuset fungerer som en produktionsbaseret kulturforening, hvilket betyder at hver forestilling og hvert kulturelt forløb er skræddersyet til det specifikke event. Vi samarbejder med lokale og internationale kunstnere og i perioder fungerer Hakkehuset som Artist-in-recidence.

Hakkehuset eksisterer som et fysisk hus, og var oprindeligt del af et dambrug. Det blev brugt til at hakke foder til ørred og lakseopdræt, deraf navnet Hakkehuset. Maskinerne i Hakkehuset blev drevet af vandturbiner, der fik vandkraft fra omkringliggende bakkevælds kilder.

Hakkehuset bliver brugt til prøvelokale for foreningens mindre scenekunst produktioner, hvorimod prøver med de større udendørs og stedsspecifikke produktioner foregår dér hvor de skal fremføres, i naturen eller i byrummet.

Name: Cracked Actors | CAT | CASA
Description:
Cracked Actors will create employment opportunities in live theatre for generations. We are an Australian independent company, founded in 2007, bound to providing quality and affordable entertainment for everybody. 

Cracked Actors produces, facilitates and develops new Australian theatre. We design flexible school programs that foster industry teamwork between professional theatre and schools with curricular and extra-curricular programs. Our company has rehearsal and performance spaces available and provides publicity services, specialising in theatre, to other companies. We design sets, costumes, sound and lighting plans to suit all budgets. 

Cracked Actors are committed to supporting the development of Australian artists, writers and theatre practitioners through entry level positions in our industry as well as through inclusive education programs which are accessible to all. 

Our initiatives provide a platform for upcoming performers as well as employment for existing artists in an environment that is welcoming to every sphere of the community. We strive to achieve artistic excellence and originality in all of our projects. We are devoted to the celebration of theatrical tradition as well as the continued development and modernisation of the artform. 

Cracked Actors are dedicated to captivating their audience and inspiring others to celebrate theatre as part of their lives.

Name: Sønderborg Sommer Revy Show
Description:
Sønderborg Sommer Revy Show 2024 – Latter, Musik og Underholdning i Topklasse!

Er du klar til en sommer fyldt med grin, skarp satire og imponerende musikalske indslag? Så kom og vær med, når vi igen byder velkommen til Sønderborg Sommer Revy Show – et af landets mest populære revyshows, der hvert år samler publikum til en uforglemmelig oplevelse i hjertet af Sønderborg!

Revyen byder, som altid, på en fantastisk blanding af sjove sketches, aktuelle emner og musikalske perler fremført af et hold af talentfulde skuespillere og musikere. Uanset om du er til klassisk revy eller moderne humor, er der noget for enhver smag.

 Hvor? Sønderborg Teater
 Hvornår? 23. maj - 5. juli 2025
 Billetter? https://sommerrevy.dk

Tag dine venner, kolleger eller familie med og nyd en aften fyldt med latter og glæde. Vi lover et show, der vil få dine lattermuskler på overarbejde!

Følg os her for opdateringer og sneak peeks på, hvad der venter jer i år!

#SønderborgRevy #SommerRevy2025 #OplevelserISønderborg #GrinMedOs

Name: Compagnie du Bistanclac
Description:
La Compagnie du Bistanclac est une machine à fabriquer des 
émotions, des rêves, des histoires … 
Le Bistanclac est une famille d’artisans déjantés qui croient au pouvoir du rire pour rassembler, partager et transmettre. Ils défendent 
un théâtre inattendu et généreux, à travers des personnages et des 
histoires extraordinaires, qui offre différents niveaux de lecture.

Name: La Mue des Crocodiles
Description:
𝗟𝗮 𝗠𝘂𝗲 𝗱𝗲𝘀 𝗖𝗿𝗼𝗰𝗼𝗱𝗶𝗹𝗲𝘀 est un collectif d’artistes du Tarn et de Haute-Garonne rassemblé·es autour de la conviction que le théâtre peut et doit être un outil pour changer le monde. Notre équipe a été formée au Théâtre de l’Opprimé à Paris et nous nous inscrivons pleinement dans le mouvement créé par le brésilien Augusto Boal, fondateur du 𝘁𝗵𝗲́𝗮̂𝘁𝗿𝗲 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝘂𝗺 !

𝗡𝗼𝘂𝘀 𝘁𝗿𝗮𝘃𝗮𝗶𝗹𝗹𝗼𝗻𝘀 𝘀𝘂𝗿 𝘁𝗼𝘂𝘁𝗲𝘀 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗺𝗲𝘀 𝗱’𝗼𝗽𝗽𝗿𝗲𝘀𝘀𝗶𝗼𝗻.
Militant·e·s et professionnel·e·s, nous avons l’expertise et les compétences pour travailler sur des thématiques sensibles telles que les violences sexistes et sexuelles, le harcèlement en milieu scolaire, les stéréotypes de genre ou toute autre forme de discrimination (racisme, validisme, homophobie, grossophobie, transphobie, cyber-harcèlement, etc).
#theatreforum #Occitanie #prevention #discrimination #vhss

Name: Baltazár Színház / Baltazar Theatre
Description: Az 1998-ban alakult Baltazár Színház az egyetlen olyan színtársulat hazánkban, melynek tagjai értelmi sérült színészek. A Baltazár egyszerre lát el művészi és társadalmi feladatot, hiszen lehetőséget teremt sérült emberek számára, hogy tehetségüket megmutassák, a nézők számára pedig, hogy szembesüljenek e tehetséggel.

Name: Musical Producties Gaanderen
Description: In 1980 werd in Gaanderen een nieuw kinderkoor opgericht, de G-Sleuteltjes. Inmiddels is dit uitgegroeid tot Musical Producties Gaanderen, een vereniging bestaande uit 3 groepen en zo’n 125 leden uit de regio en ver daarbuiten. Leden zijn zelfs woonachtig in Winterswijk, Wijchen en Amersfoort. MPG voert ongeveer jaarlijks 2 producties uit in het Amphion Theater in Doetinchem, met in totaal zo'n 4000 bezoekers. Daarnaast vinden er jaarlijks grote en kleine optredens en concerten plaats in de hele regio. Alles, inclusief orkest, kleding en decor, is in eigen beheer en de vereniging draait vrijwel volledig op vrijwilligers.

Name: Umelecký súbor Lúčnica
Description: LÚČNICA, slovenský umelecký súbor, nositeľ najvyšších domácich i medzinárodných ocenení, symbolizuje originálnu kultúru národa, takého jedinečného vo svojich tanečných, inštrumentálnych a vokálnych prejavoch. Slovenské ľudové umenie našlo v Lúčnici svojho úprimného reprezentatívneho predstaviteľa, ktorý plným priehrštím rozdáva unikátne a neopakovateľné plody bohatej tradície nadšenému publiku doma i v zahraničí. Je umeleckým a generačným spojivom medzi tradíciami minulosti a búrlivou, ale zároveň jedinečnou nádhernou prítomnosťou.

Name: Tout le silence à vivre
Description: Cette association a pour but de créer, de promouvoir, de diffuser, de développer des projets de  création, d’animation et de formation autour de l’univers théâtral et du spectacle vivant dans une  dynamique culturelle et sociale intégrant la dimension interdisciplinaire (vidéo, danse…).

Name: Hewar for Independent Theater and Performing Arts
Description:
Hewar Company for Independent Theater and Performing Arts

Hewar is an independent non-profit theater and performing arts company based in Alexandria Egypt.

‘Hewar’ is the transliteration of the Arabic word for dialogue "حوار"; dialogue is the main value around which our artistic practice revolves. Through our work, both locally and internationally, we are always working towards opening and facilitating Dialogue. 

Hewar Theater group has been working since 2005. In 2012, after the Arab Spring and the momentum of the political and social movement in the region, a need arose to establish the company and expand our projects beyond producing theater pieces to Theater Is A Must Independent International Theater forum, and international collaboration projects.  This transformation was also provoked by our emerging desire to be able to change cultural policies and have a say in the operation of our cultural context.

Name: Vestzak
Description: In Vestzak staan maken, uitproberen en ontwikkelen centraal. Muzikanten, opleidingen en culturele partners uit Enschede en omstreken werken hier samen aan een agenda vol diverse activiteiten. Ook een aantal bestaande initiatieven zullen worden doorgezet. In Vestzak vind je onder andere residenties, optredens, masterclasses, try-outs, open mics, luistersessies en onverwachte samenwerkingen.

Name: Grand Ambition
Description: We Tell Swansea Stories

Name: Divertidamente Teatro Empresarial
Description: Empresa especializada em teatro empresarial

Name: Here Comes Everybody Players
Description: A Boston based Irish theatre company, celebrating Irish culture through performance, drama and music.

Name: Compagnie Synapse
Description:
Notre compagnie vous propose des séances d'Improvisation appliquées : Team Building, Prise de parole en public, spectacle en entreprise.

Le théâtre d'improvisation appliqué permet de développer de nombreux soft skills tels que l'écoute active, la co-construction, l'engagement , la coordination, la confiance en soi et en l'autre, la prise de parole, la cohésion d'une équipe dans un cadre ludique et bienveillant.

Osez des teambuildings et formations innovantes, contactez-nous!

Name: Lumor Teater
Description:
Lumor är ett scenkonstkompani som varit verksamt i Stockholm sedan 2004. Lumor kom till ur en längtan efter sprickor; mellan olika konstformer, innehåll och form, mellan vardag och dramatik. Vi ville bort från teaterns (över)tydlighet, mer inspirerade av poesi och dokumentär skev verklighet.

Lumor har ingen fast scen, utan samarbetar alltid med andra teatrar, i och utanför Stockholm. Bland våra samarbetsparter finns Orionteatern, Dramaten, TeaterTribunalen, Malmö Dockteater, Folkteatern Gävleborg, Unga Klara, moment:teater, Riksteatern, Turteatern, Folkteatern Göteborg och Kulturhuset/Stadsteatern. Lumor riktar sig även till en internationell publik. Vår fasta punkt är vårt kontor som ligger i Konstfacks lokaler på Telefonplan. Vi har även ett förråd där vi förvarar scenografier och teknik.

Name: Munkey Industries LLC
Description: Munkey Industries is a full service theatrical consulting, training, service and design company.

Name: Nomad'I Serane, théâtre de sensibilisation
Description:
Créée en 2017, notre compagnie a pour mission de provoquer la réflexion et d’impulser des changements positifs dans la société à travers des projets culturels et artistiques variés. Fondée sur des valeurs de vivre ensemble, de coopération, de créativité et d’éducation populaire, elle s’engage pour l’Utilité Sociale, en priorité vers des publics et/ou des zones éloignés de la culture.

Afin de répondre aux enjeux sociaux actuels nous proposons : 
- Des spectacles accompagnés d’actions de médiation 
- Du Théâtre Forum 
- Des projets de coopération internationale 
- Du Théâtre de proximité 
- Des projets sur mesure 

A travers ses activités, la compagnie s'inscrit dans une démarche collaborative, à la fois avec ses partenaires et avec son public. En effet, nous avons à cœur de travailler au plus près des besoins et des problématiques de chacun dans l’objectif de proposer des actions de sensibilisation pertinentes. Nous sommes convaincus que le théâtre est un outil puissant pour éveiller les consciences, encourager l'empathie et inspirer l'action pour un monde meilleur.

Name: Fio
Description: Fio exists to create a seismic shift in the arts and cultural sector in Wales. We are a theatre and arts company based in Cardiff founded in 2016.

Name: Melbourne French Theatre Inc.
Description: Founded in 1977 by Michael [Michel] Bula and David Gorrie, Melbourne French Theatre Inc. (Le Théâtre Français de Melbourne) is a non-profit incorporated association Registered Charity and tax deductible gift recipient under the patronage of the French Ambassador to Australia.  Presenting one major theatre production a year (in May and sometimes September usually in August) in French with English surtitles and touring schools across Victoria throughout the school year, our mission is to serve as a window of French theatrical literature and performance and to cross-fertilise Australian and French-speaking cultures through theatre.

Name: Barnstorm Theatre Company - Kilkenny
Description: Founded in Kilkenny in 1991, Barnstorm Theatre Company creates and presents quality theatre for, and with children, young people and adults. We engage the transformative potential of theatre for the benefit of our audiences and communities.

Name: Tom Kirdahy Productions
Description: Tom Kirdahy Productions is a Tony & Olivier Award-winning production company driven by the transformative power of telling stories.

Name: Knowledge Workings Theater Company LLC
Description:
https://www.eventbrite.com/e/the-jesters-wife-a-comedy-for-the-dark-ages-tickets-6672
Make theater live, to as Marsha Norman wrote, “provide a keyhole into some world that nobody has ever seen.” Produce what Hilton Als called “…a refraction of reality, containing feelings and thoughts that are put forth, first, in a primary text, which the actor interprets—an interpretation that the director supports or edits, in an attempt to help build, in a made-up world, an atmosphere of verisimilitude.” But people should laugh while we do that heeding George Bernard Shaw who said “If you want to tell people the truth, you’d better make them laugh …” 

In January 2018, Joe Queenan and T.J. Elliott started writing their attempts at truth telling via ‘problem comedies’. These plays explore difficult issues in a humanistic and entertaining fashion seeking through their collaboration with actors, director, other theater professionals, and the audience to provoke discussion and understanding of issues and ideas critical to our time such as race, religion, and ideological polarization. 

In order to reach audiences as directly and immediately as possible, they founded and incorporated Knowledge Workings Theater. Our first Off-Broadway Equity showcase, Alms, enjoyed a sold-out run in May 2019 at TheaterLab in NYC. In that production and with all of our subsequent productions, our main aim is to not only stage our ‘problem comedies’ but also give members of our team — actors and our tech wizards — opportunities to show their work to a wider audience.  
Due to the Covid-19 pandemic, like other NYC companies we had to stage our next two plays — Grudges and Keeping Right — via Zoom. Nonetheless, we managed to ‘make theater live‘ and successful even on that less-than-ideal venue. In November 2021, we returned to an actual stage through our co-production with Broom Street Theater of Madison Wisconsin of our play, Genealogy.  Most recently, we staged in May 2022 a successful run of our play T

Name: THEATRE DE LA CLARTE
Description:
Le Théâtre de la Clarté est un espace dédié à tout le monde, petits et grands qui vous reçoit pour diverses expériences : 
- Spectacles pour petits et grands
- Ateliers, cours de théâtre (de 3 à 99 ans) 
- Privatisation du lieu pour vos formations / teambuildings, conférences

Name: A Host of People
Description: A Host of People is a multi-racial Detroit-based ensemble theater company creating original work that celebrates imagination, complexity, and the synthesis of seemingly disparate elements—at once epic and intimate, political and personal, poetic and approachable. AHOP exists to create aesthetically rigorous, intellectually challenging theater that is warm, welcoming, and inspiring to people from all walks of life. We choose our subject matter and themes carefully with an eye to stories, topics, and aesthetic approaches that will be equally thrilling to the most adventurous  theater fans as well as those with less exposure to the form. This is how A Host of People moves people: we play with the light and the dark; the head and the heart.

Name: Theatre Ariel
Description: Theatre Ariel presents professional performances of new and established plays inspired by the past, present, and future of the Jewish experience – its heritage and humor, struggles and triumphs, ethics and intersections. Through our focus on the specific, we illuminate the universal. Our performances entertain, educate, and enrich audiences in intimate communal settings unique to our region’s cultural life. Theatre Ariel welcomes everyone to engage with our shows as a catalyst for exciting, thought-provoking discourse.

Name: Positief Coachen
Description:
In een positief klimaat gaan kinderen beter presteren, haken ze minder snel af, zijn er minder incidenten en wordt het voor sportcoaches / leraren / ouders leuker om ze te begeleiden.

Met onze humoristische theatervoorstellingen geven we een krachtige aanzet.

Bel 06 - 122 677 24 of mail naar info@theaterbeweegt.nl.

Name: Theater kuenstlerhaus43 im Palasthotel
Description: Das kuenstlerhaus43 wurde von Dipl. Medienwirtin Susanne Müller und dem Schauspieler, Autor & Regisseur Wolfgang Vielsack 2005 in einem alten Arbeiterhaus mitten in Wiesbaden ins Leben gerufen. Seit 16 Jahren finden dort regelmäßig Theateraufführungen, Konzerte, Ausstellungen und Kleinkunstabende statt. 2011 haben wir die „Sommerfestspiele Wiesbaden“ (dreiwöchiges Freilichttheaterfestival) gestartet. Seit 9 Jahren wird in den Sommerferien deshalb vor den Toren Wiesbadens Burg Sonnenberg Spielort für Kinder- und Erwachsenentheater. Gastspiele in verschiedensten Orten (Stadtschloss Wiesbaden, Kurhaus, Kaiser-Friedrich-Bad, Bergkirche, Hotel Schwarzer Bock, Schloss Johannisberg, Biebricher Schlosspark…) ergänzen die kleine Bühne mit Wohnzimmer-Atmosphäre. Das Theater beginnt immer schon beim Einlass oder manchmal auch schon vorher. Wir erfinden Räume und Orte neu und motivieren Zuschauer (ähnlich wie beim Rimini-Protokoll) die Blickrichtung zu ändern und so Gewohntes neu oder anders zu entdecken. Theater ist Begegnung und Begegnung ist Theater. Es gibt keinen Ort, der nicht Bühnenbild werden kann. Und wer einmal eine Vorstellung im kh43 besucht hat, weiß, was das bedeutet, denn: auch die Zuschauer werden bei uns zu Statisten im vierdimensionalen Bühnenraum. Seit Februar 2021 haben wir eine Corona-Interimsspielstätte, mit ca. 400 qm Platz, ein ehemaliger Speisesaal in einem alten Grandhotel im Herzen der Stadt. Hier freuen wir uns auf Ihren besuch!
