Name: Fresh Ink Theatre Company
Description:
Fresh Ink Theatre Company is committed to developing fresh, inclusive, innovative new work with theatre artists in the New England area. We believe that representation onstage and community-building offstage has the power to inspire audiences, shift worldviews, foster understanding, and challenge the status quo. We are dedicated to programming artistic work and curating artistic collaborations that uplift and celebrate the diverse range of voices in New England. We seek to empower writers with the tools to craft plays that showcase their creative vision, and we challenge the Boston community to engage in the evolution of dynamic new work as it transforms from first draft to first production, and beyond.

We value artistic excellence, institutional transparency, community involvement, and ongoing collaboration. In our room, we require respect towards other collaborators and a deep desire to learn from every point of view present.

Name: Losers Cirque Company
Description:
Jsme Losers Cirque Company, populární divadelní spolek performerů - akrobatů, herců, mimů a tanečníků. 

Našimi zakládajícími členy jsou Petr Horníček a Zdeněk Moravec, které si můžete pamatovat jako výherce prvního ročníku televizní soutěže Československo má talent. 

Na svém kontě máme řadu celovečerních vystoupení, která pravidelně reprízujeme u nás i v zahraničí. Vystupujeme i na firemních večírcích a charitativních akcích. 

Naší domovskou scénou je Divadlo BRAVO!

Name: Likeminds
Description: Likeminds is a metropolitan development place for multi-voiced theatre makers from different disciplines. Here artistic diversity is the starting point. The great common denominator of makers and performances is idiosyncratic, fluid, diverse, activist, frayed and vulnerable.

Name: MotherFreakingHood! A Musical Comedy
Description:
MotherFreakingHood! is the irreverent, original musical comedy following three unlikely - and uncensored - friends as they take on the world from pregnancy tests to empty nests... one bottle at a time!

Rachel, wide-eyed and optimistic, is thrilled to finally put her party days behind and become a first time mom... #YAY!    

Meanwhile Angie has kept to her planner and has already enrolled her unborn child into the most exclusive all-girls preschool (definitely a girl, she already has boy).

After three kids, Marcia was done. Or so she thought. Is it bad she doesn’t want to cancel her wine of the month club and would rather be on a beach? 

Featuring “clever, irreverent and inventive” (Robert Trussell, Kansas City Star) all-original songs by Julie Dunlap and Sara Stotts and “so much humor that like the movies Airplane and The Naked Gun it must be seen several times to catch it all” (Steve Wilson, BroadwayWorld.com), MotherFreakingHood! has entertained audiences from Kansas to New York City, including its most recent production at The Black Box in KCMO produced by Fishtank Theatre in September 2022. 

Future productions are in the works (as you are reading this!) for 2023, with reservations being taken now for private pre-show happy hour events in the Chicago area.

Contact us for information on how to bring the production to a stage near you... you'll laugh your abs off!

Name: Natyarang - Dramatics Club
Description: We are a student-driven performing arts club aiming to provide a platform to showcase the theatrical skills of management students of IIM Sambalpur

Name: Les Improsak - troupe de théâtre d'impro à Tahiti
Description: Le 1er festival d’improvisation théâtrale débarque à Tahiti du 19 au 22 mars au Hilton Tahiti ! Pendant 4 jours, tout se crée en direct, avec toi public !

Name: Bretforton Theatrebarn (Part of the Bretforton Grange Estate)
Description:
Theatrebarn is a 180 seat theatre housed in a medieval tithe barn. Nestled in the foothills of the Northern Cotswolds, it is part of the Bretforton Grange Estate which can trace its origins back to the 8th Century. 

It is run by a charity which has three purposes: to serve and enhance its local community; to be a residential site to develop new work in all the cultural industries - predominantly theatre - and to act as a restorative oasis for creative freelancers.

Set in the glorious grounds of The Grange, the tithe barn and several other historic buildings have been joined together to create a site which oozes untapped potential and possibilities. The Trust intends to open all parts of the Estate gradually and develop an exciting hub where artists from around the world will meet, create, dream and share. 
The Executive Director, Dafydd Rogers is helming the next phase of the Charity's development.

Name: 52nd Street Project Inc
Description: The mission of The 52nd Street Project, a community-based arts organization, is to bring together kids from Hell’s Kitchen in Manhattan, starting at age nine and lasting through their teens, with theater professionals to create original theater offered free to the general public. By building on the core experience of accomplishment and collaboration, the Project fosters a sense of inclusion in a place where the children belong and where their creative work is the driving force. Through long-term mentoring relationships and exposure to diverse art forms (including Poetry, Photography, Theatrical Design, Dance, and Filmmaking), the Project seeks to expand the children’s means of expression and to improve their literacy, their life skills, and their attitude toward learning.

Name: Divadlo bez masky
Description: Divadlo bez masky je jedno z najmladších bratislavských divadiel. Založené bolo koncom augusta 2022 ako občianske združenie. Hrať divadlo začalo 17. marca 2023 - slovenskou premiérou hry Marka Ravenhilla bazén (bez vody).

Name: Divadlo Na zábradlí
Description: Divadlo Na zábradlí je jedno z nejznámějších menších divadel v Praze a představuje přední scénu současných divadelních tendencí.

Name: TRW Production
Description: TRW Production, a new theatrical development, investment and producing entity headed by executive producers Katy Lipson and Michael McFadden.

Name: Power Cinema Addis
Description: Power Cinema Addis have 3 auditoriums or screening rooms ,each equipped with large screen projector and sound system.

Name: Loupe Színházi Társulás
Description:
Hisszük, hogy egy színház akkor igazán jó, ha a szórakoztatáson túl el is gondolkoztat. Ha olyan témákat dolgoz fel az előadásokban, amelyek foglalkoztatják az embereket. Olyanokat, amelyek emberekről szólnak, emberi kérdésekkel foglalkoznak, emberektől. Mert szerintünk a színház feladata ránagyítani az ilyen kérdésekre. Ez a Loupe.

Loupe Színházi Társulás is a vibrant, independent theater company founded in 2022, dedicated to tackling bold, socially relevant themes through captivating performances. We bring thought-provoking stories to life, engaging audiences across Hungary with over 30 cities visited. Our productions blend entertainment with deep reflection. Comprising talented actors and creators, we foster dialogue on taboo topics with a democratic, inclusive spirit.

Name: Historische Spelen Woerden
Description:
Een pregnante gebeurtenis uit de historie van Woerden wordt in theatervorm uitgebeeld. En wij willen dat om de drie jaar doen. Waarom? Omdat we denken hiermee het historisch besef van de inwoners te vergroten. De binding met de stad te versterken. Verleden en toekomst met elkaar te verbinden, omdat de geschiedenis zich nu eenmaal herhaalt.

Omdat we de leefbaarheid en de cultuur van de stad daarmee dienen. En, omdat we het allemaal samen gaan doen! En daarmee, mede door de samenwerking met de professionals van Kunstencentrum Het Klooster, aan alle medespelers en toeschouwers iets bieden wat zowel ontspannend als leerzaam is! Cultuureducatie in optima forma! Ook worden de saamhorigheid onder de inwoners en de betrokkenheid bij elkaar ermee gediend. En tenslotte, omdat het zo leuk is om dat allemaal samen voor elkaar te krijgen!

Name: Stichting Talk-Theater XL
Description: Talk Theater XL maakt theater en multimediale programma’s en producties. Met de kracht van verbeelding, taal, podium en door ontmoeting geven we verhalen die - vaak verborgen bleven maar nu gehoord worden – vorm, en nodigen we uit tot gesprek. We opereren op het snijvlak van theater en talkshow en produceren programma’s met kunst, cultuur en maatschappelijk engagement.

Name: Junge Bühne Mainz
Description:
Seit Januar 2011 steht das freie Theater Junge Bühne Mainz unter der Künstlerischen und Regieführenden Leitung des Regisseurs und Schauspielers Philip Barth. Seitdem hat sich das kleine Theater mit seinem Ensemble von jungen Schauspieler:innen aus der freien Theaterszene der Rhein-Main-Region auf hochwertige, innovative Inszenierungen in den Sparten "Junges Schauspiel" und "Kinder- und Jugendtheater" spezialisiert. Als freies Kleintheater finanziert, verwaltet und organisiert die Junge Bühne Mainz sich und ihren Spielbetrieb völlständig selbst und erhält keine Subventionen. 

Hauptspielstätte des freien Theaters Junge Bühne Mainz ist seit Januar 2011 das Jugend- und Kulturzentrum M8-Bühne mit seinem modernen Theatersaal im Haus der Jugend Mainz. Zuvor wurde dort bereits 2009/10 ein Projekt testweise realisiert. Dem Ensemble steht hier eine vielseitig gestaltbare Bühne mit umfangreicher technischer Ausstattung zur Verfügung. Ergänzend zum umfangreichen Programm in der Hauptspielstääte wurden im Zeitraum Dezember 2018 bis März 2022 auch Gastspiele im KUZ Kulturzentrum Mainz gespielt.

Zusätzliche Bekanntheit erlangte die Junge Bühne Mainz seit 2011 auch durch Auftritte auf Kulturmessen und Festivals (u.a. MiMa Ingelheim, Kunstbiennale 3xklingeln) sowie bei mehreren Gastspielen am renommierten "mainzer forum theater unterhaus". Seit 2012 nimmt die Junge Bühne Mainz am jährlichen, überregional bedeutsamen "Mainzer Kinder-Theater-Festival" teil. Das eigene Schauspielfestival "PopUp - Theatertage für Junges Schauspiel" richtet die Junge Bühne Mainz seit 2016 aus.

Die Junge Bühne Mainz ist Ordentliches Mitglied in der Internationalen Vereinigung der Theater für junges Publikum ASSITEJ und Unterzeichnerin der Rheinland-Pfälzischen Erklärung von Die Vielen.

Name: Grupo Giramundo
Description:
O Giramundo tem 50 anos de atuação e é um dos teatros de bonecos mais antigos do Brasil. Com 38 montagens realizadas, e cerca de 1400 bonecos concebidos, o grupo já marcou presença em 13 estados brasileiros e 11 outros países. 
Nascido de uma tríade de artistas, nos anos 70, o Giramundo tem meio século de atuação e é um dos teatros de bonecos mais antigos do Brasil. A história do grupo é marcada por pesquisa, experimentação e reinvenção, com o boneco e o movimento como raisons d’être. 					

A ênfase na pesquisa faz com que o Giramundo fuja de definições convencionais de grupo teatral, se tornando uma espécie de centro de conhecimento sobre o teatro de formas animadas. Conhecimento que é aproveitado não só nas montagens, mas, também, compartilhado através da Escola e Museu, que são outras facetas importantes de sua constituição. 

Ao menos 1.350 bonecos ganharam vida pelas mãos do grupo, criados com as mais variadas técnicas de construção de marionetes, eles atuaram em 38 montagens de espetáculos ou posaram para os visitantes, no museu, quando não estavam em ação.

Name: Landestheater Tübingen
Description: Das LTT ist der größte Kulturbetrieb der Universitätsstadt Tübingen und zeigt einen abwechslungsreichen sowie mutigen Spielplan, der neben zeitgenössischen Autoren die Klassiker der europäischen Dramatik abdeckt und diese in immer wieder aktuelle Perspektiven rückt. So hat sich das LTT in der deutschen Theaterlandschaft ein Renommee geschaffen, das weit über die Grenzen Tübingens hinausreicht.

Name: LA MARCHE DU CRABE
Description:
La marche du crabe is a company dedicated to researching and creating live performances specifically tailored for early childhood and young audiences. It advocates for a close sensory approach, tailoring every aspect of its creations to the needs of its diverse spectators.

At the intersection of circus arts, dance, and theater, accompanied by the symbolism of stage props, the creations establish themselves as intimate acts seeking to renew the dialogue between artists and spectators.

La marche du crabe takes the stance of addressing sensitive themes openly to all its audiences, from infants to adolescents, from adults to seniors. Embracing the unpredictability of the moment, the company orchestrates improvised performances, focusing on the execution of an action, its authenticity, and its significant impact.

Its immersive environments, on-site encounters, and close-proximity shows with the audience foster an intimate connection, an emotional resonance, and symbolics, grounded in the surrounding reality.

In doing so, La marche du crabe nurtures its creative processes through cultural mediation encounters to confront and confirm the direction of the work; from tone to aesthetics, from storytelling to staging.

The company designs arts awareness workshops to reach its audience, preparing or extending their engagement with its works. Participants are guided to explore the expressive capacities of their bodies and voices, sharing their creativity and imagination, fostering an exchange that promotes a sense of community.

Eco-responsibility, mentoring, and resource-sharing drive their actions.

Name: Anglo Irish Productions
Description:
Tradition meets modernity in Through Irish Eyes – an inspiring new music and dance show from Anglo-Irish Productions.

Award-winning dancer/choreographer Kevin Goble and acclaimed singer/songwriter Barry Tierney, have both toured the world, introducing global audiences to Ireland’s life-affirming music and dance. Now, for the first time, they combine their talents to create a brand new show which showcases the genre’s many styles in a fresh and exciting way. The cast includes a BBC Young Musician Of The Year reciepient, All Ireland Champion musicians and World Champion level dancers.

Featuring original as well as traditional tracks, Through Irish Eyes blends the lively, flirtatious notes synonymous with traditional Irish tunes with the incredible speed and skill of modern Irish dancing. The tender Irish love song will be reinvented and sung by the island's most talented voices as the show explores themes of Ireland's story. The audience will be part of the chorus, guaranteeing that they will never forget this powerful show.

The talented cast includes 9 dancers, 8 musicians and numerous singers. Alongside classic and original songs, the show features brand new musical scores by Belfast’s very own upcoming star, Cormac Crummey.

Don’t miss this vibrant showcase that fuses the best talents in modern Irish music and dance – ensuring that this traditional art stays relevant for many generations to come.

“A singer that should be heard” - Christy Moore on Barry Tierney

“Best New Entertainment” - The Belfast Events Award regarding Kevin Goble

Name: IROKO Theatre Company
Description:
We are IROKO Theatre Company. Simply known as IROKO!

We are committed to providing opportunities and environments for people of all ages, backgrounds, and abilities to fulfil their potential.

Our aim is to use African theatre approaches as a vehicle for learning and for raising the confidence and self-esteem of people of all ages and abilities. We also aim to raise awareness, preserve, celebrate, interpret and explain African heritage and culture, so that more people and a wider range of people will be able to engage with the heritage, learn about it and have informed and changed attitudes and/or behaviour towards it.

Name: Stichting Theater Trots!
Description: Theater Trots is een stichting die theateractiviteiten organiseert voor mensen met een verstandelijke beperking.

Name: RedWit Theatre
Description: After graduating from NYU Tisch with her BFA in Acting & Musical Theatre, Allison founded RedWit Theatre, in order to put authentic stories on stage that champion representation through the collaboration with exceptional artists who share her frustration with the lack of accurate representation of neurodivergence in the media. The mandate of RedWit is not just to make spectacular theatre but to make theatre that matters.

Name: Society of Props Managers
Description: We are an international communication and support network of professional properties shop managers, committed to sharing resources, information, solutions and techniques, safety guidelines, continuing education, and stock. We promote the highest professional standards among property artisans and craftsmen, promote the profession of properties to potential artisans in college or elsewhere in the theatrical business, and establish educational standards for the training of property artisans. We improve working relationships and conditions for all properties artisans by educating theatre institutions of the capabilities and needs of property artisans. Together we have established parity with other professionals within production specialties.

Name: tiata fahodzi
Description: tiata fahodzi, the UK’s leading British African heritage contemporary theatre company, produces theatre that is fearless for a Britain of today; rich with languages, races, cultures and identities

Name: Intiman Teater
Description:
Hyra Intiman
Vill du hyra Intiman för din scenproduktion, konferens eller företagsevent?
Kontakta oss för mer info på mail: info@intiman.se alt annie.carlsson@2entertain.com

Om Intiman Teater 
Sedan 1950 har Intiman varit teaterlokal. En mysig och intim teater mitt på Odenplan i Stockholm. 

Historik
Invigningsföreställningen, Tolvskillingsoperan av Berthold Brecht regisserades av Ingmar Bergman som vid denna tidpunkt även var konstnärlig ledare för teatern. 1966 tog Sandrews över driften och drev teatern ända fram till 1997 då Hasse Wallmans tog över och döpte om teatern till Wallmans Intiman. 2010 såldes hela Wallmanskoncernen till 2Entertain som numer driver teatern med sitt ursprungliga namn, Intiman.

Under de år som teatern varit i bruk har det utan uppehåll spelats och producerats i stort sett alla olika typer av föreställningar: farser, musikaler, traditionell talteater, buskis, tragedier, komedier, standupföreställningar, och revyer. På Intimans scen har många av våra folkkära artister, skådespelare, musiker, komiker, och dansare uppträtt.

Salongen
Teatern rymmer totalt 584 publikplatser. Ingen av dessa platser har skymd sikt.
Publikplatserna är fördelade på parkett och balkong.
Parketten rymmer 400 publikplatser och balkongen 184.
Det finns 2 rullstolsplatser.

Övrigt
Scen: 10m x 10m (den disponibla ytan varierar), Scenkantbredd ca 8m, höjd ca 4m
Salong: 584 platser (400st parkett, 184st balkong)
Funktionsanpassning: Toalett samt rullstolhiss. Hörslinga av äldre modell.
Inlast: Större scenografi och teknik sker från huvudentrén på Odengatan 81.
Foajé: Två barer, två garderober samt en mindre kaffebar. 7 toaletter och 1 funktionsanpassad toalett. Ljudanläggning.
Biljettkassan: Två säljplatser. Öppen 1 h innan ord. föreställning och drivs av Intimans egen personal.

Biljettfrågor Mån–fre kl. 9:00 –16:30 
Showtic gästservice: Telefon 0771 - 13 43 00, mail: info@showtic.se

Intimans foajéförsäljning drivs av Nöjespatrullen Showrestaurang AB org. 556348-7759

Name: Thapar Nautanki Team (TNT)
Description: Thapar Nautanki Team, often (and rightfully) abbreviated as TNT, is a group of students from across the years who believe in change. Using their love for the performing arts and determination they present and spread awareness on a myriad of social issues through a “Nautanki” or a “Nukkad Natak.”

Name: Betty Friday (MC020)
Description: Elke vrijdag in Theater de Richel, van 17.30 tot 18.30 een theatrale weekend-kick off met een host, een beschouwing op de actualiteit, muziek, theater, gastoptredens en een goed gesprek. Bar open om 16.30.

Name: L'Effet Théâtre
Description: Le Théâtre pour toucher, solliciter et impliquer, les publics scolaires sur l'actualité sociétale

Name: LEITMOTIV TEATRO
Description: Leitmotiv es un colectivo teatral peruano fundado oficialmente el 7 de agosto del 2023, creado para contribuir al entorno teatral mediante la producción y difusión de las artes escénicas, a través de medios físicos y digitales. Dirigido al público interesado en conocer y disfrutar el mundo del teatro en todos sus formatos posibles desde la dramaturgia hasta la performance.

Name: Compagnie du Vent Contraire
Description:
Compagnie fondée en 2019 avec plusieurs spectacles à l'affiche.
La compagnie dispense aussi des cours de théâtre, d'improvisation et de prise de parole.

Name: FOLKS OPERETTA
Description:
FOLKS OPERETTA was founded in 2006 by the husband and wife team of Gerald Frantzen and Alison Kelly. Folks Operetta has reconstructed and produced over nineteen new productions of some of the rarest shows in the world. In 2022 we produced the American premiere of the opera “Die Kathrin” which was declared one of the top ten classical performances of the year. Folks Operetta has released two albums on the Naxos Recording Label (Rose of Stambul and Ball at the Savoy), produced 11 American premieres of operettas, five Chicago premieres of operettas and seven children operettas.  In 2018 Folks Operetta initiated the Reclaimed Voices Series to focus on the works of Jewish composers and librettists who either perished or were forced into exile during the Second World War. The series is the compass that guides our company’s work and mission. Our programming is centered on telling these composers’ stories. We have created a series of concerts to educate the public and present in-depth looks at these composers’ lives. Aside from the personal trauma that these artists experienced during the war, they suffered the further indignity of having their work ignored for decades. A once-thriving artistic community became a footnote. Our intention is to bring these composers and librettists out of the shadows. We are working tirelessly to reconstruct these forgotten and neglected works and introduce them to new audiences, in an effort to preserve these works for generations to come. Our work has inspired companies around the world to take a new look at these works. 

We believe that the arts serve to illuminate the human condition. Folks Operetta is dedicated to the revival and development of operetta, a popular and accessible form of musical theater for general audiences. In particular, we concentrate on producing Viennese, German, and American operettas from the early 20th Century, many of which have never been performed in the United States.

Name: Effectus Theatre
Description:
At Effectus Theatre, we are passionate about making theatre accessible to everyone. Our original productions for babies, children, young people and their families/carers, Children and Young People with Learning or Physical disabilities and adults living with disabilities are a perfect way to experience the magic of theatre.
We believe that everybody should be able to access the arts, no matter their ability or background. Everyone has the right to be creative, so we strive to provide a safe and inclusive space where all can come and enjoy the magic of theatre.
At Effectus Theatre, we provide a range of workshops and activities designed to help you unlock your creativity. With our experienced team of creatives on hand to guide you every step of the way, you’ll soon be creating amazing pieces of work that you can be proud of.
Our performances are designed with accessibility in mind – ensuring that all audiences feel included and engaged in our productions. With interactive elements and plenty of audience participation, our performances bring theatre alive in unique ways that will leave a lasting impression on all who attend.

Name: Nothing Ventured Productions
Description:
Nothing Ventured Productions was founded by three serial entrepreneurs with a lifelong love of theater and a spidey sense there were more like them. Alexandra Cavoulacos, Kathryn Minshew, and Christina Wallace first connected in the NY tech scene as early-stage founders looking to leverage technology to solve big problems. 

NVP’s core thesis is that there is a rising generation of Broadway investors from the tech world and beyond who want to learn the ropes of this unique asset class. Borrowing frameworks from angel investing, like rollup vehicles, NVP is able to open up access and opportunity for accredited investors new to Broadway by pooling smaller checks than productions typically welcome.

Name: Lucille Lortel Theatre
Description: Lucille Lortel Theatre is a Theater Company. It owns the historic Lucille Lortel Theatre at 121 Christopher St and is developing more theatrical space at 134 West 18th Street.

Name: HCRFTR Mandi Himachal
Description:
Mandi School Of Drama, that is non professional and not any kind of business organization. It is not affiliated to any private or government organization and not a purpose to gain any king of profit. It is founded only for those students who having the degree of H.C.R.F. & T.A. (completed the course). It is operating by students.

Our Aim
It is created only for students of H.C.R.F. & T.A. Through this students can know each other and share their knowledge, their information and their activities. It will be very easy to convey the message, catch any student or his activity and also helpful for those students who want to know how to hit the target. They ask questions to those students who have knowledge and students will find their way easily.

Name: The French Theater Project
Description: We bring live, contemporary French theater to audiences in America.

Name: Jels Vikingespil
Description: Jels Vikingespil er teater under åben himmel. En årligt tilbagevendende begivenhed baseret på flere hundrede frivilliges passion for vikinger og teater siden 1977. Mere end 780.000 gæster har gennem årene overværet drabelige fægtekampe, glødende romantik og farverige optrin på Danmarks smukkeste friluftsscene.

Name: Le O.U.P.S*
Description:
O.U.P.S* signifie "Objectifs : Utopie, Progrès, Solidarité."

Pourquoi ?

L'Utopie c'est que le théâtre devienne ce qu'il n'est pas toujours : populaire, solidaire, engagé, vecteur de savoirs, de changement et d'inclusion. 

Le Progrès c'est que notre compagnie soit un laboratoire de l'éducation populaire, de la médiation culturelle : pour défendre la citoyenneté, la démocratie et l'intérêt collectif. Soutenir les artistes et les initiatives. Contribuer au Développement durable, Territorial, économique ou personnel.

La Solidarité c'est de donner la priorité au public empêché. Agir, former, initier, animer, jouer partout où le théâtre n'est pas encore, ou pas assez.

Nous portons et porterons ses valeurs à chaque spectacles, chaque animations et chaque médiations et nous acceptons de travailler pour et avec quiconque les partages.

Name: Sardegna Teatro
Description:
Il Teatro di Sardegna è l’unico TRIC Teatro di Rilevante Interesse Culturale presente in Sardegna. Riconosciuto nel 2015 e confermato nel 2018, il Teatro di Sardegna sostiene la creazione artistica, affidando agli artisti la possibilità di avere un tempo lungo di produzione e sperimentazione cross-mediale di nuovi linguaggi e contesti.
Il Teatro di Sardegna si impegna a esprimere una scena culturale - e non soltanto artistica - delineandosi come soggetto plurale , in grado di contenere una molteplicità di linguaggi e farsi veicolo di opportunità formative.
La presenza nei territori è essa stessa plurale: nelle città di Cagliari e Nuoro da anni il Teatro di Sardegna gestisce direttamente degli spazi, che abita con spettacoli e installazioni, prodotti o ospitati.
Altresì, Il Teatro di Sardegna abita Paulilatino attraverso la gestione del Teatro Grazia Deledda, rivolta alle residenze artistiche e il borgo dell’Argentiera, nel comune di Sassari, dove con LandWorks attiva processi di cambiamento e crescita, attraverso le Arti performative e digitali.
Nel borgo ex minerario di Fluminimaggiore, il Teatro di Sardegna propone le Giornate del Respiro, un festival internazionale, dove gli artisti sono invitati a far dialogare le loro ricerche con le esperienze della comunità e del territorio. Arti Performative e attività naturalistiche in un borgo a rischio spopolamento, sono le direttrici su cui si impernia l’azione del Teatro di Sardegna: traiettorie inedite, tracciati imprevisti, narrative molteplici.

Name: Black Pearl
Description:
Black Pearl is a Theatre troupe, providing a wide range of entertainments through, Street Play, Skit, Mime and Documentaries. Combining unmatched experience and specialized skills to develop a winning team, Black Pearl works at the intersection of creativity and innovation to bring out their best performance and create magical moments for their viewers. With 75 people in the team, Black Pearl drives Theatre to improve the way the world works and lives.

Location-Tumkur, Karnataka

Name: Collectif Résonance
Description:
Compagnie de projets documentaires : théâtre documentaire & fiction créés en immersion au cœur des territoires et structures sociales, éducatives ou culturelles.

 Nous créons à partir du réel. Chaque spectacle naît d'un travail de terrain : immersion longue, paroles recueillies, dispositifs participatifs. Nos créations sont pensées comme des outils sensibles de mémoire collective et de transmission sociétale.

 CRÉATIONS

Horizon 2048 (2024) : Enquête théâtrale sur notre futur commun : un jeu TV explore désirs, mémoires et futurs inventés de 2022 à 2048, après dix-huit mois de recherches avec des publics variés en IDF, au Caire et en Chine

 en diffusion nationale dans des lieux dédiés (théâtre, centre culturels...) et non dédiés (centres pénitentiaires, collèges, centres sociaux...) 

Protège-Moi : Une traversée des droits des mineur.e.s à travers leurs récits, leurs silences et leurs imaginaires, après dix-huit mois d'immersion dans des structures de placements. 

Diffusion territorialisée : nos tournées s'accompagnent de Parcours Résonance avec les mineur.e.s placé.e.s pour ancrer chaque représentation dans la réalité locale et créer du mouvement autour de nos thématiques.

 TRANSMISSION & TERRITOIRES

Projet de territoires 

Ateliers Résonance : arts, philosophie et parole pour publics éloignés de la culture (CHU, prison, foyers...)

Exposition, podcasts, vidéo (JO 2024, CHU La Pépinière...)

 PARTENAIRES
DRAC Île-de-France, Ministère de la Justice, Région IdF, Département 94, Fondation de France, Montpellier Métropole...

 Nous intervenons partout en France : création, résidence, co-construction de projets culturels de territoire, ateliers, formations.

 Programmateurs, élu·es, directions culturelles : contactez-nous pour imaginer ensemble un projet.

 www.collectifresonance.fr | creation@collectifresonance.org

Name: Les Compagnons du Théâtre
Description:
La mission des Compagnons du Théâtre est : de repérer et former des artistes amateurs et professionnels aux disciplines de l’art lyrique et du théâtre musical ; de promouvoir le répertoire, la culture et la pratique de cet art auprès de nouveaux publics (récitals, galas, œuvres complètes).

Académie et compagnie lyrique départementale, fondée à Castres en 1953, elle jouit de l’agrément éducation populaire (81.JEP.05.AM.085 ). Elle est habilitée à recevoir des dons (218 2007).

Name: Libert'Art Agency
Description:
Impulsionamos, Conectamos & Inspiramos

Bem-vindo à LIBERT'ART  AGENCY!


QUEM SOMOS?
Somos uma agência apaixonada por teatro, dedicada a dar vida a cada história e criar conexões que ecoam além do palco. 


A NOSSA MISSÃO?

Impulsionamos…

Quer sejas um produtor experiente ou um artista com um projecto guardado na gaveta, oferecemos uma variedade de serviços personalizados, desde, programação e gestão de espectáculos, promoção e marketing, suporte técnico e consultoria artística até serviços de impacto social e cultural. Estamos aqui para impulsionar a tua próxima produção teatral e tornar a tua visão em realidade.

Conectamos..

Acreditamos na força da colaboração e na criatividade sem limites. Precisas de uma equipa técnica para o teu espectáculo? De um designer gráfico? De um coreógrafo? Podes contar  connosco! Seja diretamente através da nossa equipa ou de parceiros externos, garantimos que tens a pessoa certa para atender às necessidades do teu projeto.

Inspiramos…

O Teatro vai muito além do palco! Apostamos no desenvolvimento de uma comunidade cultural vibrante. Desenvolvemos workshops, eventos de networking e colaboração artística, apresentações para escolas, e actividades de impacto social e cultural para que possas compartilhar, aprender e crescer connosco


FICA ATENTO!

Estamos prestes a revelar as nossas primeiras parcerias, projectos e iniciativas. 

JUNTA-TE À FAMÍLIA E SEGUE-NOS NESTA JORNADA!

Se és um artista à procura de palco, um produtor cheio de ideias ou um entusiasta ansioso para apreciar o teatro, a família Libert’Art está de braços abertos para te receber.

Segue-nos nas nossas redes sociais e fica a par de tudo. Se puderes partilhar o nosso conteúdo seria fantástico pelo que ajuda imenso o nosso negócio e o dos nossos clientes


CONTACTA-NOS!
Queremos ouvir a tua voz!
Tel - 910 059 353
Email - libert.agency@gmail.com

Name: Reclaiming Our Time Productions
Description: Reclaiming Our Time Productions (RecTime) is a non-profit congregate of theatre professionals, whose aim is to produce and present excellence in community theatre productions, workshops, and arts education. The organization incorporates a broad range of theatre styles to tell the stories of marginalized cultures.

Name: Ensemble Theatre of Cleveland
Description:
Ensemble Theatre is dedicated to the responsible production of works that celebrate the human spirit drawn from the rich canon of modern American classics as well as other significant contemporary plays.  Ensemble serves greater Cleveland and the Midwest region by reintroducing the classics, examining them with new eyes, and supporting the development of new works for the American theater.   

Education and outreach activities, engage youth and community residents through on site programming, residencies, and touring performances.  
Ensemble Theatre believes that the arts are an essential and meaningful part of life. The theatre offers an important forum for stimulating and provoking thought about the issues of contemporary life, and it is a place for communal experience.  Introducing future generations to the arts will enlighten them about the human condition and provide them with a resource to nourish them throughout their lives. All art, including theatre, should be a celebration of diversity and human dignity.  The theatre provides the highest possible level of professionalism in all areas to nurture new talent, and to be ever mindful of the power of art to entertain and move the audience.

Name: Argenta Community Theater
Description: Located at 405 Main Street, in the heart of North Little Rock’s Argenta Arts District, the Argenta Community Theater serves as a centerpiece of a vibrant artistic community. From crowd-pleasing musicals to vibrant new works to theatrical classics, there is truly something for everyone to love on the ACT stage. But, there is so much more to this state-of-the-art facility than just our top-notch plays and musicals! Argenta also coordinates educational programs for all ages, hosts community and cultural events, and is available as a flexible venue for weddings, events, performances, and more. Founded in 2010 by Vincent Insalaco and Judy Tenenbaum, The Argenta Community Theater strives to bring performance and participation in the arts to Central Arkansas now, and for generations to come.

Name: Hamilton Festival Theatre Company
Description:
Celebrating awesome indie theatre in Hamilton, Ontario! 

As a leader in the performing arts sector that responds to the changing culture of Hamilton, HFTco builds a community for artists that cultivates work that is accessible, innovative, and artistically adventurous.

#HFTco #HamiltonFringe #FrostBitesFest

Name: The Big Mo Theaterproducties
Description:
The Big Mo maakt (online) events op maat voor bedrijven. Wij bereiken uw doelgroep met een flinke dosis energie en humor op een prettige en interactieve manier bij ieder gewenst thema.

Wij informeren, motiveren en inspireren. Met behulp van doelgerichte events bereiken wij uw publiek op een prettige en laagdrempelige manier. Kijk ook op www.thebigmo.nl

Name: Impact Entertainment BV
Description: Theater Impresariaat / Booking Agency for theatre

Name: AGORA Theater
Description:
AGORA – Das Theater der Deutschsprachigen Gemeinschaft Belgiens
AGORA macht grenz- und sprachübergreifendes Theater, das alle angeht: Kinder, Jugendliche und Erwachsene. Durch seine außergewöhnliche geografische Lage - im Dreiländereck Belgien, Deutschland und Luxemburg - entwickelte sich das mehrsprachige Theater zu einer Institution der Grenz-Erfahrung. Es verhandelt die Verbindungen und Differenzen zwischen deutschsprachiger, französischsprachiger und flämischer Kultur, zwischen Identität und Pluralität und zwischen Land und Stadt.

Name: In My Own Little Corner Productions
Description: Mission: open up conversations about mental health. A true story.

Name: Compagnie Fabrik Théâtre / Christine Letailleur
Description: La compagnie Fabrik Théâtre accompagne les projets de Christine Letailleur depuis 1994.

Name: Collide Theatre
Description:
Collide Theatre is a London-based, migrant and female-led theatre company founded in 2015 by Greek director Emily Louizou.

Described by The Guardian as “clearly a company to keep an eye on”, our mission is to reinvent classic stories, myths and plays by combining the text with music and movement.

Since our inception, we have collaborated with more than 70 migrant artists from various disciplines and produced 9 successful theatre shows across different venues.

Name: Stage Door Productions
Description:
Stage Door Productions, Inc. has provided theatre opportunities in the Fredericksburg, Virginia community since 1999. Through main stage shows, youth productions, camps, and other educational programming, Stage Door has touched countless individuals in the area who seek the unique experience that is live theatre. Our Stage Door family includes theatre professionals, late-blooming novices, talented amateurs, aspiring youth, enthusiastic supporters, and appreciative audiences.

Our season includes three or four main stage plays, an original One Act Play Festival, and two youth performances. We provide performing arts camps for youth and workshops for all ages. Our program also includes Stage Door Stars, a theatre enrichment experience for our special needs' community. As a thriving arts organization, our goal is to continue to grow and develop in new ways, seeking to increase theatre opportunities for all facets of our community. Come join us!

The Mission
Stage Door Productions, Inc. entertains and inspires audiences, provides an outlet for artistic expression and creative passion, educates and enriches area youth, serves children with special needs, and preserves locally the art of live theatre through performances, programming, education, and outreach in our community. 

The Vision
Stage Door Productions, Inc. envisions a thriving theatre community in Fredericksburg, Virginia where the theatre arts are celebrated, community members of all ages and backgrounds are engaged in the local theatre scene, and creative collaborations and partnerships are encouraged to foster a greater appreciation for the arts in our area and beyond.

Name: TG Wuivend Riet
Description: Theatergezelschap van regisseur/schrijver Ed Vanderweyden

Name: Doppelganger Productions
Description:
Doppelganger Productions is a none-profit company limited by guarantee (company no: 8174535) formed in 2012. A new writing theatre company based in Bournemouth, we produce innovative stage work by emerging and established theatre makers with a focus upon Dorset-based playwrights. We aim to create a vibrant theatre culture in Bournemouth and to present our work to audiences nationally and internationally.

We have performed work at the Lighthouse, Poole; Bournemouth University; the Rex Cinema, Wareham; Vita Nova (Boscombe Fringe), Boscombe; the Winchester Arts Pub, Bournemouth; the Shelley Theatre, Boscombe; Chaplin’s Bar, Boscombe; Bournemouth Town Hall; Regent’s College, London; the Charing Cross Theatre, London; the Bread and Roses Theatre, London – and additionally in a number of site-specific venues in Dorset. We have staged a number of plays in the Bournemouth Arts by the Sea Festival and in Bournemouth University’s Festival of Learning. In 2014, funded by Arts Council England, we mounted a ten-venue South-West tour of a play evoking local history – Robert Louis Stevenson in Bournemouth struggling to write The Strange Case of Doctor Jekyll and Mr Hide – underwriting our commitment to local theatre and to local subject matter which avoids parochialism.

A recent development has been in the creation of specialist workshops – radio and television scriptwriting, poetry, Twitter fiction, graphic fiction. Production opportunities are offered in radio and television projects. Last year we launched Doppelganger Firsts, a spin-off from the workshop involving a series of rehearsed readings of new stage plays we would like to subsequently put into production.

Name: Life of Ben
Description: It's just me, living my life

Name: Theatre For A Cause
Description:
Theatre For A Cause (TFAC) is a not-for-profit organization that believes in the power of music and theatre. We are a talented yet diverse pool of artists ranging from actors, singers, dancers, choreographers, and more, who perform and produce musicals to create a social impact by raising funds for NGOs.

TFAC’s founders are Vandana Munjal (actor and producer), Radhika Bharat Ram (singer and philanthropist) and Ritu R Chandra (director and producer).

Name: VGM Tribunes Nederland
Description: VGM Tribunes verzorgt in eigen beheer ontwerp, levering, montage & onderhoud van tribunes en theaterstoelen.

Name: Chanticleer Shakespeare Co.
Description:
Chanticleer Shakespeare Co. is a professional theatre company, focused on bringing high-quality, classical theatre to Fresno, CA. 

Founded on the principal that Shakespeare is for everyone, CSC aims to make classical theatre accessible, engaging, and exciting to a modern audience.

By hiring professional artists, training local talent, and being the only professional Shakespearean theatre company within 100 miles, CSC is on a mission to transform Fresno into a cultural and artistic hub in California.

Name: Puget Sound Revels
Description:
Puget Sound Revels builds community through the arts using traditional song, dance, and story drawn from many cultures.  Revels offers theater productions, seasonal celebrations, and educational opportunities for people of all ages, races, genders and across the community.

We strive to:
*Honor every person’s presence and gifts and invite all peoples to light their truths at our hearth. We welcome individuals of all ages, races, and gender identities, and strive to create spaces of authenticity and safety.  
*Celebrate all communities – past and present. We are committed to building a diverse community founded in respect, inclusivity, and delight. 
*Dance with joy and sing in unity. We believe that shared story, song, dance, and ritual build and expand our sense of community and have the power to bring people together even in times of darkness.

Name: Mama Crea  Artes Escénicas
Description: Mama Crea es una compañía dedicada a las artes escénicas con una trayectoria de 30 años dentro del sector. Mama Crea se caracteriza por la investigación escénica fuera de los lugares habituales de exhibición, por el arte y creatividad a la carta y por el diseño de propuestas pensando en un público familiar e intergeneracional.

Name: The Classics Company
Description:
The Classics Company will give theatrical life to the great plays from the classical canon that have been performed on the English-speaking stage and, by doing so, re-introduce a contemporary audience to the dramatic literature that has stood the test of time. 

Each season, artists and audiences alike will be immersed in one playwright or genre. This intimate focus will connect all of us to the brilliant longevity of the world’s greatest plays, music, visual art, and literature. Studying and performing plays in their original cultural context enriches our understanding of history and helps us to build connections to our contemporary lives.

Name: Georgetown Gilbert and Sullivan Society Alumni
Description: America's only theater group with its own law school
