 English, Español, Français.
Pour les professionnel·les et les amateur·ices, de 16 à 116 ans.
 Lille et sa métropole.

Name: ConAlma Theater
Description: Celebrating Latin culture creating a bilingual theatrical experience rooted in the soul.

Name: Mirando al sur
Description: Mirando al sur es una productora franco-argentina.de espectáculos y formación profesional.

Name: Kunst Veredelt Kieldrecht
Description:
Welkom bij Kunst Veredelt Kieldrecht
Ontdek de magie van live theater met Kunst Veredelt Kieldrecht, een bloeiend theatergezelschap gevestigd in het hart van Kieldrecht, België. Onze passie voor kunst en cultuur komt tot leven op het podium, waar we verhalen vertellen die het publiek betoveren en ontroeren.

Onze Missie
Bij Kunst Veredelt Kieldrecht geloven we in de kracht van theater om gemeenschappen te verbinden en verbeelding te stimuleren. Onze missie is om hoogwaardige voorstellingen te produceren die een breed scala aan emoties oproepen en waarbij zowel de spelers als het publiek een onvergetelijke ervaring beleven.

Wat We Bieden
Op onze website vind je een schat aan informatie over onze theaterproducties, inclusief aankomende voorstellingen, speeldata en -tijden, ticketinformatie en een galerij met foto's van eerdere optredens. Ontdek ook meer over onze getalenteerde cast en crew, die zich inzetten om elk stuk tot leven te brengen.

Word Lid van Onze Gemeenschap
Kunst Veredelt Kieldrecht verwelkomt theaterliefhebbers van alle leeftijden en achtergronden. Als je geïnteresseerd bent in de wereld van theater, bieden we mogelijkheden om deel te nemen aan audities, vrijwilligerswerk of educatieve programma's. Samen kunnen we de kunst van het theater in Kieldrecht laten groeien en bloeien.

Nieuws en Updates
Blijf op de hoogte van het laatste nieuws en updates van Kunst Veredelt Kieldrecht door onze blog te volgen en je aan te melden voor onze nieuwsbrief. Hier delen we inzichten in onze productieprocessen, interviews met castleden en regisseurs, en meer.

Contacteer Ons
Heb je vragen, suggesties of wil je met ons in contact komen? Aarzel niet om ons te bereiken via het contactformulier op onze website. We waarderen de betrokkenheid van onze gemeenschap en staan altijd open voor samenwerking en feedback.

Ontdek de wonderen van theater met Kunst Veredelt Kieldrecht. Kom bij ons langs voor een onvergetelijke reis door de wereld van verhalen en emoties.

Name: Fantateatro - Alto Music s.r.l.
Description: Fantateatro nasce nel 2008 dall’incontro di professionalità diverse e complementari, come registi, pedagogisti, attori, ed educatori. Il profondo lavoro di ricerca indirizzato a trovare le strade e i linguaggi capaci di destare l’attenzione sia dei bambini che degli adulti, la contaminazione dei diversi linguaggi artistici (arte, musica, teatro di figura, lirica…), e la freschezza tipica del grande cinema di animazione, sono gli ingredienti che portano la Compagnia, ad imporsi sulla scena italiana fin dalla sua nascita come una delle realtà più innovative a livello nazionale per quanto riguarda il teatro ragazzi.

Name: Les indifférents
Description:
Les Indifférents sont une école et une compagnie de théâtre universitaire, fondée en 1998 par Michel Nebenzahl. Depuis 2008, la direction artistique est assurée par Jean-Noël Dahan. Cette association est domiciliée à l’Université Paris Ouest Nanterre La Défense. Elle a pour objet déclaré la formation aux arts de la scène (théâtre, dramaturgie, scénographie, danse, musique), la production et la diffusion de spectacles ainsi que de favoriser la traduction, l’écriture de textes dramatiques et/ou scénario, l’adaptation pour la scène d’œuvres littéraires et de favoriser de façon plus générale les arts vivants.
L’école ouvre chaque année des ateliers de pratique théâtrale à l’Université, qui aboutissent généralement à une création. Au bout d’un an d’atelier, il est possible d’intégrer la Compagnie, troupe permanente dont le travail est plus approfondi, les créations, non calquées sur le rythme universitaire. La Compagnie a également pour mission de former les formateurs qui mèneront les ateliers de l’Ecole. Depuis sa création l’Ecole a permis à la Compagnie de se renouveler chaque année.
Une formation artistique qui accompagne un cursus universitaire apporte à l’étudiant(e) l’occasion de découvrir, ou de mieux connaître ses qualités personnelles, relationnelles et de participer à une création collective. L’ « hypermédium » qu’est le théâtre, à travers ce qui se déduit de l’expérience du corps en scène, permet de prendre une connaissance concrète, pratique, de tous les arts qui contribuent à sa réalisation.Le concept des Indifférents (pratique, enseignement, recherche) est rigoureusement universitaire, à distance du « professionnel » comme de « l’amateur ». Il vise à la création, à l’inédit, à ce qui, pour diverses raisons, ne peut se faire ailleurs. La Compagnie a ainsi joué des textes inédits dont certains ont été joués en plusieurs langues. Les Indifférents sont membres depuis 2000 de l’AITU (Association internationale de Théâtre Universitaire)

Name: CU Theater
Description:
We are a modern theatre based in Dublin City center. You can enjoy different styles of our performances such as:  

Impro shows: fun, comedy live show where actors don’t have prepared scripts but want to make you laugh.

 Playback shows - live show with a healing effect. Audience shares theirs stories, director says a secret word and actors start playing the story focusing on audience’s feelings.

Drama courses: Over 12 engaging classes, you’ll develop:
Effective Communication: Sharpen your ability to express ideas clearly.
Active Listening: Hone your listening skills for better interactions.
Body Language Mastery: Decode nonverbal cues and enhance connections.
Quick Thinking: Train your mind to respond swiftly and adapt.
Creative Thinking: Cultivate innovative approaches to challenges.
Charisma Building: Discover techniques to captivate any audience.
Adaptive Improvisation: Thrive in diverse scenarios.
Focused Attention: Boost concentration and presence.
Pure Fun: Enjoy a playful, supportive environment.

Name: Ludens Theatre Company
Description:
At Ludens Theatre Company we believe humans are made to play. We thrive on the playful aspects of competition necessary for survival, building narratives around the games we play in our daily lives. We create live interactive immersive theatrical events which place the audience at the heart of the story. Utilizing unique gameplay elements, audiences shape the narrative and world of the play, creating individualized experiences with each performance. Our productions frequently focus on topical social issues, and we empower audiences to proactively collaborate and work towards solutions across a multitude of socially engaged ideas. Our participants are part of the action, making decisions and shifting the focus from opinions about an issue to a call for action. We spark unlikely partnerships, gripping narratives, and inspire healthy and constructive dialogue. 

Ludens Theatre Company has also committed to building and enriching community development through education and audience engagement. We have cultivated partnerships with a number of higher education and regional theatre organizations to offer bespoke immersive theatre educational opportunities for all skill levels. Our workshops range from year-long Masters and Undergraduate modules at leading arts universities to short introductory workshops for community groups. We aim to inspire the next generation of immersive artists to create a more sustainable, accessible, and innovative industry.

Name: BADS Teater
Description:
Bergen Amateur Dramatic Society (BADS) er en inkluderende teatergruppe som ønsker barn og voksne i alle aldre velkommen. Vi fokuserer på å skape en følelse av mestring og et positivt miljø. 

Gruppen, ledet av Jessica Harrison, Vanessa Lande og Tine Harrison-Raft, ble etablert av Rosemary Lund i 1998. Siden den gang har BADS utviklet seg til å inkludere omtrent 70 medlemmer, inkludert dyktige bidragsytere som sminkeartister, kostymedesignere, lys- og lydteknikere, samt scenearbeidere.

Hvert år setter vi opp forestillinger på Fana Kulturhus, i tillegg til å fremføre utdrag fra stykkene gjennom året. Våre forestillinger kjennetegnes av dans, sang, humor og en overflod av spilleglede. Vi legger stor vekt på å involvere publikum i våre forestillinger, noe som skaper et unikt samspill mellom utøvere og tilskuere.

Våre produksjoner er åpne for alle som søker en berikende teateropplevelse.

Name: HOLA CLAVEL! Producciones
Description: Somos Marisol Aznar y David Angulo. Quieres darle un toque oregonés a tu evento o celebración?

Name: Fonderie ARS aps
Description:
Fonderie ARS nasce a fine 2020 per dar voce a tutte le nostre anime: teatro, letteratura, musica, cultura in generale. Ha all'attivo diverse iniziative artistiche tra cui spettacoli di burattini, spettacoli di teatro ragazzi, passeggiate teatrali e visite guidate, performance artistiche. Attualmente la
compagnia è impegnata nella distribuzione nelle scuole di due spettacoli teatrali sulla tutela del mare e del
pescato locale; si tratta di un'iniziativa del Flag Costa dei Trabocchi, finanziata con fondi europei sotto la regia
della Regione Abruzzo. Gli spettacoli sono “Fucsia e basta” (spettacolo di burattini realizzato in collaborazione
con Orsoparlante Service & Show) e “Lampara” scritto da Caterina Merolli e Raffaella Simoncini, con la regia di
Annalica Bates Casasanta e Flavia Valoppi protagonista.

Name: DIY Theatre Society
Description:
DIY Theatre is committed to producing work that examines how issues of conscience, ethics and morality have been tackled in classical and contemporary theatre.

DIY Theatre is composed of semi-professional theatre artists that have come together through their passion for the performing arts to foster exceptional talent and provide our audience with a high quality theatre experience.

Here at DIY Theatre, we value the artists - both on stage and behind the scenes -
who put their hearts and souls into creating meaningful art.

Name: Teatro Cultura Chile
Description: Teatro educativo y preventivo para colegios. Espectáculos temáticos para empresas. Shows de circo y magia. Producciones para públicos diversos

Name: La Formule Paris
Description:
La Formule D’Acting
Un programme trimestriel de coaching dédié aux acteurs souhaitant perfectionner leur jeu et enrichir leur parcours.
Au programme : sessions intensives de coaching, masterclass avec des intervenants professionnels, réalisation de bandes démo, captations photo & vidéo, et bien plus encore.
Un accompagnement complet pour développer son talent, renforcer sa présence scénique et se préparer aux opportunités du métier.

Name: Propstar LLC
Description: Propstar LLC is one of the leading Props design & acquisition studios on Broadway.

Name: Hipótesis Ficción
Description:
Hipótesis ficción es una compañía emergente creada en 2019, integrada por artistas migrantes y locales de las artes escénicas y audiovisuales.

La compañía centra su trabajo en la investigación sobre procesos de creación y producción colectiva, y la creación de vínculos colaborativos con artistas de diversas disciplinas. 

Forma parte del programa de residencias del espacio cultural RAI, donde desarrolla dos partes de la trilogía Hipótesis sobre la Ficción: “Rendirse Es un Buen Comienzo” (2019) y “Último Intento” (2020).

En coproducción con la compañía argentina EL CUENCO TEATRO, estrena “Matar al Otro” en el espacio cultural RAI (2020) y en La Sala Madrid (2023). Gana el certamen Ensayo de la embajada Argentina en España y realiza funciones en el centro cultural Emilia Pardo Bazán y la sala Umbral de Primavera.

Forma parte del programa Residencias en Resistencia de la sala El 5 de Velarde con la performance “Babilonia” (2022). 

En octubre de 2024 estrena “El Tamaño del Miedo”, en La Sala Madrid. En marzo de 2025 estrena “Basada en hechos reales” en El umbral de la primavera, en el marco del Festival de Teatro Argentino.

En mayo de 2025 estrena la obra “El Retablo de las Maravillas” en los Teatros Luchana de Madrid, espectáculo ganador del Certamen Ensayo (Festival Sala Joven 2024), Residencias P.I.A.D (21 Distritos), Festival Malasaña a Escena (Asociación cultural Esto es pez) Y Programa de Mentoring y Acompañamiento para compañías emergentes (MACOMAD).

Name: Ariëns Toneel
Description:
Het Ariëns Toneel is in 1940 opgericht door Jan Smit, een onderwijzer in Eindhoven. Het motto van het Ariëns Toneel is dat iedereen zich op diens eigen manier moet kunnen ontwikkelen in toneelspel. Dat kan in één van de minimaal 2 grote voorstellingen die wij per jaar spelen : de avondvullende zaalproductie en het traditionele wagenspel, of in wisselende andere activiteiten.

Het Ariëns Toneel wordt uitsluitend gedraaid door vrijwilligers. Zo is er het algemeen bestuur, en zijn het Artistiek Cluster en het Wagenspel Cluster belangrijke onderdelen van de vereniging. Maar ook andere (interne en externe) vrijwilligers zijn van onschatbare waarde in het realiseren van alles wat er komt kijken bij het maken van onze voorstellingen.

Name: Embers Theatre Company
Description: Embers Theatre Company is based in Arlington, Virginia.

Name: The Counterminers
Description: The Counterminers started life as a Fringe theatre comedy collective founded by Lew Forman in 2019 in Edinburgh. They have grown from strength to strength since, now producing simultaneously in London, Nottingham and Edinburgh. With a diverse range of genres including comedy, musicals and immersive theatre, they have now evolved into a collaborative and experimental new work theatre collective.

Name: Action Theatre (Italy)
Description: Action Theatre (Italy) is a Lecoq-based company that has performed English Teaching Theatre and run drama based courses in English to over 1 million students aged between 5-18 over the last 25 years. In addition to original English Teaching Theatre plays, we offer workshows (storytelling) in school to small groups, Playweeks (one week drama workshops) and English Theatre Summer Camps.

Name: Plovdiv Drama Theatre
Description: Plovdiv Drama Theatre is the first professional Bulgarian theatre founded in 1881, and one of the leading cultural organizations in the country nowadays. It is a state repertory theatre, which manages three stages in the amazing ancient city of Plovdiv – European Capital of Culture 2019. A great number of the most prominent Bulgarian actors and directors have begun their careers at Plovdiv Drama Theatre. The theatre’s productions, creative team and actors, as well as its managerial team are recipients of numerous prestigious awards.

Name: Saltworks Theatre Company
Description:
Saltworks has been producing and performing social issue plays for K-12 school assemblies since 1981. The issues we address have varied greatly over the years but our current shows focus on things like bullying, internet safety, substance misuse, and mental as well as physical health & wellness.

Our team of adult actors travel to schools in Pittsburgh, PA and the surrounding region to perform our interactive, educational, and engaging plays for student audiences before leading them in a post show Q&A session.

Name: Compagnie Liria
Description: Le théâtre qui décloisonne le quotidien et ouvre des chemins différents

Name: Murmuration Arts
Description: We are passionate about widening opportunities for people to engage in the arts. Our creative process involves in-depth research with communities, focusing on building & maintaining relationships. Each project we work on aims to create a unique shared experience, connecting communities & giving people a voice & platform on which to tell their stories.

Name: Theater am Tatort
Description: Qualitativ hochstehendes Theater an ungewohnten Orten

Name: Oslo Community Theatre
Description: Oslo Community Theatre (formerly OADLES) is an English-speaking, volunteer theatre company in Oslo, Norway. It was founded in 2020 as a non-profit organization. OCT welcomes people of all experience levels to be a part of our organization and theatrical productions. Not only do we need actors, but we are also looking for volunteers to be producers, fundraisers, project managers, directors, designers, technicians, and so much more.

Name: Look Sharp Theatre
Description: Look Sharp Theatre is a nonprofit, Leeds-based theatre company specialising in new writing, comedy and farce.

Name: StageWorks Theatre Group
Description: Our organizations focus is the development of young artists through theatrical education and the cultivation of new works. We seek to develop a love for theatre in all who come through our doors. StageWorks is a new company, and we are always seeking new directors, music directors, choreographers, and theatre educators to join our team.

Name: Compagnie Faste et Furieuse
Description:
La Compagnie Faste et Furieuse est une compagnie de théâtre contemporain créée par Inès Chassagneux et implantée à Lyon. 

La Compagnie Faste et Furieuse est à l'image de son nom : double et nourrie de pop culture. Elle est double car sa générosité et sa douceur, ne l'empêchent pas de nourrir sa saine colère pour dénoncer les injustices et se révolter quand la situation l'exige. 

Si son nom est issu d'une célèbre série cinématographique, ce n'est pas un hasard. Elle mélange la pop culture et les références plus pointues pour donner naissance à un univers qui embarque tous.tes les spectateur.ices.

Name: King Street Productions
Description: King Street Productions brings to life the best that classical and contemporary theatrical works have to offer.  Our mission is to foster community and the love of art within the city of Gananoque, Ontario.

Name: SC Teatro
Description: Somos productora teatral y formadores de actores y actrices. Nuestro objetivo es visibilizar nuestros proyectos y que cada vez más personas transiten el mundo del teatro y la actuación.

Name: Académie des Arts Dramatiques de Chantilly
Description:
L’Académie est née de la volonté de proposer un nouveau lieu de formation et de création ou l’effervescence artistique guiderait nos pas. Une école à taille humaine, dans un écrin de verdure où se rencontrent artistes professionnels et jeunes comédiens en devenir. Ancrée dans la réalité du métier d’acteur, nous travaillons ensemble  avec le soucis permanent de faire émerger les talents, les accompagner et les guider tout au long de leur cursus.  
Ici  nous cultivons la rigueur et l’esprit de troupe, le dépassement de soi et la créativité.

Name: Bogotalento
Description:
Somos un colectivo teatral juvenil en la ciudad de Bogotá. Buscamos llevar el teatro a todos los rincones de la capital, fomentando el acceso y la participación de todos nuestros conciudadanos con las artes dramáticas. Gracias a nuestro equipo interdisciplinar contamos distintos enfoques, lo cual nos permite ofrecer experiencias e interpretaciones críticas y reflexivas. 

Bogotalento surge como iniciativa de un grupo de amigos apasionados por el teatro y la preocupación social.  Nuestro primer proyecto fue desarrollado en el marco de la convocatoria:"Jóvenes en Movimiento" del Ministerio de Cultura. En el cual ofrecimos un taller teatral a los jóvenes del IDIPRON.

Name: Kit's Interactive Theatre
Description: We blend passion for history with our love of theatre to present 16 dynamic, one-woman interactive performances. Each program incorporates elements of history, dance, improvisation, humor, and ongoing audience engagement. Virtual performances are now available. These programs are ideal for students in grades K–8, as well as for adult audiences.

Name: La Clique - compagnie d'impro et de théâtre
Description: Comédie de boulevard - Théâtre - Impro - Mise en scène - c'est la recette de la Clique !

Name: Compagnie Art Dedire
Description:
Au départ, un rêve d’écriture. Partager nos joies, nos révoltes, parler de ce monde aussi beau que chaotique. De morceaux d’expériences naît la nécessité dramaturgique, ce besoin de dire autrement le monde, rire de nos pathologies sociétales pour aller mieux.  

Notre action, par ce théâtre qui utilise l’humour au service de la résolution des enjeux humains psychologiques ou des situations pathogènes du quotidien, s’organise en trois pôles :

Spectacles : A travers le jeu des acteurs, à travers la catharsis, permettre à chacun de relativiser et l’aider à avancer. Nos spectacles se jouent dans des salles de spectacle comme en entreprises 

Ateliers, actions de formation : comprendre les enjeux pour transformer les situations qui nous rendent vulnérables en prenant appui sur les techniques théâtrales et les compétences psychosociales. Nos modules se déclinent sur 3 heures à 12heures et se réalisent en entreprises ou en milieu scolaire 

Lien social : au travers de scènes du quotidien reprendre la main sur ce qui nous échappe et développer connaissance de soi et des autres, confiance en soi et en autrui, favoriser l’échange et développer les relations interpersonnelles.

Name: Nové kurzy herectví
Description:
Nové kurzy herectví nabízí své programy pro široké spektrum zájemců od zvědavců, kteří by rádi jen přičichli k tomu, co to vůbec herectví je, přes notorické stydlivce a trémisty po extrovertní šoumeny, kteří by se rádi zdokonalili v improvizaci, až po uchazeče na hereckou školu, a také třeba osoby, které by si rády zahrály v nějakém divadelním kuse. Možno též požádat o individuální lekce.

Dále nabízíme kreativní a zábavné workshopy pro firmy a školy, na rozvoj hlasových, prezentačních a týmových dovedností.

Name: The Liminal Theatre Collective
Description:
The Liminal Theatre Collective (TLTC) is a New York City-based ensemble of multidisciplinary artists dedicated to developing and producing new and reimagined works by artists of color. We explore the spaces between tradition and change, pushing the boundaries of what theatre can be and do.

At TLTC, we believe theatre should be a shared journey—one that nurtures emerging voices, challenges expectations, and fosters meaningful dialogue. Our programs include:

 The Ivy Initiative – A flagship education program offering fully subsidized conservatory-level training, mentorship, and professional industry exposure for rising high school juniors and seniors.
 Liminal Labs – A developmental workshop series supporting creators of color in bringing new works to the stage.
 The First Draft Series – A space where new plays are workshopped and refined through collaboration between writers, directors, and actors.
 The Portal Sessions – Bi-monthly community gatherings for artistic exchange, open mics, and collective growth.

We are cultivating a dynamic space where boundaries blur, stories evolve, and communities transform. If you’re passionate about the future of theatre, join us in shaping it.

Name: Ink and Stage
Description:
We are an umbrella for a group of creatives with the brightest minds who have come together to redefine storytelling on stage. Bound by a passion for theatre, we are on a mission to tell the tales of life―the good, the bad, and everything in between ― through the most powerful medium of all time―the theatre.

Our mission is to recreate, reflect, and reveal life as it is on the stage. We hold up this mirror to make you think and ask questions. We are not just mirror-holders. We wield a hammer (the theatre) to shape the world. We craft stories that catalyze transformation and leave audiences grappling with truths and ready to take action.

Name: The Greenhouse Ensemble
Description: OUR MISSION at the Greenhouse Ensemble is to create an environment that nurtures deep-rooted engagement within our growing community. We cultivate audacity, weed self-doubt and bring light to creative impulses, pushing our Ensemble beyond their own expectations. Our multidisciplinary events compel and challenge audiences by immersing them in an atmosphere composed of diverse works of art.

Name: Toegeslagen
Description: De toeslagen affaire heeft diepe sporen nagelaten in de levens van vele gezinnen, met name de jongeren die ongewild betrokken raakten bij deze kwestie. Ons doel is om met deze theatervoorstelling niet alleen bewustwording te creëren, maar ook een platform te bieden waarop deze jongeren hun stem kunnen laten horen. Door middel van zang, dans en toneel willen we hen in hun kracht zetten en de mogelijkheid geven om hun talenten te delen met een breed publiek.

Name: The Fabrication Lab
Description:
We are a startup studio specializing in designing unique props, on stage visual effects (Projections, A/V, Video) and custom commissions that will help put the finishing touches on your production. From SpongeBob to The Who’s Tommy, Disney’s Beauty and the Beast to Rent and every show in-between. 

We use the most current technologies like multi-material 3D printing and classic techniques that have been used in Hollywood for decades. 

Our team includes Emmy winning artists, FX Supervisors from your favorite network and streaming shows, and graphic designers that have designed product packaging for Disney, Hasbro, and Estée Lauder.

We are a passionate team of designers, makers and developers who believe in the power of creativity and that every theater deservers to bring their vision to life. We believe that creativity is the key to success, and we are committed to helping our clients unleash their full potential. We help future proof theater, so you don't have to.

Name: Asociación Teatral Mutis Por El Foro
Hemel Hempstead Theatre Company
Description:
HHTheatreCo is a group of local enthusiasts, with a wide range of skills, united by a love of theatre, at the Boxmoor Playhouse.



Each year we stage a variety of productions including musicals, plays and pantomimes. 



We also hold social events such as quiz nights, creative workshops and cabaret evenings.

 

We enjoy regular club nights every week, during which our bar is open and everyone can get together for activities or a chat whether they are involved in rehearsals or not.

Name: N/a
Description: N/A

Name: Freddo Children's Theatre
Description: Freddo Children’s Theatre Company (FCT) was formed in 2022 with the intent to bring American style theatre for young audiences to families residing in Singapore. We strive to bring joy to our audiences and inspire children while creating a safe and respectful work environment for our cast and crew. FCT believes people of all genders, races, and body types should be represented on stage with a focus on supporting young and upcoming artists in the local industry.

Name: The District Theatre
Description:
Located in the arts and theater district of downtown Indianapolis, The District Theatre bridges the gap between audiences and artists, community and storytellers. We are known for premier plays that reflect the many facets of our community, musical theatre, and innovative productions. The District Theatre has won many awards in the Indianapolis theater community and features three unique spaces: the large Indianapolis Foundation MainStage, the cabaret-style Brian Payne Theatre, and the Frank & Katrina Gallery for visual art exhibitions and interdisciplinary programming. 

In partnership with Central Indiana Community Foundation (CICF) and the Mass Ave Cultural Arts District, we are committed to preserving the facilities and LGBTQIA+ cultural heritage of the Mass Ave site, while providing the best venue for live performances and artistic expression on Mass Ave. The newly created Indianapolis Black Theatre Company is the "theatre company in residence."

Name: Scylla's Bite
Description: Edinburgh based theatre company for women and non-binary people.

Name: Tigerslane Studios (Murder Trial Tonight)
Description: Theatre production - Murder Trial Tonight.

Name: Pasquerilla East Musical Company
Description:
In 1997, a group of students in Pasquerilla East Hall set out to put on a musical, reintroducing something that had been missing from life at Notre Dame for more than 10 years. 

Today, PEMCo is the leading producer of musical theatre at the University of Notre Dame, presenting at least two musicals and a revue to the community every year. PEMCo welcomes students of all majors and backgrounds within the Tri-Campus Community of Notre Dame, Holy Cross College, and Saint Mary's College.

We are one of the largest student groups on campus, with students serving as producers, directors, designers, choreographers, actors, instrumentalists and so much more. All of these roles are necessary to put on the large-scale, high-quality musicals that PEMCo proudly presents each season.

Name: TRT - Théâtre des Rêves Têtus
Description:
Le Théâtre des Rêves Têtus voit le jour il y a une vingtaine d'année à
Salzbourg, en Autriche. Nicolas Marchand et Thomas Hupfer imaginent alors leur compagnie comme un laboratoire continu, un espace d'expérimentation et de production à partager avec d'autres artistes. 

Dès sa première création en 2002, le TRT affiche ce qui deviendra par la suite sa marque de fabrique : la curiosité, l'envie et la liberté dans l'emploi des multiples moyens théâtraux existants afin d'élaborer une forme propre et singulière à chacun de ses spectacles.

Les membres de la compagnie sont parallèlement actifs dans d'autres
contextes artistiques et apportent sans cesse de nouvelles impulsions au travail commun. Plus de soixante artistes issus de presque toutes les disciplines et tous les domaines des arts de la scène ont travaillé aux productions des Rêves Têtus.

Entre 2002 et 2009 le TRT signe huit spectacles. Il est soutenu notamment par la ville et la région de Salzbourg, la ville de Francfort-sur-le-Main, ainsi que par le Ministère fédéral autrichien de l'Enseignement, de l'Art et de la Culture. Primées plusieurs fois par ce dernier, ses productions sont jouées, entre autres, à Salzbourg, Potsdam, Saint-Gall et Francfort-sur-le-Main. 

En 2009, le groupe se dissout temporairement lorsque Nicolas Marchand
s'installe en France, il est refondé à Metz fin 2020.

Name: Salt Circle Productions
Description:
Salt Circle Productions is predominately a theatre company which creates new-writing and fringe theatre. Built on their love of chaos, tragedy and comedy you can find Salt Circle Productions selling their debut show and delving into the farce of everyday life.

We were created over the lockdown of 2020 as two students in London with a love of bizarre comedy and theatre. As a company we try to put the focus on marginalised stories, especially relating with our differing experiences as a queer and gender queer person and as a woman respectively. We draw on our collective experience of isolation, mental health and exclusion to present stories with fully rounded characters that do not patronise nor tokenise these experiences. Moreover, we aim to create “utopias” where people can celebrate their difference without being reduced to their struggles. We believe that whilst productions that focus on obstacles to marginalised groups are important, powerful and needed, by only showing this aspect in mainstream theatre we are reducing people into caricatures of their struggles.

Name: Freies Theater Wiesbaden
Description:
Freies Theater Wiesbaden 
Theater-Ensemble

Name: Les Presque
Description: Les Presque est un collectif d'improvisateur.rices expérimenté.e.s "tout-terrain", né sous le soleil de Marseille.

Name: Compagnie de l'Oiseau Jaune
Description:
Compagnie de théâtre gestuel et textuel.
En tournée avec le spectacle "Les Oiseaux de Passage" créé en 2021.
En création de son prochain spectacle "Les Enfants de Désordre".

Name: Lens Theatermakers
Description: Stichting LENS Theatermakers - Spelend leren voor iedereen!

Name: Home Cinema Co.
Description:
Unravel the magic of music at your home!
 
Presenting All-ranger Premium Audio Products!

GLOW. GRIP. GROOVE.

Name: Corezon
Description:
Corezon is an independent theatre and audiovisual arts company based in New York City dedicated to produce new and relevant work of Latin American and Spanish theater to broader audiences. The company presents plays essential to help expand the values of the Hispanic perspective in the US.

Corezon believes in he power of audiovisual and performing arts to achieve entertainment and catharsis; as well as a tool to achieve justice and peace through denunciation. 

Corezon also seeks to make a contribution in the cultural education of the citizens, especially in the Hispanic community.

Name: ARTTOSHOCK
Description:
Kleinschalig theatergezelschap voor musical en (muziek)theater in Amsterdam. We brengen (on)bekende titels en eigen werk van SHOCKEREND goede kwaliteit! 

Blijf op de hoogte van de laatste ontwikkelingen en theaterplannen

Name: bazmek entertainment
Description:
bazmek entertainment je nezávislé umělecké uskupení, které se věnuje profesionální divadelní tvorbě v Brně.

Nově se rozšiřujeme o bazmek kitchen - celoroční divadelní dílny pro dospělé, divadelní kuchyni - celoroční divadelní dílny pro seniory/ky a bazmek skills - divadelní workshopy pro všechny, kdo se chtějí zlepšovat nejen ve svém vystupování před lidmi.

Inspirací jsou nám romány, mytologie, reportážní knihy, životy neznámých celebrit, učebnice... V našem repertoáru se tahle různorodost odráží také v hledání výzev, a proto se u nás setkáte s novou činohrou, plenérovými performancemi i audiowalkem. Každý projekt začínáme s čerstvým pohledem, abychom při tvorbě mohli zažívat překvapení, a věříme, že tak můžeme přinést vždy jiný zážitek i divákům. 

Snažíme se totiž ukázat, že nezávislé divadlo je hravé i promyšlené, milé i mrazivé, že je výzvou i zábavou - a že i s omezenými prostředky je možné tvořit chytře, úsporně a pestře zároveň. Naším cílem je zkrátka diváky vtáhnout, chytit a nepustit!

Name: GREEN BAY COMMUNITY THEATER
Description: GREEN BAY COMMUNITY THEATER is a 501(c)(3) theater company based out of Green Bay, WI. 122 N. Chestnut Ave, 54303. Mailing Address: 122 N. Chestnut Ave PO BOX 2333, GREEN BAY, Wisconsin, United States, 54306.

Name: Concert Curieus
Description:
Concert Curieus maakt muziek-en dansvoorstellingen voor jonge kinderen (0-6 jaar) en hun opa, oma, ouder of verzorger. Iedere voorstelling is anders, omdat de samenstelling van het gezelschap wisselt en de spelers volop improviseren. 

Concert Curieus is een internationaal gezelschap en dat hoor je ook terug in de muzikale reis die wordt gemaakt tijdens een voorstelling. Bonus: kinderen hoeven niet stil te zitten, maar mogen juist meedoen. En de ouders? Die mogen ook een dansje komen wagen. 

Naast de voorstellingen voor het jonge publiek, zoekt Concert Curieus actief andere professionals in de podiumkunsten op om samen ‘instant composition’, het maken van voorstellingen in het moment, te onderzoeken. Dit doet het gezelschap door maandelijkse open training sessies te houden voor nieuwsgierige professionals. Meedoen? Neem contact met ons op.

Name: Vanderbilt Chinese Drama Club
Description: Vanderbilt Chinese Drama Club (VUCD)

Name: La Fille Du Laitier
Description:
Un jour, nous avons eu cette idée folle, forte et folklorique de faire du théâtre dans un camion. Pour se rapprocher, pour se rendre, se surprendre, pour suspendre un moment la routine du passant, pour apprivoiser, pour démystifier, pour exciter la fibre de la curiosité.
Et depuis, nos créations voyagent partout, dans la rue comme en salle, ici comme ailleurs, toujours portées par le même désir de rencontre.

La Fille Du Laitier est une compagnie de théâtre qui rend l’art vivant accessible à tous, en mariant créativité et innovation.

Que ce soit à bord de son camion de livraison-théâtre, une véritable salle ambulante, ou dans des lieux plus traditionnels, chaque représentation est pensée pour aller à la rencontre du public. À travers un théâtre de proximité, la compagnie cherche à démocratiser l’art vivant et à provoquer des échanges inattendus avec les citoyen·ne·s. Sa démarche artistique s’ancre dans un théâtre de création revendiquant le droit à la folie et à la liberté de l’imaginaire.
Elle souhaite être une porte d’entrée à l’art vivant dans le quotidien des citoyen·ne·s; une étincelle qui cultive un goût pour le théâtre.

Name: Latter Event
Description: A Scandinavian based theater company who runs shows, workshops and theater courses across Europe. We work with festivals, schools, private companies. We cater our entertainment services to the wishes and needs of our customers to make sure the audience leaves our experiences with a smile!

Name: Afra Tafri Creations
Description:
Afra Tafri Creations zet zich in voor het delen van nieuwe verhalen in nieuwe kunstvormen. De stichting streeft ernaar om ruimte te creëren voor artistieke expressie die de sociale, culturele en politieke landschappen onderzoekt en uitdaagt. 

De drijvende kracht achter Afra Tafri is Abishek Thapar uit Moga, India. Abishek is al een aantal jaar werkzaam in Amsterdam en combineert theater en sociale kunst rond postkoloniale epistemologieën. Hij werkt samen met niet professionele acteurs en creëert intieme portretten in immersieve omgevingen en participatieve formats. Zijn werken hebben een sociale en politieke dimensie met een documentatieve benadering. Hij laat artistieke voetstappen achter in meer dan 15 landen over de hele wereld.

Name: Phoenix Rising Productions
Description: From the ashes of companies that mistreated artists, who didn't pay their performers when promised, and who eventually closed their doors; comes Phoenix Rising Productions. Our mission is to highlight the rich Midwestern culture and artistry by supporting local playwrights and underrepresented groups.

Name: COECH Producciones
Description: Somos una empresa enfocada en la creación de eventos artísticos y culturales. Fusionamos los conocimientos y experiencias de profesionales en distintas disciplinas artísticas con el fin de generar proyectos innovadores y con un enfoque de enriquecimiento social / cultural.

Name: Compagnie épicène
Description:
Co-fondée en 2022 par Julia Seimandi et Jérémy Koffi,  la Compagnie épicène défend un théâtre engagé et inclusif.

Au travers de créations théâtrales et d’ateliers de sensibilisation, nous souhaitons provoquer, déstabiliser et faire réfléchir sur des sujets sociétaux liés aux stéréotypes de genre, à l’égalité filles/garçons et aux violences sexistes et sexuelles (VSS).

Name: Tres Brujas Productions
Description:
We are a micro film and theater production company based in New York City. Partners in life and in arts facilitation, Katie and Monica have collaborated with folks in Baltimore, New York and San Juan.

Our Mission: 
We support content creators of all paths and believe in creating spaces that elevate and grow diverse voices. In addition to our original content we are here to bring to life other works, you are the third bruja. 
Our Vision:
We operate with a sense of hospitality, we see the work as the creation of a gift, worthy of warmth and an abundance mindset. We believe there is a mic ready for all. 

https://fundraising.fracturedatlas.org/tres-brujas-productions

Name: Embassy Theater
Description:
Ο ιστορικός κινηματογράφος επαναλειτουργεί ως ένας σύγχρονος χώρος πολιτισμού.
 22/12: Ο Τσάρλι και το Εργοστάσιο Σοκολάτας

Name: Studio Theatre, Salisbury
Description:
Studio Theatre is now seventy years old and was situated in various premises in Salisbury before coming to roost in our purpose-built 92-seater theatre in Ashley Road. We have charitable status (Charity No. 253957).
We are a member of the prestigious Little Theatre Guild of Great Britain of which Sir Ian McKellen and Sir Kenneth Branagh were recent Presidents, and which exacts a high standard of performance from its members as well as requiring them to own their own premises.

Musical star, Rosemary Squires, is our President – one of a number of prestigious names associated with Studio Theatre, including William Golding who, in 1954, directed The Alcestis of Euripides, and the actor, Brian Protheroe, who trod our boards before becoming a professional actor. Two of the late Sir Terry Pratchett’s novels were staged as plays at Studio – one of which as a new adaptation – and he attended both on the first night of each.
Since 2017, we have entered plays in two local One-Act Festivals (Codford and Totton), and received awards on every occasion – for Best Overall Production, Best Actress, Best Director, Best Runner-Up and Best Supporting Performer, some of them a few times over, as well as many Honourable Mentions.
We welcome new members who are interested in acting, directing or just supporting , and would also be delighted to welcome anyone keen on constructing sets, helping run the bar and front-of-house, assisting with costumes or working backstage. Please head to the Membership Page of our website if you are interested.

Name: Caravan Productions
Description:
At the Caravan, we believe that everyone should be able to express themselves freely without fear or judgement.

 Our mission is to create welcoming environments where everyone has permission to explore themselves, play, and connect.

 By doing so, we aim to create a more accepting, compassionate, and fun world.

Name: Les Bêtes de Seine
Description:
Les Bêtes de Seine est une troupe de théâtre amateur créée en 2010. 
Nous sommes 11 passionnés qui partageons notre amour du théâtre tous les ans au Théâtre de la Bellefeuille à Boulogne Billancourt.

Name: Omen Star
Description: Omen Star are creators of high immersion, high agency story tellig events. Based out of North London, they run live events all over the world while also supporting community events in the UK.

Name: Instant Theatre Company
Description: Since 1994 Instant Theatre has produced improvisational theatre performances and trained generations of improvisors through the education programs it has offered or sponsored in the community. Its legacy has long been established through the exceptional shows, festivals, and improvisors it has produced in that time, which have become part of the fabric of the Vancouver improv community. After a pandemic hiatus Instant Theatre is returning to the stages and studios of the city to continue that legacy, with a new look and new team behind it.

Name: THEATRE A LA MINUTE
Description: A LA MINUTE réinvente l’expérience théâtrale en proposant un format innovant de pièces courtes d’une durée de 15 minutes. Inspiré d'un concept couronné de succès en Espagne, ce lieu unique se distingue par sa proximité avec le public, son ambiance conviviale et sa volonté de soutenir les jeunes talents. Il offre ainsi une expérience immersive, dynamique et accessible à tous, tout en favorisant l’expérimentation artistique.

Name: M & M Theatrical Productions Ltd
Description:
M&M Theatrical Productions | The UK’s Largest Touring Theatre-in-Education Provider 

For over 25 years, M&M Theatrical Productions has been the UK’s leading provider of Theatre in Education, specializing in Classic Literature Adaptations and Pantomime Productions for Primary and SEN Schools, as well as family audiences.

What We Offer:
 Classic Literature Adaptations – Bringing beloved stories to life, designed to enrich the curriculum with immersive, engaging performances.
 Pantomimes for Schools & Venues – A magical mix of tradition and modern storytelling, perfect for festive seasons and year-end entertainment.
 Cinematic Theatre in Education – A groundbreaking Covid-safe, fully immersive theatre experience combining live performance with cinematic technology.
 Corporate & Family Event Productions – Unforgettable live entertainment tailored for schools, businesses, community centres, and family-friendly venues.

 Touring Across the UK Year-Round! 
We alternate Classic Literature Adaptations in the first half of the year and Pantomimes in the second, ensuring year-round access to high-quality theatre.

 Enquiries & bookings: enquiries@mamproductions.co.uk

Name: Chameleon Theatre North
Description: Chameleon Theatre North is a theatre company that performs shows in English at education centres in the north of Spain. We Work in The Basque Country, Navarra, Cantabria, La Rioja and The province of Burgos. Our company is a franchise of Chameleon Theatre.

Name: Pikscher Perfect Scenery
Description: Founded in 2008, Pikscher Perfect Scenery has grown from Jason Pikscher’s storefront builds in Chicago to a full-service scenic and production company. We craft sets, exhibits, and wayfinding with creativity, craftsmanship, and a collaborative approach.

Name: The Hopeful Theatre Project
Description:
The Hopeful Theatre project began as a dream in the fall of 2018. We opened our first musical revue, "Two Acts of Love", February 16, 2019 to benefit The Ronald McDonald House Charities. We were so amazed by the amount of support that we had to continue making this dream a reality.

The Hopeful Theatre Project is a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization founded in the state of Texas founded on April 11, 2019.

We are different from any other non-profit theatres in Texas - each show we produce we do with one goal in mind: to raise funds for a local charity or a local chapter of a national charity.

Since our founding, The Hopeful Theatre Project has been able to raise over $40,000 for our beneficiaries, which include Ronald McDonald House Charities of Fort Worth, Make-A-Wish Foundation of North Texas, The Salvation Army, The Actors Fund, The American Red Cross, Operation Christmas Child, Wildlife Conservation Network, Save the Music Foundation, National Alliance on Mental Illness, and Anthem Strong Families.

As a company, we are looking forward to expanding on big dreams and making a difference in the community we love!

Name: WIRWAR Producties
Description: WIRWAR Productions is a circus theatre company based in Haarlem, North Holland, Netherlands.

Name: Yun Theatre
Description:
Found in 2022, Yun Theatre's mission is to build a community of Mandarin - English contemporary radical theatre creatives that challenge traditions and contribute to civic and global dialogues. 

Our first work, Monologues of n Women, is a new work devised from the experiences of Chinese women in modern-day society. Over the course of 6 months, we gathered Chinese creatives from London, New York, Portland, Columbus, and Seattle, collected interviews from over 40 women, and pieced together all our voices to create a memorable, sold-out show.

Name: TRIBO de PALCO
Description: A Associação TRIBO de PALCO tem como objetivo desenvolver projetos artísticos com a Comunidade Jovem, através de um espaço de liberdade de expressão artística, de reflexão e de criação.

Name: An Opera Theatre (AOT)
Description:
At AOT, we're more than just an opera company – we're a cultural movement committed to breaking down the barriers of classical art forms and uniting communities through the power of the performing arts. 

Based in the vibrant Twin Cities, our mission is clear: to produce socially-
relevant works that resonate with our diverse audiences and create a space for meaningful conversations.

Our passion extends beyond opera, as we believe in the transformative magic of fusing multiple art forms to craft tantalizing theater events. AOT is a platform that champions working artists in Minnesota, providing opportunities for them to thrive and showcasing their remarkable talents.

Join us in redefining the boundaries of art and culture, where every performance, every collaboration, and every audience member's experience contributes to the vibrant tapestry of our artistic community. Together, we're creating a world where the arts are a unifying force,
inspiring change, and sparking dialogue.

Name: Cellunova Productions
Description: Founded in 2023 by first generation immigrant artists, Cellunova is a New York based interdisciplinary production company aiming to create experiences that expand the boundaries of theatre. Our mission is to create interdisciplinary theatre that tackles social challenges prevalent at the very moment you're reading this mission statement, and beyond.

Name: BRUIS theater
Description: Interactieve en educatieve theatervoorstellingen voor ouders, kinderen en docenten.

Name: Broke People Play Festival
Description: Broke People was founded to create space for new work! Since then, we've grown into a home for all theatre artists: playwrights, directors, actors, and techs. We focus on creating a safe environment within New York University for students to experiment and try new things, learn the beauty of collaboration, and enjoy the process of making a play.

Name: dramental.com
Description: dramental.com is a website to help people to improve their life in better way. so, let's start to be something that you desired.

Name: Stage Door Theatre
Description:
Founded by the Dunwoody Woman’s Club, Stage Door Theatre is a professional-quality theater with world-class artists in front of and behind the curtain. With each season, our mission is to bring the most challenging, engaging, and compelling performances.

We also seek to educate the future of our community through children’s theatre and camps. Offerings taught by our team of theatre professionals and educators include acting, musical theatre, film, costuming, set design, performance opportunities, and so much more!

Name: Kathakaar Productions
Description: Kathakaar is a Theatrical Production house majorly working on the art of storytelling. Our work in the world of storytelling is not limited to entertainment but also to the education sector as well.

Name: Wolfsmouth Players Company
Description: The Wolfsmouth Players Company synthesizes, develops, and produces original theatrical works with a focus on political and socially responsible art.

Name: Utopia Unlimited
Description:
Welcome to Utopia Unlimited

We are a new, local non for profit youth theatre group called Utopia Unlimited and we will be specialising in producing, rehearsing and performing shows, Mainly Gilbert and Sullivan in a short time frame. We have a track record of this as all our staff have worked in youth theatre working with different groups for a long time. We are based in the High Peak and Derbyshire Dales

We run monthly socials with our young people where we will be running a singing group for 2 hours followed by a social where the young people can watch a Gilbert and Sullivan show and learn more about opera and musical theatre. We also plan to do trips to watch professional performances and run workshops with professionals to inspire the next generation of performers. We recently went to watch Opera Norths production of ‘Ruddigore’

We are a member led organisation. This means we run what our young people want. We provide this in a safe environment where young people can thrive. Many of our members are Neurodiverse, or members of the LGBTQ community. We welcome people from all backgrounds. We aim to be fully inclusive so everyone feels welcomed. As well as being experienced, all our staff have full DBS checks and there will be registered chaperones on site at all times.

Name: Divadlo Bolka Polívky
Description: Divadlo, kde se cítíte jako doma.

Name: La Candela - Teatro y Comunidad
Description:
La Candela Teatro y Comunidad está compuesta por un equipo transdisciplinar del ámbito educativo y las artes escénicas. Centra su trabajo principalmente en la intervención a través del teatro como una herramienta educativa y transformadora que fomenta la conciencia crítica y responsable en la sociedad. 

Realiza múltiples actividades con todo tipo de colectivos y organizaciones: proyectos de teatro social participativo, formación en teatro foro, dinamización comunitaria, mediación y facilitación de procesos grupales, dirección y producción de obras de teatro foro y teatro comunitario.

Además tiene una estrecha colaboración con entidades sociales y educativas como: institutos de educación secundaria, universidades, ONGs, fundaciones y administraciones públicas.

La Candela Teatro y Comunidad apuesta por la transformación social y personal a través del teatro.

Name: Blackboard Plays
Description:
Since 2008, Blackboard Plays has been devoted to Black Playwrights throughout the African Diaspora.  Blackboard Reading Series was incubated @ nancy manocherian’s the cell in Chelsea’s Manhattan as a resident series for 10 years, before making their new physical home pre-pandemic in The Mary Rodgers Room at The Dramatists Guild in 2018.  Over the last 15 years, they have given first readings to Black playwrights including Jocelyn Bioh, Aurin Squire and Tony nominated Jordan E. Cooper.
Feature Readings and Community Nights are two ways that Blackboard supports the development of new work by Black Playwrights.  Since 2020, Blackboard has been in partnership with the Parent Artist Advocacy League (PAAL) to produce the Black Motherhood and Parenting New Play Festival, supporting the work of Black artists with Families and their stories.  Blackboard was founded by Garlia Cornelia Jones. www.blackboardplays.com

Name: Schouwburg Middelburg
Description:
A wide variety of performances can be seen at the theatre throughout the season, but more is possible. For instance, we can provide a professional stage for amateur companies and schools. The theatre is also suitable for hosting a wide variety of events such as:

- Company presentations
- Company parties
- Symposia
- Congresses
- Receptions
- And more!

The theatre auditorium (530 seats) is particularly suitable for presentations and conferences. For smaller groups, the accommodation offers rooms for meetings, presentations and dinners. The downstairs and upstairs foyers are ideal for trade fair presentations, symposia, parties, dinners and receptions. Combined with the theatre hall, this is a perfect combination for your corporate events.

The accommodation is centrally located and equipped with state-of-the-art theatre facilities and good catering organisation. In addition, we have a box office reservation system that makes it easy to arrange any ticket sales.

Name: teatroàfaca
Description:
O teatroàfaca é a companhia de teatro fundada por Afonso Molinar e Filipa Correia em 2018. Tem como princípio fundamental a vontade de promover e dinamizar a nova dramaturgia lusófona através de abordagens pluridisciplinares alternativas às formas clássicas do teatro, explorando diferentes linguagens cénicas e experimentando formatos narrativos inovadores, sempre com o intuito de disseminar, descentralizar e democratizar o acesso à cultura.

CONTACTO: geral@teatroafaca.com

Name: La Mansarda Teatro dell'Orco
Description:
La Mansarda Teatro dell'Orco è una Compagnia di Ricerca Teatrale.
Nasce nel 1992, e si pone come interlocutore privilegiato l'infanzia.
Nel corso degli anni estende il suo interesse allo studio del rapporto tra Pubblico ed Evento Teatrale, ponendo al centro della sua ricerca la relazione "attore- spettatore", ispirandosi alle correnti di ri-teatralizzazione d'inizio Novecento, ed in particolare a figure quali Meyercol'd , Copeau e Bragaglia.
Da qui l' interesse per il Teatro Popolare e lo studio della teatralità nelle forme sceniche del passato che affondano le proprie radici nell’incontro con il rito e la festa, quali il Teatro Classico, le Sacre Rappresentazioni Medioevali, il Teatro Elisabettiano e la Commedia dell' Arte, affrontati come punto di partenza per una ricerca continua e mai compiuta che si fonda sull'esigenza di condividere con il pubblico la rappresentazione, in un rapporto necessario che si realizza nel dialogo fra chi agisce e chi è partecipe.

Name: COMPAGNIE DES INDISCRETS
Description: COMPAGNIE DES INDISCRETS is a performing arts company based out of 6 CLOS DE LA BECHADE, Limoges, Nouvelleaquitaine, France.

Name: Greizer Theaterherbst e.V.
Description: Der Verein Greizer Theaterherbst e.V. ist das offizielle und rechtliche Fundament für den Greizer Theaterherbst und das Greizer JazzWerk. Der gemeinnützige Verein wurde 1991 gegründet. Er hat rund 50 Mitglieder, darunter Spielwütige, die vom Theater nicht genug bekommen können, Musiker, die beim JazzWerk in Aktion treten, und jede Menge Helfer und Unterstützer, die im Vorder- oder Hintergrund für ein Gelingen der Festivals und aller weiteren Vereinsveranstaltungen sorgen. Leitendes Gremium des Vereins ist der fünfköpfige Vorstand. Neben der laut Satzung jährlich einmal zu organisierenden Mitgliederversammlung kommen die Mitglieder bei verschiedenen Mitgliedertreffen zusammen.

Name: Working Theater
Description: Since 1985, we have been creating theater for, about, and with working people. Our innovations in accessibility have made us a trailblazer in the American theater. As the first company in New York City to introduce sliding scale tickets, we ensure that exceptional theater remains within reach for all. Beyond this, our active commissioning pipeline (Five Boroughs/One City Initiative), grassroots audience engagement programs, and pioneering arts-in-education initiatives (TheaterWorks!) underscore our dedication to accessible and affordable theater, which is relevant to the diverse experiences of working people throughout New York City and beyond. Working Theater believes the transformative experience of live theater should not be a privilege or a luxury, but a staple of every working person’s life.

Name: La Opción Producciones
Description:
Nuestra empresa, La Opción Producciones, se define como una productora de eventos, espectáculos en vivo y proyectos audiovisuales, con una rama también muy importante basada en la formación.

Nuestro lema “Hacer sentir al espectador” se basa en llevar a cabo todo tipo de espectáculos en los que involucrar a cada uno de los presentes a través de técnicas inmersivas en las que el público se siente parte de la obra desde el minuto 0.

En el terreno audiovisual, abrimos la visión a todo tipo de género artístico donde la producción traspase la pantalla.

Somos socios y colaboradores principales de COGAM. El colectivo LGTBI+ de Madrid.

Name: JÁ International Theatre
Description:
Já is an artistic association founded in Lisbon in July 2017, by Dan Cotterall, Tania Kumeda, Margarida Rocha and Suresh Nampuri, to perform innovative English language theatre.

We aim to tell stories for the here and now – in English – in Lisbon, in the cultural cradle of Europe.

Apart from our mainstage productions, staged readings and workshops, we are involved in experiments with other dedicated professionals from around the globe who enjoy pushing the boundaries of the theatrical medium. This is our Já Universe. Hopefully, these creative explorations will plant the seed for ground-breaking new productions in the future.

Name: Timaginas Teatro
Description: Compañía de teatro y academia de artes escénicas
Location: SANTA CRUZ DE TENERIFE, Santa Cruz De Tenerife

Name: Musicalvereniging BOeMS
Description:
BOeMS (Brabantse Operette en Musical Spelers) is een musicalvereniging voor en door leden, opgericht op 2 mei 1973. Verbinding en saamhorigheid bij de leden en het artistieke team staan bij ons centraal. Daarnaast streven we jaarlijks naar een productie van stijgend niveau, wat duidelijk zichtbaar is in onze gezellige repetities met het professionele artistieke team en bij onze voorstellingen.

Wij presenteerden in de afgelopen jaren o.a. Shrek, Big Fish, The Addams Family en onze meest recente productie Made in Dagenham, en komend jaar brengen wij als nieuwe productie All Shook Up! 

Naast producties geven we ook extra optredens, zoals bijvoorbeeld volledig verzorgde en een op maat gemaakte Sintshows.

Name: Company OnStage
Description:
The Company OnStage serves the Greater Houston Community by offering professional quality performances of contemporary and classic theater for children and adults in an intimate setting at affordable prices. Since our founding in 1978, COS has had the following organizational purposes and goals:
-To provide the community with quality theatrical productions at an affordable price.
-To encourage participation in theater by the community.
-To increase awareness and appreciation of the theatrical arts.
-To provide citizens of all ages and backgrounds with an opportunity to develop theatrical talents by participation in acting and other technical aspects of theater.

The Company OnStage operates solely through the efforts of volunteers under the guidance of its Board of Directors. Our production season includes 5-7 Evening Series Productions, 5-7 Young Audience Series Productions, and 1-2 Local Authors Series to showcase Houston playwrights. Auditions occur 6 times a year and are always open to all members of the public regardless of experience.  To learn more, please visit our website.

Name: Aurora : The Theatrical Club
Description: Aurora-the Theatrical club of Siddaganga Institute of Technology, Tumkur, Karnataka. We perform Street Plays, Skit and Mime in the three languages Hindi, English and Kannada. We are not just a group..we are a family. We laugh together we cry together, we dance together we play together, we eat together and we'll be there for each other, always!

Name: Pop Up Teatro Café
Description: A cultural space that combines the rustic and bohemian atmosphere of a coffee bar with theater and live music shows.

Name: Needs More Work Productions
Description:
Spicy, bold, colorful. Theater for a better tomorrow.
Immersive, site-specific shows in NYC.
Anti-Gone, Summer 2024.
Founded by Sivan Raz.

Name: WM CIA TEATRAL
Description:
Cia. WM Teatro – Espetáculos Educativos
Educação que emociona, transforma e conecta

A Cia. WM Teatro oferece espetáculos pedagógicos voltados para escolas, com foco em temas essenciais da Base Nacional Comum Curricular (BNCC). Nossas montagens abordam questões como:

 Inteligência emocional e empatia

 Prevenção ao bullying e respeito às diferenças

 Sustentabilidade e cidadania

 Leitura, protagonismo juvenil e cultura brasileira

Por que escolher nossos espetáculos?
 Alinhamento com a BNCC: cada peça é pensada para desenvolver competências socioemocionais e cognitivas previstas na base curricular.

 Facilidade logística: levamos o teatro até sua escola, com estrutura adaptável a diferentes espaços.

 Contato direto e rápido: solicite proposta, datas e valores via WhatsApp.

Name: JdH Theaterproducties
Description: Stichting John de Heij Theaterproducties maakt hoogwaardige theaterproducties met amateurs en professionals, waarmee we het culturele klimaat in de regio voor jongeren en volwassenen verbeteren en niet voorbij gaan aan de waarde van cultuur-educatie en innovatieve maatschappelijke ontwikkelingen.

Name: The Boise Bard Players
Description:
Who Are We?
The Boise Bard Players is a mobile, minimalist nonprofit theatre company based in Boise, Idaho, that focuses primarily on Shakespeare’s plays. Our mission is to 

The common conception is that Shakespeare is only for the educated. We challenge this notion with every play, taking our productions into unconventional venues like breweries, historical locations, and retirement communities.

We produce minimalistic performances of classical plays, breaking the traditional expectations of the text by understanding each play on its own terms. Our job is to understand the script well enough that you don't have to understand every word to understand the play.

Name: FREILUFT.theater
Description: FREILUFT.theater die mobile Freilichtbühne

Name: OperY, Stichting voor opera en muziektheater
Description:
Stichting OperY is een stichting die zich inzet voor het maken van opera en klassieke-muziektheater, dáár waar mensen niet zo snel met opera in contact komen. Daarom richten we ons op uitvoeringen op locaties in kleine plaatsen, in de natuur en in bijzondere kerkjes, landhuizen en andere monumentale plekken.

In 2024 draaien we de première van AREND. Een vogelspottersopera over liefde, landschap en een heel klein vogeltje.

Name: Theater de Leeuw
Description: Theater de Leeuw is een sfeervol theater in Arnhem dat een podium biedt aan aanstormend theatertalent: studenten van theaterscholen, startende theatermakers, young professionals in de theaterwereld, theater- en muziekgezelschappen en andere vrije podiumkunstenaars.

Name: THE Theatrewalas
Description:
THE Theatrewalas’ is a multi-lingual, multi-dimensional theatre group 
that experiments with different forms of theatre to bring superior 
theatre to enthusiasts in Chennai. 

The roots of 𝗧𝗛𝗘 𝗧𝗵𝗲𝗮𝘁𝗿𝗲𝘄𝗮𝗹𝗮𝘀 can be traced back to the 60s, when its 
founders and mentors, 𝗦𝘂𝘀𝗵𝗺𝗮𝗮 𝗥𝗼𝘀𝗵𝗮𝗻 𝗔𝗵𝘂𝗷𝗮 and 𝗦𝘂𝗱𝗵𝗶𝗿 𝗔𝗵𝘂𝗷𝗮, 
started their theatre journey with some of the most eminent names in 
Delhi theatre. They together explored every facet of the performing arts 
over a period 5 decades in varied languages, demographies, genres, 
and platforms. Sushmaa has done extensive work in the capacity of an 
Actor, Director and Scriptwriter, over every medium.

Name: Ghostlight: A Research Study
Description: Welcome! The goal of this research is to better understand your experiences as theater workers in the industry. Administrators, technicians, and artists are welcome to participate.

Name: Naked Angels Theater Company
Description: Naked Angels is a theatre company that committed to strengthening a community of artists.

Description:
La compagnie Colette Merveille apporte fraîcheur et fantaisie à vos événements !

Spectacles
