Name: 4 Community Theatre
Description: Building bridges between communities and generations while providing an outlet for artistic expression and quality entertainment in western Hennepin and eastern Wright counties of Minnesota since 1998.

Name: Vicky Nöjesproduktion
Description: We produce musicals and theater shows simply for fun!

Name: Stillpointe
Description: Stillpointe Theatre is a group of Baltimore artists committed to working with all art forms to create original works of theatre, while also reinterpreting classic works and themes into contemporary works of art, resulting in a unique, groundbreaking, and inspiring theatrical experience accessible to all.

Name: Applied Mechanics
Description:
Applied Mechanics is a visionary, multiracial collective of queer and genderqueer theater artists. We make performances that surround you: in theaters, warehouses, galleries, schools, punk rock venues, in the streets, online, and in your own home.  

Our work creates lush, layered spaces that envelop the audience.  Multiple histories unfold there, and each weaves a different perspective — you choose which thread to follow. At every turn, there is an invitation: you might choose to join a dinner party, dance at a concert, start a protest, or spin the dial on a radio station. Seating is optional, accessibility is primary, and each audience member creates their own experience. Welcome! We’re so glad you are here.

Name: La Bottega Fantastica & Co.
Description:
Contornata da pietra lavica e Mar 
Mediterraneo a Catania nasce il primo 
centro di produzione artistico siciliano 
conosciuto come La Bottega Fantastica & Co.
 Innovazione e tecniche all’avanguardia 
dettano da anni il core business di 
un’azienda conosciuta sia in Italia ma 
soprattutto all’estero per la produzione 
di scenografie teatrali e cinematografi
che e allestimenti per grandi eventi.

Name: Altoona Community Theatre
Description:
Altoona Community Theatre (ACT) is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization whose mission is to produce quality live theatre that is entertaining and intellectually stimulating, provide outlets for residents to express themselves creatively, and to foster appreciation for the arts and stimulate their growth through educational programming. All production work onstage and backstage is performed by over 200 volunteers who donate their time and talents. A team of two staff members and a volunteer Board of Directors is in charge of overseeing the organization's operations.

ACT produces four mainstage productions annually in the historic Mishler Theatre, a restored 1906 vaudeville-burlesque house seating 800 people that is rented by the group for the final two weeks prior to each production. The shows – presented in September, November, February and May — are given for four performances each.

Name: WISH Entertainment
Description: Wish Entertainment bestaat uit 7 jongvolwassenen, die een passie hebben voor het maken van theater. Na hun daverende succes van debuutvoorstelling Bestemming Onbekend, welke ook direct in reprise ging, staan zij opnieuw in het theater met een eigen voorstelling. Ze kijken ernaar uit om u te verbazen met hun zelfgeschreven voorstelling "Opgedoekt". Met dit keer ook zelfgeschreven muziek! Ze zien u graag 21 en 22 april 2023 in theater de Kattendans.

Name: People You Know Productions
Description: People You Know Productions is a theatre company based in St. Andrews, producing only student written, directed and performed plays. Filling what we saw as a gap in the limited theatre scene here, our work and focus is on getting original student writing read and seen. People You Know was formalised on a belief that all original writing should get a chance to be actualised on stage, no matter how experimental.

Name: Marietta Theatre Company
Description:
Marietta Theatre Company was founded to entertain the Marietta and Greater Atlanta community through memorable, live-performance experiences. Our mission is to provide an atmosphere for the community to experience life together, introduce patrons to outstanding local talent, and support local charities.

Marietta Theatre Company (MTC Players, Inc.) is a domestic 501(c)(3) organization as defined by federal statutes (public charity).

Marietta Theatre Company encourages and embraces participation from cast, crew, volunteers, and patrons of diverse backgrounds, ethnicities, gender identities, abilities, and ages.

Name: Transfuge
Description:
Transfuge est une compagnie de création et de production, mise sur pied en 2023 dans le but de permettre à l’artiste Micha Raoutenfeld et à ses collaborateur.rice.s de créer des spectacles transdisciplinaires et d’en assurer la diffusion au Québec et à l’international.

Le mandat de la compagnie est de repousser les frontières du théâtre, de questionner les schémas dominants et de proposer une nouvelle mythologie. Les oeuvres créées par Transfuge s’appuient sur un processus de création autofictif et intègrent performance, danse et travail sonore. « Trans », préfixe latin signifiant « au-delà » et exprimant l'idée de changement, de traversée, est à la base de la vision de la compagnie.

Name: Microteatro Rosario
Description:
Viví la experiencia Microteatro!
10 microobras distintas todos los meses.
MicroBar
Espacio de arte, teatro y gastronomía

Name: Shakespeare on the Lawn
Description: Shakespeare on the Lawn is a CIO at the University of Virginia that promotes free classical theater to students on Grounds. Students in the organization put on one "Mainstage" play a semester, as well as a varying amount of small projects.

Name: Atlas Shakespeare Company
Description:
We founded Atlas in a spirit of exploration and discovery, with the mission of transporting our audiences to brave new worlds by presenting exciting, inclusive productions. In a world in which Shakespeare's work is all-too-often regarded as inaccessible, we aim to reintroduce the public to the plays as they were intended to be experienced. No highbrow declamations and no gimmicky modernizations: just action-packed, character-driven, intensely relatable dramas that explore universal themes. We respect the collaborative magic of live theater as a force for good, and we believe that classic plays, not just new works, hold the power to interrogate cultural values, foster productive discourse, build community, and champion social change. 

Most recently, we mounted a very successful production of the seldom-performed first two installments of the "Henry VI" trilogy. We were proud to receive an overwhelming amount of audience feedback praising our clear storytelling, vivid characterizations, and sense of humor—not to mention our cast members' spectacular acting skills and our gorgeous medieval costumes and live sword-fighting! We are currently making plans to present "Henry VI, Part 3," followed by "Richard III."

Name: Compagnie On Off
Description:
La Compagnie ON OFF a été créée en 2008 dans le but d’accompagner le développement, la création, l’organisation et la diffusion de spectacles vivants et visuels sous toutes leurs formes.

Son intérêt se porte particulièrement sur la langue des signes et sur la culture sourde dans le domaine artistique.

Principales activités :
• Créations / représentations de spectacles visuels et ou bilingues
• Interventions au sein d’écoles pour jeunes en région Rhône Alpes
• Organisation de manifestations culturelles
• Sensibilisation du public à propos de la langue et culture sourde

Nous constatons que la Compagnie ON OFF est aujourd’hui une structure référente dans notre région pour les personnes sourdes et entendantes, pratiquants ou pas la langue des signes.

Cette association donne en effet tout son sens à la notion d’accessibilité :
• Elle propose une offre culturelle importante en langue des signes, ce qui permet aux sourds et aux entendants signants de profiter du potentiel artistique visuel propre à la culture sourde.

• Elle rend accessible toutes ses activités aux personnes entendantes et sourdes qui ne connaissent pas la langue des signes en embauchant toute l’année des interprètes professionnels et en privilégiant des créations bilingues (LSF et français). Ce qui permet à ce public non-signant de découvrir la langue des signes et l’art sourd.

En 2018 la Compagnie On Off a été conventionnée par la Région Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes et la Ville de Lyon. Elle est également soutenue par le Ministère de la Culture-DRAC Auvergne- Rhône-Alpes et la Métropole de Lyon.
Ces soutiens ont été précieux en 2018 et nous ont permis d’aborder l’avenir plus sereinement, de structurer notre compagnie et de continuer à développer nos activités.

Name: Productiehuis IN! Achterhoek
Description:
Welkom bij Productiehuis IN! Achterhoek

Bij Productiehuis IN! Achterhoek streven we ernaar om creativiteit en talent te stimuleren door het produceren van hoogwaardige theaterproducties. Met het vertellen van unieke verhalen, streven wij ernaar om betekenisvolle en gedenkwaardige voorstellingen op te voeren.


Onze missie is om voorstellingen met live muziek te creëren die maatschappelijke kwesties belichten en de zintuigen prikkelen, ontroeren en fascineren. Op deze manier willen we thema's onder de aandacht brengen en een dialoog stimuleren.


Onze visie is om een bloeiende theatergemeenschap te creëren welke een veilige en inclusieve omgeving biedt voor mensen van alle achtergronden en leeftijden om zich te uiten, te ontwikkelen en samen te genieten van de kracht van live voorstellingen. We streven ernaar om door middel van creativiteit en kunstzinnigheid mensen tot bloei te laten komen en zo een blijvende impact achter te laten.

Opzoek naar meer informatie? Bekijk onze website, of neem vrijblijvend contact met ons op via productiehuisin@gmail.com.

Name: Warwick University Drama Society
Description:
For lovers of theatre. Whether it be acting, directing, producing, or more, we are a society dedicated to staging published plays with a production always in the works!

We are an award winning society devoted to producing excellence in student theatre. Our focus lies with published plays, actively encouraging students to use their creative freedom to take plays by everyone from Shakespeare to Sarah Kane and do exactly what they want with them. From concept to performance, WUDS supports productions every step of the way.

Opportunities include positions in directing, producing, acting, stage management, set design, costume design, sound engineering, lighting and even musicians are encouraged to get involved. As well as having access to the studio theatre of Warwick Arts Centre, WUDS supports productions that wish to occupy alternative, less-conventional venues.

As well as our productions, WUDS gives students access to a large social-network of like-minded individuals. The society holds regular workshops to enable students to learn more about specific areas of theatre production, from acting and directing, right through to marketing and lighting. In addition to this, there are regular socials, parties, and trips to see theatre productions.

Executive Team 2022/23:
President - Sophie Rayment

Productions Manager- Michael James

Charities and Secretary - Anushka Agarwal

Treasurer - Sabina Bonciu

Diversity & Outreach Officer - Sasha Jagsi

Social and Welfare Secretaries - Cat Heald and DJ Lee

Marketing & Publicity Manager - Cordelia Bowden

Tour and Workshops Co-ordinators - Re-elections Summer Holidays

Name: 18th & Union
Description: 18th & Union is a performance space in Seattle's Central District that serves as a home for portable performance and visual art. Our mission is to sustain an affordable, inclusive, and intimate space that nurtures art and community. Our vision is a city where everyone has equitable access to art and community collaboration.

Name: Stichting Muziektheater Eccola
Description:
Muziektheater Eccola, gevestigd in Schiedam, is een toonaangevende organisatie gespecialiseerd in het ontwikkelen en produceren van familie musicals. Met een nadruk op persoonlijke ontwikkeling en talentontplooiing, bieden wij een uniek platform waar jong talent uit de regio de kans krijgt om hun vaardigheden in zang en toneel te ontwikkelen en te etaleren voor een groot publiek. Onze benadering is gericht op het erkennen en versterken van de individuele kwaliteiten van elke deelnemer, waardoor we een inclusieve en niet-competitieve omgeving creëren die zelfvertrouwen bouwt en iedere deelnemer in de hoofdrol plaatst.

Als non-profit organisatie werken we nauw samen met lokale scholen, verenigingen en ziekenhuizen. Met steun van fondsen, subsidies en kaartverkoop, streeft Eccola ernaar om binnen en rondom Rotterdam een belangrijk podium te zijn voor getalenteerde jeugd. Ons doel is om hoogwaardig muziektheater te creëren dat niet alleen entertaint, maar ook inspireert en verbindt.

Name: LAMA Teatro
Description:
O LAMA Teatro, estrutura de criação artística oriunda de Faro, que tem na sua direcção artística o actor e encenador João de Brito, assume o Algarve enquanto principal incubador da sua produção artística, pretendendo desta forma, dar o seu contributo para a visibilidade e relevância desta região, no cenário artístico e cultural nacional e internacional. O LAMA Teatro foi fundado em 2010, tendo como objectivo o desenvolvimento de uma abordagem artística contemporânea e multidisciplinar, que se debruça sobre várias dramaturgias, resultando daqui uma adaptação de textos dramáticos de outros autores, mas também, na criação de obras originais para todos os públicos.

A mediação cultural é outro dos eixos principais do trabalho desenvolvido pelo LAMA Teatro e que assenta na premissa de que o acesso à fruição e à prática artística, corresponde a uma necessidade humana e social capaz de corrigir assimetrias. A realização de acções, iniciativas e práticas permanentes de formação e de fruição artística, permite a criação de um contexto favorável, onde se pretende contribuir para a democratização do acesso às Artes.

No seu historial destacam-se parcerias com instituições culturais de enorme relevância nacional: Teatro Nacional D.Maria II, Teatro da Trindade, Centro Cultural de Belém, São Luiz Teatro Municipal, Culturgest, Lu.Ca, Teatro Viriato, Cine-teatro Louletano, Teatro das Figuras, entre outros. Em 2021, nasce a MOCHILA – Festival Internacional de Teatro para Crianças e Jovens, que acontece anualmente na cidade de Faro.

Estrutura financiada pela República Portuguesa – Cultura / Direcção-Geral das Artes e apoiada pelo Município de Faro.

Name: Lionel Wendt Art Centre
Description: The Lionel Wendt Centre for the Arts is owned by Lionel Wendt Memorial Fund (LWMF), a non-profit, charitable trust with no state funding, and managed by a Board of Trustees who serve in a voluntary capacity. Inaugurated in 1945 and incorporated in 1949 by an Act of Parliament, the LWMF is the official custodian of the legacy of Lionel Wendt. Established in memory of Lionel Wendt (1900-1944) for the development and promotion of the arts, the Lionel Wendt Memorial Centre was built creating spaces for exhibitions, concerts, recitals, theatrical and dance performances and providing opportunities for classes in art, music, drama and photography.

Name: Little Engine Theater
Description: Producing the American Premieres of plays by International writers, and staging them in unconventional, unique locations.

Name: Spiritual Twist Productions
Description: Spiritual Twist Productions is a company based in Garner, North Carolina, United States.

Name: Stichting FunKey Entertainment
Description:
Ben jij vanuit HR, marketing of de personeelscommissie bezig met het Sinterklaasfeest op werk? Wij helpen je graag om er een vrolijke, professionele en volledig verzorgde middag van te maken.

Het Sinterklaasfeest is één van de mooiste momenten van het jaar, en wij maken het voor jouw organisatie nóg specialer. Met een interactieve show, een optionele workshop en een gezellige Meet & Greet zorgen wij voor een feest waar kinderen en ouders van genieten. Ook kunnen we een fotopiet meenemen om alle mooie momenten vast te leggen.

We denken met je mee en passen het programma aan op jullie wensen en locatie.

Dé keuze voor HR, marketingteams en personeelscommissies die nét dat beetje extra willen bieden.

Kortom: een zorgeloos en onvergetelijk Sinterklaasfeest voor de kinderen van je collega’s.

Neem vandaag nog contact met ons op en ontdek hoe we samen jullie Sinterklaasfeest onvergetelijk maken!

Name: Tortoise in a Nutshell
Description:
Tortoise in a Nutshell is a multi-award winning Edinburgh-based visual theatre charity dedicated to creating world-class visual theatre that ignites the imaginations of audiences around the globe.

Our vision is that anyone can access exemplary visual theatre, an artform motivated by positive social impact, which provides for the needs of all peoples.

Our work is driven by a visual language that allows us to create poetic and memorable theatre, that focuses on universal themes and human stories.

Tortoise in a Nutshell look to create accessible, engaging experiences for our communities. We continuously challenge ourselves and the way we think, ensuring we stay relevant and impactful for the people we work with and for.

We offer national and international touring productions and bespoke community engagement projects, alongside design and build commissions. We work as collaborators, project leaders and commission artists for partner organisations of all scales and sizes.

 We are currently based at the Heart of Newhaven Community.

Name: Caper & Crow
Description:
Caper & Crow is a collaboration between Craig Ilott and Stuart Couzens, who’s combined artistry create experiential worlds that fuse hospitality, entertainment and artistic pursuit.  The pair first worked together in 2012 on the creation of Ibiza’s world famous Pacha nightclub in Sydney for Justin Hemmes and Merivale.  Couzens and Ilott co-created L’Hôtel together in 2020, which had its world premiere and sold-out season for Adelaide Cabaret Festival in 2021, followed by a successful season at Sydney Opera House in 2022. 

Gatsby at The Green Light is Caper & Crow’s follow-up hit-show which premiered at the Sydney Opera House in December 2023, selling out a 15-week season to great audience and critical acclaim.

Name: ELevated Productions NYC
Description: Independent theatrical cabaret production company based in New York City.

Name: Theater Wit
Description: THEATER WIT, NFP is a company based out of 1229 W BELMONT AVE 1, Chicago, Illinois, United States.

Name: Geisslers Hofcomoedianten
Description: Grandiózní, Energické, Inteligentní, Smyslně Svůdné, Laskavé, Empatické, Rytmické, Strhující, Hravé, Okázalé, Fantastické. A především komediální. Takové je divadlo, které vám hrajeme už přes dvacet let!

Name: Teatro Ai Colli
Description:
Siamo uno spazio dedicato al teatro e all'arte situato nella città di Padova. 

Grazie alla direzione artistica del Teatro Fuori Rotta, ogni anno organizziamo rassegne ed eventi dedicati a tutte le fasce d'età.

Name: Dramallama
Description: Dramallama gives teachers unprecedented freedom to shape each and every show for their community. No extra fees, full flexibility—cut, adapt, print, even archive on video—all for one flat price. Empowering educators to bring theater to life…their way.

Name: Reclownexion
Description:
Reclownexion – Authentic Connection through the Art of Clown-Theatre

At Reclownexion, we develop and facilitate Clown-Theatre workshops that invite people to explore authenticity, creativity, and human connection.
Our spaces are safe, playful, and benevolent, open to everyone who wants to express themselves and reconnect with the joy of being.

We follow the pedagogy of the Bataclown school, where each person becomes the protagonist of their own path, progressing at their own rhythm through collective games and theatrical improvisation.
The contemporary Clown is not about pretending or performing, but about revealing what is already there — our emotions, fragilities, and unique ways of being in the world.

Through play, body, and emotions, the Clown allows integration, self-expression, and transformation.
Beyond artistic practice, Reclownexion promotes social inclusion and awareness, creating encounters between diverse people and communities through Clown interventions.

 Our main activities
Open workshops in Barcelona and El Masnou (monthly): spaces to explore the Clown within, accessible to all levels.

Team and organization workshops: playful and transformative sessions designed to strengthen human connection, communication, and creativity within groups.
These workshops help teams express, reflect, and shift perspectives, using laughter and play as powerful tools for awareness and change.

At Reclownexion, we believe that playing is a serious thing — it helps us face real issues with openness, humor, and heart.
Let’s reconnect through the art of Clown.

#Clown #Theatre #Development #Barcelona #Improvisation #TeamBuilding #SocialInclusion

See in video: https://youtu.be/jOAdRAN2BXk

Name: Tilburgse Revue
Thespians- The BBA Drama Club
Description:
Thespians is the BBA Drama Club of Institute of Management, Nirma University. 
Welcome to the vibrant world of theatrical expression at the Institute of Management, Nirma University, where creativity takes center stage with the dynamic and passionate community of the college drama club, "Thespians."

Thespians, the heartbeat of performing arts on campus, is a haven for students who are enchanted by the magic of theater. As the proud ambassadors of dramatic arts at the Institute of Management, this spirited group of individuals comes together to celebrate the power of storytelling and the allure of the stage.

Led by a dedicated team of theatre enthusiasts and guided by their love for the craft, Thespians aims to provide a platform for budding actors, directors, writers, and backstage wizards to explore and showcase their talents. The club welcomes students from diverse backgrounds, fostering an environment that values collaboration, innovation, and the sheer joy of performance.

Throughout the academic year, Thespians curates a rich tapestry of productions that range from classic plays to contemporary works, ensuring a well-rounded theatrical experience for both participants and audiences alike. Rehearsals buzz with energy, creativity, and a sense of camaraderie as members work tirelessly to bring stories to life on stage.
Thespians is not just a club; it's a close-knit family that thrives on the collective passion for the performing arts. Whether you are a seasoned actor or a curious newcomer, Thespians welcomes all who are eager to explore the magic of storytelling through the lens of theatre.

Name: Theatre Social Media Manager Support Group
Description:
Social Media Support Group: Theatre Edition is a completely digital community designed to support and connect social media managers in the theatre industry. This group is a collaborative hub where members can share challenges, swap ideas, and find encouragement from peers who truly understand the unique demands of our field.

Through monthly meetings, workshops, and ongoing conversations, we dive into actionable strategies, spark creative inspiration, and build lasting professional relationships. Together, we navigate the fast-paced world of digital engagement while celebrating the art that inspires us all!

Name: Compagnie Arlette Moreau
Description: Théâtre de rue, théâtre de l’invisible, théâtre forum, performances, installations interactives. Autant de formes participatives qu’Arlette utilise pour chercher l’humain, là où il est.

Name: Towne Street Theatre
Description: Towne Street Theatre’s mission is to create, develop and produce original work that is reflective of the African American experience and perspective. A Black femme-led theatre arts organization, Towne Street provides a home for a diverse group of artists to be free in their efforts to create and explore theatre without constraints.

Name: UpFront Theatre Company
Description: UpFront Theatre Company is an experienced, dynamic educational theatre company; specialising in providing interactive workshops & plays exploring the PSHE Suggested Programme of Study for KS2 to KS5.

Name: Egg & Spoon Theatre Collective
Description: Egg & Spoon Theatre Collective is an organization of artists who are generating innovative and theatrical work, which expands the minds, imagination, and sense of citizenship of our artistic community.

Name: Theatre New Brunswick
Description:
Theatre New Brunswick is one of Canada’s oldest
and longest running regional theatre companies.

Name: Knife Dog Play Festival
Description: Founded in 2023, Knife Dog Play Festival is NYU's first comedy play festival, featuring work written, produced, and staged by NYU students.

Name: Cultuurkerkje Oudesluis
Description:
Cultuurkerkje Oudesluis - in de volksmond 'Klein Paradiso' - is een sprankelend cultureel podium waar bezoekers kunnen genieten van een breed scala aan muziek, theater, kunst en cultuur.
Ook is het prachtige kerkje beschikbaar als locatie voor trouwen, rouwen, feesten en de organisatie van workshops en cursussen. 

Het kerkje stamt uit 1861 en is sinds de jaren '90 omgedoopt tot poptempel van de polder.

Name: Duct Tape Productions
Description: Smith College's only musical theatre organization. Since our founding in 2002, Duct Tape Productions has worked to foster an inclusive and welcoming environment while putting on full-scale musicals.

Name: Eskndriana
Description: We Are The Dream

Name: Dhwani-Theatre And Fine Arts Club -VIT-AP
Description:
Dhwani Theatre and Fine Arts Club - VIT-AP

Where Art Meets Expression

The Dhwani Theatre and Fine Arts Club at VIT-AP is a vibrant community that celebrates the performing and visual arts. We are dedicated to nurturing creative talent and providing a platform for students to express themselves through theatre, music, dance, painting, and more. Our club hosts a range of activities, from stage plays and cultural showcases to fine arts workshops, helping members hone their artistic skills and build confidence.

Whether you are an experienced performer or an aspiring artist, Dhwani is the place to explore your passion and be part of a diverse, artistic family!

Name: Net als Fred
Description: Een muziektheatervoorstelling over samenleven, liefde en het zorgen voor elkaar.

Name: Company157
Description: Company 157 exists as a student-run production company operating with the support of the UCSD Theatre and Dance Department. It is dedicated to increasing the opportunities and satisfaction of the undergraduate theatre community by providing positions/roles in playwriting, directing, stage management, design, acting, and production team members. Company 157 provides students opportunities through our dedication to producing new student works, putting on productions, educational workshops, and community events every year.

Name: Alles Uit Mijn Kast
Description: “Alles uit mijn kast" – een muzikale theatervoorstelling over transitie, veerkracht, liefde en jezelf durven zijn.

Name: Theatergezelschap Het Vervolg
Description: Het Vervolg is een gezellige en veelzijdige amateurtheatervereniging in Leiden die iedereen vanaf 21 jaar de kans geeft om zich artistiek te ontplooien.

Name: The BCN Studio
Description:
The BCN Studio managed by Watch This Space Improv, is a vibrant and creative theatre and studio space located in the heart of El Poble-Sec, Barcelona. We offer rehearsal space, improvisation jams, plays, and shows, including many interactive shows with audience participation. Good rates are available for like minded drama teams wanting daytime rehearsal or evening performance space. Our aim is to provide a platform to enable aspiring performers to showcase their talent and for audiences to experience the thrill of live improvisation theatre.



We aren't just some people who 'have a space.' We put effort in both offline and online, to grow, connect and listen to a community of creators and culture-lovers, so we have a great time serving each others' needs with our diverse resources. Our motto is, 'How can we help?'.

We aim to make responsible, sustainable choices in the materials we use, green sourced electricity, food & drinks we serve so that our space and community use only their fair share of our natural resources.
 

We look forward to you joining us to be a part of this enthralling journey!

Name: East Hartford Summer Youth Festival Inc
Description: East Hartford Summer Youth Festival Inc is a non-profit community theater in East Hartford, CT which has been serving the community of East Hartford and surrounding towns for nearly 60 years

Name: Kindervoorstelling
Description: Als ervaren theatermaker laat Aires alle kinderen op het puntje van hun stoel zitten met zijn sprookjesachtige en magische voorstellingen.

Name: Brave Little Company
Description: Brave Little Company is theatre for everyone. We create works about, with, and for kids and their grown-ups, reflecting Houston’s diversity in the stories we tell and the artists who tell them.

Name: Compagnie Gami
Description:
La Compagnie Gami asbl est une association de théâtre-action et d'art en commun, en décentralisation. Nous travaillons à l'effectivité des droits culturels en accompagnant différents publics dans des projets de création artistique, ainsi qu'en amenant nos projets collectifs et participatifs dans des lieux non-dédiés (écoles, salle de village, cafés, associations) ou des tiers-lieux (musées, centre touristique) pour rencontrer des publics dits "éloignés de la culture".


Nos projets collectifs et participatifs consistent en ateliers de création permettant aux publics de problématiser une thématique née de la concertation, de développer un ou plusieurs propos et points de vue, de travailleur leur expression et de la performer en public et d'initier un dialogue avec le "grand public" par la construction des médiations. L'expression peut prendre la forme de spectacles théâtraux, de la lecture préparée au jeu dramatique, mais également la conception d'objets scénographiques.



Nous proposons également régulièrement des ateliers ludiques, qui s’organisent autour d’une thématique et/ou d’une compétence définie à l’avance que l’on vient questionner et travailler par les outils du théâtre : gestion de conflits (“Le conflit, je gère !”), prise de parole dans le cadre professionnel (“Ma voix, émoi”), ou encore harcèlement (“Rire de ou rire avec ?”).


Nous proposons régulièrement des formations destinées aux professionnels de la culture (artistes, médiateur·rices, animateur·rices, enseignant·es, ...) pour permettre de rencontrer notre pratique et d'appréhender la technique et les enjeux du théâtre-action.


Nous produisons également nos propres formes artistiques professionnelles, des spectacles abordant des problématiques sociétales, toujours accompagnés de médiations oeuvrant à participer au débat public.

Name: Kathryn Cole Productions
Description:
Kathryn Cole is dedicated to amplifying unheard voices and bold narratives. 

Currently producing The Pyramid: A Dance Moms Parody Musical.

Name: Beowulf Ltd
Description:
Beowulf Ltd, creators of Beowulf: The Viking Feast. A production that transports you to a realm of Vikings, monsters, magic, and fantasy. Intertwining world-class cuisine with the captivating power of West End theatre.

Beowulf: The Viking Feast takes its audiences back to an age where warriors roamed, mystical creatures lurked, and legends were born. They become an integral part of the narrative, witnessing epic battles, uncovering hidden treasures, and immersing themselves in the rich world surrounding the legend of Beowulf.

A fusion of exceptional gastronomy and cutting-edge theatre, where the nourishment feeds the narrative. During the production, our warriors will indulge in a Viking Feast created by Masterchef winner Kenny Tutt - a feasting experience that complements the theatrical spectacle unfolding before their eyes.

So unleash your inner Viking, embrace the power of imagination, and let us guide you on an unforgettable quest through the realms of legend.

Connect with us on LinkedIn to stay updated on our upcoming shows, immersive feasts, and the extraordinary world we are crafting, where history, culinary excellence, and theatrical brilliance converge.

Name: De Schoenendoos
Description: Sandra de Haan en Jasper Sprengers heten je welkom in hun tuinhuis in Heeze, voor muziek, theater en andere podiumkunsten. Intiem en sfeervol, met twintig zitplaatsen.

Name: La Boucle D'art
Description: La Boucle D’Art propose des spectacles de sensibilisation aux violences sexistes et sexuelles.

Name: Foxglove Theatre Company
Description:
Our Company’s core goal is to reintroduce innovative and challenging work into the York theatre scene. In an age of multimedia we aim to preserve live performance, not by binding ourselves to tradition but through adapting the stage to entertain as well as the screen does, by highlighting what makes theatre unique.

Foxglove Theatre relishes any opportunity to dissect neglected topics, innovate to present unique visual and technological performances, and bring something new and exciting to the city of York. We specialise in the dark, the shocking, and the off-the-wall.

Name: Six Points Theater
Description: Exploring universal stories through a Jewish lens, Six Points Theater brings artists and audiences together in an intimate setting to create provocative theater that reveals the common threads of humanity.

Name: Sri Lanka Applied Theatre Foundation
Description: The Sri Lanka Applied Theatre Foundation is an academic and practice-based organization dedicated to the study, development, and application of applied theatre methodologies in educational, social, and community contexts. The Foundation engages in research-informed practice, training, and collaborative projects that utilize theatre and performance as tools for critical inquiry, experiential learning, and social engagement. Through interdisciplinary approaches, the Foundation seeks to contribute to cultural discourse, capacity building, and social transformation by fostering reflective practice, dialogue, and inclusive participation within diverse communities across Sri Lanka.

Name: the feath3r theory
Description: the feath3r theory (TF3T) is a New York City based dance-theatre-media company that produces the work of Artistic Director and Choreographer Raja Feather Kelly. As a collaboration of dancers, actors, filmmakers, musicians, photographers, and designers, our mission to broaden the space for unheard voices and repressed histories, to bring into the theatre those sometimes left out, and to use theatre to provoke much-needed public conversations. the feath3r theory  does this by challenging its audience and its creators to collectively interrogate - and celebrate - its shared relationship to human empathy and personal ethics as expressed in and distorted by popular media. By unabashedly appropriating the structures, themes, and aesthetics of reality television, celebrity culture, social media and the internet, the work of TF3T synthesizes dance, visual media, fashion, drag, standup, minstrelsy, and narrative theatre into virtuosic, expansive, radical and surreal large scale pop-culture phenomena or an overwhelming, over-saturated ‘Gesamtkunstwerk’ in which artists and audience alike experience their shared humanity. We are committed to addressing pressing social issues through Dance, Theatre, and Media with an emphasis on LGBTQ themes.

Name: FdF Entertainment srl
Description:
FdF Entertainment srl, fondata da Fabrizio Di Fiore nel 2017, è una società di produzione teatrale che in pochissimi anni di attività ha già realizzato importanti spettacoli nei maggiori teatri italiani.

FdF Entertainment ha fondato Roma City Musical, per la quale ha prodotto le nuove versioni italiane dei musical Sette Spose per Sette Fratelli, Cabaret e Saranno Famosi rappresentate in tutta Italia con eccellenti risultati di critica e botteghino.

FdF Entertainment ha fondato Roma City Ballet Company, per la quale ha prodotto grandi titoli di balletto classico come Cenerentola e Schiaccianoci, con imponenti set di scene e costume e interpretate da guest star internazionali. Ha inoltre prodotto Carmen con Rossella Brescia e il balletto pop Wonderboys/Walk.

FdF Entertainment è proprietaria di Art Village, hub culturale a Roma tra i più grandi d’Europa e da Luglio 2022 ha rilevato a Torino il Teatro Alfieri (1500 posti) e il Teatro Gioiello (500 posti).

Name: Teatro Breve de Mexico
Description:
01 ¿Qué es Teatro Breve?
Una aventura teatral emprendida por una compañía de teatro que cuenta con un gran elenco y un grupo de escritores emergentes, todos alumnos de la dramaturga Gabriela Ynclán, premio nacional de dramaturgia Juan Ruiz de Alarcón 2021.

¿POR QUÉ ES IMPORTANTE EL MICROTEATRO (O TEATRO MÍNIMO O TEATRO BREVE)?
Porque a través de obras cortas, equivalentes a los cuentos de la literatura o a los cortometrajes de la cinematografía, el público puede acercarse a conocer otras vidas y otros mundos literarios producto de la imaginación de nuevos creadores.

¿CUÁLES SON LAS HISTORIAS QUE EN ESTA OCASIÓN NOS CUENTA TEATRO BREVE?
Para esta corta temporada hemos seleccionado tres obras breves tallereadas en el círculo de lectura y creación dramática que encabeza Gabriela Ynclán: 
¿Te Conozco?, de Ricardo Sierra (egresado de la carrera de Literatura Dramática de la UDLA) y La Dómina y No te voy a decir adiós, de Jesús Alberto Hernández (periodista, urbanista y cineasta, egresado del TEC y de la UNAM).

Name: Associação Recreativa Aurora da Liberdade
Description:
Em 13 de maio de 1906, no concelho de Matosinhos, nasceu o Grupo Dramático “Aurora da Liberdade”.
A revolta do 28 de Maio de 1926 vinha longe, mas o Estado Novo estava atento e vigilante. A colectividade viu as suas instalações encerradas nos anos 50, por decisão da polícia política do Estado Novo, com o pretexto de que ali se poderia gerar agitação. Como não era verdade, três dias depois, o regime de Oliveira Salazar autorizou a reabertura da colectividade, mas impôs uma alteração ao seu nome, passando de Grupo Dramático Aurora da Liberdade para Associação Recreativa Aurora da Liberdade.

Name: Maintenance Bay 54
Description: Maintenance Bay 54 is a group of talented artists and makers who create tech-related art and immersive experiences.

Name: Peter J Loewy
Description: I have over 35 years experience in the theatre industry from Broadway to regional theatre as a Producing Artistic Director, writer and consultant. Theatre has always been my passion.

Name: La Compagnie Rosemarino
Description: Shedding light via performance on the consequences of sexual violence with the its first creation: Éclôt dans les Cendres, by Bérénice laurent. A collective artistic entreprise joining together six artists: Daniela Garcia Castro as stage director, Bérénice Laurent, Rémi Granville, Myra Zbib & Takumi de Valette as interprets. Éclôt dans les Cendres melts together the poetic, musical and corporeal forms of artistic expression in order to incarnate the survivor journey.

Name: Het Gelders Productiehuis
Description: Het Gelders Productiehuis is een toonaangevend cultureel platform dat zich inzet voor de ontwikkeling en presentatie van artistieke projecten in Gelderland en daarbuiten. Samen werken we aan het empoweren van jongeren en het vieren van diversiteit door kunst en cultuur.

Name: Cie Colegram
Description:
La Compagnie Colegram propose des spectacles et des ateliers sur Lyon et sa région.
Théâtre de rue, Théâtre scientifique, Théâtre Historique, la préoccupation de proposer un théâtre interactif, ludique et pédagogique est toujours essentielle dans chacune de nos créations !

Name: Par les 2 bouts
Description:
Théâtre spontané et animations interactives. Pour les entreprises, collectivités, associations et même particuliers !
Théâtre-débat, show d’impro, imposture au milieu d’un événement, jeux coopératifs, théâtre forum… Le théâtre est un levier : il permet des prises de conscience. Il crée une atmosphère propice au dialogue ou tout simplement au divertissement.

Name: AuFond Producties BV
Description: AuFond Producties is een nieuw productiehuis in de Vlaamse live entertainment sector. Ze maken muziektheater- en musicalproducties voor een breed publiek, waarin zowel familievoorstellingen als kwetsbare voorstellingen een plaats krijgen. Passie en kwaliteit tot in de diepte, tot in de essentie, tot aan het horizondoek: AuFond.

Name: ESSENT CREATIVA S. COOP. V.
Description:
Essent Creativa és una societat cooperativa valenciana, la qual basa el seu treball en diversos camps: la companyia professional de teatre CRIT, l'àrea de projectes de gestió cultural CULTA i la vessant d'empresa distibuïdora dels espectacles de CRIT. Es constitueix a València a l’any 2009 de la mà d’actors i actrius llicenciats o doctors en diverses especialitats humanístiques. Els objectius de la companyia se centren en la divulgació del nostre patrimoni teatral i cultural a través del teatre, i en l’establiment d’un pont de comunicació amb les noves dramatúrgies europees contemporànies i les seues aproximacions al fet teatral.
Els espectacles de CRIT són dels més representats a la Comunitat Valenciana. En els últims anys, CRIT s’ha convertit en un referent a l’hora d’aproximar les nostres bases literàries al públic general i al públic en període formatiu.
Per això també, CRIT va crear al 2013 el programa Escena Jove, per tal d’acostar el teatre al públic jove i adult que es troba en període de formació.
L'experiència dels membres de CRIT també els ha portat a obrir una línia de col·laboració amb diferents ajuntaments de la Comunitat Valenciana i d'Europa per a la gestió cultural i el desenvolupament rural a través de la cultura. 
D’una altra banda, CRIT dirigeix el projecte teatral europeu Escena Erasmus, i la xarxa europea Erasmus Europe on Scene Network junt amb la Universitat de València. Aquesta xarxa està integrada per molts països europeus que preparen espectacles amb equips artístics multiculturals. 
Per tot això CRIT ha rebut diversos premis de caràcter europeu.

Name: Chicas y Maletas
Description:
Chicas y maletas dispone de dos espectáculos de creación propia en los que indagan en preocupaciones muy concretas. 
«Tengo derecho a destruirme» tiene como premisa una reflexión sobre la perspectiva de muerte que tiene una chica de 24 años mediante la recreación de su propio funeral. 
«Antes de conocerme» busca la conexión entre personas con vidas poco convencionales y la superación de obstáculos mediante el amor, el respeto e iniciativa.

Name: Teatr im. Hansa Christiana Andersena w Lublinie
Description:
Teatr im. H. Ch. Andersena jest miejscem, w którym to, co piękne i ciekawe płynnie przenika się z tym, co trudne i skłaniające do refleksji. Jest miejscem, w którym teatr lalki animowanej przez aktora współistnieje z teatrem żywego planu, a tradycja zderza się z nowoczesnymi technikami multimedialnymi. Magia miesza się z  codziennością i oddziałuje na  wszystkie zmysły.

Dawno, dawno temu do Lublina, który powoli otrząsał się z koszmaru II wojny światowej, przybyła Maryla Kędra. Urodzona w odległym Wałbrzychu żona pianisty, absolwentka studium lekarskiego i matka dwóch córek. Przybyła i z miejsca rozpoczęła kulturalną rewolucję miasta.

W 1953 roku zorganizowała w Lublinie I Wojewódzki Przegląd Teatrów Lalkowych. Rok później powołała do życia Kolektyw Teatrów Lalkowych Województwa Lubelskiego. Stowarzyszenie to doprowadziło do powstania Teatru Lalki i Aktora, którego dyrektorem została Maryla Kędra.

Siedziba nowopowstałego teatru mieściła się przy ulicy Klonowica 1 – na skarpie staromiejskiego wzgórza, z którego rozciągała się zapierająca dech w piersiach panorama miasta. Pierwszy spektakl w Teatrze się 6 grudnia 1954. 

Dyrektor Naczelny i Artystyczny Teatru Andersena - Krzysztof Rzączyński.

Name: After the Rainbow
Description:
Midlife gets a dose of music and magic in this transformational take on Oz. Singer-songwriter Amy MacClain plays Dottie, stumbling along the faded brick road of life. She’s joined by a cast of re-imagined characters, all played by comic actor Molly Kittle. Be whisked away on a cyclone of laughter, introspection, and magic with original melodies, magical encounters, mystical revelations, and personal triumphs. A vibrant celebration of life's twists, turns, and the radiant possibilities awaiting all of us when we tap into consciousness, love, courage, and personal power. Emerge wiser and more inspired for your one precious life.

After the Rainbow will premiere at the world's largest performance festival, Fringe Edinburgh, in August 2024. 

https://tickets.edfringe.com/whats-on/after-the-rainbow-a-mystical-music-full-midlife-journey-through-oz

Name: Teatro a Molla
Description: Teatro a Molla is a non-profit registered in Italy and based in Bologna that offers improvisational theatre performances, classes, corporate training, and nonprofit collaborations.

Name: Grupo Teatral Os Retratistas
Description:
O Grupo Teatral os Retratistas (GTR) é um Grupo constituído por jovens e adultos de nacionalidade moçambicana. Está vocacionado na mobilização Social para a mudança de comportamento através do Teatro. Tem a sua Sede na Casa Provincial de Cultura da Zambézia na Cidade de Quelimane, na Avenida Paulo Samuel Kankomba nº 503. 

O GTR, tem realizado actividades com vários parceiros na área da Saúde, Educação, Meio Ambiente, entre outros. O Grupo de Teatro Retratistas é uma Associação local sem fins lucrativos baseada na comunidade que se fundou no dia 24 de Dezembro de 2001. Desenvolvemos a metodologia do Teatro do Oprimido em laboratórios práticos e em Seminários de carácter permanente para  a revisão, experimentação, análise e sistematização de exercícios, jogos e técnicas teatrais . Nos laboratórios e Seminários são elaborados projectos Socioculturais, espectáculos teatrais e produtos artísticos variados tendo como alicerce a estética do teatro.

A filosofia e as acções do Grupo de Teatro Retratistas visam a democratização dos meios de produção cultural, como forma de expansão intelectual dos seus participantes. Além da propagação do teatro como meio de activação e do democrático fortalecimento da cidadania.

Name: The Contemporary Theater Company
Description:
The Contemporary Theater Company is a 501(c)3 non-profit theater producing year-round entertainment featuring Rhode Island talent to tell stories which engage and delight our community! The CTC features scripted and improvised shows, youth classes/camps, improv and theater classes, and more!

https://www.facebook.com/contemporarytheaterco

https://instagram.com/thectc?igshid=YmMyMTA2M2Y=

Name: Eastside Improv
Description: Improv on the Eastside of Seattle

Name: On Stage Australia
Description: On Stage Australia is an Australian company that designs, owns and manages bespoke, high end, fully airconditioned moveable theatres. Design features 1,500 upholstered seats, surround sound, extensive lighting rig, sophisticated staging including revolves, lifts, trapdoors and 360° immersive projection.

Name: Theatre Prometheus
Description: Theatre Prometheus is a not-for-profit company producing classic and new works in Washington, DC. We share a goal of exploring and promoting feminist, queer, and diverse narratives. We believe in the power of local theater and are committed to providing opportunities to local artists and creating productions by and for the communities we live in.

Name: Long Beach Landmark Theatre Company
Description: Long Beach Landmark Theatre Company is dedicated to creating high quality theatrical productions that entertain, engage, challenge and inspire. With a commitment to inclusivity, social justice and diversity, we cultivate an environment that celebrates established artists and nurtures emerging local talent. Rooted in the heart of our city we believe in the transformative power of theatre that is created by and for the community it serves.

Name: Instituto Internacional de Atuação
Description: Fundado no fim de 2024, o Instituto Internacional de Atuação nasceu da paixão de um grupo de artistas comprometidos em elevar o nível da arte da cena como um todo. Nossa história está só no começo, mas nossos membros já se espalham por diversos lugares do Brasil e do mundo. Juntos, caminhamos a passos largos na realização de nossas primeiras atividades e produções.

Name: La Compagnie des Sylves
Description:
La troupe, initialement "Les Compagnons des Sylves", a été fondée en 1980 par Charlotte GAMAY (élève au Conservatoire et camarade de promotion de Bernard Blier et François Périer).
En 1995, toujours régie par la loi des Associations 1901, la troupe prend le nom de "La Compagnie des Sylves". 
C'est aujourd'hui encore la compagnie officielle de la ville du Cannet (06). 

Les spectacles qu'elle propose (entre un et deux par an) oscillent entre comédies de boulevard, créations et pièces d'auteurs reconnus. 

Une seule mission, un seul objectif à travers chacune de ces réalisations : divertir le public et lui proposer des spectacles de qualité (avec notamment un soin particulier accordé à la conception de décors professionnels).

Name: Francis Wilson Playhouse
Description: Francis Wilson Playhouse is a local community theatre in Clearwater, FL.

Name: Theater de Mythe Goes
Description:
A wide variety of performances can be seen at the theatre throughout the season, but more is possible. For instance, we can provide a professional stage for amateur companies and schools. Theatre de Mythe is also ideally suited to organising a wide variety of events such as:

- Corporate presentations
- Company parties
- Symposia
- Congresses
- Receptions
- And more!

The accommodation is centrally located and equipped with state-of-the-art theatre facilities and a good catering organisation. In addition, we have a box office reservation system that makes it easy to arrange any ticket sales.

Want a complete evening out with your colleagues or business associates? Choose from one of the many performances and combine your choice with a package.
The theatre hall (540 seats) is particularly suitable for presentations and conferences. For smaller groups, the accommodation offers two different rooms for meetings and presentation. The downstairs and upstairs foyers are ideal for trade fair presentations, symposia, parties, dinners and receptions. Combined with the theatre hall, this is a perfect combination for your corporate events.

The accommodation is centrally located in Goes, next to a large car park, and is equipped with state-of-the-art theatre facilities and good catering organisation. It is also possible, in consultation, to provide catering in the theatre. In addition, we are in possession of a box office reservation system with which every ticket sale can be easily arranged.

Name: Sky Sounds Production
Description:
At the intersection of tradition and innovation, Sky Sounds Production is a Hanoi-based creative house transforming Vietnamese heritage into immersive artistic experiences. Through groundbreaking performances that blend indigenous music, handcrafted instruments, visual storytelling, and the power of natural elements like clay, bamboo, and water, Sky Sounds is shaping a new cultural identity for Vietnam on the world stage.

Sky Sounds' newest production, GOm Show, is a sonic and visual voyage inspired by Vietnam’s ancient ceramic culture. Set on a stage shaped like a giant rotating pottery wheel, GOm uses clay-based instruments to unearth hidden voices of the earth: the echo of a rice jar, the breath of a water pot, the heartbeat of fired clay.

The performance guides audiences through a poetic cycle of day and life: from morning mist to village festival, from the silent labor of artisans to a moonlit farewell. Rather than reconstruct history, GOm awakens memory and emotion through sound, guiding each guest into a dreamscape shaped by Vietnamese culture.

Name: Rhapsody Theater
Description: A Beautiful 200+ Seat intimate theater in Rogers Park. Opening June 2022 with World Class Theatrical Magic, Chamber Music, World Music, Dance, and Cabaret.

Name: Show Your Worth, Inc.
Description: SYW aims to teach and cultivate interest in theatrics in our local youth through workshops and seasonal productions by teaching and providing the necessary resources to do well in an artistic environment.

Name: SHIFFT Utrecht
Description: SHIFFT is een cross-disciplinair dansgezelschap en creatieve hub in het hart van Utrecht. We zijn een bevlogen, jonge organisatie met twee benen stevig in het nu, die kunstenaars en publiek willen inspireren, ontmoeten en ruimte bieden aan ontwikkeling. Vanaf 9 februari 2024 is One Touch te zien in theaters door heel Nederland.

Name: ANTON BENSON PRODUCTIONS LTD
Description:
Anton Benson Productions Ltd are a North West theatre company specialising in pantomime and family entertainment.
#abpltd
#antonbensonproductions

Name: Perseverance Street Theatre Company
Description: Perseverance Street is an independent theatre company proudly based in Gympie, Queensland. We build theatre from the ground up. This is at the heart of what we do and why we exist. As a not-for-profit regional arts organization, we focus on utilizing the power of performance to foster wellbeing, resilience and connectedness.

Name: Pistoleros Wild West Show
Description:
A family-friendly, wild west action show established in 1997 for Trail Dust Town by Jerry Woods. Now owned by the Woods family (since 2020), the show features slapstick comedy, high falls, gun fights, fist fights, special effects, and Hollywood-style pyrotechnics. The 1/2-hour original scripts, effects, and large fireball set this show apart from other gun fight shows. Our favorite guest reaction..."We've seen the shows in Tombstone and Old Tucson, and this show blew them out of the water!". 

Shows are performed every weekend at 7:00 and 8:00pm, and there are several different shows throughout the year (including 3 different Halloween shows and 2 different Christmas shows). 

The Pistoleros also offer private shows on property, and variations of their show off-property for local hotels and corporate venues. Other entertainment options include character atmosphere and guest harassment shows.

The Pistoleros consider it their mission to offer first-class entertainment at an affordable price, while working to keep the wild west alive!

Name: Walterdale Theatre Associates
Description:
Walterdale Theatre is an Edmonton based community theatre committed to the production of engaging and vibrant works and providing member volunteers with opportunities to participate in all aspects of theatre production.

Walterdale Theatre, at over 60 years old, is one of Western Canada’s oldest amateur theatre groups. With the exception of a paid part-time Administrator, Walterdale Theatre is operated entirely by volunteers with a love of theatre. Members of any age and background have the unique opportunity to participate in all aspects of live theatre. We do it for love, not money.

Name: KJK Productions
Description: The mission of KJK Productions is to enrich, entertain and educate the community through exceptional but affordable theatrical arts and resources.

Name: Teatro Sustentável
Description:
Propósito do Teatro Sustentável

O Teatro Sustentável trabalha na criação de espetáculos infantojuvenis, possuindo um vasto portfólio de temas. Com o propósito de transformar vidas através da arte e do teatro, temos vários projetos aprovados pela Lei de Incentivo à Cultura na área de artes cênicas. Levamos cultura e entretenimento para crianças e adolescentes carentes em todo o país.

Name: Scènes sur mesure
Description:
Notre collectif intervient sous forme de spectacles, impostures et saynètes uniques lors de vos évènements en adéquation (Ou pas du tout…) avec le thème de votre manifestation. (Colloques, séminaires, salons, visites guidées, action de team-building) 
Nous intervenons également en entreprise et abordons alors des thématiques très spécifiques comme : Le management, Les risque psychosociaux, La sécurité, •	L’insertion des personnes en situation de handicap etc.

Une façon drôle et décalée de transmettre vos messages.

Name: University of St Andrews Gilbert and Sullivan Society
Description: Since 1970, the University of St Andrews Gilbert and Sullivan (G&S) Society has been meeting on a regular basis to rehearse, perform and generally appreciate the works of librettist W.S. Gilbert and composer Arthur Sullivan, the famous Victorian duo who wrote (among others) Pirates of Penzance and H.M.S Pinafore! They are comprised of some of St Andrews’ most talented performers, and pride themselves on being open to beginners and those more musically experienced alike. Anyone with an interest in music, performing or being on a production team is welcome to join their cast, crew or orchestra.

Name: NAH-ja!
Description:
Welkom op de bedrijfspagina van stichting NAH-ja! 

NAH-ja! is de naam van onze theatergroep. Acteurs met niet-aangeboren hersenletsel en mantelzorgers delen hun verhaal en ervaringen op het podium. Met creativiteit en humor, want dat helpt om met NAH door het leven te gaan. De eerste productie ‘Een ander hoofd’ dateert uit 2023. Eind 2025 staat ‘Jij & Ik’ op de planken van theaters in Zuidoost Brabant. Onder leiding van regisseur Liesbeth Reeser uit Eindhoven werken we verder aan de volgende productie.

Naast voorstellingen geven we graag voorlichting over niet-aangeboren hersenletsel, op aanvraag. Dat doen we door middel van theater. We werken met sketches, een interactieve vragensessie met de spelers en/of een documentaire. Afhankelijk van de wensen en de doelgroep is een combinatie met een spreker mogelijk.

Oprichter en voorzitter van de stichting is Mariëlle van der Aa, werkzaam bij De Straatdokter in Eindhoven. Na haar herseninfarct in 2015 deelt zij haar ervaringen over leven met een beperking. Motto: kijk naar wat er wél kan en geniet zoveel mogelijk van het leven! Op de website www.nah-ja.nl staan honderden blogs van Mariëlle, andere ervaringsdeskundigen en mantelzorgers. Deze verhalen zijn heel inspirerend en de 'voedingsbodem' voor de theatervoorstellingen.

Op YouTube (https://www.youtube.com/@nah-ja) is de voorstelling 'Een ander hoofd' te bekijken, evenals de gelijknamige documentaire door camjo Edith van Zalinge over het aanlooptraject. 

Wil je meer weten of heb je ideeën voor samenwerking? We zijn telefonisch bereikbaar via +31 6 15 10 17 17 (Mariëlle van der Aa).

Name: Mishkafayim Theater
Description:
תיאטרון משקפיים ע״ר מהווה מוקד תרבות וחינוך, המוביל את הדור הצעיר להעמקה והרחבת אופקים בתחומים ההומניסטיים והתרבותיים. בתיאטרון משקפיים, יצירת האמנות משתלבת עם עקרונות חינוכיים עמוקים, בכדי להנגיש את הבמה לכל ילד ונער בארץ, גם במרכז וגם בפריפריה.

פרט להיותנו יוצרי תיאטרון, אנו אנשי חינוך בעלי נסיון מגוון בשטח הכולל חינוך פורמלי וא-פורמלי.

אנו מתחייבים לקידום פרקטיקות חינוכיות מתקדמות ומוכחות, כולל למידה חברתית-רגשית (SEL), חינוך דמוקרטי על פי יאנוש קורצ'אק, חינוך עצמאי לפי מריה מונטסורי, וגישות תיאורטיות של ג'ון דיואי ורג'ו אמיליה שמתמקדות בחוויה האמיתית ובפיתוח יצירתיות.

הפעילות והתכנים שלנו מכבדים את עולמו של הילד, מעצימים שוויון וחופש ביצירה, ומלמדים להתמודד עם הצלחות וכישלונות בסביבה משתנה. אנו פועלים להנגשת האמנות תוך קידום סדנאות, ימי פעילות והתנדבות לטובת חיזוק הקהילה.

התיאטרון מעודד יצירה ישראלית תוך עידוד ופיתוח יוצרים צעירים. בתיאטרון משקפיים אנו מאמינים בכוחו של הסיפור, המדיום התיאטרלי ומימוש הפוטנציאל של דור העתיד הן היוצרים והן הצופים. 

 

אנו מזמינים אתכם.ן להיות חלק מהמסע שלנו!

Name: Naples Cinematheque
Description: NAPLES CINEMATHEQUE is the premiere purveyor of alternative cinema experiences playing exclusively at Paragon Theaters Pavilion in Naples, Florida. Twice weekly, audiences can enjoy a different vintage film title and celebrate each one as if it’s a “new” release. During this golden age of film restoration, Naples Cinematheque aims to provide an opportunity to experience the legacy of cinema like no other generation has had before.

Name: Theanema
Description:
What is THEANEMA?
It’s storytelling that lives both on stage and on screen - a show that seamlessly merges THEAtre and ciNEMA to spark immersive, authentic narratives.

Name: Seven Angels Theatre
Description: Our mission is to support professional regional theatre on a continuing basis in the Waterbury, Connecticut region; to produce and present quality theatre of fine established plays, musicals, and children’s theatre; to encourage and produce new works; to emphasize priorities of excellence, quality, integrity, and accessibility to the entire community; to provide the means to foster appreciation, participation, and education in the theatre arts, and to promote and foster the performing arts.

Name: Compagnie Les Amours Chiennes
Description:
Compagnie théâtrale émergente. Première création « Stigmates de la Gloire » créée À La Folie théâtre dans le 11e arr. de Paris, faisant l’objet de 34 représentations de mi-novembre 2023 à début février 2024.

Créateur.ices : Victoria Corda et Johannes Colin

Stigmates de la Gloire : Une pièce choc qui prend la mesure de la libération de la parole des femmes post-#MeToo dans le milieu du théâtre et du cinéma, pour en dévoiler, avec un humour grinçant, toutes les facettes sombres !

Résumé : Les icônes sont-elles condamnées à être destituées de leur piédestal pour satisfaire un public toujours plus avide de chair fraîche ? C'est en tout cas le calvaire que connaît Bella, popstar mondialement connue, qui voit son aura s'amenuiser une fois la trentaine entamée, victime, comme tant de femmes, du patriarcat et de ses diktats.

Name: Panevėžio muzikinis teatras | Panevėžys Musical Theatre
Teatro popolare d'arte
Description: Nel 1980 nasce la compagnia Mascarà Teatro, che diventa nel 1992 Teatro Popolare d’Arte con la direzione artistica di Gianfranco Pedullà, regista e storico del teatro. La compagnia opera guidata da una forte attenzione alla formazione del pubblico e realizzazione di spettacoli per un teatro popolare di qualità, rispondente a una poetica di “visionarietà”, ricca di tensioni contemporanee. Dal 1983 gode del riconoscimento ministeriale e dal 1992 di quello regionale. Dal 2010, col sostegno del Comune di Lastra a Signa, gestisce il Teatro delle Arti collocato nell’area metropolitana fiorentina, riconosciuto dal 2013 Teatro di Residenza dalla Regione Toscana , perseguendo un modello europeo di proposta originale dello spettacolo dal vivo. Il teatro propone varie forme di  TEATRO POPOLARE URBANO attraverso queste caratteristiche primarie: incrocio dei vari linguaggi (teatro, cinema, danza, arte, fotografia); proposte per tutte le generazioni di spettatori; sviluppo di varie funzioni (produzione, ospitalità, formazione a vari livelli).

Name: De Weijer Boxmeer
Description: De Weijer is gelegen in het centrum van Boxmeer. Een prachtig historisch pand met theater en filmzaal, bistro, theatercafé, kapel, parktuin en vergaderruimtes.

Name: Sandbox Theatre Collective
Description: Sandbox Theatre Collective is a member-led, non-hierarchical theatre company. Sandbox helps artists bring their ideas to life by providing a welcoming space, resources, and community support to develop collaborative projects. We are committed to amplifying diverse voices and creating accessible theatre in Chicago. Welcome to the sandbox!

Name: Theatre on Main Street, inc.
Description: New theatre founded by Hudson Valley colleagues, Michael E. Boyle, Jr. and Jessica Jaber, with a vision to bring professionalism to community theater in the Hudson Valley for actors and audiences alike.  Theatre on Main Street is a 501(c)(3) tax exempt organization working under a Small Professional Theatre contract with Actor's Equity.

Name: Karinthy Színház
Description:
Substantial relaxation and quality entertainment for everyone.

The Karinthy Theater was established long before the regime change. Its pioneering activity as the only continuously performing, independent stone theater in Buda is also an example of a change in the theater structure, which today has become a theater with a specific spirit and enjoys the support of both the profession and the critics, as well as the audience.

Játsszunk komolyan! Let's play seriously! We preserve the traditions, but by representing a modern, valid theatrical language, the theater renews itself with performances that the audience cannot see anywhere else.

Name: The Well Walk Theatre
Description: The Well Walk Theatre is a magical venue in Hampstead (North London) where families can come and enjoy a captivating blend of imaginative performances, enchanting workshops, and delightful moments. Nestled in the heart of Hampstead, our theatre is a haven for those seeking an escape into the world of wonder and creativity. With a commitment to providing quality family entertainment, we invite you to join us for an unforgettable journey where every show is a story, and every moment is a celebration of magic and joy. Welcome to The Well Walk Theatre, where the extraordinary comes to life.

Name: Thunder Bay Theatre
Description: Thunder Bay Theatre, Inc. is a year-round, non-profit theatre and performing arts organization committed to providing consistent, high-quality productions, educational opportunities, and additional arts and cultural events utilizing a professional company augmented with volunteer talent.

Name: SHAKER BRIDGE THEATRE
Description: Shaker Bridge Theatre is dedicated to discovering and creating provocative, contemporary plays and to expanding the boundaries of theater by presenting work that is compelling and innovative. Our plays are gems that we’ve brought north from New York’s off-broadway theaters, from across the ocean from London’s fringe and from regional theaters across America.

Name: HET KWARTIER
Description:
HET KWARTIER schrijft toneel - speelt met tekst. 
Theatergezelschap rond Freek Mariën en Carl von Winckelmann.

Name: Hum Studio Wigs LTD
Description:
Hum Studio Wigs Ltd specialises in creating bespoke, high-end wigs and hair pieces for film, TV, and theatre. At Hum Studio, we take great pride in our attention to detail and ability to creatively approach designer’s briefs.
Our clients work with us because of our personal hands-on approach and dedication to produce a product of the highest quality.
Clients include, Netflix, Sky Plus, Disney Plus, BBC, West End and international Theatre productions as well as, creative new works and Opera.

Name: Crystal Theatre
Description: Based in Norwalk CT, Crystal Theatre is Fairfield County’s premier children’s performing arts organization, offering classes for all ages in a warm, supportive environment, performing award-winning original musicals. Crystal Theatre is also home to the newly formed Crystal Community Theatre, producing our acclaimed shows with adults in the greater Fairfield County area. Initially founded in 1987 under the auspices of the Norwalk Recreation and Parks.

Name: Royal Theater Academy, Inc.
Description: RTA is a family educational theater company designed to nurture the artist in every one of us.

Name: WILDe Theatre
Description: Theatre association based in Erasmus University Rotterdam.

Name: Blue Roses Project
Description: Blue Roses Project (BRP) is a not-for-profit dedicated to providing queer artists a platform to develop timely new plays that speak to life in America. BRP brings together local New Orleans artists with theatre professionals from across the United States to foster the next generation of artistic voices while celebrating the city’s rich cultural legacy. We hope to make New Orleans the country’s premier location for LGBTQ+ artists to create new work.

Name: Monkee-Tree Productions LLC
Description:
Do you have a piece of artwork that you always wanted to get published, but never knew how? 

Monkee-Tree Productions LLC was founded by artists Ari Rothschild and Georgeta Rae with a simple mission: to create a platform for complete freedom in creative expression while providing a service for others to do so as well.

We are here to help you get that part of your soul that is dying to be seen, seen by those who want to experience your creativity and uniqueness.

Contact us today through DM or our website www.monkeetreeproductions.com and let's make your artistic beauty visible to the world!

Don't wait - the time will never be just right!

Name: Schubert Theater Wien
Description:
DAS Figurentheater für Erwachsene in Wien
Lassen Sie sich verzaubern und von der Magie der Puppen verführen

Bekannt und beliebt für seine morbid-humorvollen Abende sowie für seine poetischen Bilderreisen, ist das Schubert Theater ein Ort der Phantasie und Magie. Seit einigen Jahren hat sich das Team unter Simon Meusburger und Lisa Zingerle ganz dem Figurentheater für Erwachsene verschrieben und verwirklicht neue und alte Stoffe, von Klassikern wie “Faust” und “Blade Runner” über Biografien wie “F. Zawrel” oder “Die Gesichter der Hedy Lamarr” bis zu Uraufführungen wie “Circus der Träume” und “Die Welt ist ein Würstelstand“.

Mit Nikolaus Habjan kamen die Klappmaulpuppen ans Schubert Theater und Produktionen wie „Schlag sie tot“, “Der Herr Karl” und “Don Quijote” entstanden. Seitdem erfreut sich das Repertoiretheater durch seine Mischung aus aktuellen Themen, Wiener Humor und technisch präzisem Puppenspiel großer Beliebtheit. Die Produktion „F. Zawrel – erbbiologisch und sozial minderwertig“ mit Nikolaus Habjan wurde 2012 mit dem Nestroypreis ausgezeichnet und feierte 2022 ihr 10-jähriges Bühnenjubiläum. Das nonverbale Stück “Paperman” gewann 2019 den Niederstätter SurPrize Kunstpreis in Bozen, die Theateradaption von “Blade Runner” wurde 2022 in der Wochenzeitung FALTER unter die zehn besten Theaterstücke des Jahres gewählt.

Neben Kooperationen mit namhaften österreichischen Theaterhäusern, etablierten Puppenspieler*innen und jungen Gruppen der Figurentheaterszene, sowie Gastspielen im In- und Ausland, veranstaltet das Schubert Theater jedes Jahr eigene Figurentheaterfestivals, wie das “Puppen sterben besser-Festival” rund um Halloween und das “Internationale Figurenfestival” um den Tag der Puppe am 21. März. Seit 2019 setzt sich das Team außerdem mit Digitalität und neuen Technologien im, am und für das Theater auseinander und eröffnete 2021 das Virtuelle Puppenmuseum beim hauseigenen Future Lab.

With an emphasis on new, exciting work with a unique perspective and creative flair, we are one of the UK's fastest growing production companies for live comedy.

Description:

Scalateatern är en av Stockholms äldsta privatteatrar och 2018 firar vi 100 år. I våra anrika lokaler har legendarer som Jan Malmsjö, Harriet Andersson, Allan Edwall, Sif Ruud, Peter Carlsson & Blå Grodorna, Birgitta Andersson och Monica Zetterlund uppträtt. Idag är Scalateatern mycket mer än en teater.

Name: Vivid Stage
Description:
Vivid Stage is a professional yet intimate theatre company in residence at Oakes Center in Summit. Our year-long season includes plays, improv comedy, new play readings, and a summer youth program, along with many outreach and education programs for youth, adults and seniors.

We believe our purpose is to make the world a happier, more compassionate and loving place with the power of our storytelling. And we believe in the importance of creating a nurturing, supportive environment for artists to do their best work. We are working hard to make sure that our theatre is welcoming and accessible to everyone, and that anyone entering our doors will feel truly at home.

The Vivid Stage professional ensemble of actors builds community with our audience by sharing contemporary, life-affirming stories that challenge, energize and entertain.

Name: Compagnia teatrale Petra
Description:
PETRA è una compagnia teatrale che nasce nel 2011 a Satriano di Lucania, un piccolo paese della Basilicata da cui comincia ad avviare una serie di progetti su scala nazionale e internazionale e a coinvolgere la comunità, chiamata a interagire con la propria visione artistica.

Pensare, condividere e produrre teatro nelle periferie geografiche e della società assumono i contorni di una sfida, una missione. In realtà è lo stra-ordinario risultato generato da una consapevolezza, quella di utilizzare il teatro, la danza, le arti performative per ridisegnare spazi di libertà, di possibilità di incontro e confronto, di crescita culturale lì dove lo spopolamento, la mancanza di opportunità e anche la mancanza di libertà sono predominanti.
Attraverso il linguaggio dell’arte e del teatro, la compagnia agisce sul territorio lucano ribaltando la sua visione da luogo periferico, isolato a luogo di possibile creazione artistica e possibile sviluppo economico.

Tra i maggiori ambiti di intervento, la compagnia Petra si occupa di:
- Produzione di spettacoli per target tout public
- Formazione per bambini/ragazzi, nelle scuole e anche in luoghi non deputati al teatro
- Teatro sociale con rassegne di promozione del teatro in carcere a Potenza e Matera
- Rassegne di teatro ragazzi per bambini e famiglie
- Residenze artistiche.

Name: STAGEtwo Productions
Description:
Incorporated in 2018, STAGEtwo Productions is a community theatre organization based in Evansville, IN. We produce a slate of 6-10 productions a year in which local artists participate through a myriad of services/positions including (but not limited to) acting, singing, dancing, directing, graphic arts, arts management as well as technical positions for lighting, sound, and stage design and much more. Through these productions, we not only offer opportunities for artists to share their work, but we also provide opportunities for budding artists to train with seasoned veterans to learn the craft. We also offer a vibrant Summer Playwriting Workshop led by an award-winning playwright and produce at least one of the scripts begun during that workshop. 

Although we do charge for admission to our shows, we open our doors to anyone in need. Our community knows that if they want to see a show or be a part of an event, they can always come to us for financial or other assistance. We frequently work with artists to manage transportation and other operational needs and costs, as well as keeping our educational workshops at a low cost and even offering scholarships to those who need them. 

In addition, we offer a venue for rent (STAGEtwo@321) for performances, parties, or other gatherings. 

As a nonprofit, STAGEtwo is operated entirely by volunteers—including our board of directors.

Name: Roestvrij theater

Name: Teatro Tivoli BBVA
Description:
An important Portuguese businessman at the beginning of the 20th century, a cultured, well-traveled man who loved the Seventh Art wanted to build a cinema on Avenida da Liberdade. Influenced by the European culture of the time, he invited Raúl Lino, one of the most famous and award-winning architects of the time, to design it in a Neoclassical style, similar to the great buildings in Paris.

The space added to Avenida da Liberdade the glamorous aura of a Parisian boulevard, a social place of excellence, culture and modernity.

In the 70s and 90s, the Tivoli Theater went through several owners. After years of closure, and under threat of demolition to make way for a hotel, it was acquired in December 2011 by UAU, a private national show production company whose aim was to return the Theater to the city of Lisbon.
In the last 12 years, several rehabilitation works were carried out, in 2012 and 2018, work that is still ongoing so that Lisbon has a cultural space of excellence.

De Compostela, Espanha). Name: Campsirago Residenza
Description:
Campsirago Residenza è centro nazionale di ricerca e produzione delle arti performativa nel paesaggio e per l’infanzia. Ha sede nel quattrocentesco Palazzo Gambassi del borgo di Campsirago, che oggi viene restaurato nella sua interezza per realizzare una nuova residenza con nuovi spazi per progetti teatrali, per seminari di formazione e spettacolo dal vivo tutto l’anno. Dal 2013 Campsirago Residenza è riconosciuta dal Ministero della cultura come Impresa di produzione di teatro di innovazione nell’ambito della sperimentazione ed è convenzionata triennalmente con Regione Lombardia. Nel 2022 ha firmato con il Comune di Colle Brianza il secondo accordo di Partenariato Speciale Pubblico Privato in Lombardia (fra i primi 15 in Italia). 
Il legame con la natura è elemento imprescindibile del lavoro artistico della residenza ed è il cuore de Il Giardino delle Esperidi, festival nazionale di performing art nel paesaggio, giunto alla sua XVIII edizione. La ricerca artistica, da sempre plasmata nella relazione con la natura e attenta a una messa in scena non convenzionale, alla contaminazione con danza, musica e poesia, si è fatta nel tempo sempre più radicalmente diretta alla sperimentazione di linguaggi nuovi. Le produzioni della residenza, presieduta e diretta da Michele Losi, hanno come cuore la ricerca nell’ambito del teatro nel paesaggio e della performing art, esplorando la relazione tra artista, spettatore e paesaggio in una dinamica di multidisciplinarietà. Accanto a queste produzioni, fin dalle origini, la residenza porta avanti uno specifico un lavoro di ricerca sul teatro per le nuove generazioni e in particolare per la primissima infanzia. 
Campsirago Residenza tiene percorsi di formazione rivolti a professionisti e alle scuole e opera promuovendo le arti performative in forte dialogo con il territorio. Da sei anni cura la direzione artistica e organizzativa del Vimercate dei Ragazzi, insieme a delleAli, ArteVOX Teatro e Teatro Invito.
