Name: Scheldetheater Terneuzen
Description:
Mainly because of its convenient location, good accessibility and extensive facilities, the Scheldetheater offers companies, associations and private persons a representative and hospitable ambience for any event.

The multifunctional building is ideal for organising a wide variety of events, such as:

- Receptions
- Product presentations
- Symposia
- Congresses
- Company and other parties
- Own productions
- And more!

With state-of-the-art theatre facilities, an excellent catering department, our own catering service and experts in technology, organisation and communication, we are happy to support you in making your event a success in every respect.

The Scheldetheater is located on the edge of the centre of Terneuzen and is easily accessible from all directions. The underground car park with a direct entrance to the building is an added advantage.

Besides the two theatre halls, the spacious foyer, the mezzanine overlooking the Scheldt and the theatre square offer endless possibilities for large and small events.  A dinner for 60 people or a symposium for 1,000? In principle, anything is possible.

The culinary possibilities are endless: from a snack to an elaborate dinner, as simple or luxurious as you wish. Together with you, we will gladly discuss all the possibilities to come up with a tailor-made proposal to suit your arrangement. Your wishes are our starting point and we are happy to think along with you!

Name: Birch Theatre Studio
Description: Using theatre to strengthen community

Name: CIE LE CRI DÉVOT
Description:
Established in 2011 in Montpellier, Le Cri Dévot delves into contemporary writings with the spirit of engagement and interaction. Immersing ourselves in specific environments, away from conventional performance spaces, invariably serves as the starting point for our creations. These immersions enrich our perspectives and spark curiosity among locals, students, users, and more. Therefore, community projects and shared creations have
assumed a central role in the artistic development of our troupe. Co-writing with participants and collecting documentary narratives prove to be invaluable tools in designing our performances. Our journey through venues of varying scales and technical capacities encourages us to create adaptable shows, suited more fittingly to regions without dedicated venues.
Since 2017, the company has become intrigued by the concept of collective memory through an intergenerational project titled «Save the date!». Inspired by the literary works of Annie Ernaux, particularly her novel ‘Les Années’, we traverse different territories with
participatory projects (ephemeral creations with locals, collection of testimonials, artistic workshops...).
It is within this artistic cycle that we began developing #GENERATION(S), a project carried out with several groups of young individuals from all social backgrounds and territories, in the form of artistic laboratories. In July 2020, after several selection phases and up against 80 pre-selected projects, we emerged as the laureates of the BE SpectACTtive 2 project call! A European cooperation project co-funded by the Creative Europe programme, dedicated to developing participatory practices in the live show sector, particularly by involving citizens in programming or creation processes (spectator committees, participatory
approaches, immersion residences within the territories...).

Name: Sheatre
Description:
Sheatre is a professional community-engaged arts organization based in Grey Bruce, Ontario. Working primarily in rural and small urban communities, we have 35 years of experience in creating and presenting interactive, issue-oriented and celebratory theatre and the arts.

We serve communities by facilitating the expression and exploration of issues and stories that people find vital, complex, and in need of a public awareness, response, and action. Our artists work with the community to identify those issues. Then together we originate interactive dramas, musical productions, multi-disciplinary workshops, projects and events. These convey important messages that inspire discussion and change.

Name: Angels Theatre Company
Description: Angels Theatre Company is a professional theatre company based in Lincoln, Nebraska, United States.

Compagnie Printemps silencieux
Description: La compagnie Printemps silencieux crée des spectacles de théâtre itinérants autour de la question des Nouveaux Récits.

Name: In Fine Company
Description:
Sue Gilad and Larry Rogowsky are Grammy and multiple Tony Award-winning theatre producers. On Broadway, the worldwide hit Moulin Rouge! earned 10 Tony Awards, and has companies in Australia, London, and on tour across North America. 
 
Angels in America earned 3 Tony Awards including Best Revival of a Play. Jagged Little Pill was nominated for 14 Tony Awards and earned a Grammy Award for Best Musical Theatre Album. The revival of the hit Sondheim musical Company, starring Patti LuPone, earned 5 Tony Awards including Best Revival of a Musical.

Current and upcoming Broadway shows include The Outsiders, The Who's Tommy, Here Lies Love and Merrily We Roll Along. The stage adaptation of the musical film Burlesque will open at the Manchester Opera House in the UK in 2024.

Sue & Larry are Angels with Broadway’s charity, Broadway Cares/Equity Fights AIDS. Sue is the Recruitment Co-Chair at Broadway Cares, while Larry sits on the Board of Broadway for Arts Education. 
 
They are champions for arts education and frequent speakers on theatre's force for
creativity and good.

Name: La Banquette arrière
Description:
Fondée en 2001, La Banquette arrière est le véhicule partagé par une troupe de créateurs.trices singuliers.ères, unis.es par le désir de questionner la société actuelle à travers des œuvres théâtrales inédites à la fois audacieuses, pertinentes et divertissantes.

Véritable incubateur à projets générateur d’une réflexion sur notre monde, notre approche n’est pas documentaire mais bien théâtrale. Les interprètes sont au cœur de nos créations où la forme est constamment réinventée afin de surprendre et de divertir le public dans le but avoué de générer une conversation et ainsi l’amener à une réflexion sur sa vie et sur les enjeux que nous soulevons.

Pour chaque création, nous nous entourons de créateurs.trices différent.es afin de réinventer la forme de nos propositions théâtrales. Nous réunissons autour de la table des expériences diverses et variées afin de nourrir notre réflexion commune tout en participant à une transmission des savoirs et des perspectives de chacun.e. En résultent des œuvres profondément ancrées dans le présent.
 
Dix créateurs, c’est une force de création décuplée, c’est une poésie multiple, une sensibilité foisonnante. Ce sont dix ponts vers l’autre qu’il soit plus vieux, plus jeune, venu du même terreau ou du bout du monde.

Description:
We make multidisciplinary art around societal issues and know a lot about working collectively.

Name: FIGAROS
Description:
Figaros er i dag et af Danmarks mest turnerende teatre på små og mellemstore spillesteder med den helt særlige kombination af teater, revy, opera, musical og comedy for det voksne publikum. 

“Et festfyrværkeri af komik, sang og musik, hvor der jongleres med genrer”, skrev Kulturtid.dk og gav 6 stjerner for “De tre musketerer” 2023. 

Mini-Figaros byder på musikteater for børn - det er jo ikke kun de voksne, der skal have det sjovt!

Figaros is a theatre based in Denmark.

Name: Educate Theatre Camp
Description:
Founded in 2023, E.T.C.  started when a couple of professional theatre practitioners and educators decided to team up to bring their love of the arts to the youth and their communities. Over the past 30 years, we've worked professionally, and each developed our own award-winning and unique curriculums. Now we are integrating our theatre and education techniques to not only teach theatre to students, but also important life and social skills that are derived from those lessons. We are excited to be able to offer our groundbreaking curriculum and instruction all over the country with our new Educate Theatre Camp (E.T.C.) Program.

We are a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization.

Name: Collectif Corpuscule
Description:
Le Collectif Corpuscule est un groupe de création théâtrale fondé à Paris en 2020. Il regroupe trois artistes, metteuses en scène et autrices ; Cécile Roqué Alsina, Noémie Schreiber et Mélie Néel, autour d’une ligne artistique commune : les écritures du réel, du témoignage et de l’individu, dans un questionnement constant de leur rapport au monde et à son actualité.

Sur la saison 24-25, le Collectif a un spectacle en tournée :
- "Méduses", de Mélie Néel, mis en scène par Noémie Schreiber et Cécile Roqué Alsina : un seule en scène racontant le parcours d’une adolescente au sein d’une thérapie de groupe pour victimes de violences sexuelles

Et un autre en création :
- Office Notarial Bonjour, de Fabien Flament, mis en scène par Cécile Roqué Alsina et Fabien Flament, une comédie dramatique grinçante sur le monde du travail.

Name: Teater Galeasen
Description: Teater Galeasen

Name: The Classic Theatre
Description: The Classic Theatre offers immersive storytelling that blurs the lines between audience and performer. Experience unforgettable stories that resonate with the human spirit, fostering connection and leaving you inspired. Join us and encounter transformative theatre that celebrates the power of shared experiences.

Name: ASH Theater Company
Description: Our mission is to create meaningful theater experiences for our students while providing entertainment for our guests in a professional environment. We draw the community into the program for the purposes of discovering and developing talents, while also providing an environment that fosters relationships. We strive for excellence in every performance in order to create a memorable experience for both our students and our guests.

Name: Austin Scottish Rite Theater
Description:
Austin Scottish Rite Theater’s mission is to share and preserve the historic Masonic facility, serving the greater community through high quality performing arts, educational programs, and events.

Austin Scottish Rite Theater is an Austin gem – a fully operational modern theater thriving within a stunning historic landmark. SRT is Austin’s oldest theater, erected in 1871, the same year Austin became the capitol of Texas. For forty years it was a German opera house; then in 1914 it became the home of the Scottish Rite Masons who treasured the site and remain watchful tenants of the building. In 2004 the Masons created the non-profit theater organization that exists today; nestled amid the State Capitol, University of Texas, and Austin’s museum district, we at Scottish Rite are dedicated to building community through the arts. We provide quality shows for all ages, with enriching programming for children. For almost a century and a half, innumerable artists and events of all kinds have graced our venue, from the operas and circus trapeze acts that wowed crowds during the 19th Century to the live world music and multimedia children’s programming that delight Austinites today.

Name: Folkteatern i Dalarna
Description:
2.png
Nu övergår vi i Folkteatern i Dalarna, en fri teatergrupp i Dalarna!
 
Med högt ställda krav på konstnärlig kvalitet sträcker sig Folkteatern i Dalarna över hela Dalarna och ut i Sverige för att erbjuda teater under hela året.
Folkteatern i Dalarna ska vara en teater där alla känner sig välkomna. Vår verksamhet ska vara professionell och en plattform för yrkesverksamma scenkonstnärer och scenarbetare i regionen.

Vi vill etablera oss i regionen som ett alternativ, som en medaktör och motaktör till den redan etablerade konsten i regionen. Vi tror att det råder en brist på teater och att en stor grupp människor i länet skulle attraheras av en ny teater som var deras.
 
Vi ska göra vårt yttersta för att skapa utifrån höga krav vad gäller konstnärlighet och genomförandekvalitet. Vi ska jämföra oss med de bästa aktörerna i landet och vara en av dem. 
 
Vi siktar på att bli en institution i Dalarna och en emotsedd plats för kultur. Du som publik ska vänja dig vid en hög nivå på teatern och våga efterfråga densamma. 
 
Vi spelar teater i Borlänge kommun och Falu kommun samt gästspelar i övriga regionen. Dessutom bedrivs turnéverksamhet i Mellansverige. Spelplatser är allt från städer till mindre orter och byar där professionell teater sällan tar sig.
 
Det mest utmärkande med vår verksamhet skall vara strävan efter kvalitet. Vi skall modigt våga jämföra oss med landets främsta teatrar och på det sättet ska vi inte bara vara en regional angelägenhet utan på sikt verka för att bli nationellt erkända för våra föreställningar. Vi vill påstå att storstadsregionerna inte har ensamrätt på utmanande, konstnärliga och kvalitativa produktioner. Vi verkar alltid inkluderande vad gäller vår publik och tror inte att bra konst och teater är exkluderande för någon grupp i samhället. Vi tror att alla oavsett grupptillhörighet är mottagliga för scenkonst och brister kommunikationen är det avsändarens fel.

Name: The Gatehouse Theatre
Description: Stafford Gatehouse Theatre is part of Freedom Leisure and based out of EASTGATE ST, Stafford, United Kingdom.

Name: Red Yes Studio
Description: We commission, develop and produce bold new work for the stage and screen. We begin with writers. We develop with rigor. We create with integrity and impact.

Name: Scenknuten
Description: Scenknuten är en av Sveriges äldsta teaterföreningar och har sin bas i Eskilstuna. Vi sätter upp flera produktioner varje år för tusentals besökare och fortsätter att växa med nya medlemmar i alla åldrar. Med passion för scenkonst och stark lokal förankring är vi en självklar del av kulturlivet i Eskilstuna.

Name: Schitter in je eigen Musical!
Description: Theater pret is eigen pret! Want jouw verhaal dat jij vertelt wilt hebben op het podium met elkaars inspiratie, feedback, eigen decor, rol, muziek. Toe i dirt vor het eerst deed zeiden collega theaterdocenten " dat lukt nooit!" Nu, ruim 20 jaar later organiseer ik deze weken nog steeds met veel plezier en succes!

Name: Collectif Mensuel
Description:
Le Collectif Mensuel pratique un théâtre politique, populaire, polymorphe et festif. Etabli à Liège, en Belgique, il trouve sa richesse dans la diversité des artistes qui le composent : musiciens, vidéastes, comédien.ne.s, écrivain, bruiteuse, ingénieur son, régisseurs, scénographe, plasticiens...
Ses spectacles (Blockbuster, Sabordage, 2043, L'homme qui valait 35 milliards, ou encore Zaï Zaï) ont donné lieu à plus de 800 représentations tant en France qu'en Belgique (et ailleurs) où ils rencontrent un succès à la fois public et critique.
Au cœur de ce Collectif, il y a 3 acteurs : Sandrine Bergot, Baptiste Isaia et Renaud Riga, ce simple fait détermine considérablement la nature même de son travail. Si plusieurs personnes ont rejoint l'aventure et l’ont enrichie de leur expérience dans leurs pratiques distinctives, chacun des projets du collectif n’en demeure pas moins le fruit de désirs d’acteurs, et place l’acteur (de théâtre mais aussi de la société et de son temps, comme artiste conscient et responsable) au centre du processus de création.
C’est dans cette démarche que les différents spectacles ont progressivement intégré d’autres disciplines artistiques pour générer un théâtre composite, festif et communicatif, où l’humour, s’il n’est pas impératif, trouve sa place de manière pathologique.

Name: artalan kolektif
Description:
Anıl Can Beydilli, Tuğba Sorgun ve Yaşam Özlem Gülseven tarafından sahne sanatları alanında üretim yapmak ve yeni hikâyeler ile estetik biçimleri araştırmak için kuruldu.

Anıl Can Beydilli, Tuğba Sorgun ve Yaşam Özlem Gülseven tarafından sahne sanatları alanında üretim yapmak ve yeni hikâyeler ile estetik biçimleri araştırmak için kuruldu.

artalan, bünyesindeki her bir sanatçının bağımsız üretimini desteklemek ile birlikte kendi içinde bir diyalog alanı yaratarak nitelikli üretime katkıda bulunmayı hedefliyor.

artalan*

*Bir sözün söylenebilmesi, bir yazının yazılabilmesi, anlaşılabilmesi için önceden edinilmesi gerekli olan bilgilerin, yaşantıların ve kanıların oluşturduğu zihinsel olgunluk.

Name: Apollo Theater Chicago
Description: Apollo Theater Chicago is a company based out of 2550 N Lincoln Ave, Chicago, Illinois, United States.

Name: COSSOS
Description: Un espectacle pedagògic destinat a les adolescents entre 12 i 16 anys sobre les incomoditats de la descoberta de ser dona. Un espai on es posen de manifest les contradiccions en les que ens trobem en aquest món digital i la necessitat de cantar a l’amor propi en l’era de la desconnexió.

Name: Response Ability Theatre
Rolling Pig Productions
Description:
Rolling Pig Productions is a newly-established theatre and film production company based 'wherever we end up' (somewhere in the United Kingdom is where you'll find us).
The company creates work that engages with real issues and challenging themes, bringing new life to stories and ideas that deserve an audience.

Name: Elkton Magic
Description: Elkton Magic hosts touring magic acts from all over the world in our 168 seat venue in Elkton, Maryland. Full stage shows scheduled monthly, with various events throughout the county. Also available as a booking contact for private events in need of amazing entertainment.

Name: Pushback Theatre
Description:
now more than ever, in the wake of social and political hijacking surrounding the existence of trans people, our commitment to create explosive  groundbreaking work by Trans Theatre Makers about our community is more important than ever.

we are PushBack Theatre, a radical collective of Trans+ Theatre Makers, committed to creating and developing culture changing work about our community.

in the coming weeks and months, we’ll be sharing more info about how you can get involved, as well as announcements regarding what we’re going to do to begin to change the narratives surrounding Trans+ people in Theatre.

Name: AfriForum Teater
Description: AfriForum Teater is nie net ’n tuiskomplek vir Afrikaanse kunste nie, maar ook vir gemeenskappe. Die teater nooi gemeenskappe, organisasies en korporatiewe instansies uit om hul geleenthede by die teater te kom aanbied.

Name: Klicperovo divadlo
Description:
Moderní činohra v srdci Hradce Králové. 
Jsme s vámi od roku 1885.
#klicperovodivadlo #studiobeseda #hradeckralove

Name: The Lot Theatre
Description:
The Lot Theatre, SA's premiere independent theatrical producers.

Founded in 2022 by Matt Ralph and Benjamin Maio Mackay, who shared a desire to platform and employ South Australian artists and creatives at home the company debuted with RENT (2022). After Benjamin and The Lot frequent collaborator Tate Simpson received an invite to perform a solo show at New York City's 54 Below, The Lot Theatre co-produced that international concert.

Next up The Lot Theatre is bringing South Australia the premiere of Tick, Tick...Boom! in June followed by Next to Normal in October.

The Lot Theatre looks forward to growing in South Australia and beyond, as it strives to bring audiences the best independent musical theatre in the country.

Name: Jelmez-Art Kft.
Description:
Jelmez-Art Kft. (Ltd.) has been established in 1995 in Szolnok, as a privately owned, independently operating unit. At the beginning there were only a few employees and a few outdated sewing machines available for the dressmakers, which continues to grow ever since. The employees are honourably still working for the company and helping the development of the newly arrived seamstresses and tailors in their education and training, as well as initiate them into the misteries of film and theatre. 
The company has participated in making the costumes for many theater and dance productions in Hungary, so that the scenery imagined by the directors / choreographers - by the help of the costumes - can be realized more effectively on stage.

It was a milestone in the development of the company when in 2007 joined the sponsors of the Armel Opera Competition and Festival. Thanks to the Opera competition, the borders were opened to the company and its costumes have appeared on international stages too. Recognizing our accurate and precise work, as of today we can count a number of foreign opera houses amongst our returning partners.
 
As traveled through lots of European countries and the Unites States, our reliable and professionally appropriate work`s reputation has reached more and more theaters and opera houses. As a result, the number of our foreign assignments and circle of partners is increasing.
We feel an obligation to complete the requests in high quality, timely and accurate with a full service to our clients' needs.

Name: Livre Entretenimento
Description:
Produzimos teatro de qualidade, balizando genuinamente todos os processos pelos valores de diversidade, empoderamento e inclusão, mirando em um mercado justo e vibrante.

Na liderança de nossos projetos, Embaixadores Culturais com experiências de alcance global e fortes raízes locais garantem produções completas e riqueza artística.

Name: Theater Is Therapy
Description:
The Green Line at the Horizon is a theater production that aims to provoke open and honest conversation and relatability about men’s mental health in Uganda. 

We will do this by taking the audience into the heart and mind of our main character Okello. We reveal the struggles he faces to facilitate the audience to generate empathy for him while getting a certain level of understanding about his plight. 

The Green line at the Horizon is set to premier at the Kampala International Theater Festival this November 2024.

Stay tuned to our social media pages for more information about the production with the handles @theateristherapy or @thegreenlineatthehorizon

Thank you!

Name: El Enjambre Lab
Description: At The Enjambre, our mission is to foster an inclusive and dynamic community that thrives at the intersection of art, education, creativity, and technology. We are committed to creating spaces for collaboration where diverse individuals come together to explore, innovate, and transform ideas into reality. Our collective efforts aim to inspire, educate, and empower individuals to shape a more interconnected and imaginative world.

Name: Teater Lycke
Description:
Teater Lycke är en fri teatergrupp som utgörs av unga scenkonstnärer baserade i Stockholm. Vi producerar till större del egenskriven dramatik med konstnärlig bredd och blandar tvärdisciplinära uttryck.
Vi vill skapa en särskild atmosfär och få publiken ur spel. Kom och var med!

Name: Teatro Claro Mais SP e RJ
Compagnie Bicyclette
Description:
La Compagnie Bicyclette, basée en Essonne depuis 2021, propose des spectacles vivants et musicaux, abordant des thèmes comme les mobilités, l'écologie, le féminisme et les discriminations. 

Une production décarbonnée...
L’essentiel de la production de la compagnie est le plus décarbonné possible, en favorisant le réemploi et les mobilités actives, surtout en Île de France. Il s’agit de n’utiliser de moteur thermique, et plus globalement de fourgon ou voiture, que pour des déplacements nécessaires et rapides de plus de 80km, un transport de charge important. Au quotidien, nos artistes et techniciens utiliseront le vélo et le train. Pour les besoins de chargement, nous développons petit à petit des solutions alliant vélos cargos et remorques. 

...au rayonnement internationnal ! 
La Compagnie Bicyclette a l'ambition de forger des partenariats en France, en Europe et dans le monde. Elle entretient déjà un lien fort avec plusieurs compagnies italiennes en Emilie-Romagne.

Name: Rumpelmärchen
Description: Sie suchen Märchenerzählungen für Ihre Feier oder ein märchenhaftes Theaterstück? Wir kommen gerne zu Ihnen und bereichern Ihr Fest mit Märchenfiguren und Geschichten. Außerdem bieten wir Walk-Acts für Parks und vieler Gelegenheiten mehr.

Name: With Bibi
Description:
Η BiBi και η ομάδα των εξειδικευμένων παιδαγωγών μας, δασκάλων και καλλιτεχνών, βοηθούν τα παιδιά του δημοτικού στη μελέτη τους μετά το σχολείο, μέσα από δημιουργικές μεθόδους διδασκαλίας.

Διδάσκουμε μέσα από παιχνίδια, εκφράζουμε τα συναισθήματά μας μέσα από θεατρικές δράσεις και περνάμε δημιουργικά το χρόνο μας με πολλές δραστηριότητες.

Name: Young Victorian Theatre Company
Description: Young Vic is Baltimore's Gilbert & Sullivan company. We began in 1971 as an enthusiastic group of high school students and have evolved into an acclaimed and full-fledged performing arts organization today.

Name: Zwolse Theatervereniging Dionysos
Description: Dé Zwolse theatervereniging waar laagdrempelig speelplezier centraal staat.

Name: 21ten Theatre
Description: 21ten Theatre is a nonprofit theatre company co-founded by Executive Directors Ted Rooney and Brooke Totman. Both Ted and Brooke bring over 30 years of acting experience to this gem of a theatre that hosts classes, workshops, and productions. Located in Portland’s Hosford-Abernethy neighborhood, 21ten Theatre seats 50 and specializes in intimate locally produced pieces.

Name: Compagnie Panorama
Description:
Panorama est une association d'intérêt général visant à promouvoir le spectacle vivant dans toutes ses formes en direction des publics exclus, en soutenant la création de nouvelles écritures nourries par les codes de notre époque et l'interdisciplinarité ainsi qu'en accompagnant l'émergence de talents nouveaux.
Directeur artistique : Nicolas Le Bricquir

Name: Theater Zuidervis vzw
Description:
Authentiek, hartverwarmend, ontwapenend en speels theater met muziek en dans voor peuters, kleuters en kinderen t.e.m. 12 jaar. 
Thema's als burgerzin, zelfbewustzijn, communicatie, inclusieve samenleving, taal- en leesmotivatie en bevordering.
Kortom socio- emotionele en relationale vaardigheden.

Name: De Compainie
Description: The Compainie is a small theater and event group with one goal: uplifting the local community in the hamlet of Battel. Under the motto "by and for Battel", we are looking for enthusiastic neighbors who want to cooperate both in front and behind the scenes, each with their own talent. But it doesn't stop there: with every production we want to collaborate with another community or association. 1 + 1 = 3.

Name: Center Stage Productions
Description: Center stage Productions is a Non-profit organization that began in 2017. Our Mission is to grow the artistic community in Northeast Arkansas and in the surrounding areas by featuring community theatre productions that specifically target the adult demographic. Center Stage Productions creates community based, high quality productions of a professional standard that are entertaining and thought provoking. We represent the misunderstood, and disadvantaged by confronting attitudes of narrow mindedness, bigotry, injustice and ignorance.

Name: Teatro Cuauhtémoc
Description: Lugar donde la magia del arte se revela de maneras inesperadas. Nos posicionamos como un socio estratégico para productores,

Name: Cinema Kanada
Description: Movie Theater located in Tel Aviv, Israel.

Name: NoveTeatro
Description:
NoveTeatro è un centro teatrale fondato nel 2007 ed è uno dei punti di riferimento per la cultura teatrale a livello nazionale. Da febbraio 2016 gestisce il Teatro Comunale Pedrazzoli di Fabbrico. Inoltre, è riconosciuto dal 2015 dalla Regione Emilia-Romagna come Organismo di produzione di spettacolo attraverso la LR 13/99, e dal 2018 dal MiC - Ministero della Cultura come Impresa di produzione di teatro di innovazione nell’ambito della sperimentazione (DM 27 luglio 2017 art. 13 comma 3). NoveTeatro ha ottenuto nuovamente il riconoscimento dal MiC per il triennio 2025-2027,
ai sensi del DM 23 dicembre 2024, art. 13, comma 2.
NoveTeatro è ente di produzione di spettacoli di prosa con un’attenzione particolare alla drammaturgia contemporanea. Alla produzione affianca, sin dalla sua fondazione, un’intensa attività di teatro civile e di formazione intesa come formazione di un nuovo pubblico e come avvicinamento del pubblico stesso alla pratica teatrale.

Name: PLAYBOX LLC
Description:
Playbox is an experimental, actor-led ensemble redefining what theatre can be in Pittsburgh. We are a community of innovators, creators, and curious risk-takers committed to building Theatre Worth Making. Work that is bold, urgent, and deeply connected to the world around us.

Every week, With the support of the Pittsburgh Cultural Trust, we gather in our training lab to explore experimental theatre, ensemble collaboration, and the art of creative risk-taking. This space is where artists of all backgrounds come together to challenge themselves, support one another, and grow as storytellers. Our members range from emerging actors to seasoned professionals, all united by the belief that theatre should be fearless, a driving force for truth, imagination, innovation, and progress.

At the heart of Playbox is a mission to create opportunities for artists who haven’t yet found a home in traditional institutions. We believe that supporting these voices strengthens not only our ensemble but also the wider Pittsburgh arts ecosystem. By investing in Playbox, you help sustain a creative home where artists can thrive and audiences can encounter theatre that challenges, excites, and inspires to make an impact in our communities.

Your support helps fund our ensemble, stage innovative productions, and opens our doors to more artists and audiences. Together, we can make space for fearless art that matters—right here in Pittsburgh.

Name: Kristal Theater
Description: Kristal Theater werd in 2006 opgericht door theatermaker en docent Femke Krist. Sinds die tijd maakte zij vele diverse voorstellingen i.s.m. andere professionals en andere organisaties. De voorstellingen zijn altijd muzikaal en behandelen maatschappelijke thema's. In 2011 richtte zij de bijbehorende Musicalschool op in Hilversum. Hier kunnen kinderen van 4 t/m 18 jaar lessen volgen in zang, dans en toneel. Met hen wordt ieder jaar afgesloten met voorstellingen in het theater. Sinds een aantal jaar maakt Femke met de groepen van 12 jaar en ouder eigen voorstellingen op basis van materiaal dat de leerlingen zelf aandragen en dicht bij hen ligt. Hier worden samen scènes en liedjes van geschreven en vervolgens wordt dit opgevoerd door de leerlingen zelf. Zo werd in 2021-2022 de voorstelling "Corona, de aanstekelijke Musical" geschreven waarin de jongeren al hun stoom konden afblazen. Komend seizoen staat een voorstelling over identiteit op het programma. In februari 2023 zal deze in het theater te zien zijn.

Name: 24KG Productions
Description:
MARIUPOL by Katia Haddad 

Two Lives. Thirty Years. One War. 

High intensity modern drama comes from Oxford to London for the first time.  
 
In the wake of the destruction of Mariupol by the Russian forces in March 2022, Galina journeys from Moscow to the city to find her son, an injured conscript. She comes face-to-face with Steve, a Ukrainian commander, who might be able to save him. Galina and Steve have known each other for thirty years. Will he release her son? 

Set over three fateful encounters between Steve and Galina in 1992, 2002 and 2022, MARIUPOL is an emotionally charged drama that challengers the characters with intense moral dilemmas. 

Following highly acclaimed script-in-hand performances at The Old Fire Station, Oxford, MARIUPOL comes to The Cockpit as a full production. Written by Katia Haddad, the play is based on her treasured memories of the city and accounts of the survivors of the siege.

Name: Masurs Varietespektakel
Description: Das Varietespektakel ist eine Produktion von Stephan Masur für das Senftöpfchen-Theater in Köln und das Pantheon-Theater in Bonn.

Name: Creative Cinematix
Description:
Established in 1996, Creative Cinematix is a leading theatre construction and audio-video installation company. We specialize in creating captivating spaces, including home theatres, cinema halls, auditoriums, conference rooms, temple halls, and much more. Our comprehensive services include - Installations of audio and video systems, Other electronic equipment, soundproofing panels, carpets, ceilings, premium seating, and electrical fittings. we also provide services for home automation, wood works and complete interior designing.

As a trusted partner in the industry, we also excel in trading audio and video equipment, including speakers, amplifiers, microphones, projectors, and screens.

Moreover, our manufacturing division produces state-of-the-art line array speaker systems, acoustic walls, installation speakers, and ceiling tiles. We also fabricate hardware components like PCBs for electronic equipment, ensuring optimal performance and reliability.

Anticipating the future of entertainment technology, Creative Cinematix has exciting plans to develop entertainment software for systems and create engaging apps and websites in the entertainment sector.

With a passion for innovation and a commitment to excellence, Creative Cinematix continues to redefine the audio-visual landscape, delivering exceptional experiences to our valued clients.

Name: The Company We Keep Theatre Production
Studententheater St. Gallen
Description: Der Theaterverein an der Universität St.Gallen führt jährlich zwei innovative und originelle Inszenierungen auf.

Name: Pato el Pez
Description: Somos una empresa productora y de Storytelling. Creamos la historia que tu marca necesita para cuativar.

Name: Teater Lakon Bandung
Description:
Teater Lakon merupakan Unit Kegiatan Mahasiswa (UKM) di Universitas Pendidikan Indonesia (UPI). Sebagai salah satu Teater Kampus di Indonesia, Teater Lakon memiliki sejarah yang cukup panjang. Kehadiran Teater Lakon dimulai dari terbentuknya Liga Drama Bumi Siliwangi pada tahun 1962 di Fakultas Bahasa dan Seni yang kemudian menjadi tonggak teater di UPI. Kelompok ini kemudian sering melakukan pementasan di hampir seluruh kota di Jawa Barat. 

Pada tahun 1976, lahirlah Teater Nutug yang merupakan kelompok teater tingkat institute. Tahun 1977, Teater Labirin berdiri. Teater Labirin ini merupakan ‘reinkarnasi’ dari Teater Nutug. Di akhir tahun 1970-an dunia kemahasiswaan sempat ricuh yang berimbas pada kehidupan teater. Maka ketika keadaan sudah mulai tenang, lahirlah Teater Khusus pada tahun 1980 meskipun sempat minggat menjadi Teater “Swasta”. Tiga tahun kemudian, Teater Khusus kembali ke kampus dengan nama baru Unit Teater Mahasiswa IKIP Bandung (UTMIB). Mulai tahun 1990 disepakati untuk memakai nama Teater Mahasiswa IKIP Bandung (TMIB) dengan moto “Berubah untuk berkembang, berkembang untuk berbuah”. Tahun 2000, sejalan dengan perubahan IKIP Bandung menjadi Universitas Pendidikan Indonesia, TMIB berubah menjadi LAKON Teater Universitas Pendidikan Indonesia. Melalui musyawarah Teater 2008, nama LAKON Teater berubah menjadi Teater Lakon Universitas Pendidikan Indonesia, dan tahun 2009 berubah menjadi Teater Lakon UPI hingga saat dengan moto yang tidak berubah.

Name: TheateR TzT
Description: Wij hebben een menu van een aantal voorstellingen die we op elke locatie kunnen spelen, voor groot of klein aantal toeschouwers. Ook kunnen we een filmquiz verzorgen waarin we scène uit bekende films naspelen. Of een muziekvoorstelling met diverse mooie luisterliedjes.

Name: SPAZIO TEATRO -Centro d'arte drammatica
Description: Spazio Teatro - Centro d'arte drammatica è una scuola di recitazione e arti performative

Name: Testify TX LLC
Description:
Testify is all about stories. We want to help people find and tell their own stories. 

Whether you want to share a story on the stage, want a memorable story for your job interview, or want to feel comfortable sharing a story in different group settings. Testify is up to working with you. Storytelling is all we do. 

All the stories told at Testify are true stories told by the people that lived them. Join us each month to hear folks share a part of their lives with you.

And, if you have a story to tell, we'd love to hear it. We take submissions all year long. We have themes suggested for each month, but we give wide room for interpretation of our themes.

What's your story?

Name: Green Room Productions NI
Description:
Our next production 'Pirate Queen' will be performing at Ballywalter on 8th and 9th June and Millisle on 15th and 16th June.

Green Room Productions NI create sustainable Outdoor Theatre, responsive to spaces, accessible to all.

We put communities at the heart of our productions and by performing in the public's social spaces outdoors, where people can gather and connect in a safe space, we continue to promote access and participate in the Arts.

Name: Kidding Around
Description:
Kidding Around aims to provide the Boston community with theatre
for all through the power of:
- Educational Tools by making theatre accessible for people of
all ages and touring to local schools and youth organizations.
- Social Emotional Learning by learning empathy,
communication, and relationship skills, understanding
yourself and others, healing your inner child, and improving
yourself and your relationships.
- Accessible Performance through shows with target
audiences ranging from early elementary to college ages and
themes and messages that can impact all.

Name: LA FAM TEATRE I PRODUCCIONS
Description: LA FAM Teatre es una compañía de teatro con un equipo experimentado de actores, actrices y músicos que trabaja nuevos códigos y estéticas escénicas que transformen la calle en un espacio no convencional.

Name: Meraki Entertainment
Description: Our mission at Meraki Entertainment is to combine the worlds of digital media and live entertainment to foster a place of creativity. We are a platform focused on creating accessibility in the theatre industry and allowing audiences to experience theatre in a way that's never been done before with exclusive content you can view from anywhere in the world.

Name: Oproer.theater
Description:
De theaterindustrie staat onder druk; met steeds minder financiële middelen wordt het voor opkomende makers steeds moeilijker om een plek te vinden waar ze hun talent kunnen laten zien en groeien. Acht productiehuizen in Nederland, Likeminds, Podium Bloos, Werkplaats Walhalla, Karavaan, VIA ZUID, Theater de Generator, De Nieuwe Oost, Grand Theatre en Explore the North , hebben besloten hun krachten te bundelen, wat leidde tot het ontstaan van Oproer.

Oproer maakt zich sterk voor meer kansen voor startende makers, op zoek naar speelplekken en publiek. Het is een landelijk initiatief dat deze opkomende theatermakers ondersteunt bij productie, marketing en publieksbenadering, waarbij de focus ligt op het opbouwen van een duurzame carrière. Samen bieden wij een platform voor het ontwikkelen van nieuwe producties en maken we de uitwisseling van deze producties door heel Nederland mogelijk. We streven ernaar om het Nederlandse theaterlandschap persoonlijker, jonger en toegankelijker te maken door de persoon achter de performance in beeld te brengen. Hierdoor stimuleren we interacties en verbindingen tussen het publiek, makers en theaters of andere speelplekken. 

Oproer wordt mogelijk gemaakt door het VriendenLoterij Fonds, dankzij een extra schenking van de VriendenLoterij. Hiermee kan Oproer nieuwe producties ontwikkelen en een intensieve samenwerking binnen het netwerk aangaan.
Het VriendenLoterij Fonds ondersteunt kunst- en cultuurprojecten die radicale

Name: Performance Club Theatre Company | Non Profit | PCTC
Description: At Performance Club Theatre Company, we are dedicated to empowering youth through performance! Our Summer Stock Youth Theater productions offer high quality entertainment at the historic Thalian Hall in the Ruth & Bucky Stein Theatre. We believe in the transformative power of theater to not only entertain but also educate, instilling invaluable life lessons in our young performers and audiences alike.

Name: Columbia Musical Theatre Society
Description:
Columbia Musical Theatre Society (CMTS) is Columbia University’s oldest and only recognized student group that regularly produces musical theatre revivals.

Each year, CMTS produces approximately three mainstage productions. Past productions have included Anastasia, Footloose, Next to Normal, Head Over Heels, In the Heights, Sunday in the Park with George, Cinderella, and The Rocky Horror Picture Show. 

We additionally host a number of special events throughout the academic year. These have included 24 Hour Musical, where students commit to learning and performing a full length-musical within a period of 24 hours; Miscast, a cabaret where students have the opportunity to perform songs from roles in which they would never be cast; and Senior Showcase, an opportunity for graduating seniors to commemorate their time with CMTS.

Name: Ansh The Theatre Society
Description: Ansh Theatre Society, brings creativity to life. From gripping stage plays to vibrant street performances, mime, and improv, we are the storytellers weaving magic on the stage. Join us in the journey of expression, camaraderie, and the art of theatre.  #AnshTheatre #BennettUniversity #DramaLovers

Name: Théâtre de l'Anagramme
Description: Théâtre de l'Anagramme is a company based out of Lyon, France.

Name: Githec
Description: Crée en 1993 et implanté à Pantin depuis près de 25 ans. Spectacles, ateliers et création populaire.

Name: O3 Odyssey Of Ohit
Description:
O3 (Odyssey Of Ohit) Dramatics Society

The O3 Dramatics Society is a vibrant and dynamic university-level club based in Amity University Noida, aimed at cultivating a passion for dramatic arts among students. Named in homage to the artistic journey of dramatics, the society is a conglomerate of talented individuals who share a mutual love for theater, dramatics, and performing arts.

Array of Performances:
Since its inception, O3 has been the creative mind behind numerous remarkable performances, including skits, plays, ‘Nukkad Natak,’ and theater performances, showcasing a rich tapestry of narratives, emotions, and expressions. These performances have not only entertained but also ignited conversations and reflections among the audience.

Accolades and Recognition:
Has been a formidable contender in various competitions, earning several accolades and prizes, testament to the relentless dedication, immense talent, and creative prowess of its members. These accolades are a beacon of motivation, encouraging members to constantly push artistic boundaries and explore new horizons.

Cultivating Artistic Expression:
O3 provides a nurturing environment for budding artists to hone their craft, explore their artistic inclinations, and express their creative visions. It is a space where ideas flourish, creativity knows no bounds, and artistic spirits are free to soar. The society is committed to fostering an atmosphere of learning, growth, and artistic excellence, enabling members to reach their fullest potential in the realm of dramatic arts.

Community and Collaboration:
Beyond performances, O3 is a close-knit community of like-minded individuals who collaborate, learn, and grow together. It is a melting pot of diverse talents, backgrounds, and perspectives, united by a common thread of passion for the arts. The camaraderie and collaborative spirit within the society are the driving forces behind its continual success and innovation in the world of dramatics.

Name: Nemzeti Lovas Színház
Description:
National Equestrian Theater - the theater of the equestrian nation
We are proud to say that in recent years the National Equestrian Theater has entered the history of the Hungarian theater. With our high-quality productions and full house performances, we prove year by year that the National Riding Theater is a real Hungarian and an important mission in terms of country image both in Hungary and in Europe. The creed of our theater is closely related to the idea and objectives of the Kincsem - National Equestrian Program.

Wherever you perform at the National Equestrian Theater, our audience can count on real magic every time: special Andalusian horses and friesian horses, catchy tunes, hussar costumes embroidered with Hungarian motifs, fabulous carriages and of course, a great sounding actor. Tibor Pintér, director of the National Equestrian Theater, has repeatedly stated that he and his company are building bridges between the circus and the theater, with magical nights where their actors sing on galloping horses.

We believe that we Hungarians were not only once known and recognized as equestrian nations, but that we can still receive this honor today - the mission of the National Equestrian Theater. The reputation of our art has not only reached our capital city and our big cities, but we are getting more and more supportive invitations and requests from beyond our borders. Our mission is to bring Hungarian youngsters closer to the most beautiful animals in the world, the horses through the productions of the National Equestrian Theater: with the National Equestrian Theater the experience comes on horseback!

Name: Holle Vaten Theater
Description:
Over ons
Beeldend theater dat verbindt, verwondert en verhalen tot leven brengt.

Holle Vaten Theater is het werkveld van Vincent Alders: beeldend theatermaker, poppenspeler, regisseur en docent. Vanuit het noorden van Nederland creëren we voorstellingen, kunstprojecten en workshops op het snijvlak van theater, beeldende kunst en educatie.

Onze kracht ligt in:

Het vertellen van verhalen via beelden, maskers, poppen en muziek.

Het creëren van participatieve kunstprojecten met gemeenschappen.

Het geven van educatie & workshops op maat, van basisschool tot kunstacademie.

We zoeken actief de samenwerking op met onderwijsinstellingen, culturele organisaties, gemeentes, festivals en andere makers.


Meer info: www.hollevatentheater.nl

Kernactiviteiten

Theatervoorstellingen
Poëtisch, beeldend theater met wortels in mythologie, verbeeldingskracht en ambacht.
Geschikt voor festivals, kleinere zalen, culturele podia en bijzondere locaties.

 Community Art & Participatieprojecten
Bijvoorbeeld: POST – Het Reizende Postkantoor, een mobiel kunstwerk waarin bewoners hun verhaal delen en vormgeven.

Onderwijs & Workshops
Educatieve projecten zoals Atlas, waarin kunst, taal en omgeving samenkomen.
Ook inzetbaar voor BIK-trajecten, teamdagen, lessen op basisscholen en kunstopleidingen.

Samenwerkingen & coproducties
We werken interdisciplinair en op maat. Denk aan projecten met schrijvers, muzikanten, vormgevers of sociaal ontwerpers.

Name: Ibtida - The Dramatics Society of Hindu College
Description:
Founded in 1991 by Imtiaz Ali, Ibtida has continued its legacy of 32 years by being nationally awarded for self-scripted street and stage production.

The society is known across the theater circuit for choosing bold and thought provoking topics for each of their productions,

Name: Central Coast Theatre Company
Description: CCTC’s mission is to inspire, empower, and educate artists to create and bring to life stories by providing opportunities in a variety of outlets in the performing arts to all individuals thus providing enrichment to the community through culture, education, and entertainment.

Name: Riverfront Theater Company
Description:
RTC has a fifty five year history of producing community theater for local audiences.

We pride ourselves on being part of the community. A place where enthusiastic volunteers can work and play together, educate and mentor to young people, and create quality, affordable theater. We strive to be a welcoming, and encouraging group who have created a comfortable and easily accessible theater experience for actors and theater tech people throughout the Pittsburgh region.

History:

Stage Right began as the Faux Paw Players and then changed its name to the Fox Chapel Community Players, performing shows in the garage of a home in the Falconhurst housing plan back in the early-1960s. It became increasingly popular and moved first to O’Hara Elementary School, and then finally, changed its name to Stage Right and moved to Boyd Community Center — now replaced by the Lauri Ann West Community Center. After producing a few shows in the new center, we have now scheduled our 2019 and 2020 seasons of shows exclusively at Aspinwall Riverfront Park. As of the August 1, 2019, Stage Right began operating under the name Riverfront Theater Company so as to more closely align ourselves with our geographic location and distinguish ourselves as a separate entity from Stage Right in Greensburg, PA.

Many past and present members of the RTC family have taken the skills they’ve honed with us and applied them to professional careers in the entertainment industry. We are constantly re-evaluating what we do and will always strive to become an even better source of cultural and creative experiences, and continue to be a proving ground for the professionals of tomorrow.

Name: Theatriks
Description:
At Theatriks, we create practical and reliable audio-visual solutions for homes and businesses. Our work ranges from home theatres and private cinemas to multi-room audio systems, projectors, and professional sound setups for cafés, clubs, restaurants, and auditoriums.

We keep the process simple. It begins with a site visit to understand your space and requirements. We then help with procurement, installation, and complete integration of the right AV systems — from speakers and amplifiers to projectors and screens. Every setup is designed to perform well, look good, and be easy to use.

What drives us is simple: great AV should be effortless to use and impossible to forget. Whether you’re watching a film, filling a lounge with music, or running a packed venue, we make sure your system delivers every time.

Theatriks: delivering audio-visual experiences that fit your space and your lifestyle.

 Website: www.theatriks.com
 Email: info@theatriks.com
 Contact: +91 9920399203

[Home Theatre Experiences, Professional Audio, Acoustics, AV Integration, AV Solutions, Private Cinemas, Projectors & Screens]

Name: Open Book Theatre
Description: Open Book Theatre Company is a professional theatre located in Trenton, MI.  Our mission to promote connection through theatrical storytelling.  We produce a 5 show mainstage season as well as Driveway Theatre that goes out into the community each summer.

Name: French British Improvisation
Description: La French British Improvisation est une compagnie d’improvisation basée à Londres depuis plus de 10 ans. Elle propose chaque mois des concepts d’improvisation théâtrale au public francophone de Londres ainsi que des prestations auprès d'entreprises ou organisations.

Name: Roxedge Entertainment
Description: Roxedge Entertainment is a theatre production and general management company founded by Clayton Howe in 2022  with a focus on raising the voices less heard. Since its inception, Roxedge has produced Broadway and Off-Broadway Productions including Here Lies Love, How To Dance In Ohio and Dracula, A Comedy of Terrors and a podcast, Entertainmentx getting to the heart, soul and drive of top performers in the entertainment industry. Upcoming productions include The Art of Life & Never Be King.

Name: Débora Karan Produções
Description: Produtora independente de eventos teatrais, artísticos e/ou culturais visando ampliar espaço e promover conexões e encontros para que artistas curitibanos possam criar e apresentar suas obras autorais em espaços culturais pela cidade.

Name: Candle House Collective
Description:
Founded in 2018 by Evan Neiden, Candle House Collective are award-winning creators of Alternate Reality Theatre: experiences designed to infiltrate an audience’s reality using immersion, interaction, and choice-driven storytelling.

Like the folk-tale from which the company borrows its name, Candle House’s aim is to displace audiences from their reality and ignite their imaginations. Their revolutionary approach uses analog communication methods like phone calls and physical deliveries to reach participants worldwide and infuse their everyday spaces with mystery, memory, and magic.

There’s someone waiting for you on the other end of the line. All you have to do is pick up the phone.

Name: Les Historiens du Présent
Description:
Les historiens du présent est une association loi 1901 qui organise des spectacles de théâtre en tournée.
Nous avons également une chaîne YouTube où, en dehors des présentations de nos spectacles, nous publions des vidéos de nos tournées, nos rencontres avec les habitants et commerçants des villes où nous nous produisons mais aussi des sketchs divers sur des sujets sociétaux ou autres.

Name: L'Horta Teatre
Description:
L'Horta Teatre és una de les formacions teatrals més veteranes de la Comunitat Valenciana. Més de quaranta anys de presència en el panorama teatral valencià, i espanyol avalen una trajectòria professional que de forma continuada ha anat presentant les seues produccions al públic.

L'Horta Teatre es defineix com una entitat del sector cultural que té per missió posar en marxa programes d'actuació que permeten la creació, producció i exhibició de les arts escèniques en general i, més concretament del teatre infantil.

Conviuen dues línies de treball clarament diferenciades que vertebren l'activitat de l'empresa: la companyia L'Horta Teatre i la Sala L'Horta. Aquestes dues línies de treball són complementaries entre si, i es corresponen amb els objectius de l'empresa: la creació i manteniment d'un centre de producció estable i de referència i la creació i manteniment d'un centre d'exhibició referent i estable de teatre infantil i juvenil.

Name: Maria Baric Company
Description: Maria Baric Company on palkittu itähelsinkiläinen teatteri, joka yhdistelee taiteessaan ennakkoluulottomasti erilaisia esittävän taiteen muotoja, kuten nukketeatteria, musiikkia, varjoteatteria, tanssia, tuliteatteria ja sirkusta. Maria Baric Companyn toiminnan ytimessä on taiteen saavutettavuus, ja yksi keskeisistä Companyn toimintamuodoista onkin erityisesti Itä-Helsingin alueelle jalkautuminen ja taiteen- ja kulttuurin vieminen erilaisten yleisöjen luo.

Name: Pogingen tot afscheid
Description:
Vaak komt de dood onverwachts. Maar als je deze bewust tegemoet treedt, vanwege een terminale ziekte, dementie of een euthanasie wens, dan is de rouw voor zowel de stervende als de naasten al vroeg aanwezig. 

Er bestaan al veel universele en nationale rituelen voor het verwerken van rouw na de dood, zoals een begrafenis, maar nog niet voor de periode ervoor. ‘Pogingen tot afscheid’ is een theatervoorstelling waarin de kracht van rituelen wordt onderzocht bij het verwerken van rouw vóór de dood.

Vier rituelen, geïntroduceerd vanuit een fictief karakter, afgewisseld met persoonlijke verhalen van de acteurs die meer gericht zijn op het algemene afscheid in het leven, zoals afscheid van liefde, werk of woonruimte.

Het publiek is vrij om deel te nemen en verhalen te delen, maar is zeker niet verplicht. Je bent op elk moment vrij om te bewegen tussen het zijn van een toeschouwer en het zijn van deelnemer in een ritueel, tussen het zien van een voorstelling en het beleven van een ervaring.

Name: Mylaga
Description:
Community of English-speaking activities in Málaga and the Costa del Sol. 

We use the power of improv to train individuals, teams and corporate leaders on communication, creativity, teamwork, accountability, problem-solving and leadership.

Name: Shadowland Theatre
Description: Shadowland Theatre works with communities to unearth their distinctive histories, create new stories and celebrate special events. We animate streets, parks, and public spaces with our bold design sensibility and raucous theatricality.

Name: Oddments Theatre
Description: Oddments is a full-time Christian Theatre Company based in Yeovil, Somerset with a heart for mission. We take theatre with a message into churches, schools and prisons across the UK.

Name: Les Débouvetés
Description: Troupe indépendante d'art lyrique, spécialisée dans la création d'opéras.

Name: Asociación Playbill
Description:
Productora que realiza espectáculos de teatro musical peruanos y latinoamericanos 

Trabajamos con artistas reconocidos

Desarrollamos actividades en pro del crecimiento de la industria del teatro musical en el país.

Name: Latine Theater Lab
Description: Latiné Theater Lab's mission is to create a dynamic platform for Latiné voices, celebrating our diverse cultural heritage through innovative and impactful storytelling. Through a commitment to artistic excellence, collaboration, and authenticity, we strive to enrich the cultural landscape, foster community engagement, and inspire meaningful connections.

Name: Bottegavaga
Description:
Bottegavaga è un'associazione culturale, nel cuore di Venezia, nata dall’unione di attori che hanno più di vent’anni di esperienza in ambito della creazione di spettacoli e dell’insegnamento di tecniche teatrali.

La compagnia propone, oltre a spettacoli di propria creazione, corsi e laboratori rivolti a tutti ed esperienze di teatro sul territorio anche per privati, in italiano e in inglese.

Name: Sandstone KC
Description:
Sandstone is a non-for-profit theatrical arts company founded by Danielle Omer, Landon Hudson, and Bryleigh Giffin. The three founders are close friends and performers in Kansas City area. Sandstone was created to serve the local artists in KC, by giving them a space to share their talents in various projects and shows.
Sandstone made their debut in Summer 2024, with its first project being an original concept by the founders titled: "my song". This was showcased as a part of the KC Fringe Festival. 
Sandstone has just recently announced their next concept based cabaret: CENTURY21 with an expected performance date of January 4th, 2025.

Name: Rice Cookie Improv
Description:
We are a diverse group of passionate improv theater enthusiasts gathering weekly to do improv and to socialize together outside of improv. Once you’ve attended a Rice Cookie session you might get addicted to both the inclusivity of this community and to the joy of free improv creativity that emerges in the workshops. We wish to include everyone and welcome people with or without prior improv experience. We welcome you to our workshops and shows!

Join Our Workshops: https://www.meetup.com/ricecookieimprov/ 
Follow us on Instragram: https://www.instagram.com/ricecookieimprov/

Name: Arte Em Cena Bauru
Description:
A Sirius Produções, braço criativo da Escola Sirius de Teatro e busca colocar a cidade de Bauru e região no mapa dos grandes musicais, sendo não apenas um celeiro de novos talentos, mas também uma produtora que proporciona ao nosso público local a experiência das grandes salas de teatro da
capital

Name: Warner Robins Little Theatre
Description: Warner Robins Little Theatre is a non-profit community theatre that has been providing live theatrical productions to patrons in Middle Georgia since 1962. The theatre stages five main shows every season, from comedies to dramas to musicals, as well as short-run special events and theatre workshops.

Name: La Cahute
Description:
Théâtre - Improvisation - Conte - Éducation artistique et culturelle

Facebook : La Cahute
Instagram : lacahutetheatre

Name: dftc (Dorothy's Friends Theatre Company)
Description: USC's premier student-run theatre company dedicated to putting on productions and events that empower the LGBTQIA+ community.

Name: Oaks Center Cinema
Description: Movie Theater in Oaks, PA. The Oaks Center offers an enthralling experience for movie enthusiasts.

Name: Stowarzyszenie Twórców "Cztery wymiary to dla nas za mało"
United Solo
Description: Learn more about the world's largest solo theatre festival at unitedsolo.org.

Name: Strathclyde Musical Theatre Society
Description: Strathclyde Musical Theatre Society is a student run theatre company that operates within the Strathclyde Students Union to offer musical theatre opportunities to the students of the University.

Name: Creatures & Cocktails
Description:
Creatures & Cocktails is a storytelling speakeasy: a curated, live narrative experience that blends tabletop roleplaying, facilitated storytelling, and social hospitality into a single, accessible event. 

Designed for both newcomers and experienced players, it emphasizes collaboration, emotional engagement, and shared authorship over rules mastery or performance. Participants gather around a table, guided by professional storytellers, to collectively shape a story in real time—one that prioritizes connection, curiosity, and creative risk. 

The result is an inclusive cultural experience where narrative becomes a communal act rather than a spectator sport.

Name: The Trip Fantastic
Description: The improv comedy company with a twist: one cast, one show, one night.

Name: Children's Acting Academy
Description: Children's Acting Academy has been training children for careers in theater, film, and TV for over 30 years. Students have gone on to study at the four major performing arts high schools in NYC, and to star and appear in Broadway shows.

Name: Cinefolks Homecinemas
Description:
Welcome to Cinefolks, the ultimate home cinema experience! We are a leading home cinema company dedicated to providing top-ofthe- line audiovisual systems for movie enthusiasts and music lovers alike.

Our mission is to create a personalized and immersive cinematic experience in the comfort of your own home. We offer a wide range of home cinema solutions tailored to meet the needs and preferences of our clients. From large-scale projectors to highquality speakers and sound systems, we provide all the necessary equipment to bring the cinema experience to your doorstep.

Our team consists of experienced professionals who are passionate about creating the perfect home cinema experience for our clients. We provide a comprehensive consultation to understand your requirements and preferences, ensuring that we deliver a solution that exceeds your expectations.

Name: Mise(s) en Scène / Cie Colin Muset
Description:
Créée en 1997, la compagnie est implantée sur la commune d’Herbignac en Loire-Atlantique, au château de Ranrouët plus précisément.
Structure professionnelle à la fois organisateur, producteur et diffuseur de spectacles, notre structure œuvre à la valorisation des patrimoines architecturaux, naturels et humains par l’action culturelle et le spectacle vivant.
Nous travaillons en lien avec les territoires et les acteurs institutionnels et associatifs qui les animent.
Pour ce, nous disposons d’un pôle formation et d’un pôle création :
- Le pôle formation, porteur des valeurs de l’éducation populaire et de la culture pour tous, s’adresse à tous les publics jeunes et moins jeunes, ordinaires et extraordinaires.
- Le pôle création, pour sa part, est constitué d’une équipe de professionnels permanents et intermittents mettant leurs compétences et leurs différents savoirs faire au service des projets et des sites sur lesquels nous intervenons. Cette équipe de professionnels a aussi en charge l’animation du pôle formation.

Name: MULTIVERSOteatro
Description: Benvenuti nel sito di MULTIVERSOteatro. I nostri spettacoli parlano sopratutto del ruolo della donna nella storia e nella società contemporanea. Sono il prodotto finale di un lavoro lungo e curato che coinvolge professionisti e artisti, al centro c'è il lavoro dell'attore creativo, che si fonde in una partitura unica con immagini, musica, luce, costumi, oggetti e scenografia.

Name: NEPATHYA
Description:
We're a student-run theatre group from PGDAV College Evening, Delhi University, dedicated to nurturing artistic talent and providing a platform for creative expression. Our mission is to educate and empower students in the world of theatre, while fostering a community of passionate thespians. Join us for a journey of artistic growth, exploration, and entertainment!
 Creating Stories, Building Dreams

Name: BlueJay Theater Collective
Description: BlueJay is a Dramatic Theater-based student organization at Emerson College. Their purpose as a collective and organization is to execute and depict relatable theater in which their young-adult and college-aged audiences can see themselves accurately portrayed onstage. In doing so, BlueJay will also work to make audition material accessible for students who are struggling to find text that suits their age group, gender identity, relationship to the content, and/or more, creating a collection of literary materials available for use. They aim to appeal to and uplift the demographic they are working with in creating an inclusive, professional, and familial work environment, as well as creating a space in which actors, designers, Managers, and staff feel supported and encouraged to share their ideas. Their goal is to inspire the artistic spirits of young creatives through proper representation and relatability.

Name: AVS Cinemas
Description:
Home cinema, also called home theaters or theater rooms, are home entertainment audio-visual systems that seek to reproduce a movie theater experience .
Using "4D AFX" the new experience in sound cinemas 
We offer a full range of services, including AV system design, equipment sales (audio, video, lighting, control systems, rigging, stage design), installation and upkeep/maintenance – all in line with your specifications, your budget and your timeframe

Name: Leela - An Indian Community Theatre
Description: The heart of Leela’s purpose is to provide an avenue for individuals to explore and express their creativity through collaborative theatre productions, workshops, and play readings, and to evolve to their highest potential. Leela's vision is to provide an avenue for individuals to explore and express their creative potential and evolve through theatre. Leela is a sponsored project of the Austin Creative Alliance.

Name: Verse Orlando
Description: Verse Orlando uses brand new never-before-seen holographic rendering technology to offer interactive experiences where you can explore dreamlike worlds, interact with 3D characters, and experience captivating four-dimensional art. Located in Dezerland Park, we host multiple 30-60 minute immersive adventures best experienced with families, friends, partners, and groups.

Name: Show Ready Productions CIC
Description:
We at show ready productions CIC are a dedicated creative theatre company based in South Cheshire committed to enriching the lives of young individuals and the broader community through the performing arts. Our plan is that our operations will be anchored in a physical location where we engage our audience directly creating an immersive experience that resonates with our values of creativity, inclusivity, and artistic expression. With a small passionate team of three employees and a wider team of 7 collaborators, we strive to deliver high-quality theatrical productions and workshops that cater to diverse customer segments including young aspiring performer, Schoolchildren and theatre lovers. Our Primary offerings include:

•	musical theatre productions, 
•	community theatre events, 
•	workshops for young performance 
•	performance showcases for local talent 

Through these initiatives we aim to inspire creativity, foster teamwork and cultivate a love for the performing arts within our community.  

In addition, we aim to provide opportunities to our young creatives providing the necessary experience in the production of theatre, encouraging wannabe directors, musical directors, choreographers and stage managers to engage in our productions.

Name: Production Workshop
Description:
Production Workshop (PW) is Brown University’s oldest and only completely student-run theater, established in 1960.

Located in T.F. Green Hall at 7 Young Orchard Avenue, PW maintains two blackbox theaters (the Downspace and the Upspace) for use by the Brown Community.

PW produces 4 mainstage works each year, plus an annual short play festival, immersive art pieces, and more.

Name: BEDOUIN SHAKESPEARE COMPANY LTD
Description: BEDOUIN SHAKESPEARE COMPANY LTD is a touring theatre company based in London.  They specialise in large scale international Shakespeare tours. They run educational workshops at top schools around the world..

Name: Penny Drop Productions
Description:
Penny Drop Productions are a group of theatre-makers (Holly Bancroft, Ella Hakin and Sophia Woolfenden) experimenting with devised performance that explores the fun and the uncanny. We are interested in use of movement, multimedia, integrated sound, comedy and text - always considering
the female perspective and the audience experience.

Name: Drive N Theatre
Description: It is SHOWTIME! The Drive N' Theatre is a classic feel with a modern touch located in Newton, Illinois!

Name: SUD - studentské universitní divadlo, z.s.
Description:
Divadlo SUD je prostor v centru Českých Budějovic, který je otevřený všem, kteří se chtějí umělecky realizovat a navazovat skrze umění dialog sami se sebou, s diváky, posluchači, se všemi.

Nové vedení je mladé a plné energie. Pohání nás láska k divadlu, která je upřímná, bláznivá a bezbřehá. S mladistvým elánem přichází nespočet nápadů, které se v nás rodí každou vteřinou. Nejsme však poblázněná skupina mladých a potrhlých bohémů. Jsme vzdělaní, máme praxi, názor a k možnosti rozžívat prostor našeho divadla přistupujeme s velkou pokorou a respektem.

Jsme přesvědčeni, že tvůrčí sílu dokážeme proměňovat v jasném konceptu. Chceme divákům nabídnout vidění umění našima očima a společně s nimi vytvářet jedinečné události.

Jsme si vědomi, že naši velkou devízou je několikaletá tradice, kterou SUD má ve svém samotném fungování a především ve své nabídce vzdělávání v dramatické tvorbě.

Kurzy dramatické tvorby mohou navštěvovat děti od předškolních let po dospěláky neomezeného věku. Vzdělávací programy jdou ruku v ruce s naší filozofií, že lásku k divadlu v sobě může objevovat a rozvíjet opravdu každý a divadlo si tak vychovává vlastní generace tvůrčích osobností.

Naší ideou je poskytnout místo, útočiště pro tvorbu a poznání. Proto jsme otevření pro jedince i projekty, které nemají možnost vlastního prostoru. Máte kapelu? Fotíte a rádi byste své fotografie někde vystavili? Děláte divadlo? Pokud je mezi vámi někdo, kdo by rád využil divadlo SUD pro vlastní realizaci, rádi se s vámi sejdeme a pobavíme se o možné spolupráci.

Name: Mejor Con Arte
Description:
Mejor con Arte es una empresa dinámica que ofrece servicios integrales para el mundo del espectáculo, dando respuesta efectiva a cualquier necesidad relacionada con las artes escénicas. 

La empresa se ha especializado en la interpretación patrimonial a través de las artes escénicas. 

Disponemos de la más amplia selección de espectáculos de creación propia, relatos, teatro infantil, teatro familiar, calle, conciertos…

Y si lo que buscas no está dentro de nuestros montajes, nosotros te lo facilitamos, Magos, Cuenta cuentos, acróbatas, viajes en globo, actores, técnicos, conciertos, monólogos, mentalistas, diseño y construcción de escenografías, atrezzo, eventos a medida y todo lo que imagines.

Name: Secrets of the Night
Description:
Met Secrets of the Night in uw theater, weet u een ding zeker. Niemand is veilig voor de geheimen en schandalen die boven water zullen komen tijdens deze avondvullende improvisatievoorstelling.

Het is een mysterie wat de acteurs te wachten zal staan wanneer de avond start. Met alleen een kledinghint op zak staan ze op het podium zonder ook maar een regel tekst gerepeteerd te hebben. Wanneer we van start gaan krijgen de acteurs te horen wie ze van elkaar zijn, waar ze zijn en waarom ze samen komen. Als het algemene verhaal verteld is krijgen de acteurs individueel, een voor een ook hun persoonlijke verhaal te horen. Een verhaal vol geheimen, schandalen en bedrog. Het publiek krijgt alles te horen en kan zich klaar gaan maken voor een heerlijk avondje ramptoerisme als alle geheimen langzaam boven water komen drijven. Met hilarische opmerkingen en pijnlijke situaties vullen onze acteurs de avond met prachtig en bijzonder improvisatietheater. Een avond die u niet wilt missen!

Name: La Robe Rouge
Description: Jeunes étudiants en théâtre en voie de professionnalisation, la compagnie a déjà 5 ans derrière elle.

Name: Dramatoriet
Description:
- Dramapedagogik, interaktivitet, scenkonst -

På Dramatoriet finns auktoriserade dramapedagoger, projektledare och skådespelare med interaktivitet som specialité. Det gör att våra projekt har både pedagogiska och konstnärliga kvalitéer. 

Interaktivitet, samarbete och lekfullt lärande är det vi gör allra bäst.

Läs mer på dramatoriet.se eller kontakta oss för mer information.

Name: Nearly Theatre
Description:
Founded by Hanna Fogelqvist and Alice Sandström in 2020, Nearly Theatre has found its niche in adapting and recontextualising familiar stories. So for we have genderbent Oscar Wilde, analysed the legacy of Henrik Ibsen, bedazzled William Shakespeare, and queered Jane Austen.

As a non-profit organisation, Nearly Theatre is centered around the word ‘amateur’ - someone who loves what they do. We are a queer, feminist, class-conscious, democratic organisation, and we strive to make ethics of care present both in how we relate to each other behind the stage and what we perform on it.

Name: Arizona Community Theatrical Company
Description: AHWATUKEE CHILDRENS THEATRE INC is a company based out of 11011 SOUTH 48TH STREET ROOM B101, PHOENIX, Arizona, United States.

Name: Cie Les 3 points de...
Description:
C'est en 2006 que deux amies Marie-Alexandra Deplagne et Séverine Donneux, alors lycéennes et passionnées de théâtre imaginent monter leur propre spectacle "Et pourquoi pas Tombouctou ?". C'est à cette occasion qu'elles créent la compagnie "Les 3 points de ..." 
A la fin du lycée les études éloignent les deux amies et pendant quelques années la compagnie s'est endormie.
En 2020, suite à ses études à l'Académie Supérieure de Théâtre d'Anjou, Marie-Alexandra Deplagne décide de relancer la compagnie et de d'en faire une compagnie professionnelle.

Name: de Witte Pomp
Description: De Witte Pomp maakt eigenzinnig muziek- en poppentheater voor jong én oud. We geloven heilig in de kracht van verbeelding. Nemen ons publiek mee op reis naar werelden waar alles mogelijk is. Vertalen grote thema’s naar kleine verhalen. En maken van kleine verhalen grote avonturen. Het ambacht van poppenspel staat op een eigentijdse en verrassende manier altijd centraal. Net als live muziek.

Name: The Maysville Players
Description: The Maysville Players is one of the oldest theatre groups in the commonwealth. Housed in the historic Washington Opera House, the Players offer a variety of performances each year, including musicals, comedies, dramas, and children's shows.

Name: Fraternal Compagnia Aps
Description: Fraternalcompagnia is a company based out of Via Cavazzoni 2/g, Bologna, Bo, Italy.

Name: Nevid Teatar
Description:
We are a professional theater troupe dedicated to the development of original works and innovative artistic expression.

For 14 years, we have collaborated with artists from the country and the region, creating diverse cultural content for children, youth, and adults. So far, we have performed in six countries, 60 cities and municipalities, and almost 150 different venues across the Republic of Srpska, Bosnia and Herzegovina, the region, and Europe, engaging 55 artists from around the world.

We are recognized in the theatrical world for our original approach to executing complex audio-visual projects, which we perform in a wide variety of spaces. We have produced an absurd cabaret, an animated fairy tale, a philosophical stand-up, a musical pantomime, interactive educational plays, poetry evenings, as well as an expressionist poem, an anti-monochoreodrama, and an animated film-strip. In addition to producing original plays and projects, we organize visual and literary contests, interactive drama workshops, animation and educational programs, expert lectures on education, as well as strategic projects for cultural decentralization.

We also develop digital content for all age groups. So far, we have created an animated theater etiquette guide for children and adults, an illustrated and audio book of fairy tales and fables for children, instructional and educational methods for working with children called "Education through Play," an illustrated book on proper nutrition titled "Nevid Teatar’s Healthy  Entertainer" and the first regional audio book for children with developmental difficulties, created according to Easy to Read standards.

On the theater stages of the country and the region, our work is recognized as original and innovative. This is supported by numerous awards and recognitions at international festivals in the categories of multimedia, creativity, originality, innovative animation, as well as best play, best actor and actress, and best dramatic text.
Location: City of Banja Luka, Republika Srpska

Name: The Actors Studio of New Jersey
Teatro Inovarte
Description:
Teatro Inovarte is a  dynamic Spanish-language theater company based in Chicago, non-profit organization 501(c)3 dedicated to celebrating the beauty and power of performing arts rooted in Hispanic culture. We bring together talented artists, innovative productions, and a passion for storytelling to create meaningful and memorable experiences.

Our company serves as a cultural bridge, showcasing the richness of Hispanic traditions while embracing contemporary voices that reflect the diverse world we live in. Committed to inclusivity, creativity, and artistic excellence, Teatro Inovarte provides a platform where stories are told authentically and audiences are invited to connect, reflect, and be inspired.

By engaging with the community through performances, workshops, and collaborations, we aim to nurture a love for the arts and make theater accessible to everyone. At Teatro Inovarte, we believe in the transformative power of the arts to unite people and celebrate the vibrant stories that shape our collective identity.

Name: Mini Moon Theatre
Description: New theatre company aiming to make entertaining theatre for young people!

Name: Emmerson & Ward
Description: We are a new writing company with a focus on producing new LGBTQ+ work for the UK and international touring.

Name: NEUSWIJS
Description: Wij zijn NEUSWIJS. Een collectief van jonge makers uit Utrecht. NEUSWIJS staat voor de nieuwsgierigheid naar theater, wij maken namelijk nieuwsgierig, speels, beeldend & vervreemdend jeugdtheater. Want de echte wereld is al echt genoeg. Voor ons is het belangrijk dat iedereen op jonge leeftijd de mogelijkheid heeft zich te laten verwonderen door theater. Wij doen dat op onze beurt door theater naar kinderen te brengen. We spelen onze voorstellingen overal. Van klaslokalen tot bibliotheken en van gymzalen tot kleine theaters.

Name: Good Soup Entertainment
Description:
We are producers, creatives, and marketers committed to supporting storytellers and their artistic homes.

We believe in the power of theatre and its ability to transform communities and change lives for the better.

Our mission is to help bring compelling stories to life and make them widely accessible to fans old . . . and new.

We’re looking for partners who share a passion for pushing boundaries and challenging assumptions. Partners who believe the best results come from open collaboration and calculated risks. That’s Good Soup.

Name: ACT Players
Description:
