Established in 2004, ACT Players is home to a diverse group of individuals who share a common passion for the “performing arts”, both on the stage and in the wings. We are not simply actors, but directors, pit musicians, producers, costumers, choreographers, light and sound technicians, and most importantly, we are volunteers who support an organization built on core family values, inclusiveness, pride, fellowship, talent, mutual respect, and love for the theater.
Towards that end, ACT Players endeavors to:

• Provide challenging workshops and drama courses to interested students and adults as an enrichment and extension of the community theater program.

• Create quality, educational and cultural experiences for anyone wishing to participate in any area of the theater/performing arts.

• Give young people an appreciation of the performing arts, imparting to them the necessary skills for producing, directing and participating in community theater and other related projects

• Continue to seek opportunity for future growth within our community and to partner effectively with other dramatic organizations.

• Build a true sense of community strength and spirit by utilizing the existing talents of local thespians and providing a creative outlet for aspiring performers.

Name: Le Studio teatar
Description:
Le Studio theatre has been active in Serbia (Belgrade) since 2008, with its own actors and technical team, working space, and scene, including 70-100 seats and a continuous repertoire (including a theatre and music program). 

It is founded and managed by two professionals (theatre director/musician and set designer/puppeteer) with 15 years of experience in theatre methodology. One of the main activities of the Le Studio is training on acting techniques in structured, yearlong acting courses. And also, training of theatre professionals.

The plays deal with topics relevant to society, experimenting with different aesthetics and genres, with a strong visual approach (using shadow theatre, puppets, video, etc.) 

Audience development is one of Le Studio's missions. The audience in Le Studio is friendly hosted, active on stage, and asked to share impressions after playing with authors and actors in a relaxed atmosphere.

Update: The theatre currently due to covid does not have its venue anymore, only space for creation and workshops.

Name: Klub kultury Uherské Hradiště p.o.
Description: Klub kultury Uherské Hradiště, příspěvková organizace

Name: Encore Performing Arts
Description: Encore Performing Arts inspires and empowers young artists to discover and develop important life skills through unparalleled arts education, mentorship and extraordinary theater experiences.

Name: BaronTheater Opende
Description: Het BaronTheater is het leukste theater op de grenz van Groningen en Friesland!

Name: Skull And Dagger Dramatic Society
Description: Skull & Dagger Dramatic Society is San Diego State University's oldest club. We are a student-run theatre club, working to expand our reach to the arts as a whole. We produce full length shows every semester, as well as offer our assistance as a registered student organization to students who want to produce their own work. Through our regular Uncaged Festival, we offer space for students to promote new works and perform. All our productions are student directed, casting students. We host other events throughout the year, such as headshot events, hangouts, and movie nights!

Name: Les Choristes Musical Troupe
Description: Welcome to Les Choristes!  We are a talented  group of actors and stage crew  who perform a shortened Broadway performance once a year for Leland High School.

Name: La Compagnie Merlot
Description:
La Compagnie Merlot est une compagnie d'improvisation théâtrale parisienne fondée en 2018. Avec plus de 200 spectacles devant plus de 3000 spectateurs, et des dates à Nantes, Rennes, Annecy, Berlin, Lyon, Bordeaux, Aix, Marseille et 3 éditions du Festival d'Avignon, elle s'impose petit à petit comme l'une des étoiles montantes de l'improvisation théâtrale française.

Après son succès au Festival d'Avignon, la Compagnie Merlot joue désormais son spectacle phare "Spin-Off" sur les planches de La Divine Comédie, à Paris. La compagnie est spécialisée dans le long form narratif, et enseigne également l'improvisation théâtrale à une centaine d'élèves au sein de son école "Les Cours Merlot", fondée en 2023.

Name: Naturtheater Heidenheim e.V.
Description: Naturtheater Heidenheim is a company based out of 3 Hugo-Rupf-Platz, Heidenheim an der Brenz, Baden-Württemberg, Germany.

Name: WWU Student Theatre Productions
Description: Western Washington University's Student Theatre Productions Club. Full length plays, new works, and staged readings.

Name: The Tent Theater
Description: The Tent Theater Company nurtures, supports, and advocates for American playwrights and cross-disciplinary theater makers later in their careers, fostering connections among them and promoting their artistry and wellness to the larger community.

Name: Ondernemersclub De Rode Loper
Description: Theater de Koornbeurs kan dankzij Ondernemersclub de Rode Loper speciale belevenissen organiseren. De bedrijven die aangesloten zijn bij De Rode Loper doneren jaarlijks een bedrag. Het theater kan daardoor bijzondere momenten creëren.

Name: Montague Shakespeare Festival
Description:
Welcome to the inaugural Montague Shakespeare Festival 2024! Nestled in the charming village of Turners Falls within Montague, Massachusetts, we are proud to launch an exciting celebration of Shakespeare’s immortal works. The Shea Theater will serve as the central hub for all stage performances and workshops, marking its significance in the festival’s happenings.

The festival is a dynamic, three-week-long celebration of Shakespeare’s timeless works, designed to inspire, educate, and entertain. From stage performances and hands-on workshops to community-led events and educational initiatives, our festival promises a diverse array of experiences.

The Montague Shakespeare Festival invites everyone – locals and visitors, novices and enthusiasts, young and old – to engage with Shakespeare’s works in a creative spirit. Together, let’s celebrate the enduring genius of the Bard and foster a deeper appreciation for the transformative power of theatre.

Name: Studio 7 de Coeur
Description: Amoureux de la nature humaine et animés par l'envie de créer du lien entre les individus, nous inscrivons la ligne artistique de la compagnie autour de sujets sociétaux et intemporels.

Name: TeatroE
Description: TeatroE è un'associazione di promozione sociale nata per raccontare, sperimentare e trasformarsi sul palco, tra produzioni originali, formazione e collaborazioni, senza mai perdere la voglia di creare. Gestisce due spazi, il Teatro di Villazzano e il Teatro Comunale di Nogara, e collabora stabilmente con la scuola EstroTeatro, dando vita a progetti e spettacoli di grande qualità.

Name: O Aturuxo de Melpómene
Description:
A asociación teatral “O Aturuxo de Melpómene” constitúese o 24 de abril do ano 2007, en Narón, por iniciativa dun grupo de 13 alumnas e alumnos da Escola de Teatro de Narón, que sentimos a necesidade de crear unha entidade propia coa principal finalidade de promover os proxectos e traballo en conxunto no ámbito teatral.

“O Aturuxo de Melpómene” e unha asociación sen ánimo de lucro, centrada específicamente no traballo teatral a través dos seguintes ámbitos:

➽ Ámbito de promoción e divulgación de espectáculos teatrais:
Creación.
Deseño.
Montaxe.
Realización.
➽ Ámbito formativo:
Formación Permanente: dirixida ó afianzamento e desenvolvemento das habilidades teatrais.
Formación Específica: dirixida á incorporación de recursos para traballos específicos.
➽ Actividades complementarias: Todas aquelas dirixidas a promover a asociación ou a complementar as actividades a desenvolver.

Name: Klouns Theatre Company
Description:
"We strive to facilitate and environment where everyone can rediscover the world around them, where performers can risk and create freely, and where audiences can witness core human truths. Above all, we strive to deepen a lasting connection between fellow persons as a direct result of our work as a company." 
- Founding Members of Klouns Theatre Company

Name: Atelje 212
Description: Atelje 212 is a theatre located in Belgrade (Serbia), established in 1956, on the premises of the Borba building in front of 212 chairs. It was founded by a group of directors, actors and writers with the aim of creating a theater with an avant-garde repertoire, which would compete with the classical theaters in the city. Its opening play was the staging of Johann Wolfgang von Goethe's Faust, directed by Mira Trailović.

Name: VOH Music One
Location: Đa Kao, Ho Chi Minh City

Name: Égal Teater
Description: Égal Teater driver Trikkestallen på Torshov og Skillebekk Scene.

Name: InTeam Producties
Description:
Wij maken musical.
Op het podium. In de coulissen. Achter de schermen.
InTeam Producties is een groep makers die houdt van goed theater, sterke verhalen en een publiek dat openstaat voor meer.
Meer lef, meer gevoel, meer diepgang.
Al meer dan 10 jaar brengen we voorstellingen die niet schreeuwen, maar binnenkomen.
We kiezen voor producties die raken. Soms luid, soms klein. Maar altijd echt.
Van underground cult tot bekroonde klassiekers: als het iets losmaakt, zijn wij vertrokken.

Name: Yeppoon Choral Society Inc
Description: Musical Theatre Since 1965.

Name: YOUNG THEATRE MAKERS
Description:
Young Theatre Makers is a new youth theatre in Amsterdam for ages of 8 - 25. 




We are a creative and inclusive company with young people's your voices at the centre.  
Learn acting skills, improvisation techniquesand physical theatre to devise a group performance. 
You will build your self-confidence, develop your individual voice, make a piece of original theatre to perform in front of friends and family!

To register for one of our groups, of for more information visit our website: www.youngtheatremakers.com

Name: Espaço Cênico Produções Artisticas
Description:
A arte não responde. Pergunta.
Os 38 anos de experiência da Espaço Cênico moldou uma 
forma particular de fazer artístico, que levou seu idealizador e 
diretor, Luiz Antonio Rocha (teatro, cinema, TV, produção 
cultural), a realizar montagens longevas que estabelecem uma 
ponte entre o teatro e a filosofia, e que expressam uma 
profunda reflexão do Homem e de suas transformações. A 
escolha de suas peças prioriza 3 aspectos essenciais, que têm 
demonstrado resultados surpreendentes em produções de 
baixo custo, mas de grande alcance e abrangência de público: 
Temas relevantes e atuais + trabalho do ator + concepção 
cênica minimalista. Essa fórmula sui generis se traduz em 
respeito ao público, sucessos de crítica e de público que tem 
lotado salas de espetáculos por todo o Brasil e possibilitado 
extensas temporadas (de 5 até 10 anos) sustentadas pela 
contagiante divulgação boca-a-boca e pela positiva 
combinação de arte e a reflexão

Name: Theater On The Roof
Description: "Theater on the Roof" is the first alternative theater in Armenia, founded in 2016. It is the first rooftop theater in the world. Performances take place on the roof. In our theater we combine theatrical performances, concert program and wine hospitality. The play schedule is very diverse, our actors and directors are from different theaters of Armenia. We have had the opportunity to host world personalities and received a high rating.

Name: Oxford Peoples Theatre
Description: Oxford People's Theatre  are an intergenerational community theatre company that create community through theatre with anyone from 9- 90+. We run classes, workshops and create events for and with Oxfordshire residents.

Name: Asociación Juvenil Teatros Mágicos
Description:
Somos una Asociación Juvenil fundada en enero de 2017 con el fin de crear y disfrutar del teatro.

Desde espectáculos de títeres hasta pompas de jabón, pasando por espectáculos de magia. En cada una de las obras se pretende que la gente que acude al espectáculo se quede con un buen sabor de boca al salir del teatro y que pasen un rato divertido, entretenido y mágico.

Name: Butterfield Stage Players
Description: Butterfield Stage Players is a company based out of 201 S Denton St, Gainesville, Texas, United States.

Name: The Imbible
Description: Since 2014, THE IMBIBLE Off-Broadway shows have combined music and comedy with history, science, and of course drinks to take audiences on journeys through time and around the world while learning about and enjoying cocktails and spirits!

Name: Art Theater Karolos Koun
Description: The Art Theatre (Theatro Technis) was founded in 1942 -the darkest years of the Nazi occupation- by Karolos Koun, setting as its aims the promotion of new Greek playwrights, the foundation of a Drama School with its own highly individual style, the familiarization of the Greek public with all the major foreign playwrights, both classical and modern, the staging of Ancient Drama. Its principal characteristics were and still are: collective work, theatrical training and common artistic aims.

Name: Joy 4 Kids - French and Spanish Theatre
Description:
Modern Foreign Language events for primary schools.

We offer immersive Spanish and French theatre plays for EYFS, KS1 and KS2 pupils.

We also entertain disco or themed birthday parties for children aged 2 to 11.

Name: WhoDunnit, Inc.
Description:
WhoDunnit is a 501(c)(3) donation-supported nonprofit corporation for the performing arts, dedicated to the principle that a well-crafted mystery is a beautiful thing. We are also a Kentucky original and a full member of the Louisville Independent Business Association and Center for Nonprofit Excellence.

Founded in Massachusetts by writer Ann Waterman and veteran actor-director Joel Hellmann, WhoDunnit was born out of a group that gave an annual charity benefit for the Multiple Sclerosis Society. But when their annual murder mystery started attracting sell-out crowds, they knew they had to take it farther. WhoDunnit quickly established a reputation for “Mystery Theater with a Difference.” 

WhoDunnit has an amazing variety to offer audiences in any season. Offerings have included ghost stories, lively holiday musicals, a Mystery Cabaret, courtroom dramas, comedies, costumed extravaganzas set in the 1920s and 1930s, and Ye Olde Murder Mysterie, a truly unique tale set in the year 1007, when mystical Druids reigned and people still believed in magic. WhoDunnit shows will keep the audience on its toes!

Name: Théâtre'Hall
Description: Création, production et mise en scène de pièces de théâtre contemporaines

Name: Hamburg St. Pauli Varieté GmbH & Co. KG
B-LATERALE
Description:
Siamo un gruppo di attori diplomati all'istituto nazionale del dramma antico (I.N.D.A) nel 2019 , subito dopo il diploma abbiamo creato una compagnia teatrale con il desiderio di mettere in scena di produzioni che fossero totalmente nostre, dalla scrittura alla messa in scena.
Con uno sguardo al passato, cerchiamo il nuovo nella drammaturgia contemporanea. Sperimentando nuovi linguaggi, osservando la società che ci circonda e raccontandola con il nostro punto di vista, spesso guadagnato con fatica, facendo capolino perciò, Laterale. 
Condividiamo la passione per il teatro e crediamo fermamente che la cultura debba fare parte della vita di tutti, per creare una società migliore, più inclusiva e gentile. 
Crediamo in un teatro luogo d'incontro di tutte le arti, che suggerisca nuovi punti di vista, che tenda all'altrove, colmando i vuoti che non riusciamo a spiegarci.

Name: Leo's Theatrical Costumiers
Description: Suppliers of quality costumes for both amateur and professional theatre companies, Leo's Theatrical Costumiers is one of the leading costume providers in the UK, supplying high quality theatrical and fancy dress costumers. We can supply nationwide for musicals, plays, operas, Gilbert & Sullivan, pantomimes, photo shoots, television and film and have over 40,000 costumes to choose from.

Name: Prends Ton Envol
Description:
Compagnie de spectacle vivant

Implantée à Marseille, la Compagnie Prends ton envol propose des spectacles de théâtre jeune public.
Ces spectacles culturels peuvent être représentés en tous lieux, équipés ou non : théâtres, écoles, centre de loisirs, médiathèques, comités d’entreprises, festivals, événementiels…

La compagnie n’a pas tardé à prendre ses marques et à ouvrir son désir de création à la pédagogie. Nous croyons aux liens entre recherche et transmission : reconnaître la valeur des thèmes traités, s’interroger sur de grandes thématiques en tentant de s’approcher du regard de l’enfant.

Name: Le13emecri Compagnie d'improvisation
Description:
ACCOUDÉS  HIPPOCAMPE  VOITURE 13, plus de 243 représentations en France et en Belgique.

Depuis plus de quatorze ans, Le 13 Cri s'est spécialisé dans la création des univers oniriques en improvisation théâtrale, mêlant musique et chant live, création d'univers lumineux, jeux juste et théâtralité. 
Elle a conquis plus de 7.000 spectateur·ices en Europe et continue à nous faire rêver les yeux ouverts.

Nous vous proposons une expérience théâtrale unique et sur-mesure :

· Spectacles : Des pièces improvisées, immersives et personnalisées pour tous types d'événements (entreprises, mariages, festivals...)

· Formations : Des ateliers pour développer votre créativité et votre confiance en scène, adaptés à tous les niveaux

· Animations : Des activités ludiques et originales pour renforcer la cohésion de vos équipes ou animer vos événements (team building, séminaires, Off-site...)

· Ateliers créatifs : Des stages pour approfondir les techniques de l'improvisation et créer votre spectacle

Formation à Lyon : nous formons des troupes au théâtre le fou dans le 1er arrondissement de Lyon, un programme pédagogique axé sur la corporalité, la beauté des histoires et le jeu sans cabotinage


Nos domaines d'expertise :
Entreprises : journées d'accueil en école, team building, séminaires, off-site...
Particuliers : mariages, anniversaires, événements privés...
Collectivités : festivals, manifestations culturelles...
 

Contact : Loup LACAILLE
le13emecri@gmail.com
0781989798

Name: Flashback Theater Co.
Description: A semi-professional theater company producing live plays and musicals in Somerset, Kentucky.

Name: Parent Theatre Company
Description: A performance space made by and for young artists.

Name: GDR PRODUCCIONES
Description: Creamos, producimos, representamos. Somos el fiel reflejo del trabajo y el esfuerzo diario. Trabajamos en cada una de nuestras áreas para dar lo mejor a los artistas que tienen la posibilidad de trabajar con nosotros.

Name: Ateliê Bobó
Description: Criação e produção de peças cenográficas, cenografias e direção de arte para espetáculos e produções audiovisuais.
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: Les passeurs de l'Impalpable
Description: Deux comédiens et un musicien. Notre spécialité, les pièces improvisées.

Name: 2handers
Description:
2handers is all about getting back to the route of theatre, and the need in all of us to find a connection.

Some of the work we create is hard hitting and uses drama to highlight the atrocities that humans do to each other, animals and the world. Some of the drama we create is fun designed to purely entertain you.

We all know the action on stage is fiction, but if it can enlighten, excite and entertain then we’ve done our job.

Let's explore things that we cannot explore in our every day lives and step outside of the day-to-day for an hour or two.

Isn't that why we visit the theatre?

Name: Theatersport Kâttekwaod
Description:
Als langst bestaande theatersportgroep in Utrecht hebben we al heel wat meegemaakt. Het begon al in 1998 (!) met vier enthousiaste UCK-cursisten en een jaar later (met een eerste wedstrijd op 9 april 1999) was het officieel: Kâttekwaod was geboren! Het was in een periode dat improtheater nog betrekkelijk nieuw was in Nederland. Er waren toen nog geen Lama’s, Alpacas en Grote Improvisatieshow.

We moesten een beetje pionieren en dat was super spannend! Al vanaf het begin organiseerden we onze eigen theatersport voorstellingen. In de loop der jaren hebben we op een aantal locaties in Utrecht ons vaste podium gehad zoals café Maria, café Venue en café Hofman. Hou onze facebookpagina in de gaten voor recente optredens en shows.

Name: Open Jar Productions
Description: Providing creative services for productions of all sizes, supporting Broadway, West End, National Tours, and special events around the world

Name: Tre Floyd Productions
Description: We tell informative yet entertaining stories about black experiences.

Name: Are We Delicious?
Description: Starting with a blank slate, a small ensemble of Madison writers and performers create a high-energy, engaging show in only 2 weeks! Banishing perfectionism and releasing the abundant creativity that lives in each of us, Are We Delicious? has created over 30 full productions since it's inception, including comedies, dramas, mysteries and musicals.

Name: Újszínház
Description: Az Újszínház, egy pici de gyönyörű színház a belváros szívében, amely hatalmas és felelősségteljes feladatot vállalt, azzal, hogy kizárólag magyar szerzők műveit szerepelteti repertoárjában, melyre egyetlen más teátrum sem mert vállalkozni ezidáig. Mottónk: „Klasszikus értékek - magyarul.” Azt hirdeti, hogy a tiszta forrású, magyar (és keresztény) értékeket keressük, történelmi, irodalmi, viselkedésbeli hagyományainkat, melyekből példát meríthetünk, hogy e szerzett tudással és támogatással, magabiztosan építhessünk tartalmas jövőt gyermekeink számára. Arra törekszünk, hogy igényes mondanivalóval engedjük haza nézőinket, szórakoztató, felemelő gondolkodni-valóval, amely hozzánk, értünk nekünk és főként: rólunk szól. Kihasználva meseszép magyar nyelvünk játékosságát, és a "magyarul" szó kétértelműségét -  anyanyelvünkön, magyar szerzők által, - és közérthetően, hozzánk közelálló, ismerős módon tálalva, úgy, ahogy csak mi, magyarok tudunk gondolkodni, ahogyan csak mi értünk.

Description:

Tamasha is the official drama club of NIBM, bringing together theatre, humor, and music to create unforgettable performances. From Freshers’ to Farewell, Tamasha is a part of every major college event, adding energy and creativity to the NIBM experience.

The club is structured into four verticals:

	•	 Drama – Engaging in street plays, skits, and stage performances to tell compelling stories.
	•	 Stand-Up – Exploring comedy through stand-up acts and improv performances.
	•	 SAAZ (Musical Vertical) – A new initiative that blends music and storytelling to create artistic performances.
	•	 Technical – Managing lights, sound, and stage setups to enhance the overall production quality.

Beyond college events, Tamasha participates in inter-college drama competitions and uses theatre as a medium for awareness and change. With its diverse performances, Tamasha continues to be an integral part of NIBM’s cultural landscape.

Name: #VidasRotas: Un Documental en 3 Actos
Description:
En 2007, la construcción de la línea 7B de Metro de Madrid, en San Fernando de Henares, hizo que en varias viviendas de la localidad comenzaran a aparecer grietas. Con los años, los problemas en las infraestructuras de las casas aumentaron y el número de vecinos afectados ha ido creciendo. Varias viviendas, de hecho, han tenido que ser derribadas.

La obra cuenta lo que la cámara de Iván Fuentes, realizador audiovisual y afectado por este problema, pudo grabar: la historia real, el testimonio, de 24 familias de San Fernando de Henares que vieron cómo sus casas eran demolidas debido a las afecciones causadas por el metro, y cómo sus vidas cambiaron radicalmente en un año, pasando de vivir en sus casas -hoy desaparecidas, convertidas en escombros y, luego, en un solar-, a hacerlo en unos apartahoteles alejados de su localidad natal.

Cuenta también, en tres actos dramatizados basados en hechos reales, lo que la cámara de Iván Fuentes nunca pudo llegar a grabar: escenas donde los protagonistas, los vecinos, ven cómo su casa se va agrietando, la carta de la Comunidad de Madrid que llega al buzón y avisa del desalojo de las viviendas, el miedo a perder un hogar; vecinos que vieron cómo sus casas se volvieron inhabitables hasta ser, definitivamente, derribadas.

Name: VideoCabaret
Description:
VideoCabaret was founded in 1976 and is one of Canada’s most inventive, prolific and celebrated theatre ensembles. The company’s founding playwrights Michael Hollingsworth and Deanne Taylor have created many enduring plays, and with renowned designers and actors have devised spectacularly original styles of performance — black-box epics, multi-media cabarets, musicals, opera, and masquerades.

In 2000, Taylor and Hollingsworth refurbished a theatre space in the backroom of the Cameron House, an iconic rooming house and music club. Perched above Queen Street West, Hollingsworth refined The History of the Village of the Small Huts, a satirical history cycle of 21 plays exposing Canada’s history of colonization and government corruption within a ‘black box’ designed by the company to represent a timeless void where scores of characters are conjured up in rapid-fire succession.

VideoCabaret offers paid professional development opportunities to emerging theatre artists and playwrights. The Black Box Sessions encourages acting and directing participants to experiment with plays by Hollingsworth and Taylor in their signature style of production and performance. The Michael Hollingsworth Writing Circle is a paid professional training and development program for emerging theatre creators. Participants come together to discuss the creative process and assisted each other in developing new works.

Since 2019, we are proud to have moved into our permanent home at the Busy Street Theatre located at 10 Busy Street in the Leslieville neighbourhood of Toronto. The theatre was renamed as Deanne Taylor Theatre in 2023 in honour of our late Co-founder, Deanne Taylor.

Name: Regional Performing Arts Company
Description:
Regional Performing Arts is a company that operates in Northwest Indiana and provides a unique and supplemental performance experience for the youth in the area. The company is dedicated to offering a safe and educational environment where young people can grow artistically while forming long-lasting connections with their peers.

Through its programs, Regional Performing Arts creates an inclusive community that fosters creativity, personal growth, and self-expression. The company believes that every young person should have the opportunity to explore and develop their artistic abilities in a supportive environment.

In addition to providing a space for artistic expression, Regional Performing Arts also strives to offer an environment where young people can make connections with peers outside of their school network. This allows them to broaden their social horizons and form friendships with individuals who share their interests and passions.

Regional Performing Arts is committed to serving the youth of Northwest Indiana by providing high-quality performing arts education, while also creating a positive and nurturing environment for them to thrive in.

Name: Dupla Face | teatro & desenvolvimento
Description:
Dupla Face - improduções teatrais é muito mais do que uma companhia teatral: é um convite para descobrir o poder transformador da arte, seja nos palcos, na sala de aula ou até mesmo no ambiente corporativo. Com sede em Curitiba e uma alma inquieta, nós atuamos em três frentes (ou melhor, "faces"): produção artística, formação  e teatro empresa. Aqui, a improvisação é nossa estrela-guia e a criatividade corre solta!

Temos uma equipe qualificada composta por Alisson Lopess, Camille Bittencourt, Ju Herculano e Vítor Berti. Na Dupla Face, reunimos nossas potências individuais e experiências — cada um com cerca de 10 anos de atuação — na produção de eventos artísticos e projetos de desenvolvimento humano.

Nosso grande diferencial é que, como a improvisação teatral nos ensina, sabemos escutar, aceitar e propor. Quer um espetáculo que faça o público gargalhar ou refletir? Uma oficina para desengessar o chefe ou melhorar a comunicação da equipe? Nós criamos soluções culturais sob medida, sempre com aquele toque espirituoso e leve que só a Dupla Face consegue entregar. Afinal, nossa missão é "grudar" arte nas pessoas!

Entre em contato e solicite um orçamento!

Daj nam znać! Z pewnością się dogadamy ;)

#ImproWiza #Teatr #Impro #Eventy #Warsztaty #Kreatywność

Name: WITHINTHEATRE
Description:
Withintheatre - a London-based theatre company comprised of talented Slavic performers. 

Bringing together professional actors from Belarus, Ukraine, and Russia, our goal is to produce relevant work that connects with audiences globally. On stage, we revisit our own encounters of residing in countries veering towards authoritarian dystopia, and share these experiences with the audience.

We specialize in physical theatre, documentary documentary theatre, and incorporate contemporary media on stage. 

For us, theatre is not only a vital form of activism but also a warning!

Name: le Bateau Noir
Description:
LE BATEAU NOIR
« Faire du théâtre en troupe
pour partir à l’aventure,
traverser des océans
inconnus, essuyer des
tempêtes australes, découvrir
des îles salvatrices… »
Ariane Mnouchkine.

Le Bateau Noir est créé à l’automne 2023 à
Paris et se rassemble autour de sa première
création Macbeth.
Peut-être est-ce après une performance
autour du Conseil aux comédiens dans
Hamlet, que Vanya Chokrollahi, imagine avec
Macbeth, une première traversée dans
l’œuvre de Shakespeare.
Peut-être faut-il remonter avant, lors de la
rencontre avec la pièce.
Ou bien encore, faudrait-il chercher dans
l’inconscient, l’obscur pressentiment dont
parlait Peter Brook : « l’intuition, puissante
mais vague, qui indique la silhouette
première, la source à partir de laquelle la
pièce (…) parle ».
Très vite rejoins par d’autres, et soutenu par
la compagniemia et Le Théâtre de la
Fonderie (lieu du Théâtre du Radeau), Le
Bateau Noir hisse les voiles à l’automne
2023.
Fréquentant la Cartoucherie de Vincennes, le
Théâtre des Bouﬀes du Nord, la Fonderie,
l’univers de la troupe se nourrit d’une frange
du théâtre de recherche : Brook, Lecoq, Oida,
Mnouchkine, Grotowski, Barba, Tanguy, etc.
La recherche d’un théâtre ouvert à tous, et
pour tous, attentif aux courants qui traversent
l’époque, aux inquiétudes, aux replis, la
troupe pense Macbeth comme une mise ne
garde contre le pire.
L’intérêt enfin pour les masques comme outil
de recherche, de transformation, ou de
dévoilement/dépassement de soi. Plusieurs
membres de la compagnie sont aussi
facteur.rice.s de masques.

Name: Bleu Lemon
Description:
La Compagnie Bleu Lemon cherche à dialoguer avec le monde contemporain par des formes théâtrales documentaires notamment mais aussi musicales. 
Elle s’attache à parler de notre présent.

Name: Drama Club Camp
Description: Week-long summer residencies for multiple musical theatre writing teams on 60 wooded acres and a lake in Maine

Name: Sears Studio Performing Arts Academy - formerly Abba Dabba Children’s Entertainment
Description: Acting, Singing, Dancing for all ages!

Description: La Scène Efreinée est une association de Théâtre au sein de l'établissement scolaire de l'Efrei. Pendant longtemps l'association, s'appelait Yé Mistikrik !

Name: Trupe da Esquina
Description:
Bem-vindes!
Somos uma trupe teatral independente, dirigida por Cadu Bernardi. Realizamos nossa peça de estreia "Em Busca do Clube da Esquina" homenageando esse grande grupo de musicistas importantes para a cultura de Minas Gerais.

trupedaesquina@gmail.com

Name: Cafe Theatre
Description:
Cafe Theatre akşamları perde açmasıyla izleyicilerine, bir yandan içkilerini yudumlarken bir yandan sahnedeki eşsiz gösterileri ve tiyatro oyunlarını izleme fırsatı sunan yemekli ve içkili bir mekandır.
Masalı düzende 100 kişilik ve ayakta 150 kişilik kapasitesi ile tiyatro oyunlarına, stand-up gösterilerine ve konserlere ev sahipliği yapar.
20 sene önce Bağdat Caddesi'nde Türkiye'de ilk defa kurulan Cafe Theatre, Bodrum Şubelerinin ardından şimdi İstMarina Kartal'da sizlerle buluşuyor.

Name: Coletivo Em Tempos
Description: Coletivo teatral composto por artistas pesquisadores do fazer teatral e documental em tempos de guerra.

Name: Personal Pizza Party
Description: Personal Pizza Party (3P) is an NYC-based production company that endeavors to provide all the ingredients our artists need to create whatever project they’re hungry for at the moment, be it theatre, musical experiences, films, audio dramas, and more. We seek to produce work that is socially-conscious and gives a platform to a diverse array of untold stories whilst fostering community amongst young creatives at the start of their professional careers. We believe that good art (pizza?) is made better by collaborating (partying?) with great people, and building a hub (oven?) for like-minded artists to realize their personal (!!!) dream projects is at the core of what we do. Our projects aim for honesty, irreverence, and – above all – fun. I mean, we’re not called Personal Pizza Party because we hate fun.

Name: DIE BÜHNE e.V. – das Theater der TU Dresden
Imperium Theatre Company
Description: Imperium Theatre Company is a nonprofit organization dedicated to producing and presenting transformative plays, performances, and theatrical events. As a producing and educating nonprofit, we strive to engage our community through the arts, increase accessibility to transformative experiences, and provide innovative training for artists. Our mission is rooted in the belief that storytelling is the foundation of humanity, and theatre serves as a powerful vehicle for cross-cultural education, civic engagement, and social change. With a commitment to artistic excellence, we empower theatre-makers to be fearless and curious, uplift marginalized voices and experiences, and create accessible environments that transcend the stage. Through our diverse range of activities, programs, and partnerships, we aim to cultivate new narratives, foster dialogue, and inspire lasting impact in the communities we serve.

Name: Junk Theatre
Description:
We craft original performances finding humour, hope, & humanity in the darkest corners. With bold absurdist comedy, we tackle claustrophobic and inescapable scenarios.blending energetic performances with sharp social critique. Our low-budget, high-impact shows make audiences laugh, cringe, and question the status quo.

We’ve performed our original shows in Leeds, London and Edinburgh. We were nominated for an Offie award in 2023 following a five-star sell-out run of our original play ‘Ants’ at the Edinburgh Fringe Festival. Our show, ‘Stanley’, won the International Fuse Festival Award this year and has been picked up by The Omnibus Theatre, where it will have a three week run next autumn. A WIP version of our newest show, ‘You Look Okay To Me’ was performed at Theatre Deli earlier this year and was well received. We are currently in the process of submitting an Arts Council England funding bid to further develop the show. We are a diverse group of actors, directors, playwrights and choreographers from Leeds and London. We lead workshops for new writers in Leeds to develop their skills and advise them on the best way to get their writing on stage.

Name: Piti Theatre Company
Description: Piti Theatre Company was founded in 2004 by American playwright/actor Jonathan Mirin and Swiss choreographer, dancer and visual artist Godeliève Richard. We're based in Shelburne Falls, MA and Les Ponts-de-Martel, Switzerland. Piti (pronounced "PEA-tea") is an ancient Indian (Pali) word translatable as "joy" or "rapture." Piti programming plants seeds of joy, sustainability and justice in hearts, minds and communities. Piti's local programming in the U.S. is dedicated to engaging underserved rural communities across Franklin County. We also create award-winning documentaries, podcasts and music for all ages.

Name: BLOEI!Meeleeftheater
Description:
Wij organiseren interactieve kindertheater programma's voor scholen, BSO's, bibliotheken etc met een educatief tintje. Je kunt ons inzetten voor zeer diverse thema's, zoals de seizoenen, onze emoties en zintuigen, maar ook actuele thema's als eenzaamheid, pesten of faalangst. Ook verzorgen we maatwerk wat bij het actuele thema past waarin een school, bso of anders actief is.

Ons meeleeftheater brengen we spelenderwijs in een verhaaltje waarin we als typje kinderen meenemen, dichtbij de beleefwereld van de leeftijdsgroep. Het is niet alleen leuk en leerzaam, maar draagt ook bij aan emotionele en sociale ontwikkeling van kinderen. Voornamelijk in de onderbouw basis onderwijs.

Name: Collectif Hold Up ASBL
Description: Collectif Hold Up ASBL is a company based out of 132 Rue Georges Moreau, Anderlecht, Belgium.

Name: Lower Merion Players
Description: Players is Lower Merion High School’s very own student-run theatre organization. Every school year, talented students with a variety of interests work together to produce three shows a year; a musical, a blackbox play, and a main stage play. We spend our time after school everyday building the set, sewing costumes, rehearsing acting, hanging lights, publicizing the show, designing the show, leading our fellow students, and most importantly, learning from each other and our coaches. We need your support to keep our organization running strong. So please consider donating!

Name: Struts & Frets Theatre Company
Description:
Struts & Frets Theatre Company is dedicated to producing innovative professional theatre through our collaborative, artist-driven storytelling.

Both onstage and off, S&F strives to make theatre accessible for all. 

We bring social impact at the highest level for our rural community through our productions of Shakespeare’s work, exciting new plays, and other classical playwrights. 

S&F nurtures artists of all levels, with our Youth Ensemble program, providing tuition free apprenticeships, and by investing in artists returning to the craft after time away, thereby creating intergenerational connections.

Dedicated to our community, we  promote engagement alongside local businesses through our use of nontraditional theatrical venues.

Name: La Triple Producciones
Description: Desde 2022, nos reunimos para crear teatro y compartir nuestras historias con las personas de nuestro entorno.

Name: L'Espace Potentiel
Description: L'espace potentiel rassemble artistes et communautés autour de sujets sensibles et des enjeux de santé mentale. Nous produisons des créations qui combinent la dramathérapie, l'ethno-théâtre et le théâtre. Nous visons à évoluer avec la rencontre humaine par le théâtre et le jeu imaginaire.

Name: Wigton's John Peel Theatre
Description: Wigton Theatre Club @ The John Peel Theatre: great drama and music at Cumbria's friendliest theatre.

Name: Compagnie Auguste
Description: La compagnie Auguste a été créé en 2021 sous l'impulsion de Basile Frigout. Il y travaille ses créations proches de la littérature dans l'engagement et le poétique. La compagnie est née de l'envie de trouver une forme théâtrale en réponse aux multiples crises qui s'annoncent ou qui se déroulent déjà ; économique, climatique, sociale, dans un monde de plus en plus rapide, par le politique, par le médiatique, par la culture du zapping et des multiples plateformes de streaming. Au cœur de ses projets se trouve l'envie de trouver, dans la forme de ses spectacles, une invitation à la pause et à la contemplation. Un temps d'arrêt dans le bruit du monde pour contempler une œuvre littéraire.

Name: Theatre SUST
Description:
স্বাধীনতা উত্তর কালে বাংলাদেশে যে গ্রুপ থিয়েটার ভিত্তিক নাট্যচর্চা শুরু হয় সেই ধারাবাহিকতায় ১৯৯৭ সালে শাহজালাল বিজ্ঞান ও প্রযুক্তি বিশ্ববিদ্যালয়ের কিছু উচ্ছ্বল প্রাণবন্ত তরুণের একটি রঙ্গীন স্বপ্নের স্বার্থক বাস্তবায়ন “থিয়েটার সাস্ট”।

১৯৯৭ সালের ৮ই ডিসেম্বর “অভিষেক” অনুষ্ঠানের মাধ্যমে জন্ম নেয় বিশ্ববিদ্যালয়ের প্রথম গ্রুপ থিয়েটার “থিয়েটার সাস্ট” এবং সেই থেকে অদ্যাবধি গ্রুপ থিয়েটারের আদর্শে গতিশীল এই সংগঠন। বিশ্ববিদ্যালয়ের সাংস্কৃতিক অঙ্গনকে গতিশীল রাখতে থিয়েটার সাস্ট এ পর্যন্ত ৩৪টি নাটকের ১২৫টি সফল প্রদর্শনী করা সহ ৭টি নাট্য উৎসব সফলভাবে করতে পেরেছে।  নানাবিধ বিধি-নিষেধ, সংকট, অভাব এবং প্রচন্ড নৈরাশ্য আমাদের চলার পথে বাঁধা হয়ে দাঁড়িয়েছে। তবুও কেবল অফুরন্ত প্রাণ শক্তিকে পূঁজি করে আমরা এ পথ অতিক্রম করতে পেরেছি।

“নাটক নির্মাণ করে যৌবন, নাটক আনবেই অবিনাশী প্লাবণ” এই শ্লোগানকে সামনে রেখে কুসংস্কার মুক্ত সুন্দর পৃথিবী গড়ার লক্ষ্যে শুরু হয় আমাদের পথ চলা। তারুণ্যের এই শক্তি, অনন্ত উচ্ছ্বাসকে নিয়ে অনাগত ভবিষ্যতের দিকে দৃপ্ত পায়ে এগিয়ে যাব, এটাই আমাদের দৃঢ় প্রত্যয়।

Theatre SUST is a renowned cultural organization of Shahjalal University of Science and Technology, Sylhet. The theatre club was established on 08 December 1997. TS has successfully completed 132 stage performance of 37 plays and 8 drama festivals. Notable among the plays are "Sonar horin", "A new testament of Romeo and Juliet", "Raktakto prantor", "Shesher kobita", "Atto-kothon", "Hason Raja", "Debi Chowdhurani", "Avineta" etc.

Name: AdLibretto
Description: AdLibretto performs improvised musicals

Name: Studio UFO
Description: Studio UFO maakt beeldende theatervoorstellingen en (prenten)boeken.

Name: Al Ringling Theatre Friends, Inc
Description: Al Ringling Theatre Friends, INC is a company based out of 136 4TH AVE, Baraboo, Wisconsin, United States.

Name: SIERRA STAGES
Description: Sierra Stages is a community theater which enriches the cultural life of Nevada County by providing high quality, affordable and accessible performances for everyone. Over the past 12 years, we have presented 40 productions of plays and musicals utilizing local talent onstage and behind the scenes at our community’s leading performing arts venues, including the Nevada Theatre, Off Center Stage, and Miners Foundry Cultural Center. In addition, we have offered a series of over 45 informal play readings, collaborated with a number of local nonprofit organizations for fundraising events, and produced two musicals for local elementary schools:  Stone Soup and The Quiltmaker's Gift.

Name: Alquimia Producciones | Teatro escolar
Description:
Somos Alquimia Producciones, una compañía artística dedicada a crear experiencias teatrales para escuelas, con contenido social y emocional. 
Tenemos profesionales con más de 4 años de experiencia tocando corazones en mas de 400 escuelas en distintos países de latinoamérica y nuestra visión es invitar a la reflexion tanto a adolescentes como adultos de una manera alternativa.
Diseñamos y presentamos obras teatrales especialmente pensadas para el ámbito escolar, con contenidos que promueven la reflexión, el diálogo y la empatía. Abordamos temáticas como el bullying, los vínculos afectivos, las adicciones y el impacto de las redes sociales, brindando a estudiantes y docentes una experiencia artística profunda y transformadora.

Name: Centro Universitario Teatrale CUT Bergamo
Description: Centro Universitario Teatrale Bergamo is a company based out of Teatro Sant'Andrea, Via Porta Dipinta, 37, Bergamo, Bg, Italy.

Name: STiC-er Theater
Description:
The STiC theater has been around since 1985, when Kerstin and Axel Zühlsdorff and Kerstin Rhode established a school theater group at the Erich Weinert School in Stralsund, which was entered in the register of associations as a youth theater in 1992. In 1991, Kerstin Zühlsdorff founded the Youth Art School of the Hanseatic City of Stralsund, the first in the new federal states. The JKS integrated the STiC-er in 1998 under independent sponsorship and itself became part of the “Theaterpädagogisches Zentrum Mecklenburg-Vorpommern” project.

The TPZ has been run by the association on behalf of the Hanseatic City of Stralsund since 2008. The facility consists of two buildings. Frankenstraße 61 is home to the Alte Eisengießerei, a venue with 120 seats, a foyer and a fundus. The second building, at Frankenstraße 57, is a teaching building with 3 rehearsal stages, a tailor's workshop and a media workshop spread over 3 floors. With its varied program of courses, projects and events, the association has been making an important contribution to urban and regional youth and cultural work for many years.

Name: Yellowhammer Theatre Group
Description: Yellowhammer Theatre Group brings theatre performance and arts education to Alabama’s Black Belt to expand opportunity and access to this vibrant and important art form.

Name: Theaterverein "Schräge Vögel"
Description: Wir "Schräge Vögel" sind Menschen vom Rande der Gesellschaft, die den Humor nicht verloren haben und begeistert Theater spielen.

Name: Cult collective
Description: Cult Collective began as Cult Theatre 2016 as a mission to bring independent, experimental theatre to the people of Kilkenny. It began as a passion project between Anna Ní Dhúill and Éadaoin Kennedy who were both seventeen at the time and condemned to undertake the Leaving Cert. Realizing we’d much rather spend our time making art for free than study, they re-wrote Reservoir Dogs for stage and put it on in the back of Cleere’s pub.

Name: art der stadt e.V.
Description: art der stadt e.V. is a socio-cultural center with a focus on theater out of 3 Ekhofplatz, Gotha, Thüringia, Germany.

Name: Jubilo
Description:
Jubilo is a theatre company founded in 2011 in Wrocław (Poland), driven by the need for artistic intervention as a protest against cultural exclusion. Jubilo aims to extinguish social, economic, linguistic and cultural barriers through artistic encounters in which the platform of exchange is the language of theatre and music. Since its foundation, the Ensemble has worked with different groups including: young people with physical and mental disabilities, adults with past experiences of mental illness, homeless adults, refugees, asylum seekers, troubled youth, specializing in work in prisons with inmates of closed and half-open departments. Jubilo collaborates with many artistic and theatrical organizations internationally, including the Grotowski Institute, of which it has been a collaborating company since 2013.

For many years, Jubilo has been conducting, in cooperation with the Grotowski Institute, the project "Unlocking", aimed at inmates of the closed and half-open departments of the prisons of Wroclaw and Swidnica (PL), producing the award-winning performance Reflection (2015), Kain (2019), the performative installation Cain In Absentia (2020), On the Other Side/Passage (2020) and the installation Odgrodzenie (2021). Within the frame of the project, the company develops several platforms including theatre training programs for inmates, the production of professional performances, training programs for theatre practitioners/pedagogues and academic research. 

In 2021, within the Freeway project, in collaboration with the Grotowski Institute and under the patronage of the Court of Wroclaw, Jubilo organized the first European Festival of Theatre in Prison, Granice/Borders. The event hosted training workshops for actors and theatre operators, performances, national and international panel discussions, a photo exhibition and monographic meetings on the activities of the companies involved in the Festival.

Name: Midnight Lotus Productions Ltd
Description: We are a small production company run by Mrin Somani, currently producing "Open Call: An interactive cabaret" and "Instant Luv Noodles"

Name: Compagnie Veilleur
Description: En 2007, à l’issue de ses études à l’École du Théâtre National de Strasbourg, Matthieu Roy a fait le choix de revenir sur son territoire natal, à Poitiers, pour y créer la Cie du Veilleur devenu aujourd’hui Veilleur, son « établi » de travail de metteur en scène et de l’élaboration de ses spectacles. Au fil du temps s’est définie une ligne artistique autour de la création de textes inédits d’auteurs vivants dans un rapport de grande proximité entre les interprètes et les spectateurs – un rapport d’immersion amplifié parfois par le recours aux nouvelles technologies.

Name: Fae Production
Description:
FAE Production är ett kreativt produktionsbolag som specialiserar sig på att skapa unika och magiska upplevelser genom scenkonst, eldshower och tematiserad underhållning. De erbjuder helhetslösningar för event, destinationer och kommuner, där de kombinerar professionellt skådespeleri, nyskapande pyroteknik och sagolikt berättande.

Företagets verksamhet vilar på tre huvudpelare:

Eld & Äventyr: Spektakulära eldshower och effekter som blandar traditionellt gyckel med modern teknik.

Möten & Sagor: Levande karaktärsmöten och mingelaktörer som skapar oförglömliga ögonblick för besökare.

Shower & Magi: Skräddarsydda koncept och färdiga föreställningar som anpassas efter kundens vision och miljö.

De beskriver sig själva som ett personligt produktionsbolag som strävar efter att höja ribban för vad underhållning kan vara, oavsett om det gäller bröllop, festivaler eller stora turistdestinationer.

Name: Haml'Aix
Description:
@hamlaix
> Club théâtre de Sciences Po Aix

Name: Last Word Productions Ltd
Description:
Last Word is a UK-based production company, passionate about creating exciting theatre.
Working across the theatrical spectrum, we are a team of dynamic, imaginative of creatives.
From new writing to established classics, musical theatre to Shakespeare, Last Word want to produce something special.

Name: ArT Platforma & TEATR FORMA
Description:
Performing Arts Education for Kids & Adults in Prague.
Auteur theatre TEATR FORMA production

An independent project of inspiring collaboration in various art forms. ArT PLATFORMA is more than a new theatre stage, but a crossroad of theatre, modern dance, performing arts and multimedia. 
The TEATR FORMA Theatre, being the resident of the Lab, determines its main direction as a constant search for new theatrical, poetic and physical forms.

Name: Inspired Theater Company
Description: Inspired Theater Company strives for excellence as we create theater for all, bringing family values, integrity, patriotism, and community together while using our talents given to us by God our Creator.

Name: BLOOMSDAY IN MELBOURNE
Description: Theatre company celebrating the writings of James Joyce annually on 16 June - Bloomsday.

Name: Amici Del Teatro
Description: L’Associazione Amici del Teatro ha come scopo la promozione della cultura teatrale all’interno dell’Università, l’organizzazione di eventi di confronto e di approfondimento ed il sostegno al Laboratorio Teatrale LUISS. È benvenuto chiunque manifesti un interesse verso il mondo del Teatro, sia esso coinvolto, a vario titolo, in attività teatrali, sia esso semplicemente affascinato o incuriosito.

Name: Theatervereniging DoeDeMee
Description:
Wij zijn Theatervereniging DoeDeMee, uit Lepelstraat. Onze groep bestaat uit enthousiaste leden van alle leeftijden en we houden van toneel, zang en acteren.

Wij zijn een nog jonge vereniging, opgericht in december 2019 en daadwerkelijk gestart in januari 2020. Vol goede moed zijn we begonnen met het repeteren van een musical totdat de coronacrisis uitbrak. Helaas hebben we toen alles op een laag pitje moeten zetten, maar toen het weer eenmaal mocht, hebben we ons uiterste best gedaan om er wat moois van te maken. Uiteindelijk hebben we een paar voorstellingen gehad waaronder:

    2023: “Het Land van Ooit, de musical”
    2024: “Ze kunnen De Pot Op”
    2025: “’t Kom Hier Wel Spoken”

Name: Willow Creek Theatre Company
Description: Our mission is to support local artists and make it possible for them to make a living through their art. From improv to standup, to full-on theatrical productions, Willow Creek Theatre Company strives to support artists. This is in hopes of creating a community of artists that can fully sustain themselves off of performing their work. We believe this is not just a reality for those artists living in bigger cities, but is something that can be achieved right here in Iowa City.

Name: CANINE COLLECTIF
Description: Le Canine Collectif est composé de 11 acteurs.rices & créateurs.rices qui se fédèrent pour raconter des histoires.

Name: Theater for Charity
Description:
Theater for Charity is a non-profit theater group on the UC Berkeley Campus that puts on a bunch of awesome shows each semester, and donates all the proceeds to charity! 

Everything is student run, written, directed, produced, and performed. We do 2-3 shows a semester, so keep an eye out if you want to try out! Even if acting isn't yo thang, we are always on the look out for writers, directors, and technical people as well!

Name: Soul Penny Circus
Description: Soul Penny Circus is a registered 501c3 organization serving the greater Northern Colorado area. We are a collaborative concoction of aerial dance, clowning, and theatre. Our nonprofit organization is fiercely dedicated to giving back to the community through original, artistic productions that are accessible to all.

Name: Paper Picture Productions
Description: Established in 2021, this artistic house was created by theatre professionals to showcase up and coming artists and original works within the Nation’s Capital. Since its inception, Paper Picture Productions has produced shows at the National Arts Centre, Arts Court, Algonquin Theatre, Station Theatre, and the Royal Theatre.

Name: Sprietsels
Description: Sprietsels improviseert spannende, ontroerende en grappige sprookjesverhalen voor kinderen in de basisschoolleeftijd.

Name: Rockstar Widow Musical
Description: A new musical by Richard Carey Ford and Paulette Kranjac

Name: de Roze Bubbel
Description: De Roze Bubbel maakt variété voorstellingen waar buiten- en doodgewone nieuwe podiumkunstenaars unieke en nog nooit getoonde acts laten zien.

Name: Stage & Screen Studios
Description: Stage & Screen Studios is a Theatre company in Maryland offering live performances, acting coaching and professional casting!

Name: Sigarro Pictures
Description:
Sigarro Pictures è una casa di produzione indipendente che opera tra cinema e teatro, con sede a Napoli.
Nasce dalla volontà di raccontare storie autentiche, capaci di lasciare il segno, con uno sguardo attento alla società contemporanea.

Ci occupiamo di:
Produzione e sviluppo di progetti cinematografici
Realizzazione di spettacoli teatrali originali
Partecipazione a Festival nazionali e internazionali
Organizzatori di masterclass, corsi ed eventi nel settore dell'audiovisivo

Name: Electric Dusk Drive-In
Description: Electric Dusk Drive-In is LA's longest running pop up drive-in located in the City of Glendale, California. Playing classic movies and hosting private events, from movie premiers to nonprofit, and school events.

Name: Renaissance Theatre Company
Description: The Renaissance Theatre Company (RTC) is a theatre company dedicated to producing dramatic art that is artistically brave, morally responsible, and community-minded.

Name: CAST - Co-operative Association to Support Theatre
Torosaur
Description: TOROSAUR  is a company specialising in the telling of stories for Theatre, TV and Film based in the UK.

Name: Sail Entertainment
Description:
En Sail Entertainment creamos espectáculos familiares llenos de música, emoción y magia. Somos una empresa dedicada al entretenimiento en vivo, la animación y la producción audiovisual, combinando creatividad y calidad para conectar con públicos de todas las edades.
Desarrollamos espectáculos originales, música y experiencias escénicas que inspiran, educan y divierten. Cada proyecto está diseñado para que niños y adultos puedan disfrutar, aprender y soñar juntos, a través de historias coloridas, personajes entrañables y universos llenos de imaginación.
Nuestro compromiso es construir contenidos familiares que trasciendan, aporten valor y generen recuerdos inolvidables en cada audiencia.

Name: Wichita Shakespeare Company
Description: Wichita Shakespeare Company is a not for profit theatrical organization based in Wichita, Kansas. It is our mission to provide quality, free of charge performances of Shakespearean plays in a setting that is accessible, and provide an opportunity for those interested in working in the arts to develop their skills through practical application. WSC presents the Shakespeare in the Park series each summer in parks in the Wichita area.

Name: Green Light Group Productions
Description: Green Light Group Productions (GLG) is a production firm devoted to the creative development and production of new works across stage, screen, and new media. We specialize in the creation of new musical theater and content that challenges the form.

Name: The Quays Foundation
Description: Performance art is the foundation for our programming. Through stage productions,School and church visits,street theatre and workshops,we spread positive messages through performance art and community service. Always fun, always family friendly!

Name: Hook & Eye Theater
Description:
Hook & Eye Theater creates bold, original work through full-length productions, Instant PlayLabs, and education initiatives that ignite curiosity and collaboration. Our process is rooted in deep research, radical collaboration, and fearless experimentation—using improvisation, movement, sound, text, and debate to explore big ideas and take creative risks. 

We thrive at both ends of the spectrum: the electric immediacy of pop-up performances like our Instant PlayLabs and the slow-burn artistry of long-form collaborations. Our work is playful and gutsy, rigorously crafted and alive with spontaneity. 

“Where Hook & Eye’s real genius lies, however, is in mining the comedy to be had in the nuanced awkwardness of the interaction of strangers through brilliantly pared back dialogue and understated acting. It’s the sort of humor that doesn’t even register as comedy at first, yet slowly and quietly builds to something both genuinely funny and somehow touching.”
— exeunt

“Audacious and conceptually fascinating . . . a play like She-She-She reminds us of what’s possible and can inspire us to agitate and organize for a better, more humane, world.”
— theasy.com


“[A] very sharp, poignant, and pointedly critical play.”
— hyperallergic

“[A] rich, intelligent, funny work, one of the strongest plays we’ve seen in recent memory.”
— culture catch

Whether you're a beginner looking to build confidence or a performer aiming to create a full sketch show, 2W Improv provides a supportive, high-energy space to grow your skills, take creative risks, and have a blast doing it.

+

+

+

+

Name: Out of the Blue Theatre Company
Tiyatro Halbuzaar
Description:
Halbuzaar, 2025 yılında kurulan bağımsız bir tiyatro topluluğudur. Amacımız, sahne sanatlarının farklı disiplinlerini bir araya getirerek yaratıcı, özgün ve kolektif işler üretmektir. Farklı disiplinlerden gelen ama aynı sahnede buluşan bir topluluğuz. Halbuzaar, sadece bir oyun sahnelemek değil, birlikte üretmek, düşünmek ve hissetmek isteyenlerin yol arkadaşıdır.

Halbuzaar, çocuklar için tiyatroyu yalnızca bir seyir deneyimi olarak değil; hayal gücünü geliştiren, duyguları besleyen ve öğrenmeyi oyunla buluşturan bir alan olarak görüyor. Tiyatronun büyüsünü, müziğin coşkusunu ve dansın enerjisini çocuklarla paylaşmak; onların dünyasına sanatsal, eğitici ve eğlenceli bir yolculuk açmak en büyük hedeflerimizden biridir.

Name: Fred Skeleton Theatre
Description:
Fred Skeleton Theatre Company provides the Okanagan with shows that push boundaries, stretch limits and introduce the audience to the surprising, the strange and the wonderful.

Fred Skeleton was a cardboard skeleton on the kitchen wall of Artistic Director Rob Mason-Brown's university dorms.
 
Fred the cardboard skeleton belonged to Mr Christopher Ford and when he and Rob were looking to do a play separate from their studies, they chose the name during a night of drinking in their kitchen. Fred was later stolen by a group of nuns who stayed in the halls during the summer.

The name has stuck over the years due to it being memorable and eye catching.

Name: Persona Collective
Description:
Persona Collective is an ensemble of experimental theatre artists that evolved from the Voice Theatre Lab (2006 - 2013), a laboratory that explored and developed rigorous and highly energised physical and vocal training methods. 

What is Persona?

Persona Collective, based at Charles Sturt University at Wagga Wagga, is an ensemble of theatre practitioners comprised of acting and performance staff and graduates. It is a bridge between education and the industry, providing local theatre artists professional opportunities. Persona is both a performance company and a laboratory; it explores and develops rigorous and highly energised performance training methods. Spectators that enjoy challenging, expressive and experimental work will find the Persona Collective experience most rewarding. Persona has been developing new works and staged reimagined classic plays for a number of years, such as adaptations of Shakespeare, site-specific performances and also actor training films. It is now proudly based in Wagga Wagga; the first offering being the 2018 site-specific, skate park performance of Norm and Ahmed. In 2019, Persona staged TOME (which has since toured nationally), Lines and Boxes (now published through Australian Plays), Actors Without Worlds, Cerebellum, and Messages (which has also toured the PLAYLIST Festival, with Siren Theatre Co. at the Seymour Centre).

We offer an alternate to live theatre in the region because the way we develop and create works is based on the process, meaning that training and development is the key to the way we do things.

After a ‘pause’ in live theatre, we are back to provide audiences with some fresh, new theatre…

Name: Boston Young Artsits
Description:
Our mission is to provide a unified home for local artists to collaborate, connect, and create art that reflects the neighborhood around them. 

The arts are at a crossroads. As artificial intelligence, a booming streaming industry, and social media all make waves in the cultural zeitgeist, live art forms struggle to find their place. Nowhere is there a better case study of this phenomenon than in Allston-Brighton; a place where a bountiful history of artistic expression is being met with gentrification and booming student populations. Local artists and patrons alike are left to wonder where they fit into this new order.  We are here with the answer.

Name: Billy Strayhorn: Something to Live For
Description:
Featuring a stunning score, Billy Strayhorn: Something to Live For brings to life the remarkable true story of one of the greatest composers of all time. 

From his impoverished beginnings in Pittsburgh to his lifelong collaboration with Duke Ellington, this world-premiere new musical follows the highs and lows of Billy Strayhorn's career, the joys and heartbreak of his personal life, and the challenges he faced living as an openly gay Black man in mid-20th century America at the dawn of the civil rights movement. 

Through his collaborations with Lena Horne, Billie Holiday, and the greatest jazz orchestra of all time, Billy Strayhorn transcended racial and sexual barriers and brought a unique fusion of jazz and classical music to the world with all-time favorites including “Take the ‘A’ Train” and the immortal “Lush Life.”

MUSIC AND LYRICS BY BILLY STRAYHORN
WRITTEN BY ROB ZELLERS WITH KENT GASH
MUSICAL DIRECTION BY MATTHEW WHITAKER
CHOREOGRAPHER DELL HOWLETT
DIRECTED BY KENT GASH

Description: Northern Town Parodies is a comedy theatre company founded by Nina Groll and Jack Doyle. Follow us on Instagram and TikTok @NorthernTownParodies to keep up with our current and future projects! At the time of writing, we have amassed 15.5K followers on Tiktok and 83,000 views on our most popular show. We provide social and pop culture critique, while also providing a place for fans to celebrate their favorite works (and acknowledge how they can do better). NTP provides opportunities to actors and technicians who have not had experience in working professionally, and we are dedicated to providing a well-rounded experience in all areas of theater for those who participate in our shows. Name: LUCHT production
Description:
I’m Ewa, a freelance producer & culture manager currently living in Antwerp, Belgium.

It might sound trivial, but I truly believe in the power of culture. And that, with the help of culture, change is possible. Change of the world, change of narrow minds, change of our closest surroundings. This is what drives me to act. 

Over the last 15 years I have gained extensive experience in the cultural industry   not only as a producer, but also as a theater manager, director’s assistant, sales manager and even as a volunteer. Thanks to that, I can see from a broad perspective what should be done and how to do it, paying attention to  many more aspects than just production. 

My main areas of interest are theater (from site-specific, to classical, to opera) and dance, but I’m also active in the area of exhibitions and live music. 

I’m a graduate of cultural studies with a specialization in theater and performance (bachelor), management (master) and culture management (postgraduate).

Name: Konsensus Yapım
Description:
Konsensus Yapım, yaratıcı ve özgün tiyatro projeleri üreten bir yapım şirketidir. Amacımız, sanatı herkes için erişilebilir kılmak ve sahne sanatlarında yenilikçi bakış açıları sunmaktır. Yüksek üretim kalitemizle, sahneye koyduğumuz her eser, izleyiciyi derinden etkilemeyi hedefler.

Çocuk tiyatrosundan yetişkinlere yönelik oyunlara kadar geniş bir yelpazede eserler üretiyoruz. Çocukların hayal gücünü besleyen, eğlenceli ve öğretici oyunlar ile yetişkinlere hitap eden dramatik yapımlar arasında dengeyi sağlıyoruz. Oyunlarımızda sanatın gücüne inanıyor ve seyircimizin düşünsel ve duygusal gelişimine katkı sağlamayı amaçlıyoruz.

Öne Çıkan Projelerimiz:

Masalını Arayan Prens: Çocukların hayal dünyasını zenginleştiren, onların sosyal ve duygusal gelişimine katkıda bulunan, renkli ve interaktif bir çocuk oyunu.

Kalana Dair: 1974 yılında geçen, derinlemesine insan ilişkilerini ve toplumsal yapıyı ele alan, yetişkin izleyiciye hitap eden bir dramatik eser.

Her iki oyun da çeşitli şehirlerde sahnelendi ve büyük ilgi gördü. İster okul etkinliklerinde ister büyük tiyatro salonlarında, her yaştan izleyiciye hitap edebilecek projeler üretiyoruz. 

Konsensus Yapım, olarak fikrimizi birliğimizden, gücümüzü üretkenliğimizden alıyoruz.

Name: Odesa Company
Description:
Odesa Company is an independent non-professional theatre staging and education company based in London, Ontario. It was founded in November of 2022 and federally incorporated on August 15, 2023. Odesa Company is committed to staging immersive & engaging theatre, and providing theatre education opportunities.

It was co-founded by Adam Smalley, Chris Smalley, and Scott Smalley. Odesa Company's inaugural production was the definitive 1927 adaptation of Bram Stoker's novel "Dracula", written by Hamilton Deane and John L. Balderston. "Dracula" opened at the Palace Theatre to rave reviews on Friday, October 27th, 2023.

For updates on upcoming shows & events, please visit us @odesa.company on IG and Facebook and at our website http://www.odesa.company

Każdy z nas pochodzi z innego świata, mamy różne prace i doświadczenia. Jednak, jako grupa, poza pasją, posiadamy kilka wspólnych cech: towarzyskość, otwartość, gadatliwość, wrażliwość. 

To właśnie jest ekstrawersja, prawda?

Name: Comedytunes
Description:
Comedytunes bestaat uit cabaretier Ronald Smink en ontwerper Dimitri Jansma. 
Zes jaar geleden wilde Ronald een comedynight organiseren in Simplon Groningen. Dit omdat er de afgelopen jaren geen vaste stand-up comedy podium meer was in Groningen. Per toeval werd Dimitri Jansma via Simplon benaderd voor het ontwerpen van de posters voor de comedynight. Naast dat er gelijk een klik was tussen de heren  sloeg de comedynight ook in als een bom. De eerste comedynight was binnen no-time stijf uitverkocht. Door het succes zijn er in het eerste seizoen meteen een aantal shows bijgeboekt die ook allemaal snel waren uitverkocht.

Door het succes in Simplon benaderde Ronald ook andere poppodia; Neushoorn Leeuwarden, Hedon Zwolle en Podium Victorie Alkmaar. In combinatie met de prachtige posters van Dimitri waren de comedynights op deze locaties ook een groot succes. Bomvolle zalen, enthousiast publiek en leuke reacties van de comedians gaven de heren een boost om verder te gaan.

Comedytunes bestaat nu inmiddels 6 jaar heeft  11 vaste locaties waar  comedynights worden georganiseerd. Daarnaast organiseren zij veelvuldig comedynights in verschillende middelgrote theaters in Nederland.  Door enthousiaste reacties van theaterprogrammeurs, poppodium programmeurs, comedians en natuurlijk het publiek, blijven de heren doorgaan.  

Want zoals de slogan luidt: 
Comedytunes want er valt nooit genoeg te lachen! 

Voor vragen neem gerust contact met ons op info@comedytunes.nl

Name: Hafthoz Art Society
Description:
Hafthoz Art Society is a Vancouver-based theatre company dedicated to producing performances that resonate with universal themes of love, conflict, and aspiration while highlighting Iran’s unique cultural heritage. Founded 20 years ago in Iran and now established in Vancouver, the company began as a small ensemble exploring Iranian theatrical traditions and has since evolved into a renowned institution bridging Eastern and Western theatrical practices.

Hafthoz Art Society is committed to producing performances that resonate with universal themes of love, conflict, and aspiration while highlighting Iran’s unique cultural heritage. Through a blend of traditional and contemporary approaches, their productions seek to engage, educate, and inspire audiences of all backgrounds. By integrating elements from various cultures, the company aims to create a space where art transcends boundaries and cultures unite.

In Vancouver, Hafthoz Art Society has established itself as a crucial part of the local arts scene, bringing diverse communities together through a shared love for theatre. Their productions often feature a mix of classical Persian plays and original works that address relevant social issues, encouraging dialogue and understanding among varied audiences. As they continue their artistic exploration and cultural connection journey, Hafthoz Art Society remains dedicated to fostering a deeper appreciation of Iranian art and culture in Vancouver and beyond.

Name: Red Umbrella Theatre Company
Description:
We are a company committed to producing well-written masterpieces that expose the grace, guilt, and truth that are embedded in human relationships.

Co-Founders and Artistic Directors, Connor Kopko and Annika Rudolph, met at the Atlantic Acting School in 2022. During their lunch breaks, Kopko and Rudolph would meet at the red umbrellas, across the street from Chelsea Market, and daydream about establishing a company with a powerful mission statement. Their inaugural production, Sonnez Les Matines, was produced in February 2023.

Name: Theaterruine St. Pauli
Description: The St. Pauli Ruine in Dresden's Hechtviertel is a modern event location with a unique flair. Since 1999, the ruin has been run by the non-profit TheaterRuine St. Pauli e.V. and has established itself as one of Dresden's most popular summer theaters. In 2012, the dilapidated ruin was sensitively renovated; roof and side glazing now protect the old walls from further decay and our guests from the weather. From April to October, visitors can experience a diverse theater and concert program as well as extraordinary events - in an attractive setting between historical sacred building and airy glass and steel architecture. The St. Pauli Ruine can be rented for guest performances, company events, receptions, etc.

Description:
brengt maatschappelijk-culturele locatietheater producties in de regio IJmond. De stichting ontwikkelt bijzondere voorstellingen op kenmerkende locaties, met oog voor erfgoed, landschap, geschiedenis én de actuele thema’s die in de samenleving spelen. Theater wordt een plek waar mensen elkaar ontmoeten, verhalen delen en samen nieuwe perspectieven ontdekken. In de projecten geeft een professioneel kernteam vleugels aan ideeën en talent van zichzelf en van anderen.

Stichting Theatermanifestatie IJmond
werd in 2016 opgericht met als doel op regelmatige basis maatschappelijk-culturele activiteiten te organiseren op kenmerkende locaties in de IJmond. Daarbij richt de stichting zich hoofdzakelijk op het maken van theatervoorstellingen samen met amateurs, verenigingen en professionals uit de regio IJmond en daarbuiten.

Na het grote succes van de trilogie (SCHEMERING, LUWTE, ZICHT) realiseerden we in de periode 2023-2025 een serie (RADAR, TEER, ZAND, KRACHTSTROOM) rondom het thema ‘de leefbare samenleving’ onder de naam de Manifest.

Name: Sawwah Theatre مسرح سواح
Description:
Sawwah Theatre | مسرح سواح
Where Puppets Speak, and Children Listen.
دمى بتحكي، وقلوب الأطفال بتسمع.

نحن مسرح سواح – مبادرة فنية تعليمية فلسطينية تأسست عام 2021، تعنى باستخدام فن العرائس التفاعلي كوسيلة ترفيهية وتوعوية للأطفال.

 ماذا نقدم؟

- سيناريوهات تربوية توعوية
- أغانٍ خاصة وشخصيات مميزة
- ورشات وأنشطة ترفيهية وتعليمية

أن يكون لكل طفل في فلسطين فرصة ليضحك، يتعلم، ويعبّر عن نفسه من خلال الفن والخيال.

رسالتنا:
نستخدم فن العرائس لتوصيل رسائل إنسانية وتعليمية بطريقة محببة للأطفال، تُعزز قيم التسامح، والاندماج، والتمكين.

Name: PEQO
Description:
PEQO geeft voorstellingen in de vorm van Storytelling Blind Tastings.

In deze voorstelling kom je bij ons in Restaurant Rotonde, één van de meest toonaangevende restaurants in Rotterdam van dit moment, aan tafel zitten en luister je naar een live verteld verhaal waarin je mee wordt genomen naar een andere wereld. We blinddoeken je; halen de visuele ervaring weg, waardoor alle andere zintuigen versterkt worden. Onze woordkunstenaar zorgt er met een scherpzinnig verhaal vol slimme fysieke effecten, bijzondere geuren, achtergrondgeluiden en vooral prachtige live muziek en zang voor dat je eventjes ondergedompeld wordt in een andere realiteit. Ondertussen komen we bij je met ons meest bijzondere en uitgebreide tasting-menu, helemaal in lijn met het verhaal.

Name: Compás Producciones
Description:
En Compás Producciones creemos que el teatro es un acto de magia: un espacio donde los sueños encuentran su voz, se convierten en historias y cobran vida en el escenario para conectar con quienes se atreven a imaginar. 

Fundada en Lima, nuestra compañía nace con el propósito de crear obras originales que inspiren, conmuevan y dejen huella. Nos apasiona contar historias que inviten al público a reflexionar, emocionarse y reconocerse en los personajes y mundos que presentamos. Para nosotros, cada montaje es una oportunidad de tender puentes emocionales, abrir preguntas y generar experiencias vivas. 

Desde nuestros inicios hemos apostado por proyectos que combinan sensibilidad artística y compromiso profesional. Obras como Luna, Mamás a las 4:20, Sr. Mostaza y Querida Amalia reflejan nuestra búsqueda constante de nuevas formas de narrar, siempre con el sello de la originalidad y el cuidado en cada detalle. 

Más allá de las tablas, Compás es también un espacio de encuentro y comunidad. Valoramos profundamente el trabajo en equipo, la colaboración entre artistas y la creación colectiva. Creemos que el teatro no solo sucede en el escenario, sino también en la energía compartida entre quienes lo hacen posible y el público que lo recibe. 

Nuestra visión es seguir creciendo como una compañía que impulse la cultura en el Perú y que abra caminos hacia una escena teatral innovadora, accesible y significativa. Compás no es solo una productora: es un punto de encuentro para quienes creen en el poder de la imaginación. Porque en cada historia que contamos, buscamos que el público viva algo más que una función: una experiencia que inspire, ilumine y permanezca.

Obras teatrales 100% originales que han sido trabajadas con psicólogos y educadores, todo con el propósito de ofrecer no solo entretenimiento y diversión, sino también historias que tocan el alma y enseñan valores importantes a nuestros jóvenes espectadores. Historias que hablan de temas sociológicos actualmente relevantes. Bienvenidos a Escena Zero

Name: Shahrzad Theatre complex
Description:
Shahrzad Theater Complex is the first private theater complex in Iran, which was designed and managed by Shahrzad Jafari in December 2016, and its construction process began in the former location of Omid Hospital and Maternity Hospital.

In July 2017, it started its activities with 3 halls equipped with modern facilities and modern equipment with capacities of 290, 280 and 110 people.

Shahrzad Theater Complex has hosted more than 1000 plays and cultural events (performances / concerts / video art / exhibitions, etc.) during 4 years and has had over 1 million ticket sales, which is a significant figure in Iran’s theater economy cycle.

Name: Sunbeam Theatre Company
Description: Sunbeam Theatre Company was designed to operate as a 'front door' to the Canadian theatre industry, providing opportunities for emerging artists to develop their skills on and off the stage.

Name: The Island Players
Description:
The Island Players is a nonprofit community theater located in the heart of Anna Maria Island, Florida. Founded in 1949, we are the oldest continuously operating community theater in Manatee County, dedicated to enriching our coastal community through the performing arts.

Each season, we produce a dynamic mix of comedies, dramas, and classics, offering five mainstage shows annually in our historic 1912 theater building. We’re powered by passionate volunteers—onstage, backstage, and in the audience—who help us keep live theater thriving on the island.

Beyond the stage, we are committed to community engagement through educational programs, partnerships with local organizations, and initiatives that make the arts more accessible to all.

We invite theater lovers, donors, and arts professionals to connect with us here as we continue to grow, collaborate, and celebrate the joy of storytelling.

Name: Entre Sonhos Produções
Description:
A Entre Sonhos Produções é uma empresa que leva magia e diversão para crianças de todas as idades, através de adaptações teatrais de clássicos da literatura infantil.

Fundada em 2014 por Lucas Costa, um apaixonado pelo teatro e pela infância, a Entre Sonhos Produções já encantou milhares de espectadores com suas peças adaptadas, como ‘Peter Pan e a Terra do Nunca’, ‘Alice no País das Maravilhas’ e ‘A Bela e a Fera’. A empresa tem como valores a criatividade, a qualidade, a responsabilidade social e a educação cultural.
