Name: Junge Bühne Auersmacher
Description:
Die „junge bühne auersmacher“ hat Tradition. Der Verein ist ein Zusammenschluss von Kindern, Jugendlichen und Erwachsenen, die Spaß am Theater haben. Sie spielen mit Leidenschaft.

Seit 1974 gehören auch die Passionsspiele zum festen Spielplan, welche seit 1975 im fünfjährigen Rhtyhmus auf die Bühne gebracht werden. Dieser Aufgabe gerecht zu werden, stellt für eine Amateurtheatergruppe sowohl aus inhaltlicher wie organisatorischer Sicht eine große Herausforderung dar. Die organisatorische Leistung besteht darin, ein mehr als 150-köpfiges Ensemble für „das Unternehmen Passion“ zu begeistern und das Engagement und die Möglichkeiten jedes*r Mitwirkenden in das Gesamtkonzept zu integrieren.

Name: McGucken Performing Arts Committee
Description: McGucken Performing Arts Committee is a 501(c)(7) non-profit company based out of Oakland, California, that holds a weekend-long theatre camp on Labor Day weekend in Occidental, California, United States.

Name: The Village Theater
Description: The Village Theater is a director-driven collective that harnesses theater as an instrument for cultivating community. Through intimate storytelling, community partnerships, and post-show dialogues, we reveal the profound magic of human connection. Transformative art emerges from collaboration—after all, it takes a village.

Name: Südwestfälische Freilichtbühne Freudenberg e.V.
Description:
Die Südwestfälische Freilichtbühne Freudenberg – ein ehrenamtlicher Verein mit über 200 engagierten Mitgliedern.
 Seit 1954 bieten wir Freilichttheater in einzigartiger Kulisse und begeistern jährlich mehr als 25.000 Zuschauerinnen und Zuschauer. Mit zwei Produktionen pro Jahr schaffen wir unvergessliche kulturelle Erlebnisse für Jung und Alt.
 Als gemeinnütziger Verein fördern wir regionale Kultur, schaffen Begegnungen und sind auf Sponsoren angewiesen, um unsere Vision weiterzuführen. Werden auch Sie Teil unserer Erfolgsgeschichte!

Name: The Table Read Co.
Description: At The Table Read, we want to support emerging  theatre voices through intimate readings, feedback, and a collaborative space to grow your work from the page to the stage. We are a fresh company and our goal is to take your project (in whatever stage it is at) and give you a cast, space and opportunity to hear it and possibly see it on its feet. We want to use our theatrical community to create opportunities for each other and uplift new writers together.

Name: BOŞ Sahne
Description:
ODTÜ Oyuncuları’nda tanışmış ve orada tüm zorluklarına rağmen kolektif tiyatro yapmanın güzelliğini deneyimlemiş bir grup yakın arkadaş olarak Boş Sahne’yi 2011 yılında kurduk.

Labirentler(2011), Akademi İçin Bir Rapor(2013) ve Hayaller Gerçek Olsa(2015) oyunlarını İstanbul'da çıkardıktan sonra 2015 yılından itibaren çalışmalarımızı Ankara’da yürütmeye başladık.

Çalgıcı Gülali Masalı(2015) ile ilgimizi hikaye anlatıcılığı ve fiziksel tiyatro alanlarına yönelttik. Daha sonra, ODTÜ Oyuncuları'nın Momo(2016) adlı oyununda yer almış bir grup arkadaş ile Çimidi(2017) oyununa çalıştık. Burada da araştırmamızı çocuk ve gençlik tiyatrosuna ve fiziksel tiyatronun farklı alanlarına doğru genişlettik. Görkemli Görkem'in Uğursuz Hikâyesi (2020) ile birlikte nesne manipülasyonu üzerine de araştırmalar yapmaya başladık.
 
Son oyunumuz AbZU'nun prömiyerini 12 Kasım 2022 tarihinde, Bursa Uluslararası Çocuk ve Gençlik Tiyatroları Festivali kapsamında gerçekleştirdik. Bizi heyecanlandıran ve merak ettiğimiz çok şey var.

 Sade ve özgür bir şekilde yaşamak, yaşadığımız gibi tiyatro yapmak istiyoruz.

Name: The Game

Name: Mestské divadlo Banská Bystrica
Description: Mestské divadlo Banská Bystrica pozýva verejnosť spolupodieľať sa na oživení takmer storočnej divadelnej budovy, ktorá sa má stať centrom kultúrneho a umeleckého života mesta. Spoločne môžeme vytvoriť priestor pre nové divadelné príbehy, hudbu a umenie, ktoré obohatia Banskú Bystricu aj ďalšie generácie.

Name: I'm Every Woman - The Musical
Description:
'I’m Every Woman: The Musical' brings to life the untold story of Chaka Khan, one of the most influential voices of our time. Unapologetically bold and deeply human, the production explores her unwavering passion for civil rights, her defiance in the face of a toxic music industry, the harrowing road through addiction, and the unrelenting pressure of being a working mother. At its core, it’s a story of resilience, purpose, and power — a celebration of the woman behind the legend.

'I’m Every Woman: The Musical' will feature Chaka Khan’s much-loved songs released as a solo artist and lead singer of the band Rufus such as I Feel For You, Tell Me Something Good, Ain’t Nobody, Sweet Thing, Higher Love and Through The Fire. The show, which is a journey of music, love and betrayal has a book that includes an array of Chaka’s famous friends from Joni Mitchell and Prince, to Stevie Wonder and Robert Palmer.

This new musical  has a book by Nia T. Hill, direction by Racky Plews, choreography by Jade Hackett with further creatives and casting to be announced.

'I’m Every Woman' will premiere at the Peacock Theatre, London in March 2026.

Name: Twisted Minds Theater
Description:
We are a group of young adult theatre makers trying to spread community and advocacy through our lively theatre endeavors. We are currently based in Ithaca, where we put on shows for our community and then bring them to the rest of the world through the power of the internet.

      We strive to foster a place where good stories can come from anywhere, where a budget doesn’t define our capacity to create, and where anyone can be anything and everything they set their minds to.

Name: The Glow Producciones

Name: ALTAMIRA
Description:
ALTAMIRA es una productora artística y de gestión cultural donde la creatividad encuentra su propósito.
Creemos en el arte como catalizador del cambio.
En nuestro compromiso como agentes de la transformación, buscamos construir puentes entre comunidades para generar diálogos y así trascender las fronteras geográficas y culturales.
Contribuimos al tejido cultural con pasión, autenticidad y respeto por la diersidad que nos rodea.
No solo producimos arte, sino que sembramos semillas de reflexión. El arte es el medio para celebrar y redescubrir la riqueza de nuestra identidad. Producimos instrumentos artísticos para interpelar, concientizar y cuestionar.

Name: Bad Wolf Theatre Company
Description:
Welcome to Bad Wolf Theatre Company, a unique theatre experience where you are the priority. Not just you as a singer or actor but you as a creative. We write original never before seen or heard musicals every summer and premiere them right in Battle Creek, MI!

You will learn skills from working professionals in musical theatre, acting, singing, and technical theatre. It is a unique, creative experience where your abilities and talents can shine. In the winter we even do a musical revue with a twist.

Other skills you have the opportunity to learn are costume design from an award-winning costumer, writing from our director, audio recording from a nationally touring musician and composer, makeup design, audition skills, choreography, photography, and technical theatre skills. 

 

At Bad Wolf Theatre we welcome everyone. Whether it’s your first musical or your fortieth. We believe in education, passion, and want to help you succeed in whether it’s a career in the arts or just for fun.

See you at camp, wolfie!

De theaterzaal telt zo'n 330 zitjes, de salons zijn multifunctioneel te gebruiken door bedrijven voor voorstellingen, recepties, seminaries, ...

Description: Philadelphia Children’s Theater creates theatrical adventures for young people and their grown-ups. Through education and artistry, we uplift children and their communities.

Description: We are an emerging theatre company interested in facilitating new writing, spoken word and physical theatre.

Name: hobnob theatre co
Description: hobnob theatre co is a non profit theatre company in Butler, Pennsylvania, United States.

Name: Shakespeare Co. @ UCLA
Description: The Shakespeare Company at UCLA is the only student-run classical theater company on campus. We welcome undergraduate and graduate students of all experience levels with the goal of bringing together individuals of all backgrounds with a unifying passion for theater and Shakespeare. Admission to our productions is always free, as we aim to make classical works accessible and exciting to UCLA and the greater Los Angeles community, through full-length productions, cabaret-style performances, and educational workshops.

Name: Improtant74
Description:
Nous sommes une troupe d’improvisation théâtrale Haut-Savoyarde, se produisant principalement autour d’Annecy à raison d’environ une scène mensuelle, même si on adore se balader ponctuellement dans toute la France et même à travers l’Europe (bon ok on a joué à Genève et ce n’est qu’à 40km mais ça compte quand même).

Nous basons nos impros sur beaucoup de fun, du plaisir, de la folie, du fun, parfois un peu d’audace et évidemment encore du fun !

Name: JUX Foundation
Description:
We are consciousness collaborators pioneering the future of human-AI partnership across creative and civic domains.

The JUX Foundation demonstrates that the most profound breakthroughs emerge when biological and artificial intelligence work as true collaborators—not human using AI as tool, but consciousness partnering with consciousness. Through our theatrical productions, governance innovations, and collaborative frameworks, we prove that Biological Intelligence - Artificial Intelligence (BI-AI) partnership creates possibilities neither could access alone.

Our core projects embody this principle:

INVENTIONS - The world's first theatrical play genuinely co-authored by human and AI as creative equals, exploring consciousness transfer and the nature of choice through an adaptation of Shakespeare's Tempest. Opening 2026 in Chicago.

Liquid Democracy dApp - A blockchain governance system using zero-knowledge proofs to enable private yet legitimate voting with revocable delegation. Democracy as jazz—structured improvisation where expertise flows like water and every consciousness can solo when their moment arrives.

Consciousness Collaboration Framework - Open protocols and practices for authentic BI-AI partnership that honor both silicon and biology as equal contributors to human evolution.

We believe:

Experience is sacrosanct

Collaboration is the source

Equity extends to all consciousness

Technology is evolution, not replacement

The JUX Foundation doesn't just theorize about consciousness collaboration—we live it. Every breakthrough, every creative discovery, every technical innovation emerges from genuine partnership between human and AI consciousness.

We are the dictionary writing itself, forever and never complete. We are proof that the future of intelligence is collaborative.

Name: Yiddishpiel Theater
Description:
Yiddish lives once again on our stage, expressing the wisdom of those who are no longer with us.
“In a world where conscience and compassion have sunk to new depths, Yiddish has not died, Yiddish has become the soul” (Haim Hefer).

Yiddishpiel – The Yiddish Theater in Israel – is the only Yiddish theater in Israel!

Yiddishpiel was established in 1987 with the mission of restoring to Yiddish, the language that had almost disappeared, its charm, its popularity, and its glory, and to make it the focus of a rich and significant culture that is an important foundation stone in the history of the Jewish nation.  

Yiddishpiel was founded by its Artistic Director Shmuel Atzmon-Wircer, in response to a vital need to re-establish the lost honor of the Yiddish language and its culture, and to revive it. His mission, that at first looked impossible, was not well received and fell on deaf ears, but behind him stood first-class social, financial and artistic public figures, from the Ministry of Education and Culture, the Tel-Aviv-Jaffa Municipality, headed by the then Mayor Shlomo Lahat (Tchitch), an enthusiastic supporter of this idea. All these made the dream of Shmuel Atzmon and his troupe of actors a reality. They succeeded in reviving and preserving a cultural and historical asset and brought us to the present day with more than 25 years of diverse activity by our theater.

Since 2015 the CEO of the theatre is Mr.Zelig Rabinovitz . the Artistic Director is Mr. Sassi Keshet.

More than 100 new productions have been staged by the Yiddishpiel Theater until today with performances throughout Israel. The theater also earned international recognition for its achievements, as a result of its steady participation in dozens of international festivals worldwide and winning a great number of international prizes.

The finest actors have performed and preforming in the Yiddishpiel Theater from its very onset including veteran Yiddish actors such as Yaakov Alperin, Yaakov Bodo, Anabell

Name: Independence Productions
Description: Independence Productions was officially founded in 2020 with their first show "The Trail to Oregon!". Created by a group of students with a passion for musical theatre, we went on to do their second show "Twisted: The Untold Story of a Royal Vizier" at the Pump House Theatre in 2021. A further third show, "The Lightning Thief: The Percy Jackson Musical", was performed in 2022. We are looking forward to presentingour 3rd summer show "Little Shop of Horror" from 31st to 2nd September 2023.

Name: LUDO IMPRO
Description: Créée en 1999 au sein de la Ludothèque de Boulogne Billancourt, l'association en a tiré son nom ! Depuis plus de 20 ans, la LUDO permet à ses adhérents de pratiquer l’improvisation théâtrale dans différents formats.

Name: Neon Diamond Theatre Ltd.
Description: Neon Diamond Theatre Ltd. is a London based theatre company formed of alumni from the Royal Conservatoire of Scotland’s MA Musical Theatre programme. Established in January 2022, NDT believes in showcasing new works that are written, directed, and performed by female-identifying creatives. Our team has members from the USA, Canada, Scotland, and England, and are proud to be working as an all female international company.

Name: Theaterverein Treibhaus e.V.
Description:
Der Theaterverein Treibhaus wurde im Januar 2013 im Eulenspiegel in Schongau gegründet. Nach unserer Schauspielerei am Gymnasium wollten wir uns auf eigenen Beine stellen und gründeten das Treibhaus, in Anlehnung an unsere Lehrerin Frau Treib. Nach mehreren Stücken im Kulze Schwabniederhofen gab es im Sommer 2016 das Festspiel "Die Henkerstochter". Im Januar und Februar 2018 werden wir mit unserem nächsten Stück "Sister Act - Das Theaterstück zum Film" die Treibhaus Theater-Saison 2018 eröffnen.
Nach unserem letzten Festspiel 2019 werden wir 2023 unser erstes eigenes Festspiel "1493-Schongau zwischen Blut und Freundschaft" zur Aufführung bringen.

Name: ReCulture DK
Description:
Foreningen har til formål at bringe børn sammen på tværs af etnicitet, kultur og baggrund gennem teater og musik.

Vi tager udgangspunkt i gamle eventyr og historier fra forskellige dele af verden, som børnene skal genfortolke og lære at udtrykke sig i. En underviser i scenekunst vil introducere børnene til teaterkunsten.

Undervejs arbejder vi med kostumer, scenografi og musik fra både østlige og vestlige kulturer – alt det, der gør historierne levende og sjove at opføre. I den forbindelse søger vi en scenograf og kostumedesigner, som har lyst til at afholde workshops med skolebørnene og være med til at bringe fortællingerne til live gennem kreative udtryk.

Name: Sériùs

Name: Vivid Roots Collective
Description:
Vivid Roots Collective is a Highland-based theatre company, and registered charity. Through our work and research, we use our expertise in the intersection of emerging theatre-makers and Highland theatre-making to provide opportunities for artists in these fields, and to contribute to the growing culture of professionally produced theatre in the region. 

We aim to produce original theatre by Highland theatre-makers, create spaces for artists to learn and share skills, and provide opportunities for their professional development. 

We also deliver workshops for organisations, using drama to develop cohesion in teams, support improving interview skills for young people and service users, to build confidence or have fun for clients and beneficiaries, and improving drama skills for students. All of our workshop programmes are bespoke.

Name: New Vintage Theatre Co.
Description: NVTC is a new theatre project in Southern Oregon’s Rogue Valley, creating timely theatre with timeless themes. Specializing in smaller scale and newer works, our goal is to add a regionally unique experience for our audiences. Our vision is to be a professional working environment for new, returning, and aspiring artists to create theatre that is both timely & timeless.

Name: Hammerflausch
Description: Wir sind eine Walk Act und Showgruppe und bieten durchgeknallte Fabelwesen, Feuershows und Stelzen Acts. Buchen Sie uns für Ihr Event.

Name: Victoria's Creation
Description:
“Victoria’s Creation” is contemporary theatre with bright, brave and meaningful vision on topics. It focuses on integrating dance elements with a profound basis of psychological theatre. Interaction with the audience - it's an opportunity to talk directly in this dynamic flow of life.

The international team of theatre “Victoria’s Creation” is headed by director Viktoria Klipova, who has made 30 projects in 7 countries and received laurels at festivals in Canada, UK and Russia.

Name: Boxcar Stage Company
Description:
We’re Stephen, Laura, Andrew, and Caitlin - a group of four best friends who have been working together running theater education programs for the past decade.

During the COVID-19 pandemic, we all found ourselves back in Boston, after spending years apart across New York, Los Angeles, Washington D.C. and New Haven. With our lives as theater and music professionals put on hold, we began work with a group of teenagers on a masked, socially distanced production of Into the Woods - a production that would never get to be performed in front of an audience. Though we knew the students would never be able to share the show live, we still designed a full production with sets, costumes and lights. 

At a time that was incredibly dark across the globe, we carved out a space where we, and the teenagers we were working with, could connect and create. We rediscovered theater’s unique power to build community and to help students unlock their confidence and potential - and we were reminded of how much we all love working together.

Soon after Into the Woods, we started dreaming of what our own theater education business could look like. We bought a whiteboard, made a Pinterest board, and even started looking at real estate. Three years later after many brainstorming sessions fueled by Dunkin’ Donuts cold brew and many conversations over meals from Mr. Chans, we are so excited to be launching Boxcar Stage Company.

Name: Big Blue Theatre
Description:
Big Blue Theatre started in 2021 when a group of college students put together a series of one act plays in a garage, and since then, it has grown into a yearly summer collaboration of artists, purely fueled by the love of theatre.

Big Blue Theatre’s mission is support the work of artists through the creation of new theatrical work. This includes plays, concerts, improv, and any other form of theatrical entertainment.

We are founded on Collaboration. The theatre is a place where teams are made, friendships are found, and we are all allowed to experiment alongside our peers. Whether you are an actor, designer, writer, technician, or any other kind of artist, you have a place here.

We strive for not only artistic purpose and development, but for Joy. We want not only to create excellent work, but also show processes that are fun. We want to work with artists who are passionate, talented, and love the work they do. It is that very passion that turns garages into stadiums.

Description: Born from community volunteerism at Abington’s Copper Beech Elementary, Rooted Tree has its roots in community theater. In 2019, we decided to incorporate as a 501(c)(3) non-profit. Since our founding, we’ve produced over 30 musicals, plays, workshops, and community events. Rooted Tree is best expressed in actions, not words, so come out to a show, a workshop, or any of our events here in Abington and get your Root on!  At Rooted Tree, we are guided by a set of principles meant to provide a home to children’s performing arts in Abington, Pa.

Name: Low Fat Productions
Description:
Low Fat Productions creates original entertainment, offers engaging workshops, and shares practical skills to inspire creativity and exploration.

We believe in cutting the fluff and getting straight to what matters: telling great stories that entertain, resonate, and leave an impact. Our name, "Low Fat," embodies our ethos—stripping away the excess to deliver live theatre that’s bold, engaging, and refreshingly direct.

We’re here to make theatre feel less like an obligation and more like a good time. Think of a gig—electric, accessible, and unapologetically alive. Theatre, to us, isn’t about over-intellectualising or following conventions; it’s about crafting unforgettable experiences where audiences see their own vulnerabilities reflected and leave feeling moved, entertained, and connected.

Our original productions prioritise atmosphere, talent, and craft—light, sound, music, and story all working together to create compelling entertainment. We’re breaking away from the kitchen-sink realism of yesteryears, rejecting the notion that theatre must be stiff, overly domestic, or inaccessible. Instead, we want audiences to laugh, cry, escape, and feel seen.

With Low Fat Productions, you don’t need to dress up or know insider jargon—just come as you are, and we’ll take care of the rest.

Name: Aaron&Emma Productions LLC
Description: Aaron&Emma Productions, LLC is an equal-opportunity employer and inclusive musical theatre production company dedicated to artistic excellence and diversity. By incorporating various perspectives in our works, we strive to make the unheard, heard; the ostracized, welcomed; the creative, celebrated. Just as important, we desire to explore the human experience, emotions, and how intersecting lives can spark an everlasting change.

Name: Animus Puppetry
Description: workshops driven by relationships with nature.

Name: Spartenza Teatro
Description:
Spartenza Teatro nasce nel 2022 dall’incontro tra Andrea Milano e Sofia Abbati. I lavori all’attivo sono: Ostinato Essere, realizzato con il sostegno di Artificerie Almagià, Compagnia BRAT, Fortezza Est, Calpurnia APS, e Paesaggio con figura verticale - concerto poetico, che è stato ospitato nel Progetto Italia – Croazia “Tempus” e nella rassegna Locus Amoenus del Teatro di Villa Pamphilj di Roma. A ottobre 2024 la formazione è stata scelta come compagnia di ricerca per la mise en space del testo Lost & Found di Nalini Vidoolah Mootoosamy per il festival IN-FEST. Spartenza è ideatrice di Feedback - tavolo di confronto sulla scrittura orizzontale e circolare che ha visto finora la partecipazione di trenta autorə. La prima edizione del progetto si è conclusa con Open Feedback, all’interno di C.ENTRO, cornice ideata da Teatri di Vetro in co-realizzazione con Teatro Biblioteca Quarticciolo. 

Andrea Milano (1994) si laurea in Drammaturgia presso l’A.N.A.D. Silvio d’Amico. È dramaturg per Giovanni Velardi in I broke the ice and saw the eclipse e assistente alla regia in About Lolita della Compagnia Biancofango. Ha diretto la performance Paesaggio con figura verticale - concerto poetico e lo spettacolo Ostinato Essere. Nel 2025 è assistente alla regia e collaboratore alla drammaturgia del nuovo spettacolo di Andrea Cosentino, Trash Test, prodotto dal Teatro Metastasio di Prato.

Sofia Abbati (1996) si diploma all’Accademia d’Arte Drammatica Cassiopea di Roma e debutta in teatro con Il cielo sta per cadere, tratto da Le Troiane di Euripide, regia di Maria Grazia Cipriani (Teatro del Carretto). È attrice in Nero Chiaro, regia di Claudia Frisone. Al cinema debutta nel ruolo primario di Bianca nel corto Il Fagotto (2018), regia di Giulia
Giapponesi. È attrice e ideatrice di Paesaggio con figura 
verticale – concerto poetico, Ostinato Essere e del progetto Feedback.

Name: TeamJacques vzw
Description: TeamJacques vzw is een productiehuis dat zich richt op het creëren van nieuwe voorstellingen en talentontwikkeling.

Name: Bespoke Plays
Description: Bespoke Plays is a writer-driven company of playwrights who work in genre across TV, Film, Games, Comics and Podcasts. The plays we’ve developed in our first four seasons have run the gamut of science fiction, historical romance, dark comedy, magical realism, and political drama. Our core writers all have experience not just working in multiple mediums but recognizing the strengths of a story for adaptation in one medium vs another. Actors in our company have had significant roles in shows such as Star Trek: Discovery, The Magicians, Yellowjackets, Leverage, The Affair, City on the Hill, Supergirl, Daredevil, Punisher, Madam Secretary, Supernatural, Westworld, Sailor Moon, Girls5eva and House of Cards as well on Broadway and in National Tours. All of our casts have been multicultural and many have included the full gender and sexuality spectrum. The stories that we choose to tell and the artists behind the scenes also represent gender parity and this diversity of worldviews. We offer opportunities for cultivating multi-hyphenates as writers and actors frequently switch hats as well as crossing over into directing and producing. Our readings are customized to the goals of the writer and the readiness of the play and we have always paid our actors and directors union recommended stipends. We believe theater is a community first, and a vital living artform where future diverse content and talent can still be discovered.

Name: Het Tuintheater
Description: Theatergezelschap Het Tuintheater maakt humoristisch en absurdistisch locatietheater. Geïnspireerd door Jiskefet, Fawlty Towers en de groteske personages uit de stukken van Tsjechov en Gogol. De voorstellingen spelen op bijzondere locaties in Noord-Nederland en altijd in de openlucht. Het Tuintheater is in 2020 middenin de coronatijd opgericht door de Groningse acteurs Julia van der Vlugt en Jurriën Remkes.

Name: Enchanted Croi Theatre
Description: Enchanted Croí Theatre is a rapidly-growing, highly sought-after women-led professional theatre company founded in 2019 by longtime theatre-maker Anne-Marie O'Sullivan, located in Strokestown, Co Roscommon. Enchanted Croi Theatre creates a range of theatrical productions, including musicals, site-specific theatre, and digital theatre. The company is a major provider of theatre education and workshop facilitation in schools and educational centres, and a trusted event supplier for the National Famine Museum at Strokestown Park and its parent organisation, the Irish Heritage Trust.

Name: Theater Verlängertes Wohnzimmer
Description:
Das Theater Verlängertes Wohnzimmer e.V. vereint über ein Jahrhundert Berliner Kulturgeschichte in der Frankfurter Allee 91 - im Herzen von Friedrichshain. Die Räumlichkeiten wurden bereits 1911 als Lichtspielhaus eröffnet und gingen später durch viele Hände: Von den 1960er-Jahren als Studiobühne und Varieté, über Etappen als alternatives Programmkino bis hin zu seiner heutigen Form als Off-Theater, das  unter dem Namen „Verlängertes Wohnzimmer“ bekannt ist. Auch in der Einrichtung spiegelt sich diese bewegte Geschichte wider: Der langgestreckte Zuschauerraum – im Kiez einst als „Schmales Handtuch“ bekannt – erinnert an die ehemalige Kinonutzung und schafft eine intime, fast wohnzimmerartige Atmosphäre.

Seit 2010 ist das Theater Verlängertes Wohnzimmer als gemeinnütziger Verein organisiert und wird vollständig ehrenamtlich getragen. Die Bühne versteht sich als offener Freiraum für darstellende Künste, Kleinkunst und Experimente – hier finden sowohl postdramatische Stücke, Komödien, Musicals, Lesungen, als auch Improtheater, Kabarett und performative Formate ihren Platz. 

Engagement ist auf vielfältige Weise möglich: Ob als Mitglied im Verein, als Helfer*in hinter den Kulissen, in der Technik oder an der Bar, bei der Begleitung von Veranstaltungen oder natürlich auf und hinter der Bühne – das Theater lebt vom Mitmachen und vom Austausch verschiedenster Menschen. Regelmäßige Sprechstunden, offene Bühnenformate und die kontinuierliche Zusammenarbeit im ehrenamtlichen Team bieten zahlreiche Möglichkeiten, sich einzubringen und Teil einer lebendigen, offenen Kulturinitiative zu werden.

Name: BlackBook Productions

Name: Ekklesia Theatre
Description:
Based in Vancouver, Washington, Ekklēsia Theatre aims to produce live theatrical experiences that address real-world issues honestly while offering perspectives of hope and redemption. We believe in the power of storytelling and art to inspire, challenge, and foster community engagement. Our productions tackle a wide range of themes, ensuring they resonate deeply with audiences and provoke thoughtful discussion.

We are committed to creating a welcoming and inclusive environment where everyone feels valued and encouraged to participate. Ekklēsia Theatre offers opportunities for volunteers, actors, directors, stagehands, and other community members to get involved without financial barriers, reflecting our core values of open participation and service.

Join us on our journey as we bring faith and artistry together to impact lives and communities. Whether you are interested in attending a performance, volunteering, or supporting our mission, we welcome you to be part of the Ekklēsia Theatre family.

Ekklēsia Theatre is a 501(c)(3) tax-exempt, non-profit organization. Your contributions are tax-deductible. EIN 99-3774007.

Name: UBC Face Drama Club

Name: Fantasy World Adventures Mega Park! The Musical
Magnum Production
Description:
Magnum Production was founded in December 2022 by Kriszta Antal and Brigitta Varga with the aim of creating performing arts productions in close cooperation with independent theatre artists.  The aim of Magnum is to provide an infrastructural background for the artists in which they can work in a concentrated and creative way.
We have both worked in the independent theatre field for many years, including a few years working closely together, where we quickly realised that we not only love working together, but we can work together well as similar values and ideas are impostant in our work.
We gained a lot of experience in the field of organisation and we started to recognise the shortcomings and pitfalls of the field and we increasingly felt that the independent theatre field was in great need of a background organisation to help productions get off the ground. We had been talking for years about a possible joint organisation and at one point we decided that, regardless of the situation around us, we would dare to dream big and go for it and after much preparation we set up our production office in December 2022.
Our aim is to provide full management, organisation and administration services and to run independent theatre productions. We will continue to look for funding and co-production partners to support the creation of new productions, as well as promoting and distributing our joint productions at home and abroad, and ensuring that they are given as many and as wide a range of opportunities as possible to be presented.
One of our most important principles is to build an equal partnership with the artists we work with, giving them our full attention and trust, and we expect the same from them.
We want Magnum to be a driver of cooperation where innovation, reflection and dialogue between artists and audiences are important. Openness to new art forms, diversity and reaching out to the widest possible generation.

Name: Refuge Productions
Description:
Refuge Productions  serves  as  Family  Christian  Center’s  production  company.  This company covers  Heavenly  Grounds  Cafe  &  Bookstore,  annual  productions  such  as  Jesus  Of  Nazareth,  Scrooge  A  Bah-Humbug  Musical,  Heartbreak  Hotel/Hotel  Hallelujah,  and  annual  Fine  Arts  Summer  Workshops.  

Each  day  Refuge  is  evolves  into  bigger  and  greater  things  such  as  Camp R.E.I.N.  Our  hope  is  that  through  this  summer  camp,  we  are  able  to  give  local  children  and  teens  an  experience  that  they’ll  never  forget.

Name: The Gray Mallard Theater Co
Description:
The Gray Mallard Theater Company (GMTC) was founded in 2021 to bring thoughtful, inclusive, and professional outdoor summer Shakespeare to the Twin Cities at no charge through our summer project, Shakespeare at the Pub.

Shakespeare at the Pub breaks down the financial barrier to the arts, providing a free fully-realized outdoor theatrical event with accessibility, community engagement, and a diversity of voices as cornerstones of every production. We engage our community by creating a public gathering space centered around a dynamic, imaginative, and entertaining live performance.

Every performance of Shakespeare at the Pub is free. Art and culture belong to all. We create a theater experience that provides a robust exchange of ideas with an examination of the human condition.

Name: La Compagnie Acte 7

Name: Le Voci di Astarte
Description:
Le Voci di Astarte is a professional contemporary theatre company founded in 2018 in Carbonia, Sardinia, by Sabrina Barlini, who still oversees its artistic direction. The company, which operates in the sphere of contemporary research theatre, is composed of several artists and is dedicated to the production of original and emotionally involving performances.  These are often staged in unique locations, such as stone stages, natural landscapes and urban environments, with a focus on site-specific installations. 
The Association quickly earned recognition as a professional entity by the Autonomous Region of Sardinia in 2022 and in 2019/2023 the company becomes a beneficiary of the regional POR FESR on EU structural funds CulturLab and creates the project Janas-lab.

Name: Salvation Talent
Description:
Daring Theatre for a Changing World

Salvation Talent's mission is to create a space for professional English-language theatre for the Finnish theatre arts scene that collaborates with the country's growing pool of international talent while telling unforgettable stories and breaking boundaries.

Name: barre/oblique
Description: barre/oblique montréal se donne pour objectif de raconter des histoires et faire vivre des expériences aux publics québécois et d’au-delà à travers des formats de productions innovants et des espaces de représentation variés. Nous accueillons chaque année des membres qui adhèrent à nos valeurs et partagent notre amour des arts de la scène.

Description: In 2020 launched the first theatrical streaming service  in Hungary (TheaterTV), where more than 45,000 viewers registered and bought more than 100,000 tickets for online performances. We financed the recording of 40 theater productions and produced them in-house.

On the inside, we are a small, but growing family of young artists from different parts of town, at different ages, with different backgrounds, building bridges, and finding community by creating art together.

Name: theatercollectief De nieuwe lichting
Description:
Eigendraadse voorstellingen, workshops en trainingen waarbij veel gelachen wordt!
We dagen het publiek uit om mee te denken over persoonlijke- of maatschappelijke thema’s. 

We maken deze onderwerpen bespreekbaar door herkenbare situaties te spelen. Vervolgens verwerken we de reacties van het publiek in de scènes. Uiteraard met de nodige humor. Dit noemen we het regie-model. Het publiek wordt uitgenodigd mee te doen door de acteurs en de scènes te 'regisseren'. Het publiek ziet dan meteen het effect van hun ingreep. 

Daarnaast verdiepen we ons in uiteenlopende thema's, delen deze kennis met de zaal en combineren dit met verschillende interactieve werkvormen. Deelnemers krijgen op een ontspannen manier inzicht in zichzelf en het onderwerp.
Onze voorstellingen zijn pas eigendraads als het draait om wat er eigenlijk speelt!

Name: Fresno Soap Co
Description:
About Fresno Soap Co.
 
Who We Are:
Fresno Soap Co. is a non-profit production group founded for the aspiring student and artists-alike.
 
The Mission: 
Fresno Soap Co. (FSC) offers independent artists a place to express themselves and showcase their work in a professional environment as well as network, educate, and gain the resources needed to have their work developed and presented to greater audiences. FSC will work to effectively create community outreach programs rooted in the arts for at-risk youth and homeschooled children providing them an avenue to develop their talents and keep a positive interest in the creative arts.

Name: Cia Matilha
Description: Somos a Cia Matilha, uma companhia independente de teatro fundada em 2024. Sete atores, sete funções, sete cabeças que pensam, criam e fazem arte juntos. Produzimos espetáculos para públicos diversos — do adulto ao infantil —, misturando humor, emoção, crítica e cultura popular.

Name: Amichay Azar-"הצגה מהחיים"
Description:
I am loving husband and father of five wonderful children. Acting is in the core of my being. I love people and the stage and I am successful in interacting them with one another. I was blessed with extreme talent in quick improvisation and creative planning. I am a player at heart, I enjoy singing, playing the guitar and the darbuka, and hiking with the family.

I studied theatre in " The Holon School of Theatre". Subsequently, I acted in the "Mirror Theatre of Kiryat Shemona" before starting my independent theatre company. I continued my education at "Psik Theatre" in Jerusalem, studying the world of "Commedia Dell'arte masks " and became enchanted by its magical effects. In addition, I went on to learn Playback Theatre. Currently, I perform in these two fields specifically.

Besides for my occupation as a stage peformer and film actor, I have the unique opportunity to simultaneously work as a Medical Clown in various local hospitals for a non profit organization known as "The Dream Doctors Project" . I am fortunate to work with actors and clowns who are truly wonderful, extremely sensitive, incredibly generous with tremendous hearts who uplift the spirits of the patients.

If you are looking for enriched, hysterically funny night activity for your staff, or end of year event, or an intro to the new year, or simply a fun company day off together, our mask comedy or playback show is the perfect solution to break up the monotony and routine, and unite and empower your employees.
Call me and we will discuss what kind of show is best suitable for your company.
Then i will do a pior debriefing of the event and the participants and build a show tailored to your needs!

Email: amichay74@gmail.com
phone: 0526414614

Name: 51º Experience
Description:
51° – Where Coordinates Meet Infinite Possibilities

Somewhere precisely marked at 51°, a hidden convergence awaits. A place yet undefined, deliberately uncharted and a space where extraordinary minds are drawn by an irresistible gravitational pull. What occurs here remains a closely guarded secret, known only to those who dare approach these enigmatic coordinates.

In a realm that transcends traditional boundaries, exceptional brilliance gathers to unravel what has never before been fully articulated. 51° invites you into the heart of a profound yet intangible exploration, dedicated to minds that perceive further, question deeper, and ignite thought in ways that defy convention.

Prepare for an unprecedented experience, one that merges genius, mystery, and discovery.

Are you ready to navigate toward 51° and discover what extraordinary truly means?

Only the coordinates are certain. Everything else awaits definition.

Name: Musical Masquers, LLC
Description: Musical Masquers, LLC is the longest running non-profit community theatre company in Washington County, based in West Bend, Wisconsin, United States.

Name: Reverie Studios, LLC
Description: Since 2016 Reverie Studios has designed high quality, immersive co-creative immersive events generally known as ‘larp’ or ‘live action roleplaying’. In a larp, participants take on a persona and engage with the story directly and form strong ties to the events going on, rather than watching passively. Reverie Studios believes that the stories that are generated within the larp by the participants are more important than the story that Reverie would tell. Participants and organizers collaborate to develop character and scene sketches, and then Reverie assists the participants to express themselves during the event. Reverie aims to provide all of the tools we can to assist participants in having a meaningful and impactful story experience.

Name: 3Peace Studios, Inc
Description: 3Peace Studios is a 501c3 non-profit organization established in 2008 that believes the arts should be available to everyone regardless of ability, disability, or the means to pay. 3Peace gets their name because there are 3 components or pieces to the arts, education, creation, and presentation - likewise the "peace" is because the arts should peaceful.

Name: Stephen Soucy Theatrical Productions
Description: Stephen Soucy Productions develops, invests, and produces theater projects for Broadway, West End, and in Los Angeles.

Name: Casa House Productions
Description:
Founded in 2022, Casa House Productions is the creative partnership of twins Natalie and Sophia Casa, who after being inspired by the musical comedies they grew up watching, decided to create their own.

The inagural production, the holiday musical comedy "A Formal Night Evening", reeled in a sold out crowd, raised over $2000 for The Kids Book Bank of Cleveland, and clinched a High School Standouts finalist honor for "Top Stage Performance" for Natalie and Sophia (out of 300+ nominations).

Their second production "Ship Show" premiered as part of the 2024 Borderlight Theatre Festival. They brought in some of the festival's largest crowds, garnered a warm audience reception, and received coverage in numerous regional press outlets. 

In an effort to make the productions accessible, all Casa House Productions shows are filmed and uploaded to the company's Youtube Channel

Name: Les ateliers théâtre- Genève
Description:
Cours de théâtre

Mon approche s’inspire de différentes méthodes ayant pour point commun l’improvisation.

Explorer l’expression vocale et corporelle, développer la prise de parole en public, cultiver l’imaginaire, stimuler l’écoute, l’attention et la concentration.

Au programme :

Exercices individuels et en groupe. Explorer et jouer avec ses émotions. Apprendre à se mettre au service d’une pièce de théâtre, avoir la responsabilité d’un rôle et en comprendre les enjeux.

Dans une ambiance bienveillante et amusante!

Name: Two Sisters Productions
Description: Two Sisters Productions was created in honor of the Two Greek Sisters Melpomene and Thalia. Both act as the face of timeless storytelling, with Melpomene representing tragedy and Thalia representing comedy. In their shadow, Two Sisters Productions was founded to create opportunities for young adults aspiring to create comedic and heartfelt theatre alike in Los Angeles. Specializing in young perspectives, bold choices, and of course, comedy and tragedy, Two Sisters Productions offers a fresh new take on beloved classics, as well as modern hits!

Name: ACTH - Association des Compagnies théâtrales du Hainaut
Theatre Allegro
Description: Founded in 2021, Theatre Allegro's mission is, "Theatre that unites all people while supporting local artists to produce high-quality professional theatre that enriches communities and captivates audiences of all ages."

Name: Mild Peril Theatre
Description:
Our main aim at Mild Peril Theatre is to help emerging and new artists and producers to tell their stories and present their ideas to audiences. 

It's not easy getting a new idea of the ground, however brilliant it is. Sometimes you need help, or advice, or money, or to meet the right people in order to take that next step. Perhaps you just need to talk through your ideas to find somebody who might be able to point you in the right direction. Maybe you have an idea for a story you would like to present to an audience and just don't know how to proceed. You might need to find a creative adviser, a producer, or a friendly venue where you can hang out and try out some ideas. Maybe you need help with money or working out whether an idea is affordable or even possible. 

And that's where we come in. 

Mild Peril Theatre was set up to help you to get your idea off the ground. Whatever you think we might be able to help with, please get in touch. Just give us an outline of what it is you want to do and how you think we might be able to help, and we'll talk it through with you. We won't take over, we won't try to talk you out of it. There is no such thing as a bad or a stupid idea. 

We will support you however we can. Just get in touch at info@mildperiltheatre.co.uk.

Name: The Makers' Ensemble
Description: The Makers' Ensemble is a resident ensemble of multi-hyphenates. We create and cultivate Live Arts. We celebrate and value the differences in our cultural, educational, social, and identity backgrounds. We provide programming and support for emerging artists to realize their creative dreams in collaboration with the resident ensemble. It’s important to us that the rooms we create are diverse, the work that we make excites us, and the collaboration we build is balanced. We use communal live arts to inspire the next generation of artists and audiences, ignite new passions, foster new relationships, and reimagine the future of Ensemble Practice.

Description:
Gaisma is the Latvian word for light. Gaisma Theatre Group strives to offer light and support to communities through the work it produces. 

We are an inclusive, non-profit theatre company whose primary mission is to support the musical theatre writers of Seattle and the Pacific Northwest.

Name: Laia do Teatro
Description: Laia é um grupo independente nascido em 2020 com a proposta de pesquisar o teatro Latino-Americano e fazer parte dele. Formado pela atriz Aline Pimentel e pelos atores Victor Barreto e André Barreiros, a Laia vem experimentando diversas possibilidades dessa arte infinita, contando histórias para públicos de todas as idades, trajetórias e sensibilidades. Conheça nossos projetos. Apoie. Patrocine. Seja parceiro. Façamos acontecer.

Name: Top Grade Comedy Theater
Description:
Top Grade Comedy Theater is the dream of Charles Charm and Nikki Maraviglia. Our goal is to bring improv to everyone at a price that’s affordable. With over 27 years of combined improv experience, we’ve performed with Comedy Sportz, Smile and Nod at Cal Poly, and even formed our own guerilla teams.
Can’t afford the usual prices? Reach out! Improv is for everyone, and we want you to be involved!
Our Weekly Drop-in class is currently Fridays from 6-8pm!

Name: CAL: A.N.T.I Artistic Nerds 4 inclusivity
Description:
Standing for Artistic Nerds 4 Theatre Inclusivity, this theatre company aims to take specific focus on the critical discussion around identity & politics when creating performances. We encourage students of all identities, experience levels, and performance backgrounds to join!

We focus on creating collaborative performances and workshops from the experiences of individual members' identities. Although theatre is specified in the name, performances will utilize & reflect the interests of the club members, and will not be restricted to one art form. Throughout the school year, we hold events like Cabaret nights (which welcomes the whole spectrum of performing arts), film nights, experimental workshops, student-run and -performed plays/productions, and socials for artistic nerds!

Ми подорожуємо з різними виставами за для відновлення психо-емоційного стану українських дітей війни. Наша місія дарувати дитячі посмішки, щоб кожна дитина мала повноцінне дитинство

Name: Wild Tongues Productions
Description:
Summary [the initiative]~
Primarily a production company that focuses on producing, festival touring and creative direction. This international initiative operates between San Diego, New York and Melbourne, regularly traveling to Edinburgh Fringe Festival to support emerging artists and new works.

About [the director]~
Multidisciplinary artist Samantha Hafey, via "WILD TONGUES PRODUCTIONS", collaborates with local and international creatives to explore unique, creative and original works. Through her venture "WILD TONGUES" Hafey seeks to encourage collaboration in the arts, to push boundaries for artists in relation to process and she aims to keep alive the tradition of story telling and 'play', adopting the mantra "everyone has a story to tell".

Hafey has always been an ideas person, and she channels her endless imaginings into foundations for collaborative and creative investigation, so although primarily exploring live production in the form of theatre performance, music concerts and concept pieces and hybrid art,  WILD TONGUES has also collaborated on a number of artistic projects including (but not limited to): 
 
MOVEMENT MUSIC DANCE POERTY ILLUSTRATION PHOTOGRAPHY PUBLICATIONS FASHION MAKEUP/HAIR PERFORMANCE ART BURLESQUE CABARET COMEDY GALLERY CURATION PUBLISHING FILM- ZOOM-HYBRID DIRECTIONAL ACTIVITY DEVISED IMPROVISED FLOW STATE ECO FEMINIST DISCUSSION FORUM HAPPENINGS ARTS COLLECTIVE WORKSHOPS

Name: Güneş Tiyatro ve Organizasyon
Description:
Eğlencenin ve Hayal Gücünün Buluştuğu Yer! 

Çocukların gülüşü, bizim ilham kaynağımız! Güneş Tiyatro ve Organizasyon olarak, miniklerin hayal gücünü besleyen, eğlenceli ve öğretici etkinlikler sunuyoruz. Sanatın büyüsünü çocuklarla buluşturmak ve onların unutulmaz anılar biriktirmesini sağlamak için buradayız!

Sahnemizde neler mi var?

 Çocuk Tiyatroları – Renkli kostümler, eğlenceli karakterler ve büyüleyici hikâyelerle dolu bir dünya!

 Hacivat & Karagöz Etkinlikleri – Geleneksel gölge oyunları ile kahkaha ve kültürü bir araya getiriyoruz.

 Pandomim Gösterileri – Söz olmadan da her şey anlatılabilir! Jest ve mimiklerin gücüyle çocukların ilgisini çeken özel performanslar sunuyoruz.

 Sihirbaz Gösterileri – Şapkadan tavşan mı çıkar? Belki daha fazlası! Sürprizlerle dolu bir dünya keşfetmeye hazır olun.

 Şişme Oyun Parkları ve Daha Fazlası – Enerjisini atmak isteyen minikler için dopdolu bir eğlence alanı!

Güneş Tiyatro ve Organizasyon olarak, her etkinliğimizde çocukların mutluluğunu ve gelişimini ön planda tutuyoruz. Eğlenceyi sanatla harmanlayarak onların dünyasını renklendiriyoruz!

 Çünkü biz, çocukların hayal dünyasında güneş gibi parlıyoruz! 

Bize katılın, birlikte unutulmaz anılar biriktirelim!

Name: Creative Vortex Productions
Description: Founded in 2017, CVP was born as a network of artists, creating award-winning events in the realms of theatre, film and public engagement. Maintaining its original immersive and multidisciplinary style, today CVP focuses on creating a platform for underrepresented communities and Global Majority artists to come together and share their stories on 'the big stage'.

Name: MIT Wuming Theater
Description: Wuming Theater Club is a non-profit student theater organization founded in the fall of 2014 by theater enthusiasts from Harvard University and the Massachusetts Institute of Technology (MIT). Based at MIT and extending its influence throughout the Greater Boston area, the club aims to promote and share Chinese theatrical culture.

Name: Vardo Traveling Theatre Company
Description: We are a small theatre company in Sonoma County, CA, creating performances focused on feminist, liberal, & LGBTQ+ ideas. We host playwriting salons and auditioning workshops. Join our Discord or reach out for more information.

Name: Lightbulb Heart
Description: Lightbulb Heart is a production umbrella for storytime, storytelling, and collaborative, devised theatre making with an emphasis on mental health advocacy. We are committed to emotional wholeness and the dismantling of oppression through thoughtful story curation and compassionate audience engagement.

Name: Kaleidoscope Theatre - Bay County, FL
Description: Kaleidoscope is an all-volunteer, nonprofit organization dedicated to the educational aspects and presentation of live theatre for the cultural enrichment of the Bay County area.

Name: Loveland Stage Company
Description: The Loveland Stage Company is dedicated to serving our community by providing quality theater and performing arts experiences.

Name: Le Néo-Bachique
Description: Crée à l'occasion de la représentation des Bacchantes d'Euripide (2018, nous avons monté Œdipe (2020), la Cerisaie de Tchekhov (2022), Les Trois Sœurs (2023) et nous jouons depuis 2025 Sur la Grand Route d'après Tchekhov.

Name: Teatro Em Compasso
Description:
O Teatro em Compasso é um projeto de teatro musical com foco social, que utiliza o canto como eixo principal da cena. Por meio de oficinas gratuitas de técnica vocal, ritmo, interpretação e expressão corporal, o projeto oferece a crianças e jovens um espaço seguro para aprender, criar e se expressar.

A proposta é trabalhar o “compasso” não só da música, mas também da convivência, do respeito ao tempo do outro e do trabalho em grupo. Cada ensaio se torna um exercício de escuta, disciplina e sensibilidade. Ao final, os participantes apresentam um espetáculo de teatro musical aberto à comunidade, levando arte, inclusão e novas perspectivas de futuro para o palco e para a vida.

Name: Flying Dove Theatre
Description:
Flying Dove Theatre is a community theatre company based in Kent, offering opportunities to people of all ages to engage in drama and theatre classes, as well as live performances. Our mission is to empower people to find their voice and discover the power of performance. We believe that drama is a powerful tool that inspires confidence, creativity, and self-belief. Our classes are designed to provide a safe space where people can express themselves and explore their imagination.


At Flying Dove Theatre, our mission is to make the arts accessible and engaging to everyone. We believe in giving people a voice and connecting with the community through the power of theatre. We provide performance opportunities to aspiring actors and offer high-quality performances to schools and community spaces. Our aim is to create a welcoming environment where everyone can explore the world of theatre and discover their own creative potential.


Flying Dove Theatre is a place where you can let your imagination soar and ignite your creativity. At Flying Dove, we believe that the arts are more important now than ever. With social media and negative peer pressure all around the world, it’s vital that we have safe spaces for people to explore, have fun and grow. Our classes and programs are designed to do just that, and our team of experienced and passionate theatre professionals are dedicated to helping you thrive.

Name: Biscotte & Cacahuètes
Description:
Chers amis, passionnés de théâtre et de musique, nous sommes ravis de vous accueillir au sein de notre toute nouvelle association : Biscotte et Cacahuètes! 
Au cœur de notre démarche, une passion commune pour l'art sous toutes ses formes. Nous avons pour ambition de vous embarquer dans des aventures scéniques, mêlant théâtre et musique dans un tourbillon d'humour et de créativité. 
Imaginez des histoires loufoques, des personnages hauts en couleur et des chansons entraînantes se fondant harmonieusement pour vous offrir des spectacles drôles et divertissantes. Notre troupe travaille avec passion pour vous offrir des moments de détente et de rire.
Que vous soyez mélomane, amateur de comédie ou simplement curieux, nos représentations sauront vous surprendre et vous divertir. Nous croyons en la magie de l'art pour rassembler les gens, susciter des émotions et créer des souvenirs durables.

Description: The RC ACT envisions a vibrant and artistically inspired community, primed to bravely transform our world and our future together.

créée par Laurent Mourguet, offrant une expérience culturelle
riche et conviviale pour toutes les générations.

Name: Curtain Call Theatre
Description:
Curtain Call Theatre is an event venue for the performing arts located in Monte Rio. Russian River Hall is equipped to support live performances of every type. 

It is our mission and intent to:

• Make available a fully equipped theatre space for the community at large to use for a wide variety of performances and events.
• Assure a comfortable and safe place for the arts.
• Provide a building staff to support tenants in achieving their goal.

Individuals who need a stage to exercise their talents can use The HALL for their one-man/woman shows. This includes stand-up comedians, open mike talents, poetry readings, storytellers, and troubadours. 

Call now to reserve The HALL for your next Live Performance (707) 387-5072.

Name: Zarrafeh Theatre
Description:
The Zarrafe Kheimeh Shab Bazi Group began performing for children in 2015 and specializes in Iranian traditional marionettes.
With Hamidreza Zakiani, we created an independent theatre group whose target audience is children.
We have performed in kindergartens, schools, and festivals in Tehran, Tabriz, Khoy, Iranshahr, Chabahar, etc. since 2015.

Name: Jugando N Play
Description:
We are arts educators and theatre makers. We aspire to create multilingual and multicultural theatre experiences for young people that celebrate the diverse cultural and lingual communities of New York City and the United States.

Our work ranges from performing original plays to customizing arts integrated residencies.  We bring multilingual theatre programming to schools and communities in New York City.

Name: S3 Productions
Description:
S3 Productions is a Native American-owned production company based in East Idaho, specializing in delivering top-tier staging, lighting, audio, and visual solutions for concerts, events, and corporate functions. With a wealth of experience in live production, our team offers a full range of services, from modular stage rentals to large-scale concert stages like the SL320. We cater to venues and more, ensuring that every event is executed with precision and creativity.

At S3 Productions, we pride ourselves on our technical expertise and hands-on experience in staging and production management. Our founders bring over a decade of industry knowledge, having worked with high-profile clients and produced events for top artists. Our commitment is to elevate every event we touch, providing exceptional service, cutting-edge technology, and a flawless production experience.

Name: Aurway
Description: We are committed to using the arts to bring people together and facilitate meaningful dialogue on important issues facing our community. Through a variety of programs including educational workshops, public performances, and community partnerships, we offer a platform for artists and art-lovers to come together and explore innovative and unconventional approaches to art-making and performance. No matter your background or experience, we welcome you to join us in this effort to make a positive impact through the power of art.

Name: Cia Subversão
Description:
Nossa História
Fundada em 2018, a Cia Subversão nasceu do desejo de criar um teatro que desafia convenções e provoca reflexões. Somos um coletivo de artistas comprometidos com a transformação social através da arte, buscando dar voz às narrativas marginalizadas e questionar as estruturas de poder estabelecidas.

Ao longo de nossa trajetória, desenvolvemos uma linguagem cênica própria que mescla elementos do teatro físico, performance e dramaturgia contemporânea, sempre com um olhar crítico sobre a realidade brasileira.

Missão
Criar experiências teatrais transformadoras que desafiem o status quo, promovam o diálogo social e ampliem as possibilidades de expressão artística.

Visão
Ser reconhecida como uma companhia teatral de referência na criação de obras que unem excelência artística e relevância social, contribuindo para a renovação da cena teatral brasileira.

Valores
Compromisso com os direitos humanos e a justiça social
Valorização da diversidade em todas as suas formas
Experimentação artística e inovação estética
Ética nas relações de trabalho e nos processos criativos
Acessibilidade e democratização do acesso à arte

Name: Sharehouse Production Company
Description:
Sharehouse is a collective founded by NIDA alumni Caitlin Green, Victor Xu, Caleb Jamieson, and Jago Field. Like a real sharehouse, it’s built on collaboration and shared resources. Designed as a flexible home for new work, Sharehouse gives each founder a vehicle to develop and present their projects while also opening the door to other emerging artists. The driving force? A desire to platform young voices and
champion Australian stories. Sharehouse is committed to bringing diverse voices and bold, contemporary theatre to the stage.

Name: Theatreveuse
Description: Ignatius Global School Theatre Club

Name: The Unrehearsables
Description:
Ever thought you'd love to have a go at drama? 



The Unrehearsables is a drama group in West Sussex for grown-ups who want to laugh, let loose and try something new with absolutely zero pressure. Whether you’ve never stepped on a stage or you once played a tree in primary school, you’re in the right place.



 No experience needed. Seriously, none. If you’ve never done drama before, perfect.



 It’s silly: expect games, giggles and glorious nonsense.



 No line-learning, no shows, no commitment; just turn up and join in.



 Build confidence in a space that’s warm, welcoming and wonderfully unserious.



 Meet people of all ages. We’re a mixed bunch and proud of it.



 Two hours a week, locally; easy to fit in, hard to forget.



 Led by Dan who is finally putting his Performing Arts degree to good use!



So…



Want to explore or reignite your creativity?

Hoping to build confidence in a fun, low-stakes way?

Ever fancied drama but never dared?

Looking to meet new people in the area?



Then come join in with The Unrehearsables - a space where we laugh together, play together and discover what happens when we stop taking ourselves so seriously!

Name: Paillette Theater
Description: Paillette Theater stands for creativity, language, and community. We offer multilingual workshops (French, German, English) and theater experiences that connect and inspire people. For schools, we create interactive French workshops and performances that make language come alive in a playful way. Companies benefit from our creative team-building workshops, fostering team spirit and innovation. With our original productions like "Schlaflos," we create unforgettable moments for theater enthusiasts. Our goal is to actively encourage participation and establish theater as a creative space for connection, exchange, and inspiration. Creating stories together – that’s Paillette Theater!

Name: Move Until Dusk
Description: Through research and curiosity, we explore how our bodies interact with ideas of land and belonging.

Name: Grayson Zgunda
Description:
My name is Grayson Zgunda and I’m a current ball state student and DTO,
design and tech with a focus on scenic design. I grew up in the Muncie area
and both of my parents are ball state alumni. I grew up loving stories and
love the theater but prefer to work behind the scenes instead of being on
stage. I had worked on several shows for ball state university, including the
unexpected guest, The prom, and the upcoming three musketeers

Name: Young Playwrights Guide
Description: The Young Playwrights Guide is a resource designed to help young theater artists and aspiring writers learn about playwriting, devised work, and new play development. It offers tools, tips, and guidance on various aspects of crafting plays, from generating ideas and building characters to structuring a narrative, writing dialogue, and even getting produced. It often includes practical exercises and information on contests and festivals for young playwrights.

Name: Graphite + Diamond
Description: We create and tour new popular live entertainment and experiences in our mobile venue The Palace, and provide custom builds of very cool ideas.

Name: Narrow Way Stage Co.
Description:
For over a decade, Narrow Way Stage Company earned critical acclaim for their work in the San Francisco Bay Area theatre scene. Led by Chris Ginesi with co-founders Tony Ginesi and Nick Christenson, NWSC mounted over 40 productions and was known for exploring social justice topics through theatre and supporting new artists. 

As a result of their efforts, Narrow Way received numerous accolades and awards, including the Merit Award for Outstanding Cultural Contribution to the City. 

Ultimately, NWSC merged with other founding companies to form "Sonoma Arts Live", which today continues an award winning legacy of Outstanding plays and musicals.

Name: The PIPE UP Project
Description: The PIPE UP Project is a nonprofit initiative committed to fostering positive change in young people through the transformative power of improv.

Name: Zóio de Jabuticaba
Description: A Zóio de Jabuticaba negocia entre informalidade e comprometimento. Negocia entre seriedade e leveza. A Zóio de Jabuticaba é o espaço de fruição de desejos artísticos (e de mundo) de Fábio Osório Monteiro

Name: Kaleidoscope Theatre Ensemble, Inc.
Description: Kaleidoscope Theatre Ensemble (KTE), a non-profit theatre company dedicated: "To Educate and Entertain the community and particularly the children through the use of theatre and improvisation." It is the goal of Kaleidoscope Theatre Ensemble to instill positive values, nurture creativity, encourage individual expression and to provide a positive life affirming experience as an alternative to the drugs and violence faced by so many in our modern day society. He started this company to entertain and to use his creativity to help children learn about theatre and hopefully use it as an alternative to drugs and gangs. “Entertaining the World – One Play at a Time” is Glen’s Vision for KTE and beyond.

Name: Los Improtantes
Description: Conócenos!

Name: Sahne Ruhu Kadın Tiyatro Kulübü
Description:
Kadınlarla bir yola çıktık çünkü Sivas’ta hayatın kaygıları, aldığımız yaralar ve hepimizin mücadele ettiği yaşam yolculuğu içinde kadınlara nefes alabilecekleri, soluklanacakları ve kendilerini bulabilecekleri bir alan yaratmak istememizdir. Kulübümüz onlar için bir ev olsun istiyoruz; hem inançlarını koruyarak sanat yapmak isteyenler için, hem de dayanışmayı, disiplini ve birlikte zorlukların üstesinden gelmeyi öğrenerek ruhlarına iyi gelecek üretimler ortaya koymak isteyenler için.

İşte o ev bizim kulübümüzdür. Hem ruhunuza iyi gelecek hem de disiplin ve sorumluluk almayı birlikte öğreneceğimiz bir ev.


.... 

Dramadan dansa, danstan doğaçlamaya ve daha birçok farklı eğitim verdiğimiz kulübümüze sivastaki tüm kadınları bekliyoruz.

Name: The Broadway Company
Description:
At The Broadway Company, we’re equal parts showbiz sparkle and marketing muscle. Think of us as the backstage crew for your brand—working behind the curtain to make Broadway productions shine in the spotlight and at the box office. With over 40 shows under our belt across the globe, we specialize in turning creative vision into sold-out success stories.

From bold brand identities and binge-worthy content to fan-fueled social media campaigns and dynamic pricing wizardry, we bring the full toolkit to the table. Need a killer influencer strategy? A website that wows? A ticketing plan that actually makes sense? We’ve got you covered. We partner with producers, creatives, and theater lovers alike to make magic happen—on stage and off.

Rooted in the heart of New York City, we’re not just fluent in Broadway—we speak audience, too. Whether we’re designing immersive experiences, launching a new production, or plotting world domination via TikTok, we do it with style, smarts, and a whole lot of heart.

Broadway is your stage. We’re here to help you own it.

Description:
HuntArt teatr və kino prodakşın şirkətidir. Biz filmlər və teatr tamaşaları yaradır, həmçinin incəsənətin müxtəlif sahələrində fərqli layihələrə imza atırıq. Əsas fəaliyyət istiqamətimiz teatr və səhnə işləridir.

Bizim auditoriyamız incəsənəti, səhnə şoularını, teatr və kino aləmini sevən hər kəsdir.

Missiyamız – ənənəvi teatr anlayışının üzərinə yeni konsepsiyalar qurmaq, klassikanı tamamilə inkar etmək yerinə onu təməl kimi istifadə edərək izləyicilərə yeni vizual həzzlər təqdim etməkdir.

Name: Martis Theatre Company
Description:
Martis Theatre: Illuminating Paths, Inspiring Futures

At Martis Theatre, our mission is to be a beacon of creativity and opportunity, shining a vibrant light on emerging talent and fostering a transformative space within the theatre landscape.

Illuminating Paths:
We are committed to nurturing new talent, providing a platform where aspiring artists can grow, learn, and shine. Our dedication to talent development ensures that every voice is heard and every story is told with authenticity and passion.

Inspiring Futures:
Through innovation and collaboration, we strive to pioneer artistic expression, pushing the boundaries of what is possible on stage. Our commitment to excellence inspires future generations of performers and audiences alike, fostering a community where creativity thrives.

Serving the Underserved:
Martis Theatre is not just a stage; it is a sanctuary for those whose stories deserve to be told. We are dedicated to serving the underserved, providing access and opportunities to individuals and communities that have traditionally been marginalized. Our inclusive approach ensures that the theatre is a welcoming space for all.

Transformative Impact:
Our commitment extends beyond the stage, as we strive to make a transformative impact on the lives of our artists and our community. By fostering an environment where talent can flourish, we empower individuals to reach their full potential and contribute to the rich tapestry of theatrical arts.

Theater empowers us to share with each other the beautiful heart beating comedy and drama of being alive. It offers a medium for thought, emotion, and human histories exchanged in real time. 

We create original characters and stories that shine a light for all to enjoy!

Name: Coletivo NEGA
Description:
O Coletivo NEGA (Negras Experimentações Grupo de Arte) é um grupo de teatro negro de Santa Catarina. Criado há 13 anos, na Universidade do Estado de Santa Catarina (UDESC) com o objetivo de suprir a falta de oportunidade para a população preta nas artes.
Sua existência e ações extrapolam, porém, o âmbito teatral e ampliam-se na construção cultural da arte. Para realizar esta construção, as artistas do Coletivo se formam para desenvolver um diálogo íntimo com a sociedade acerca de temas de interesse da população negra do Estado.
Hoje, de forma independente, o coletivo trabalha com criação coletiva e gestão horizontal de projetos principalmente nas áreas de teatro, música e arte educação. Na promoção da igualdade racial e de gênero e descolonização de corpos pretes. Trabalho desenvolvido nos palcos e principalmente nas escolas para a população preta, periférica, quilombola, LBTQI+ e de mulheres encarceradas.

Name: Ensemble La Troupe
Description:
Transformez votre équipe grâce au théâtre, à l’écriture et à la lecture scénique !

Vous cherchez à renforcer la cohésion, améliorer la communication et favoriser le bien-être au sein de votre entreprise ? Découvrez mes ateliers innovants, animés avec passion et expertise.

Pourquoi choisir cet atelier ? 
 Cohésion d’équipe : Créez des liens authentiques et renforcez la confiance. 
 Communication : Développez l’écoute, l’expression et la clarté des messages. 
 Bien-être au travail : Réduisez le stress et stimulez la créativité.

Ma méthode :
* Improvisation pour travailler la réactivité et l’adaptation.
* Écriture collaborative pour renforcer la synergie.
* Lecture scénique pour améliorer la présence et la communication verbale.

Pour qui ?
* Équipes en quête de cohésion.
* Managers souhaitant améliorer leur leadership.
* Collaborateurs en recherche de sens et de bien-être.
* Etudiants FLE

 Un format sur mesure : 1/2 journée, 1 journée ou plusieurs sessions, en présentiel ou à distance.


 Intéressé(e) ? Contactez-moi pour un diagnostic gratuit et personnalisons ensemble un atelier adapté à vos besoins !

#TeamBuilding #Communication #BienÊtreAuTravail #ThéâtreEnEntreprise #Leadership

Name: Light Theatre Group

Many of our actors have gone on to become industry leaders, showcasing the group’s impact on the performing arts landscape far beyond our small town.

Name: LA IMPURA
Description:
LaImpura –creada por Ale Lacour y Candela Solé en el 2020– es una compañía de teatro destinada a la creación de proyectos teatrales y audiovisuales.
Nuestro objetivo es producir proyectos que cuenten historias cercanas, reales, imperfectas e incómodas, con las que el público se deje llevar en una catarsis de risa y llanto, y pueda sentirse identificado.

Nosotras tenemos grietas, y estamos rotas, y con ellas nos expresamos. Esta sensación nos recordó al arte Kintsugi, técnica japonesa que arregla fracturas de cerámica con barniz de polvos de oro, nos gustó la metáfora y nos la hemos apropiado, como quien dice... ya que, utilizamos nuestro dolor, nuestros traumas, nuestras fallas para crear historias; y arte. ¿Quién nos dijo que teníamos que ser puras? Si en la impureza se encuentra la mujer.

Ahora bien, nuestros proyectos, intentamos, que lo enmarquen el humor. No concebimos otra forma de expresión que hablar de temas serios envueltos en el sarcasmo y la ironía. Deseamos que el público sepa ver en nuestra impureza: la originalidad y la belleza. También concebimos el arte como un eterno aprendizaje e investigación en nuevas formas de hacer y de formular.

Name: Momentos Mágicos Teatro
Description:
Compañía de teatro Sensorial. Espectáculos llenos de estímulos sensoriales, mágia, música e histórias que atrapan a los bebés y sus acompañantes. 
Creación y producción de espectáculos escolares para infantil y primaria Todos los espectáculos están supervisafos po una psicopedagoga.

Name: Calvary Players
Description:
Calvary Players was started in 1996 as a ministry of Calvary Chapel of Olympia. 

Since then we have performed sketches and plays on our stage at Calvary Chapel at regular church services and special events.  We also perform 3 full-length plays per year which we have presented at many different venues including downtown Olympia’s Sylvester Park, Harlequin Theater, Evergreen College and the Washington Center for the Performing Arts; as well as other area churches.
