Name: THEATER am TRAUMsee
Description: Theater am Traumsee ist ein Verein zur Förderung von Kunst und Kultur am Traunsee. Wir bieten Theaterworkshops für Kinder & Jugendliche.

Name: Theatre Outré
Description:
Theatre Outré is unusual and unexpected, startling and subversive, bizarre and bold,
extravagant and evocative. Theatre Outré creates, produces, and presents theatre that
is queer in either form or subject, an alternative to what is offered in the mainstream. We strive to entertain and provoke audiences with a combination of new works or
reimagining classical canonical plays through an Outré lens.
 
Our programming and operations are motivated by the following guiding principles: We provide an uncensored, uplifting, and uncompromising voice to those in our community who are often considered to exist beyond the fringes of social propriety, sexual norms and gendered expectations.
 
Our goal is to make a concerted effort to employ Queer (2SLGBTQIA+) artists, artists

who choose to live, work or study in the Lethbridge area, and Albertan artists. We strive to make our work and the artists we hire known to communities outside of Lethbridge through tours and other forms of inter-community outreach.

Name: MadFox Theatre
Description: Operating out of beautiful Kelowna, British Columbia in the Okanagan Valley, MadFox Theatre was formed to bring unpredictable and unforgettable live theatre performances to the BC Interior. The MadFox team is constantly finding new ways to set the bar; from progressive spins on old classics, to exciting new Canadian works, and everything in between.

Name: Au théâtre de l'If
Description:
Créée en 2021, la compagnie Au théâtre de l’If est née d'un déménagement vers la province, l'Ariège plus exactement. Il ne s'agit pas comme pour Molière d'un exil forcé mais le hasard, la destinée, nous a conduit non loin des chemins qu'il a parcouru, entre Toulouse, Montpellier et Carcassonne.

La compagnie développe sa ligne artistique vers trois axes complémentaires : les créations, l’enseignement de l’art du comédien, et les actions culturelles.

Name: Western Playhouse
Description: Western Playhouse is a non-profit AEA theatre located in St. Joseph, Missouri whose purpose is to enhance the local and regional arts scene, engage the community with family-friendly events, and empower young theatre artists by providing them with professional applied-learning opportunities while providing an exceptional theatrical experience.

Name: Compagnie du Partage de Minuit
Description:
La compagnie du Partage de Minuit est une association créée à Olmeto, en Corse du Sud, en 2019. Formée autour des équipes artistiques du Festival de l'Olmu et de Paul Fortini, elle veut travailler à rendre accessible le théâtre sous toutes ses formes, en mettant l'accent sur la diffusion d'œuvres en plein air ou dans des lieux insolites (églises désacralisées, salles des fêtes, parkings...)

Les langues portées par la compagnie vont indéniablement dans cette direction : Handke, Genet, Kane, Racine, des auteur.ices politiques, qui parlent de révolte et de révolution.

Le soutien aux jeunes artistes est très important pour la compagnie, elle même dirigée par un artiste émergent : nous considérons que la seule manière de changer de paradigme, c'est de faire entendre de nouvelles voix, de nouvelles visions du monde, des questionnements contemporains sans cesse renouvelés.

Name: 16 Arts & Cie
Description: 16 Arts & Cie propose des ateliers et des cours de théâtre pour enfants, adolescents et adultes.

Name: Teatr u Zaliva
Description: We are an Eastern European Theater making variety of entertaining and drama productions for our russian speaking audience in Houston and beyond.

Name: Teatro Barranco
Description: El teatro es magia al alcance de tus manos. Nosotros te lo mostraremos

Name: Compagnie Möbius-Band
Description: Möbius-Band, conventionnée Région Centre-Val de Loire, est une compagnie de théâtre contemporain implantée à Tours. Elle a pour artiste associée la metteuse en scène Pauline Bourse : passionnée par la littérature et les écritures théâtrales contemporaines, curieuse des aventures collectives, elle travaille le théâtre politique. Cherchant à créer des écritures théâtrales originales pour chaque spectacle, la compagnie est pluridisciplinaire. Auteur.e.s, musicien.ne.s, chorégraphes, créateurs lumière, costumières, scénographes et, bien sûr, comédien.ne.s, collaborent ensemble aux divers projets. Son travail artistique se nourrit également de nombreuses rencontres avec les publics et les amateur.e.s.

Description:
Ancyra Tiyatro, Ankara merkezli profesyonel bir tiyatro ekibidir. Klasik ve çağdaş eserleri özgün bir bakış açısıyla sahneye taşıyarak izleyiciye nitelikli ve düşündürücü bir tiyatro deneyimi sunar. Her prodüksiyonunda metin, sahne tasarımı, müzik ve oyunculuk disiplinlerini bir bütün olarak ele alan Ancyra, sahne sanatlarının dönüştürücü gücüne inanır.

Amacımız; tiyatroyu yalnızca bir gösteri değil, toplumsal ve bireysel farkındalık yaratan bir paylaşım alanı hâline getirmektir.

Name: Off Center Theatre
Description:
About:
Founded in 1962 by Tony McGrath and Jerry Chase, Off Center Theatre has been at the forefront of New York's experimental theater scene. For over six decades, we’ve brought thought-provoking, progressive works to life, with a special focus on community engagement and innovative productions. My mother, Abigail McGrath, worked alongside my father for many years, helping to grow the theater into a space that nurtures both established and emerging artists.

Our mission: To continue the tradition of offering groundbreaking performances and creating a platform for diverse voices in the arts.

Name: Cap and Bells
Description:
Since its formation in 1898, Cap & Bells has been devoted to providing student directors, designers, actors, and stage managers with the opportunity to produce their own plays for the Williams campus and the Berkshire community. In a given school year, Cap & Bells typically puts on 6-8 productions. The shows take place all across campus, from Theatre Department spaces in the '62 Center for Theatre and Dance, to student dorms, libraries, and basements. Works performed run the gamut from Shakespeare, Stoppard, and Sondheim (Williams class of '50!) to original student-written work.

Every Cap & Bells show is produced, directed, designed, performed, and run exclusively by Williams students.

Name: Spike Tape Wesleyan
Description: Spike Tape is dedicated to serving independent student theatre at Wesleyan University by facilitating the theatre-making process while prioritizing the well-being and growth of those involved. Our vision is to be a dedicated contributor to the Wesleyan Community—an inclusive organization that produces a wide array of student-led works and collaborates with other campus organizations.

Name: Bring Your Own Theatre Productions
Description:
Bring Your Own Theatre (BYOT) Productions is Chicago's longest standing 24 hour play-based theatre company!

BYOT's monthly shows bring together writers, directors, and actors together 24 hours before the show to announce groups, and discuss consent, comfortability, and lay the ground work for the playwright to begin creating a one act play, based on a theme selected by audience votes from the previous show. The next morning and afternoon are dedicated to rehearsals and tech before bring all plays together for one punk-rock night of theatre!

BYOT originally began as a senior thesis to create short original theatre in a short period of time, the original "venues" being the living rooms of our earliest members, going as far back early 2014. Over the years, a grassroots following took hold, with BYOT playing site specific spaces ranging from Kimball Manor, HQ, and The Globe Pub, to hair salons and our own backyards before taking up residence in theater venues throughout Chicago.

In addition to our monthly shows, we do cabarets and script pubs, and BYOT has adapted two short plays from our monthly shows into full length productions; "By Definition" by Josh Leeper, which ran at The Charnel House, and "Aces & Eights" by Ross Childs, which ran at City Lit Theater, as well as The Rover by Aphra Behn at the Prop Thtr. Inspired by this process, in 2020 BYOT began it's Workshop Reading Series as an opportunity to further develop opportunities for our company members and returning collaborators. 

Like many theatre's, BYOT became virtual in April 2020 following the spread of the COVID-19 pandemic, and as a result has embraced the challenges of finding new and creative ways to make theatre, ranging from Zoom plays in 24 hours, cabarets, and BYOTag, a series of solo acts based on a theme.

BYOT has since returned to in person shows, and we look forward to sharing our art with all of you!

Name: Cincinnati Black Theatre Company
Description:
CBTC was officially formed following the successful production of the Midwest Regional Black Theatre Festival in 1998 and 2000. Since gaining its 501(c)(3) non-profit status on November 20, 2001, CBTC has enlightened over one million people throughout the Tri-State region and beyond about the wealth and value found in African American theatre, culture, and history. People of all cultural, ethnic, and socio-economic backgrounds and ages are invited to participate and attend.

CBTC provides educational and artistic programming for people of all ages, with opportunities spanning theatre, media arts, and cultural enrichment. CBTC remains committed to welcoming and supporting underprivileged youth from under-served communities. It’s programs also engage a wide range of participants—children, teens, and adults—who seek meaningful experiences in performance, storytelling, and community-building.

Name: Mama Compagnie
Description:
Promouvoir et faciliter la création artistique féminine en mettant en lumière et/ou en soutenant les artistes; autrices, créatrices, chanteuses, danseuses, dessinatrices et metteuses en scène (liste non-exhaustive)

Susciter, favoriser, promouvoir, créer et diffuser toute forme de manifestation à caractère artistique et/ou culturel et/ou psychosocial qui interroge et porte un regard particulier sur la place de la femme dans la société

Développer des formes artistiques à destination des familles afin de leur faciliter l’accès à la culture

Encourager les échanges et la rencontre des artistes et du public, ainsi que des artistes entre eux

Name: Panevėžys theatre „Menas“
Description:
Established in 1991.
Founders of the theatre Julius Dautartas and Kęstutis Vaičiulis.

Since 2019 theatre has had a new direction with managing director Anupras Jucius and artistic director Monika Klimaitė-Daunienė, leading the theatre in a new, contemporary way. 

We are a municipal repertoire theatre with productions for different age groups. 

Our goal is to create a contemporary theatre, which would facilitate the ideology of a conscious 21st-century human being.

Since 2007 we organiser of the Baltic Small small stages festival (Kamerinių spektaklių festival). 

Since 2009 we facilitate an applied theatre class for teenagers. 

Theatre, drama theatre, performance, physical theatre, events and much more.

Name: Divadlo Palace
Description: Divadlo Palace je zaměřené především na komedie s kvalitním hereckým obsazením. Najdete nás přímo v centru Prahy – na Václavském náměstí v pasáži Jalta. Své působení jsme zahájili 4. dubna 2006 a od té doby přinášíme divákům zábavné, chytré a divácky oblíbené inscenace v podání předních českých herců.

Name: Compagnie Brise-fer
Description: Nous avons le plaisir de vous annoncer que notre première création, PERDRIX, est programmée au festival d’Avignon OFF 2024, du 29 juin au 21 juillet !

Name: Trip Teatro
Description:
A Trip Teatro está atuando há 30 anos. Fundada em 1989 se firmou como uma importante companhia teatral do Brasil. Apresentou-se em todas as capitais do país e em outros 14 países de 3 continentes (América do Sul, Europa e Ásia), participando de importantes eventos do gênero.
 
    Criou em 2004 o “Centro de Pesquisa e Produção de Teatro de Animação” em Rio do Sul, desenvolvendo projetos culturais como festivais, eventos de formação e outras ações que lhe renderam diversos prêmios. Atualmente é uma das gestoras do Teatro Embaixo da Ponte (Espaço Cultural Moysés Boni), espaço cênico pitoresco situado embaixo de uma ponte, no centro de Rio do Sul (SC).
 
    No ano de 2012 foi homenageada com a Medalha de Mérito Cultural Cruz e Sousa, concedida pelo Conselho Estadual de Cultura (CEC) e Governo do Estado de Santa Catarina.

Name: Mutual Friend Productions
Description: We help reach more fans & sell more seats using tech industry expertise. We produce 2-6 shows per year.

Name: Pursued By Bear
Description:
Pursued By Bear is a marketplace for theatre professionals to hire their underutilised costumes, sets, puppets & props accessible to other theatre professionals.

Founded in 2023, Pursued By Bear is the fastest growing network of creative professionals. We facilitate costume and equipment hires for producers providing an easy to search catalogue of costme from a wide variety of providers unlike the current solution of making on-site visits to providers who have limited availability. By providing access for producers to big ticket items, they can unlock creativity and support the development of shows. All while keeping storage costs down by making hiring an appealing solution unlike today's model.

Name: Van Katoen en Water
Description:
De makers van de succesvolle producties Het Verzet Kraakt en Van Katoen en Nu hebben de smaak te pakken en komen deze zomer terug met een indrukwekkend theaterspektakel op locatie. 

Van Katoen en Water neemt bezoekers op bijzondere wijze mee in de geschiedenis van 600 jaar Almelo. Honderden professionals, vrijwilligers en amateurs brengen samen iets tot stand dat nog lang zal nadreunen in de Almelose gemeenschap. 

Van Katoen en Water is een komisch en ontroerend theaterspektakel over vallen en elkaar helpen opstaan. Noaberschop rules! Van 24 augustus tot en met 11 september is dit bijzondere locatie theaterstuk te zien op het Indiëterrein in Almelo.

Name: TIC TAC - Teatro Amador de Ciências
Description: Grupo de teatro amador, pertencente à Faculdade de Ciências da Universidade do Porto desde outubro de 1994

Name: Het Portret Spreekt
Description:
De stichting ‘Het Portret Spreekt’ produceert theatervoorstellingen waarbij de (vaderlandse) historie centraal staat. Sinds de oprichting van de stichting, zo’n tien jaar geleden, is een bonte stoet aan historische personages tot leven gewekt en met veel succes ten tonele gevoerd.

De gastschrijvers en de acteurs die door de stichting worden aangezocht, staan steeds samen garant voor levendig theater met een historische basis, zonder de stoffigheid die daar vaak bij op de loer ligt. In de voorstellingen staan persoonlijke verhalen centraal, waardoor de personages tot leven komen en een hedendaagse stem krijgen.

Name: Productiehuis Plankenkoorts
Description: Productiehuis Plankenkoorts is dé broed- en toonplaats in West-Brabant van professionele podiumkunsten voor startende professionele makers. Als productiehuis willen we een ondersteuner zijn van startende professionele makers, willen we als matchmaker helpen bij het opbouwen van een relevant netwerk en willen we nieuwe generaties makers en theaterliefhebbers de noodzaak van theater laten ervaren door diverse vormen van publieksontmoeting en duurzame trajecten voor het onderwijs.

Name: Broad Theatre
Description: Broad Theatre delivers bold, innovative, and provocative theatre experiences written by and for people with marginalized genders. We partner with emerging playwrights in the Austin area to premiere new stories for a new Austin.

Name: Compagnie 22h22
Description: Les spectacles La Confiture de Coings et Plutôt Crever sont actuellement en tournée sur Paris. Toutes nos dates sont sur notre site internet.

Name: ETÚTI
Description: ETÚTI is a theatre group and a Civil Non-Profit Company based in Athens

Name: La Fabrique des petites utopies
Description:
Imaginée en 2000 par Bruno Thircuir, la Fabrique des petites utopies est une compagnie de théâtre indiscipliné qui tente de raconter le monde d’aujourd’hui de manière politico-poétique. Nos créations mélangent les arts : théâtre, cirque, marionnette, vidéo, musique, chant…

Pour nos spectacles pluridisciplinaires nous avons inventé et fabriqué un camion théâtre de 100 places et un chapiteau de 300 places…

Name: Strik!
Description:
Strik! is where the organizers find the best artists for their event.
Strik! helps the artists to find the best events for their act.

Name: Atelier Jeune Théâtre
Description: Association béthunoise de pratique théâtrale pour les jeunes âgé.e.s de 5 à 17 ans

Name: Four County Players
Description:
Four County Players is a company based out of 5256 Governor Barbour St, Barboursville, Virginia, United States. It is Central Virginia’s longest continuously operating community theater. 

Founded in 1973, the group grew out of an idea shared by Lillian Morse and Bill Thomas: “Creative arts need to be a part of the area’s rural communities.” The theater group officially started in January of 1973 when a group of ten people gathered at Morse’s home. They pooled their money for start-up costs, and when the take was tallied, the founders had $70 to launch their new enterprise. The first thing they did was set up theater workshops for children at the Gordonsville Recreational Center. This effort produced many new members and two productions: "Switched at the Crossroad" and "Noah’s Flood." 

Every year, Four County Players presents four to five Mainstage shows. These productions include at least one musical, a straight play, and a family Christmas show.

In 2009, the theater opened up a second performance space called the Cellar in the front room of the lower level. The inaugural production was Shakespeare’s "Hamlet," directed by Caitlin Lucia for Impulse Project. The Cellar continues to be a perfect venue for smaller productions, experimental works, and special events like the "Songs in the Cellar Cabaret" series.

Four County Players prides itself on producing high-quality shows that involve volunteers from the community and keep generations of audiences returning for years.

Name: Trotamundos
Description:
TROTAMUNDOS es una compañía destinada a los niños y jóvenes que lleva el teatro a todos, combinando historias con lecciones de vida. Desde una perspectiva psicológica, con los conocimientos propios que da el escenario, buscamos poner en palabras elementos que interpelan a los niños, niñas, adolescentes y jóvenes, y dar herramientas a los educadores para trabajar estas problemáticas. 

Además de las clases, llevamos la escuela al teatro y el teatro a la escuela para que todos puedan tener la experiencia de ver teatro de calidad y despertar en nuestro público ese deseo de querer participar.

Name: Metropol Theater
Description:
The Metropolitan Theater or the Theater of Tirana was established in 2008. The mission of this theater is to bring on stage the artistic values of international and national performances.



It is part of the Cultural Center of Tirana, which includes: Metropol Theater, Folklore Ensemble “Tirana”, City Band, TEN Center, cinema “Agimin” and cinema “Lapraka”. The focus of the Cultural Center is to offer the capital quality and diverse artistic experiences, creating the necessary spaces for artists of all generations, encouraging and supporting the creation, realization and interpretation of quality Albanian works.



In all its activity and activity QKT supports the values of national culture and art, as well as the best values of world culture and art, to provide education and entertainment for all strata and age groups of society.



This theater is open to new talents. Metropol Theater has 2 large halls with a capacity of 220 people, a library with foreign and Albanian books. Children’s plays are also given in this theater every weekend.

Name: The Seacoast Repertory Theatre
Description:
The Seacoast Repertory Theatre (The Rep) has been a vital part of the Portsmouth, New Hampshire arts community since 1988. Founded with the belief that theater should be bold, inclusive, and accessible to everyone, The Rep has grown from a summer stock company into a year-round, professional producing house—bringing hundreds of performances to life every season — with a mission to entertain, educate, and inspire through the power of live theater. We do this by taking artistic risks, nurturing creative voices, and ensuring that everyone—from longtime patrons to first-time performers—feels welcome and valued.
Our home is a historic theater nestled along the Piscataqua River, where we produce a full slate of musicals, plays, concerts, cabarets, new works, youth productions, and experimental offerings through our Underground Series. We strive to create work that sparks conversation, challenges expectations, and invites people of all backgrounds to see themselves reflected on stage. But what really sets Seacoast Rep apart is our commitment to being more than a theater—we’re a community hub. We believe that storytelling has the power to build empathy, ignite joy, and transform lives. Whether it’s through our education programs, pay-what-you-can performances, or our focus on
creating space for diverse stories and perspectives, we use the stage to lift up our shared humanity.

Name: Pipeline Playwrights
Description:
Pipeline Playwrights is a non-profit 501(c)(3) organization based in Northern Virginia.

The idea for Pipeline Playwrights took root in the fall of 2016 when four Northern Virginia playwrights decided they wanted to get their work in front of a wider audience. Pipeline Playwrights launched formally in February 2017, under the auspices of Thelma Theatre, and incorporated as its own non-profit in November 2019.

As a producing and writing collective, we work together to support, present, and promote the work of women playwrights. We believe theater should reflect the reality of daily life while exploring the infinite variety of our collective experiences as women. Our goal is to write and produce plays that communicate truths that bind us all together in community. In addition to three of the original co-founders, Ann Timmons, Jean Koppen, and Patricia Connelly, Pipeline Playwrights now includes Nicole Burton and Crystal Adaway.

Today we are more spread out geographically, we continue to meet together to nurture each other’s creative work, and together we produce readings of not only our new works, but works by other women playwrights.

Name: Grupo Teatral Skena
Description: Grupo Teatral dedicado a la actividad de formación y a la creación y producción de espectáculos teatrales.

Name: A Party at Anna's
Description:
A Party at Anna's is a production company that brings house-party stories to life, and facilitates interactive theater development among young artists. We seek to represent a variety of college experiences, and are committed to creating a platform for queer playwrights. 

Our stories question the nature of confrontation by welcoming you back into the emotional, horny, chaotic, loving memories of being a stupid 20 year old.  As a Party Goer, you'll meet ex-lovers, best-friends, enemies... the list goes on. The gossip you'll gather comes with great power. How each night ends is up to YOU.

Name: Circus Santelli
Description: Circus Santelli

Name: Manro Evenemten Studio Gala
Description: Geniet van een fantastisch diner in combinatie met een avondvullend programma vol showspektakel en gezelligheid. Hoogwaardig theater met Zang, Dans, Humor, Illusie, Speciale effecten, licht- en videoprojecties.

Name: The Winter Players
Description:
The Winter Players were formally established in June 2024 by LASALLE College of the Arts BA (Hons) in Acting graduate Marwyn Ho. Their main ambition is the exploration, resurrection and reinvention of classic Dramatic Literature and Forms, staging theatre classics that are not often seen on the local stage with Asian voices and sensibilities.

Their debut performance of 'Doctor Faustus' concluded in early July 2024 to a sold-out run.

Description: Das etwas andere Volkstheater

Name: Windhorst Decor & Rekwisieten
Description: stagepainting. specialisme in balletvloeren

Description: Sidekick Theatre is a company based out of 11411 Masonic Home Dr, Bloomington, Minnesota, United States.

Name: Les Noum'Balourds
Description:
Créée en 2018, l'association propose différentes activités autour du théâtre et des mots. Deux troupes de théâtre adulte, quatre cours de théâtre pour les enfants et adolescents, un atelier remue-méninges.

L'association propose, à destination des organismes à buts sociaux ou humanitaires, APE etc..., des représentations bénévoles. Pour plus d'informations n'hesitez pas a nous contacter.

Name: Proboscis Theatre Company
Description: A Chicago based theater company that celebrates human potential, defends human dignity, and magnifies voices from every corner or our human family.

Name: Les DeufoiZin
Description:
Les DeufoiZin est une association artistique basée à Fougères (35) qui propose des pièces de théâtre, courts-métrages, divertissements de rue et ateliers de théâtre.

Nous proposons des créations originales impactantes et aimons jouer avec les émotions du public !

Name: Post Mortem Players
Description: Founded in 2022, Post Mortem Players is a new theatre company that specializes in stage works of horror, the macabre, and things that go bump in the night. Representing the Concord/Charlotte, North Carolina region, each season we present three hair-raising productions: our annual "Christmas Spirits" ghost story in December, and two other classic or contemporary horror plays and musicals.

Name: De Pretentie
Description:
Wild theaterduo speelt en vertelt met veel streken en vooral véél goesting! Folie à deux: Gilles Lavent en Lisa De Lange
Eerste voorstelling: Besmeurde witte laarsjes vanaf 7 november 2025

Name: Levity Theatre, LLC
Description: We are Levity Theatre, and we exist to bring people together through laughter and hilarious, light, and original, improvisational comedy that is for all ages. We aim to excite and educate the Coeur D’Alene community about the art form of improv, and encourage people let loose and embrace their weird. Come see a show or take a class! You won’t regret it.

Name: Kresge Theatre Company
Description:
Founded in 1995 as Café Theatre, the Kresge Theatre Company has been bringing theatre to Wheaton’s campus in inventive and experimental ways for over two decades.

Since it's reimagining as KTC in December 2023, the company has become a voice for theatre students on campus and a producer of student work while building its presence as an invaluable collaborator in the community earning it an important place in Wheaton's art ecosystem.

KTC provides a training ground for theatre and theatre-interested students to pursue experiences as actors, directors, designers and technicians.  Through its Executive Board, KTC provides opportunities for the next generation of arts administrators and theatre professionals to gain first hand experience in managing the day-to-day operations of a company modeled on professional industry standards.

Name: Siitara Theatre
Description: Sitara has been offering dynamic interactive performances for families in the Middle East since 2008. Combining acting, puppetry, maskwork, music and madness, Sitara’s unique, interactive approach ensures everyone is engaged. We deliver brand messaging in a meaningful and memorable way for our corporate clients, make any event go with a bang, and offer teacher friendly school trips that entertain and educate. With shows either in English or Arabic or a mix of the two we delight children and adults alike.

Name: Compagnie Calie
Description: Cours de théâtre et Cinéma

Name: Darkplay Theatre
Description:
Darkplay Theatre is a Social Cooperative Enterprise (KOINSEP) and artistic organization with a mission to bring Greek culture with respect, creativity and imagination to new and non-traditional audiences through innovative performing arts, theatre and multimedia, encouraging, representing and recruiting performers and contributors from all communities.

AΦM: 996434860 • ΓΕΜΗ: 180898361000 • ΔΟΥ: ΚΕΦΟΔΕ ΑΤΤΙΚΗΣ
NAME: ΚΟΙΝΩΝΙΚΗ ΣΥΝΕΤΑΙΡΙΣΤΙΚΗΣ ΕΠΙΧΕΙΡΗΣΗΣ ΘΕΑΤΡΟΥ ΑΘΗΝΑΣ

Following a strict non-profit model, all funds raised from ticket sales, donations, funding and other revenue streams are committed 100% to current and future production costs (and associated admin/overheads).  No profits, surpluses or investments are shared, returned and distributed, no funders/investors receive payments of any kind (including gifts or gifts in kind), and the voluntary management board receive no salaries for their board roles. 

We are participating members of the Anna Lindh Foundation Greek Network which works to bring together people and organizations from the two sides of the Mediterranean, focusing on development through education and training.

We are also partners and share common purpose with CCIF Malta whose vision is to engage and equip Maltese communities to actively work together to free Malta of slavery and human trafficking, and to see all local and ethnic communities in Malta operate alongside each other with harmony and transparency; free of slavery and economic exploitation.

Name: Dutch Vinex Wonder Boys
Description:
Dutch Vinex Wonder Boys is een innovatief en eigentijds kunstcollectief dat zich richt op
culturele projecten waar muziek, theater en landart in verschillende combinaties
samenkomen. Opgericht in 1998 onder de naam Stichting Pompei en sinds 2012 bekend
als Dutch Vinex Wonder Boys, vertegenwoordigt het collectief de eerste generatie
Almeerders die zich inzetten voor het opbouwen van een culturele identiteit binnen hun
jonge stad Almere. Het collectief fungeert als het multidisciplinaire stadsgezelschap van
Almere en heeft als missie om hoogwaardige cultuur aan te bieden die kritisch reflecteert
op de werkelijkheid en ruimte schept voor nieuwe perspectieven. Geschiedenis en Ontstaan
Dutch Vinex Wonder Boys ontstond in een periode waarin Almere nog volop in
ontwikkeling was, een stad waar de cultuur nog ontbrak en veel ruimte was voor
experiment. Als pioniers hebben de leden van het collectief de 'Almeriaanse Droom'
omarmd: het idee om een nieuwe, onbevangen cultuur te creëren, vrij van ballast en
traditie. Deze instelling is fundamenteel voor hun artistieke visie, waarbij ze spelen met
waarheid en fictie om zo de verhalen van onze tijd te herzien en een nieuw narratief te
creëren. Als eerste generatie opgegroeid in Almere, hebben zij de schijnbare leegte van de
polder omgezet in een bron van creativiteit. Dutch Vinex Wonder Boys wil met hun werk een kritische blik werpen op de tijdgeest en de
verhalen die onze werkelijkheid vormgeven. Door te spelen met onwaarheden en het
onderzoeken van de grenzen tussen feit en fictie, nodigen ze het publiek uit om bestaande
perspectieven te heroverwegen en de wereld op een nieuwe manier te ervaren. Het
collectief ziet zichzelf als een creatieve kracht die niet alleen kunst maakt, maar ook een
nieuw verhaal creëert dat relevant is voor zowel de lokale gemeenschap als een breder
publiek.

Name: Central Coast Comedy Theater
Description:
Central Coast Comedy Theater is a improv and sketch comedy theater based in San Luis Obispo, California, United States. We do shows at various venues all around the central coast and host classes and workshops at The Bunker SLO, 810 Orcutt Rd. San Luis Obispo.

We have found that improv comedy is not only fun but also has great therapeutic and team building benefits. Our mission as a nonprofit is to share those benefits with as many people and organizations as we can.

We offer weekly classes for individuals looking to explore the benefits of improv. And we also offer team building workshops for organizations looking to enhance corporate culture, improve team communication, or if your organization just needs an injection of fun and silliness get in touch with us.

Name: Premier Acte
Description:
Comédies, jeune publics
One man shows, seuls en scène
Spectacles musicaux

Name: Stichting GAAF Muziektheater
Description:
Stichting GAAF Muziektheater creëert grensoverstijgend muziektheater dat mensen verbindt en maatschappelijke onderwerpen op een frisse manier belicht door middel van aansprekende en uitdagende muziektheaterproducties.

Over GAAF
In haar producties brengt stichting GAAF Muziektheater jong en ouder muzikaal talent, amateurs en professionals samen en creëert een uitwisseling waarbij speelplezier en kwaliteit hand in hand gaan. Zo hoopt zij bij te dragen aan het niveau van muziektheater in Nederland en een breder begrip en interesse voor muziektheater te kweken.


Ieder seizoen nieuwe projecten
Ieder seizoen produceert stichting GAAF Muziektheater een mix van educatieve projecten en commerciële producties uit het opera-, operette- en musicalrepertoire. De stichting brengt zowel nieuw als bestaand Nederlands en buitenlands repertoire en is daarbij geïnspireerd door de veelzijdigheid van het genre. Muziektheater is grenzeloos: of je nu luistert naar de rijke Off-Broadwaytraditie of de monumentale opera’s uit de Romantiek, je maakt kennis met een veelheid aan artistieke werkelijkheden, visies en keuzes. Muziektheater verbindt: niet alleen genres en disciplines, maar ook overtuigingen, denkbeelden en mensen. En muziektheater overstijgt – juist door te verbinden en te beschouwen – die gestelde waarden.

Name: Naturtheater Renningen e.V.
Description: Das Naturtheater Renningen begeistert seit 1954 jedes Jahr tausende Besucher mit seinen Theaterstücken. Gelegen zwischen Naturschutzgebieten dürfen die Zuschauer für ein paar Stunden in Welten abtauchen und die Geschichten - gespielt von Laiendarstellern genießen. Im Frühjahr verwandelt sich hierfür jährlich die große Freilichtbühne in eine Welt im Orient, einem gespenstisch schönen Anwesen oder auch in einen alten, modrigen Hafen. Betrieben von ehrenamtlichen Helfern ist das Naturtheater ein schönes Ausflugsziel in der Region und perfekt für Familien, die etwas unternehmen möchten.

Name: The Jones Classical Theatre
Description:
The Jones Classical Theatre's Mission:
- To provide affordable, quality access to theatre and theatre education
- To study, interpret, perform, preserve and teach classical, classic and classically inspired texts
- To use our artistry to not only have a tangible impact on our community itself, but to inspire our guests, artists, and audiences to do the same
- To promote critical thinking and the advancement of the theatrical medium through classic and classical texts

The Jones Classical Theatre Company supports and encourages:
- The sustainable, community-centered and ecologically ethical production of theatre
- Theatre focused on text and performances, with little regard for majestic production values or spectacle. We encourage theatre with stock production aesthetics, engaging with site-specific venues, found spaces, or partnering with schools, churches, or community spaces/theaters. Such an approach allows for budgeting to reflect the prioritization of compensating the artist more than the securing of "things", in the literal sense.
- The open, empathetic, honest, respectful discussion of sensitive topics, ideas, and themes
- The investment, promotion, and support in and of theatre/performing arts and theatre/performing artists outside of New York City and Los Angeles
- The casting, hiring, and support of theatre artists outside of New York City and Los Angeles, particularly in the Midwest and Southeast

Name: GRUPOJOGO
Description: GRUPOJOGO is a performing arts group that merges dance, theater, and visual arts to create captivating and thought-provoking performances. With an emphasis on innovation and creativity, we are dedicated to exploring new and unconventional avenues of artistic expression, pushing beyond the limits of traditional performance. We have participated in numerous national festivals, earning recognition for our unique and captivating approach to the performing arts.

Name: Impro ohne Namen
Description:
- IMPRESSUM / DATENSCHUTZERKLÄRUNG: Unsere Pflichtangaben finden Sie durch einen Klick auf den Button "Kontakt" sowie unter der URL https://impro-ohne-namen.de/pflichtangaben/  -

Aufmerksamkeit, Spontanität, Fehlertoleranz, Kreativität und Spaß am Spiel – all das umfasst Improvisation, was wir – Impro ohne Namen – zusammen so lieben. Diese Lust am Szenen- und Rollenwechsel verbindet uns und wir wollen unseren Spaß am Impro mit Interessierten, Teilnehmenden, Zuschauern und weiteren Spielern in Open Stage Veranstaltungen, Shows und Workshops teilen.

Name: The Cecil Hepworth Playhouse - Theatre for the Community
Description:
The Playhouse
The Cecil Hepworth Playhouse is a performing arts venue for hire in Walton on Thames town centre, ideal for theatre, dance, comedy and musical productions.

Facilities include a sound and lighting systems, orchestra pit, scene dock, dressing rooms, and a spacious bar area. The raked seating can be deployed for your audience, or retracted to reveal a large space for rehearsals, choirs, dance, fitness classes, quiz nights, private parties, other commercial or community events. 

There is step-free access for the audience or event attendees to the auditorium, foyer, bar and accessible WC facilities.

Donations welcome
We are a charity and we need your help to keep the Playhouse running. Please consider donating to support your local arts. 

Donations via Give A Little - Please select 'Gift Aid' when prompted.

Name: ACT ONE Theater Company
Description: The ACT ONE Theater Education Program was founded in 2022. We feature Live Theater and Camps for people of all ages. Follow our journey as we build a community around theater.

Name: Městské divadlo Žatec
Description: Kulturní akce, pravidelné divadelní představení a filmové projekce v královském městě Žatci.

Name: The Sigman Brothers
Description: We the Sigman brothers, are a theatre company that produces original musicals. Our mission is to foster an artistic environment that inspires the creation and staging of new and original theatrical works of all genres. We seek to preserve and extend the storied tradition of American theatre.

Name: QaBoom Theater
Description:
QaBoom brings the magic of puppetry and storytelling to life, sparking joy, creativity, and imagination in children aged 3-10. As a mobile puppet theater, we create unforgettable experiences at schools, events, and private parties. Our interactive shows combine vibrant storytelling, engaging puppets, and interactive activities tailored to entertain and educate young audiences. With a deep understanding of early childhood development, our performances foster emotional growth, social skills, and creativity while ensuring every child has an incredible time.

Whether it’s a school event, birthday party, or community gathering, we create a magical world of storytelling, puppetry, and fun that captivates children and leaves lasting memories.

Our talented team crafts each show to delight young audiences while nurturing their creativity, communication, and problem-solving skills. With bilingual performances in Arabic and English, QaBoom is the perfect choice for your next event.

Let us turn your venue into a stage of wonder and joy. Book us today and watch the magic unfold!
